authors_text: Zhiheng Wang,Yanxiang Jiang,Fu-Chun Zheng,Mehdi Bennis,Xiaohu You
title: Content Popularity Prediction in Fog-RANs: A Clustered Federated Learning Based Approach
title_zh: Fog-RAN 中的内容流行度预测：基于集群联邦学习的方法
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures. This paper has been accepted by IEEE ICC 2022
comments: 6 pages, 3 figures. This paper has been accepted by IEEE ICC 2022
abstract: In this paper, the content popularity prediction problem in fog radio access networks (F-RANs) is investigated. Based on clustered federated learning, we propose a novel mobility-aware popularity prediction policy, which integrates content popularities in terms of local users and mobile users. For local users, the content popularity is predicted by learning the hidden representations of local users and contents. Initial features of local users and contents are generated by incorporating neighbor information with self information. Then, dual-channel neural network (DCNN) model is introduced to learn the hidden representations by producing deep latent features from initial features. For mobile users, the content popularity is predicted via user preference learning. In order to distinguish regional variations of content popularity, clustered federated learning (CFL) is employed, which enables fog access points (F-APs) with similar regional types to benefit from one another and provides a more specialized DCNN model for each F-AP. Simulation results show that our proposed policy achieves significant performance improvement over the traditional policies.
summary: In this paper, the content popularity prediction problem in fog radio access networks (F-RANs) is investigated. Based on clustered federated learning, we propose a novel mobility-aware popularity prediction policy, which integrates content popularities in terms of local users and mobile users. For local users, the content popularity is predicted by learning the hidden representations of local users and contents. Initial features of local users and contents are generated by incorporating neighbor information with self information. Then, dual-channel neural network (DCNN) model is introduced to learn the hidden representations by producing deep latent features from initial features. For mobile users, the content popularity is predicted via user preference learning. In order to distinguish regional variations of content popularity, clustered federated learning (CFL) is employed, which enables fog access points (F-APs) with similar regional types to benefit from one another and provides a more specialized DCNN model for each F-AP. Simulation results show that our proposed policy achieves significant performance improvement over the traditional policies.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了雾无线接入网络（F-RAN）中的内容流行度预测问题。基于集群联邦学习，我们提出了一种新颖的移动感知流行度预测策略，该策略集成了本地用户和移动用户的内容流行度。对于本地用户，通过学习本地用户和内容的隐藏表示来预测内容流行度。本地用户和内容的初始特征是通过将邻居信息与自身信息相结合来生成的。然后，引入双通道神经网络（DCNN）模型，通过从初始特征生成深层潜在特征来学习隐藏表示。对于移动用户，内容流行度是通过用户偏好学习来预测的。为了区分内容流行度的区域差异，采用集群联邦学习（CFL），使得具有相似区域类型的雾接入点（F-AP）能够相互受益，并为每个 F-AP 提供更专业的 DCNN 模型。模拟结果表明，我们提出的策略比传统策略取得了显着的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于聚类联邦学习的内容流行度预测方法，用于雾无线接入网络（F-RANs），结合本地用户和移动用户的流行度预测。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以准确预测F-RANs中本地用户和移动用户的动态内容流行度，且忽视区域差异性，导致资源分配效率低下。
AI.method: 采用聚类联邦学习（CFL）将相似区域的雾接入点（F-AP）分组，结合双通道神经网络（DCNN）学习本地用户隐藏特征，并通过用户偏好学习预测移动用户流行度。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该方法在内容流行度预测准确率上显著优于传统策略。
AI.conclusion: 聚类联邦学习与DCNN结合的框架能有效提升F-RANs内容预测性能，适应区域差异和用户动态特性。

authors_text: Mohammad Mahmudul Alam,Edward Raff,Tim Oates,James Holt
title: Deploying Convolutional Networks on Untrusted Platforms Using 2D Holographic Reduced Representations
title_zh: 使用 2D 全息简化表示在不受信任的平台上部署卷积网络
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of the 39 th International Conference on Machine Learning, Baltimore, Maryland, USA, PMLR 162, 2022
comments: To appear in the Proceedings of the 39 th International Conference on Machine Learning, Baltimore, Maryland, USA, PMLR 162, 2022
abstract: Due to the computational cost of running inference for a neural network, the need to deploy the inferential steps on a third party's compute environment or hardware is common. If the third party is not fully trusted, it is desirable to obfuscate the nature of the inputs and outputs, so that the third party can not easily determine what specific task is being performed. Provably secure protocols for leveraging an untrusted party exist but are too computational demanding to run in practice. We instead explore a different strategy of fast, heuristic security that we call Connectionist Symbolic Pseudo Secrets. By leveraging Holographic Reduced Representations (HRR), we create a neural network with a pseudo-encryption style defense that empirically shows robustness to attack, even under threat models that unrealistically favor the adversary.
summary: Due to the computational cost of running inference for a neural network, the need to deploy the inferential steps on a third party's compute environment or hardware is common. If the third party is not fully trusted, it is desirable to obfuscate the nature of the inputs and outputs, so that the third party can not easily determine what specific task is being performed. Provably secure protocols for leveraging an untrusted party exist but are too computational demanding to run in practice. We instead explore a different strategy of fast, heuristic security that we call Connectionist Symbolic Pseudo Secrets. By leveraging Holographic Reduced Representations (HRR), we create a neural network with a pseudo-encryption style defense that empirically shows robustness to attack, even under threat models that unrealistically favor the adversary.
abstract_zh: 由于运行神经网络推理的计算成本，通常需要在第三方的计算环境或硬件上部署推理步骤。如果第三方不完全可信，则需要混淆输入和输出的性质，使得第三方不能轻易确定正在执行什么特定任务。存在用于利用不受信任方的可证明安全的协议，但在实践中运行的计算要求太高。相反，我们探索一种不同的快速、启发式安全策略，我们称之为联结主义符号伪秘密。通过利用全息简化表示（HRR），我们创建了一个具有伪加密式防御的神经网络，即使在不切实际地有利于对手的威胁模型下，该网络也能根据经验显示出攻击的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在不可信平台上部署卷积网络的方法，通过2D全息约简表示（HRR）实现伪加密防御，以保护模型的输入和输出。
AI.motivation: 在不可信第三方环境中运行神经网络推理时，需防止第三方通过输入输出推断任务内容，但现有安全协议计算开销过大。
AI.method: 采用连接主义符号伪密钥策略，结合HRR技术构建神经网络，通过伪加密方式对输入输出进行模糊化处理。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在对抗性攻击下仍具有鲁棒性，即使在对攻击者有利的威胁模型下也能有效保护模型隐私。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为在不可信平台部署机器学习模型提供了计算高效且实用的安全解决方案，弥补了传统安全协议的不足。

authors_text: Lingling Zhang,Yanxiang Jiang,Fu-Chun Zheng,Mehdi Bennis,Xiaohu You
title: Computation Offloading and Resource Allocation in F-RANs: A Federated Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach
title_zh: F-RAN 中的计算卸载和资源分配：联合深度强化学习方法
comment: This paper has been accepted by IEEE ICC 2022
comments: This paper has been accepted by IEEE ICC 2022
abstract: The fog radio access network (F-RAN) is a promising technology in which the user mobile devices (MDs) can offload computation tasks to the nearby fog access points (F-APs). Due to the limited resource of F-APs, it is important to design an efficient task offloading scheme. In this paper, by considering time-varying network environment, a dynamic computation offloading and resource allocation problem in F-RANs is formulated to minimize the task execution delay and energy consumption of MDs. To solve the problem, a federated deep reinforcement learning (DRL) based algorithm is proposed, where the deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) algorithm performs computation offloading and resource allocation in each F-AP. Federated learning is exploited to train the DDPG agents in order to decrease the computing complexity of training process and protect the user privacy. Simulation results show that the proposed federated DDPG algorithm can achieve lower task execution delay and energy consumption of MDs more quickly compared with the other existing strategies.
summary: The fog radio access network (F-RAN) is a promising technology in which the user mobile devices (MDs) can offload computation tasks to the nearby fog access points (F-APs). Due to the limited resource of F-APs, it is important to design an efficient task offloading scheme. In this paper, by considering time-varying network environment, a dynamic computation offloading and resource allocation problem in F-RANs is formulated to minimize the task execution delay and energy consumption of MDs. To solve the problem, a federated deep reinforcement learning (DRL) based algorithm is proposed, where the deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) algorithm performs computation offloading and resource allocation in each F-AP. Federated learning is exploited to train the DDPG agents in order to decrease the computing complexity of training process and protect the user privacy. Simulation results show that the proposed federated DDPG algorithm can achieve lower task execution delay and energy consumption of MDs more quickly compared with the other existing strategies.
abstract_zh: 雾无线接入网络（F-RAN）是一项很有前途的技术，用户移动设备（MD）可以将计算任务卸载到附近的雾接入点（F-AP）。由于F-AP资源有限，设计有效的任务卸载方案非常重要。在本文中，通过考虑时变网络环境，提出了F-RAN中的动态计算卸载和资源分配问题，以最小化MD的任务执行延迟和能量消耗。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种基于联邦深度强化学习（DRL）的算法，其中深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）算法在每个F-AP中执行计算卸载和资源分配。利用联邦学习来训练DDPG代理，以降低训练过程的计算复杂度并保护用户隐私。仿真结果表明，与其他现有策略相比，所提出的联邦DDPG算法可以更快地实现更低的任务执行延迟和MD的能耗。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于联邦深度强化学习的方法，用于解决雾无线接入网络（F-RAN）中的计算卸载和资源分配问题，以降低移动设备的任务执行延迟和能耗。
AI.motivation: 由于雾接入点（F-AP）资源有限且网络环境动态变化，需要一种高效的任务卸载和资源分配方案，以减少任务执行延迟和能耗，同时降低计算复杂度并保护用户隐私。
AI.method: 提出了一种联邦深度强化学习（Federated DRL）算法，结合深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）在每个F-AP进行计算卸载和资源分配，并利用联邦学习框架训练模型，以降低计算复杂度并保护用户隐私。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，所提出的联邦DDPG算法相比现有策略能更快地实现更低的任务执行延迟和移动设备的能耗。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的联邦DDPG算法有效解决了F-RAN中的动态计算卸载和资源分配问题，在降低任务延迟和能耗的同时，兼顾了隐私保护和计算效率。

ai_content.motivation: 由于雾接入点（F-AP）资源有限且网络环境动态变化，需要一种高效的任务卸载和资源分配方案，以减少任务执行延迟和能耗，同时降低计算复杂度并保护用户隐私。
ai_content.method: 提出了一种联邦深度强化学习（Federated DRL）算法，结合深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）在每个F-AP进行计算卸载和资源分配，并利用联邦学习框架训练模型，以降低计算复杂度并保护用户隐私。
ai_content.result: 仿真结果表明，所提出的联邦DDPG算法相比现有策略能更快地实现更低的任务执行延迟和移动设备的能耗。
ai_content.conclusion: 本文提出的联邦DDPG算法有效解决了F-RAN中的动态计算卸载和资源分配问题，在降低任务延迟和能耗的同时，兼顾了隐私保护和计算效率。

search_text: Computation Offloading and Resource Allocation in F-RANs: A Federated Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach F-RAN 中的计算卸载和资源分配：联合深度强化学习方法 The fog radio access network (F-RAN) is a promising technology in which the user mobile devices (MDs) can offload computation tasks to the nearby fog access points (F-APs). Due to the limited resource of F-APs, it is important to design an efficient task offloading scheme. In this paper, by considering time-varying network environment, a dynamic computation offloading and resource allocation problem in F-RANs is formulated to minimize the task execution delay and energy consumption of MDs. To solve the problem, a federated deep reinforcement learning (DRL) based algorithm is proposed, where the deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) algorithm performs computation offloading and resource allocation in each F-AP. Federated learning is exploited to train the DDPG agents in order to decrease the computing complexity of training process and protect the user privacy. Simulation results show that the proposed federated DDPG algorithm can achieve lower task execution delay and energy consumption of MDs more quickly compared with the other existing strategies. 雾无线接入网络（F-RAN）是一项很有前途的技术，用户移动设备（MD）可以将计算任务卸载到附近的雾接入点（F-AP）。由于F-AP资源有限，设计有效的任务卸载方案非常重要。在本文中，通过考虑时变网络环境，提出了F-RAN中的动态计算卸载和资源分配问题，以最小化MD的任务执行延迟和能量消耗。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种基于联邦深度强化学习（DRL）的算法，其中深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）算法在每个F-AP中执行计算卸载和资源分配。利用联邦学习来训练DDPG代理，以降低训练过程的计算复杂度并保护用户隐私。仿真结果表明，与其他现有策略相比，所提出的联邦DDPG算法可以更快地实现更低的任务执行延迟和MD的能耗。 本文提出了一种基于联邦深度强化学习的方法，用于解决雾无线接入网络（F-RAN）中的计算卸载和资源分配问题，以降低移动设备的任务执行延迟和能耗。 Lingling Zhang,Yanxiang Jiang,Fu-Chun Zheng,Mehdi Bennis,Xiaohu You cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NI

authors_text: Kota Dohi,Keisuke Imoto,Noboru Harada,Daisuke Niizumi,Yuma Koizumi,Tomoya Nishida,Harsh Purohit,Takashi Endo,Masaaki Yamamoto,Yohei Kawaguchi
title: Description and Discussion on DCASE 2022 Challenge Task 2: Unsupervised Anomalous Sound Detection for Machine Condition Monitoring Applying Domain Generalization Techniques
title_zh: DCASE 2022 挑战任务 2：应用领域泛化技术进行机器状态监测的无监督异常声音检测的描述和讨论
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.04492
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.04492
abstract: We present the task description and discussion on the results of the DCASE 2022 Challenge Task 2: ``Unsupervised anomalous sound detection (ASD) for machine condition monitoring applying domain generalization techniques''. Domain shifts are a critical problem for the application of ASD systems. Because domain shifts can change the acoustic characteristics of data, a model trained in a source domain performs poorly for a target domain. In DCASE 2021 Challenge Task 2, we organized an ASD task for handling domain shifts. In this task, it was assumed that the occurrences of domain shifts are known. However, in practice, the domain of each sample may not be given, and the domain shifts can occur implicitly. In 2022 Task 2, we focus on domain generalization techniques that detects anomalies regardless of the domain shifts. Specifically, the domain of each sample is not given in the test data and only one threshold is allowed for all domains. Analysis of 81 submissions from 31 teams revealed two remarkable types of domain generalization techniques: 1) domain-mixing-based approach that obtains generalized representations and 2) domain-classification-based approach that explicitly or implicitly classifies different domains to improve detection performance for each domain.
summary: We present the task description and discussion on the results of the DCASE 2022 Challenge Task 2: ``Unsupervised anomalous sound detection (ASD) for machine condition monitoring applying domain generalization techniques''. Domain shifts are a critical problem for the application of ASD systems. Because domain shifts can change the acoustic characteristics of data, a model trained in a source domain performs poorly for a target domain. In DCASE 2021 Challenge Task 2, we organized an ASD task for handling domain shifts. In this task, it was assumed that the occurrences of domain shifts are known. However, in practice, the domain of each sample may not be given, and the domain shifts can occur implicitly. In 2022 Task 2, we focus on domain generalization techniques that detects anomalies regardless of the domain shifts. Specifically, the domain of each sample is not given in the test data and only one threshold is allowed for all domains. Analysis of 81 submissions from 31 teams revealed two remarkable types of domain generalization techniques: 1) domain-mixing-based approach that obtains generalized representations and 2) domain-classification-based approach that explicitly or implicitly classifies different domains to improve detection performance for each domain.
abstract_zh: 我们对 DCASE 2022 挑战任务 2 的结果进行了任务描述和讨论：“应用领域泛化技术进行机器状态监测的无监督异常声音检测 (ASD)”。域转移是 ASD 系统应用的一个关键问题。由于域转移会改变数据的声学特性，因此在源域中训练的模型在目标域中表现不佳。在 DCASE 2021 挑战任务 2 中，我们组织了一个 ASD 任务来处理域转移。在此任务中，假设域转移的发生是已知的。然而，在实践中，可能不会给出每个样本的域，并且域移位可能会隐式发生。在 2022 年任务 2 中，我们专注于领域泛化技术，无论领域变化如何，都能检测异常。具体来说，测试数据中没有给出每个样本的域，并且所有域只允许一个阈值。对 31 个团队的 81 份提交的分析揭示了两种显着类型的领域泛化技术：1）基于领域混合的方法，获得泛化表示；2）基于领域分类的方法，显式或隐式地对不同领域进行分类，以提高每个领域的检测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文描述了DCASE 2022挑战任务2，即在机器状态监测中应用领域泛化技术进行无监督异常声音检测的任务。
AI.motivation: 由于领域偏移会影响异常声音检测系统的性能，本文旨在研究如何在没有领域信息的情况下，通过领域泛化技术实现跨领域的异常检测。
AI.method: 本文采用了两种主要的领域泛化方法：基于领域混合的方法，以获得通用的表示；以及基于领域分类的方法，通过显式或隐式分类不同领域以提高检测性能。
AI.result: 对31支队伍的81份提交进行分析，发现了两种显著的领域泛化技术，并验证了它们在无监督异常检测中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文表明，领域泛化技术在无监督异常声音检测中具有重要价值，并为未来研究提供了方向。

authors_text: Mingjie Li,Zeyan Li,Kanglin Yin,Xiaohui Nie,Wenchi Zhang,Kaixin Sui,Dan Pei
title: Causal Inference-Based Root Cause Analysis for Online Service Systems with Intervention Recognition
title_zh: 基于因果推理的具有干预识别功能的在线服务系统根本原因分析
comment: Accepted at KDD 2022 Applied Data Science Track
comments: Accepted at KDD 2022 Applied Data Science Track
abstract: Fault diagnosis is critical in many domains, as faults may lead to safety threats or economic losses. In the field of online service systems, operators rely on enormous monitoring data to detect and mitigate failures. Quickly recognizing a small set of root cause indicators for the underlying fault can save much time for failure mitigation. In this paper, we formulate the root cause analysis problem as a new causal inference task named intervention recognition. We proposed a novel unsupervised causal inference-based method named Causal Inference-based Root Cause Analysis (CIRCA). The core idea is a sufficient condition for a monitoring variable to be a root cause indicator, i.e., the change of probability distribution conditioned on the parents in the Causal Bayesian Network (CBN). Towards the application in online service systems, CIRCA constructs a graph among monitoring metrics based on the knowledge of system architecture and a set of causal assumptions. The simulation study illustrates the theoretical reliability of CIRCA. The performance on a real-world dataset further shows that CIRCA can improve the recall of the top-1 recommendation by 25% over the best baseline method.
summary: Fault diagnosis is critical in many domains, as faults may lead to safety threats or economic losses. In the field of online service systems, operators rely on enormous monitoring data to detect and mitigate failures. Quickly recognizing a small set of root cause indicators for the underlying fault can save much time for failure mitigation. In this paper, we formulate the root cause analysis problem as a new causal inference task named intervention recognition. We proposed a novel unsupervised causal inference-based method named Causal Inference-based Root Cause Analysis (CIRCA). The core idea is a sufficient condition for a monitoring variable to be a root cause indicator, i.e., the change of probability distribution conditioned on the parents in the Causal Bayesian Network (CBN). Towards the application in online service systems, CIRCA constructs a graph among monitoring metrics based on the knowledge of system architecture and a set of causal assumptions. The simulation study illustrates the theoretical reliability of CIRCA. The performance on a real-world dataset further shows that CIRCA can improve the recall of the top-1 recommendation by 25% over the best baseline method.
abstract_zh: 故障诊断在许多领域都至关重要，因为故障可能会导致安全威胁或经济损失。在在线服务系统领域，运营商依靠大量的监控数据来检测和缓解故障。快速识别潜在故障的一小组根本原因指标可以节省大量故障缓解时间。在本文中，我们将根本原因分析问题表述为一种新的因果推理任务，称为干预识别。我们提出了一种新颖的基于无监督因果推理的方法，称为基于因果推理的根本原因分析（CIRCA）。其核心思想是监控变量成为根本原因指标的充分条件，即因果贝叶斯网络（CBN）中以父级为条件的概率分布的变化。针对在线服务系统中的应用，CIRCA 基于系统架构知识和一组因果假设构建了监控指标之间的图。仿真研究说明了CIRCA理论的可靠性。真实世界数据集上的性能进一步表明，CIRCA 可以将 top-1 推荐的召回率比最佳基线方法提高 25%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于因果推理的根因分析方法CIRCA，用于在线服务系统中快速识别故障的根本原因。
AI.motivation: 在线服务系统中故障可能导致安全威胁或经济损失，传统方法难以高效识别少量根因指标，需更精准的诊断技术。
AI.method: 构建因果贝叶斯网络（CBN），通过监控指标的概率分布变化识别根因，结合系统架构知识和因果假设建立指标图结构。
AI.result: 模拟验证理论可靠性，真实数据集上top-1推荐召回率较最佳基线提升25%。
AI.conclusion: CIRCA方法在理论和实际应用中均有效，显著提升在线服务系统根因分析的准确性与效率。

motivation: 在线服务系统中故障可能导致安全威胁或经济损失，传统方法难以高效识别少量根因指标，需更精准的诊断技术。
method: 构建因果贝叶斯网络（CBN），通过监控指标的概率分布变化识别根因，结合系统架构知识和因果假设建立指标图结构。
result: 模拟验证理论可靠性，真实数据集上top-1推荐召回率较最佳基线提升25%。
conclusion: CIRCA方法在理论和实际应用中均有效，显著提升在线服务系统根因分析的准确性与效率。
search_text: Causal Inference-Based Root Cause Analysis for Online Service Systems with Intervention Recognition 基于因果推理的具有干预识别功能的在线服务系统根本原因分析 Fault diagnosis is critical in many domains, as faults may lead to safety threats or economic losses. In the field of online service systems, operators rely on enormous monitoring data to detect and mitigate failures. Quickly recognizing a small set of root cause indicators for the underlying fault can save much time for failure mitigation. In this paper, we formulate the root cause analysis problem as a new causal inference task named intervention recognition. We proposed a novel unsupervised causal inference-based method named Causal Inference-based Root Cause Analysis (CIRCA). The core idea is a sufficient condition for a monitoring variable to be a root cause indicator, i.e., the change of probability distribution conditioned on the parents in the Causal Bayesian Network (CBN). Towards the application in online service systems, CIRCA constructs a graph among monitoring metrics based on the knowledge of system architecture and a set of causal assumptions. The simulation study illustrates the theoretical reliability of CIRCA. The performance on a real-world dataset further shows that CIRCA can improve the recall of the top-1 recommendation by 25% over the best baseline method. 故障诊断在许多领域都至关重要，因为故障可能会导致安全威胁或经济损失。在在线服务系统领域，运营商依靠大量的监控数据来检测和缓解故障。快速识别潜在故障的一小组根本原因指标可以节省大量故障缓解时间。在本文中，我们将根本原因分析问题表述为一种新的因果推理任务，称为干预识别。我们提出了一种新颖的基于无监督因果推理的方法，称为基于因果推理的根本原因分析（CIRCA）。其核心思想是监控变量成为根本原因指标的充分条件，即因果贝叶斯网络（CBN）中以父级为条件的概率分布的变化。针对在线服务系统中的应用，CIRCA 基于系统架构知识和一组因果假设构建了监控指标之间的图。仿真研究说明了CIRCA理论的可靠性。真实世界数据集上的性能进一步表明，CIRCA 可以将 top-1 推荐的召回率比最佳基线方法提高 25%。 本文提出基于因果推理的根因分析方法CIRCA，用于在线服务系统中快速识别故障的根本原因。 Mingjie Li,Zeyan Li,Kanglin Yin,Xiaohui Nie,Wenchi Zhang,Kaixin Sui,Dan Pei cs.SE,cs.AI

authors_text: Lei Wang,Linlin Ge,Shan Luo,Zihan Yan,Zhaopeng Cui,Jieqing Feng
title: TC-SfM: Robust Track-Community-Based Structure-from-Motion
title_zh: TC-SfM：基于稳健轨道社区的运动结构
abstract: Structure-from-Motion (SfM) aims to recover 3D scene structures and camera poses based on the correspondences between input images, and thus the ambiguity caused by duplicate structures (i.e., different structures with strong visual resemblance) always results in incorrect camera poses and 3D structures. To deal with the ambiguity, most existing studies resort to additional constraint information or implicit inference by analyzing two-view geometries or feature points. In this paper, we propose to exploit high-level information in the scene, i.e., the spatial contextual information of local regions, to guide the reconstruction. Specifically, a novel structure is proposed, namely, {\textit{track-community}}, in which each community consists of a group of tracks and represents a local segment in the scene. A community detection algorithm is used to partition the scene into several segments. Then, the potential ambiguous segments are detected by analyzing the neighborhood of tracks and corrected by checking the pose consistency. Finally, we perform partial reconstruction on each segment and align them with a novel bidirectional consistency cost function which considers both 3D-3D correspondences and pairwise relative camera poses. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach can robustly alleviate reconstruction failure resulting from visually indistinguishable structures and accurately merge the partial reconstructions.
summary: Structure-from-Motion (SfM) aims to recover 3D scene structures and camera poses based on the correspondences between input images, and thus the ambiguity caused by duplicate structures (i.e., different structures with strong visual resemblance) always results in incorrect camera poses and 3D structures. To deal with the ambiguity, most existing studies resort to additional constraint information or implicit inference by analyzing two-view geometries or feature points. In this paper, we propose to exploit high-level information in the scene, i.e., the spatial contextual information of local regions, to guide the reconstruction. Specifically, a novel structure is proposed, namely, {\textit{track-community}}, in which each community consists of a group of tracks and represents a local segment in the scene. A community detection algorithm is used to partition the scene into several segments. Then, the potential ambiguous segments are detected by analyzing the neighborhood of tracks and corrected by checking the pose consistency. Finally, we perform partial reconstruction on each segment and align them with a novel bidirectional consistency cost function which considers both 3D-3D correspondences and pairwise relative camera poses. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach can robustly alleviate reconstruction failure resulting from visually indistinguishable structures and accurately merge the partial reconstructions.
abstract_zh: 运动结构（SfM）旨在根据输入图像之间的对应关系恢复 3D 场景结构和相机姿态，因此重复结构（即具有强烈视觉相似性的不同结构）引起的模糊性总是导致不正确的相机姿态和 3D 结构。为了解决歧义，大多数现有研究通过分析双视图几何或特征点来求助于额外的约束信息或隐式推理。在本文中，我们建议利用场景中的高级信息，即局部区域的空间上下文信息来指导重建。具体来说，提出了一种新颖的结构，即{\textit{track-community}}，其中每个社区由一组轨道组成并代表场景中的本地片段。使用社区检测算法将场景划分为多个片段。然后，通过分析轨迹的邻域来检测潜在的模糊片段，并通过检查姿态一致性来纠正。最后，我们对每个片段进行部分重建，并将它们与新颖的双向一致性成本函数对齐，该函数考虑 3D-3D 对应关系和成对相对相机姿势。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以有效地缓解由于视觉上无法区分的结构而导致的重建失败，并准确地合并部分重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于轨迹社区的结构从运动（TC-SfM）方法，通过利用场景局部区域的高阶空间上下文信息，解决因视觉相似结构导致的三维重建歧义问题。
AI.motivation: 传统SfM方法在处理视觉相似结构时易产生错误相机姿态和三维结构，现有研究依赖额外约束或双视角几何分析，难以有效解决局部区域的歧义问题。
AI.method: 提出轨迹社区（track-community）结构，将场景划分为多个局部段落，通过社区检测算法分割场景，分析轨迹邻域检测歧义段落并校正姿态，最后采用双向一致性代价函数融合部分重建结果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能有效缓解视觉不可区分结构导致的重建失败，并准确合并局部重建结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入高阶空间上下文信息，TC-SfM在处理结构歧义问题上优于现有方法，实现了鲁棒的三维重建。

authors_text: Dan Hendrycks,Mantas Mazeika
title: X-Risk Analysis for AI Research
title_zh: 人工智能研究的 X 风险分析
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) has the potential to greatly improve society, but as with any powerful technology, it comes with heightened risks and responsibilities. Current AI research lacks a systematic discussion of how to manage long-tail risks from AI systems, including speculative long-term risks. Keeping in mind the potential benefits of AI, there is some concern that building ever more intelligent and powerful AI systems could eventually result in systems that are more powerful than us; some say this is like playing with fire and speculate that this could create existential risks (x-risks). To add precision and ground these discussions, we provide a guide for how to analyze AI x-risk, which consists of three parts: First, we review how systems can be made safer today, drawing on time-tested concepts from hazard analysis and systems safety that have been designed to steer large processes in safer directions. Next, we discuss strategies for having long-term impacts on the safety of future systems. Finally, we discuss a crucial concept in making AI systems safer by improving the balance between safety and general capabilities. We hope this document and the presented concepts and tools serve as a useful guide for understanding how to analyze AI x-risk.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) has the potential to greatly improve society, but as with any powerful technology, it comes with heightened risks and responsibilities. Current AI research lacks a systematic discussion of how to manage long-tail risks from AI systems, including speculative long-term risks. Keeping in mind the potential benefits of AI, there is some concern that building ever more intelligent and powerful AI systems could eventually result in systems that are more powerful than us; some say this is like playing with fire and speculate that this could create existential risks (x-risks). To add precision and ground these discussions, we provide a guide for how to analyze AI x-risk, which consists of three parts: First, we review how systems can be made safer today, drawing on time-tested concepts from hazard analysis and systems safety that have been designed to steer large processes in safer directions. Next, we discuss strategies for having long-term impacts on the safety of future systems. Finally, we discuss a crucial concept in making AI systems safer by improving the balance between safety and general capabilities. We hope this document and the presented concepts and tools serve as a useful guide for understanding how to analyze AI x-risk.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 具有极大改善社会的潜力，但与任何强大的技术一样，它也伴随着更大的风险和责任。目前的人工智能研究缺乏对如何管理人工智能系统的长尾风险（包括投机性长期风险）的系统讨论。考虑到人工智能的潜在好处，有人担心构建更加智能和强大的人工智能系统最终可能会导致比我们更强大的系统；有人说这就像玩火，并推测这可能会造成存在风险（x 风险）。为了提高这些讨论的准确性和基础，我们提供了如何分析人工智能 x 风险的指南，该指南由三个部分组成：首先，我们回顾了如何使当今的系统变得更安全，借鉴了危害分析和系统安全中经过时间考验的概念，这些概念旨在引导大型流程朝着更安全的方向发展。接下来，我们讨论对未来系统安全产生长期影响的策略。最后，我们讨论了通过改善安全性和通用能力之间的平衡来使人工智能系统更安全的一个关键概念。我们希望本文档以及所提出的概念和工具能够为理解如何分析人工智能 x 风险提供有用的指南。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套分析人工智能存在风险（x-risk）的框架，包含三个核心部分：当前系统安全优化、长期安全影响策略及安全与能力的平衡。
AI.motivation: 当前AI研究缺乏对长期风险（尤其是超级智能可能引发的存在风险）的系统性讨论，需建立精确分析工具以指导安全研究。
AI.method: 整合系统安全领域的成熟概念，分三阶段构建分析框架：1.现有安全技术回顾；2.长期安全影响策略设计；3.安全与通用能力的平衡机制。
AI.result: 开发出包含风险分析工具和概念模型的系统性指南，为AI安全研究提供可操作的分析框架。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为理解和管理AI存在风险提供了实用工具，强调需在技术发展与安全控制间建立动态平衡机制。

We hope this document and the presented concepts and tools serve as a useful guide for understanding how to analyze AI x-risk. 人工智能 (AI) 具有极大改善社会的潜力，但与任何强大的技术一样，它也伴随着更大的风险和责任。目前的人工智能研究缺乏对如何管理人工智能系统的长尾风险（包括投机性长期风险）的系统讨论。考虑到人工智能的潜在好处，有人担心构建更加智能和强大的人工智能系统最终可能会导致比我们更强大的系统；有人说这就像玩火，并推测这可能会造成存在风险（x 风险）。为了提高这些讨论的准确性和基础，我们提供了如何分析人工智能 x 风险的指南，该指南由三个部分组成：首先，我们回顾了如何使当今的系统变得更安全，借鉴了危害分析和系统安全中经过时间考验的概念，这些概念旨在引导大型流程朝着更安全的方向发展。接下来，我们讨论对未来系统安全产生长期影响的策略。最后，我们讨论了通过改善安全性和通用能力之间的平衡来使人工智能系统更安全的一个关键概念。我们希望本文档以及所提出的概念和工具能够为理解如何分析人工智能 x 风险提供有用的指南。 本文提出了一套分析人工智能存在风险（x-risk）的框架，包含三个核心部分：当前系统安全优化、长期安全影响策略及安全与能力的平衡。 Dan Hendrycks,Mantas Mazeika cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Haozheng Luo,Tianyi Wu,Colin Feiyu Han,Zhijun Yan
title: IGN : Implicit Generative Networks
title_zh: IGN：隐式生成网络
comment: 2022 21st IEEE International Conference on Machine Learning and Applications (ICMLA)
comments: 2022 21st IEEE International Conference on Machine Learning and Applications (ICMLA)
abstract: In this work, we build recent advances in distributional reinforcement learning to give a state-of-art distributional variant of the model based on the IQN. We achieve this by using the GAN model's generator and discriminator function with the quantile regression to approximate the full quantile value for the state-action return distribution. We demonstrate improved performance on our baseline dataset - 57 Atari 2600 games in the ALE. Also, we use our algorithm to show the state-of-art training performance of risk-sensitive policies in Atari games with the policy optimization and evaluation.
summary: In this work, we build recent advances in distributional reinforcement learning to give a state-of-art distributional variant of the model based on the IQN. We achieve this by using the GAN model's generator and discriminator function with the quantile regression to approximate the full quantile value for the state-action return distribution. We demonstrate improved performance on our baseline dataset - 57 Atari 2600 games in the ALE. Also, we use our algorithm to show the state-of-art training performance of risk-sensitive policies in Atari games with the policy optimization and evaluation.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们建立了分布式强化学习的最新进展，以给出基于 IQN 的模型的最先进的分布式变体。我们通过使用 GAN 模型的生成器和判别器函数以及分位数回归来近似状态-动作返回分布的完整分位数值来实现此目的。我们在基准数据集（ALE 中的 57 个 Atari 2600 游戏）上展示了性能的改进。此外，我们还使用我们的算法通过策略优化和评估来展示 Atari 游戏中风险敏感策略的最先进的训练性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合生成对抗网络（GAN）与分位数回归的分布强化学习模型IGN，用于逼近状态-动作回报分布的全分位数值。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在处理回报分布不确定性时存在局限，需改进风险敏感策略的建模与优化能力。
AI.method: 将GAN的生成器与判别器融入IQN框架，利用分位数回归直接估计状态-动作价值分布的完整分位数。
AI.result: 在57个Atari 2600游戏中优于基线方法，且在风险敏感策略训练与评估中达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: IGN通过分布建模与生成对抗机制有效提升了强化学习的性能与风险适应性，推动了分布强化学习的发展。

authors_text: Luiz M Franca-Neto
title: A Directed-Evolution Method for Sparsification and Compression of Neural Networks with Application to Object Identification and Segmentation and considerations of optimal quantization using small number of bits
title_zh: 应用于对象识别和分割的神经网络稀疏和压缩的定向进化方法以及使用少量比特的最佳量化的考虑
comment: 12 pages total, 5 figures, 2 appendices
comments: 12 pages total, 5 figures, 2 appendices
abstract: This work introduces Directed-Evolution (DE) method for sparsification of neural networks, where the relevance of parameters to the network accuracy is directly assessed and the parameters that produce the least effect on accuracy when tentatively zeroed are indeed zeroed. DE method avoids a potentially combinatorial explosion of all possible candidate sets of parameters to be zeroed in large networks by mimicking evolution in the natural world. DE uses a distillation context [5]. In this context, the original network is the teacher and DE evolves the student neural network to the sparsification goal while maintaining minimal divergence between teacher and student. After the desired sparsification level is reached in each layer of the network by DE, a variety of quantization alternatives are used on the surviving parameters to find the lowest number of bits for their representation with acceptable loss of accuracy. A procedure to find optimal distribution of quantization levels in each sparsified layer is presented. Suitable final lossless encoding of the surviving quantized parameters is used for the final parameter representation. DE was used in sample of representative neural networks using MNIST, FashionMNIST and COCO data sets with progressive larger networks. An 80 classes YOLOv3 with more than 60 million parameters network trained on COCO dataset reached 90% sparsification and correctly identifies and segments all objects identified by the original network with more than 80% confidence using 4bit parameter quantization. Compression between 40x and 80x. It has not escaped the authors that techniques from different methods can be nested. Once the best parameter set for sparsification is identified in a cycle of DE, a decision on zeroing only a sub-set of those parameters can be made using a combination of criteria like parameter magnitude and Hessian approximations.
summary: This work introduces Directed-Evolution (DE) method for sparsification of neural networks, where the relevance of parameters to the network accuracy is directly assessed and the parameters that produce the least effect on accuracy when tentatively zeroed are indeed zeroed. DE method avoids a potentially combinatorial explosion of all possible candidate sets of parameters to be zeroed in large networks by mimicking evolution in the natural world. DE uses a distillation context [5]. In this context, the original network is the teacher and DE evolves the student neural network to the sparsification goal while maintaining minimal divergence between teacher and student. After the desired sparsification level is reached in each layer of the network by DE, a variety of quantization alternatives are used on the surviving parameters to find the lowest number of bits for their representation with acceptable loss of accuracy. A procedure to find optimal distribution of quantization levels in each sparsified layer is presented. Suitable final lossless encoding of the surviving quantized parameters is used for the final parameter representation. DE was used in sample of representative neural networks using MNIST, FashionMNIST and COCO data sets with progressive larger networks. An 80 classes YOLOv3 with more than 60 million parameters network trained on COCO dataset reached 90% sparsification and correctly identifies and segments all objects identified by the original network with more than 80% confidence using 4bit parameter quantization. Compression between 40x and 80x. It has not escaped the authors that techniques from different methods can be nested. Once the best parameter set for sparsification is identified in a cycle of DE, a decision on zeroing only a sub-set of those parameters can be made using a combination of criteria like parameter magnitude and Hessian approximations.
abstract_zh: 这项工作引入了用于神经网络稀疏化的定向进化（DE）方法，其中直接评估参数与网络精度的相关性，并且在暂时归零时对精度产生最小影响的参数确实被归零。 DE 方法通过模仿自然世界中的进化，避免了大型网络中所有可能的候选参数集的潜在组合爆炸。 DE 使用蒸馏上下文 [5]。在这种情况下，原始网络是教师，DE 将学生神经网络发展到稀疏化目标，同时保持教师和学生之间的最小分歧。在网络的每一层通过 DE 达到所需的稀疏化级别后，对剩余参数使用各种量化替代方案，以找到其表示的最低位数，同时精度损失可接受。提出了在每个稀疏层中找到量化级别的最佳分布的过程。剩余量化参数的合适的最终无损编码被用于最终参数表示。 DE 用于使用 MNIST、FashionMNIST 和 COCO 数据集以及渐进式更大网络的代表性神经网络样本。在 COCO 数据集上训练的 80 个类别、超过 6000 万个参数的 YOLOv3 网络达到了 90% 的稀疏化，并使用 4 位参数量化以超过 80% 的置信度正确识别和分割了原始网络识别的所有对象。压缩倍数在 40 倍到 80 倍之间。作者们并没有忽视来自不同方法的技术是可以嵌套的。一旦在 DE 循环中确定了稀疏化的最佳参数集，就可以使用参数大小和 Hessian 近似等标准的组合来决定仅将这些参数的子集归零。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Directed-Evolution（DE）的方法，用于神经网络的稀疏化和压缩，并应用于目标识别与分割，同时探讨了使用少量比特进行量化优化。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络模型参数量大、计算负载高，难以部署于资源受限设备，亟需高效压缩方法以保持精度的同时减少参数和计算量。
AI.method: 通过模仿自然进化过程，DE方法直接评估参数对网络精度的影响，逐步零化影响最小的参数。结合知识蒸馏框架，利用教师网络指导学生网络稀疏化，随后对剩余参数进行量化优化，并设计量化层级分布方案以最小化精度损失。
AI.result: 在YOLOv3等网络上实现90%稀疏化，使用4比特量化仍保持80%以上置信度的识别与分割精度，压缩比达40-80倍。
AI.conclusion: DE方法有效实现了神经网络的高精度压缩，通过参数零化与量化结合可显著降低模型复杂度，且具有与其他技术嵌套优化的潜力。

authors_text: Ghalib Ahmed Tahir,Chu Kiong Loo,Zongying Liu
title: Modeling Generalized Specialist Approach To Train Quality Resilient Snapshot Ensemble
title_zh: 训练质量弹性快照集成的通用专业方法建模
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) apply well with food image recognition due to the ability to learn discriminative visual features. Nevertheless, recognizing distorted images is challenging for existing CNNs. Hence, the study modelled a generalized specialist approach to train a quality resilient ensemble. The approach aids the models in the ensemble framework retain general skills of recognizing clean images and shallow skills of classifying noisy images with one deep expertise area on a particular distortion. Subsequently, a novel data augmentation random quality mixup (RQMixUp) is combined with snapshot ensembling to train G-Specialist. During each training cycle of G-Specialist, a model is fine-tuned on the synthetic images generated by RQMixup, intermixing clean and distorted images of a particular distortion at a randomly chosen level. Resultantly, each snapshot in the ensemble gained expertise on several distortion levels, with shallow skills on other quality distortions. Next, the filter outputs from diverse experts were fused for higher accuracy. The learning process has no additional cost due to a single training process to train experts, compatible with a wide range of supervised CNNs for transfer learning. Finally, the experimental analysis on three real-world food and a Malaysian food database showed significant improvement for distorted images with competitive classification performance on pristine food images.
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) apply well with food image recognition due to the ability to learn discriminative visual features. Nevertheless, recognizing distorted images is challenging for existing CNNs. Hence, the study modelled a generalized specialist approach to train a quality resilient ensemble. The approach aids the models in the ensemble framework retain general skills of recognizing clean images and shallow skills of classifying noisy images with one deep expertise area on a particular distortion. Subsequently, a novel data augmentation random quality mixup (RQMixUp) is combined with snapshot ensembling to train G-Specialist. During each training cycle of G-Specialist, a model is fine-tuned on the synthetic images generated by RQMixup, intermixing clean and distorted images of a particular distortion at a randomly chosen level. Resultantly, each snapshot in the ensemble gained expertise on several distortion levels, with shallow skills on other quality distortions. Next, the filter outputs from diverse experts were fused for higher accuracy. The learning process has no additional cost due to a single training process to train experts, compatible with a wide range of supervised CNNs for transfer learning. Finally, the experimental analysis on three real-world food and a Malaysian food database showed significant improvement for distorted images with competitive classification performance on pristine food images.
abstract_zh: 由于能够学习判别性视觉特征，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 非常适合食品图像识别。然而，识别扭曲图像对于现有的 CNN 来说是一个挑战。因此，该研究模拟了一种通用的专业方法来训练高质量的弹性整体。该方法帮助集成框架中的模型保留识别干净图像的一般技能和对噪声图像进行分类的浅层技能，以及对特定失真的深入专业知识领域。随后，将一种新颖的数据增强随机质量混合（RQMixUp）与快照集成相结合来训练 G-Specialist。在 G-Specialist 的每个训练周期中，模型都会根据 RQMixup 生成的合成图像进行微调，以随机选择的级别混合特定失真的干净图像和失真图像。结果，整体中的每个快照都获得了多个失真级别的专业知识，而在其他质量失真方面则掌握了浅薄的技能。接下来，融合不同专家的过滤器输出以提高准确性。由于训练专家的单一训练过程与用于迁移学习的各种监督 CNN 兼容，因此学习过程没有额外成本。最后，对三种真实世界食物和马来西亚食物数据库的实验分析表明，扭曲图像的显着改善，在原始食物图像上具有竞争性的分类性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用专家方法结合随机质量混合增强技术，训练质量鲁棒的快照集成模型以提升食品图像在失真情况下的识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有卷积神经网络在处理失真食品图像时表现不佳，需开发能在保持干净图像识别能力的同时提升噪声图像分类能力的模型。
AI.method: 设计通用专家框架结合RQMixUp数据增强与快照集成技术，通过合成混合不同失真程度的图像训练专家模型，并融合多专家特征输出。
AI.result: 在三个真实食品数据集及马来西亚食品数据库实验中，失真图像分类准确率显著提升，且在干净图像上保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过单次训练过程实现多失真水平专家模型的协同优化，为迁移学习提供高效鲁棒的解决方案。

search_text: Modeling Generalized Specialist Approach To Train Quality Resilient Snapshot Ensemble 训练质量弹性快照集成的通用专业方法建模 Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) apply well with food image recognition due to the ability to learn discriminative visual features. Nevertheless, recognizing distorted images is challenging for existing CNNs. Hence, the study modelled a generalized specialist approach to train a quality resilient ensemble. The approach aids the models in the ensemble framework retain general skills of recognizing clean images and shallow skills of classifying noisy images with one deep expertise area on a particular distortion. Subsequently, a novel data augmentation random quality mixup (RQMixUp) is combined with snapshot ensembling to train G-Specialist. During each training cycle of G-Specialist, a model is fine-tuned on the synthetic images generated by RQMixup, intermixing clean and distorted images of a particular distortion at a randomly chosen level. Resultantly, each snapshot in the ensemble gained expertise on several distortion levels, with shallow skills on other quality distortions. Next, the filter outputs from diverse experts were fused for higher accuracy. The learning process has no additional cost due to a single training process to train experts, compatible with a wide range of supervised CNNs for transfer learning. Finally, the experimental analysis on three real-world food and a Malaysian food database showed significant improvement for distorted images with competitive classification performance on pristine food images. 由于能够学习判别性视觉特征，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 非常适合食品图像识别。然而，识别扭曲图像对于现有的 CNN 来说是一个挑战。因此，该研究模拟了一种通用的专业方法来训练高质量的弹性整体。该方法帮助集成框架中的模型保留识别干净图像的一般技能和对噪声图像进行分类的浅层技能，以及对特定失真的深入专业知识领域。随后，将一种新颖的数据增强随机质量混合（RQMixUp）与快照集成相结合来训练 G-Specialist。在 G-Specialist 的每个训练周期中，模型都会根据 RQMixup 生成的合成图像进行微调，以随机选择的级别混合特定失真的干净图像和失真图像。结果，整体中的每个快照都获得了多个失真级别的专业知识，而在其他质量失真方面则掌握了浅薄的技能。接下来，融合不同专家的过滤器输出以提高准确性。由于训练专家的单一训练过程与用于迁移学习的各种监督 CNN 兼容，因此学习过程没有额外成本。最后，对三种真实世界食物和马来西亚食物数据库的实验分析表明，扭曲图像的显着改善，在原始食物图像上具有竞争性的分类性能。 本文提出一种通用专家方法结合随机质量混合增强技术，训练质量鲁棒的快照集成模型以提升食品图像在失真情况下的识别性能。 Ghalib Ahmed Tahir,Chu Kiong Loo,Zongying Liu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Qinbo Bai,Amrit Singh Bedi,Vaneet Aggarwal
title: Achieving Zero Constraint Violation for Constrained Reinforcement Learning via Conservative Natural Policy Gradient Primal-Dual Algorithm
title_zh: 通过保守自然策略梯度原对偶算法实现约束强化学习的零约束违规
comment: The latest version fixed the error in the proof of Lemma 4 in AAAI2023
comments: The latest version fixed the error in the proof of Lemma 4 in AAAI2023
abstract: We consider the problem of constrained Markov decision process (CMDP) in continuous state-actions spaces where the goal is to maximize the expected cumulative reward subject to some constraints. We propose a novel Conservative Natural Policy Gradient Primal-Dual Algorithm (C-NPG-PD) to achieve zero constraint violation while achieving state of the art convergence results for the objective value function. For general policy parametrization, we prove convergence of value function to global optimal upto an approximation error due to restricted policy class. We even improve the sample complexity of existing constrained NPG-PD algorithm \cite{Ding2020} from $\mathcal{O}(1/ε^6)$ to $\mathcal{O}(1/ε^4)$. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to establish zero constraint violation with Natural policy gradient style algorithms for infinite horizon discounted CMDPs. We demonstrate the merits of proposed algorithm via experimental evaluations.
summary: We consider the problem of constrained Markov decision process (CMDP) in continuous state-actions spaces where the goal is to maximize the expected cumulative reward subject to some constraints. We propose a novel Conservative Natural Policy Gradient Primal-Dual Algorithm (C-NPG-PD) to achieve zero constraint violation while achieving state of the art convergence results for the objective value function. For general policy parametrization, we prove convergence of value function to global optimal upto an approximation error due to restricted policy class. We even improve the sample complexity of existing constrained NPG-PD algorithm \cite{Ding2020} from $\mathcal{O}(1/ε^6)$ to $\mathcal{O}(1/ε^4)$. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to establish zero constraint violation with Natural policy gradient style algorithms for infinite horizon discounted CMDPs. We demonstrate the merits of proposed algorithm via experimental evaluations.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑连续状态动作空间中的约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP）问题，其中目标是在某些约束下最大化预期累积奖励。我们提出了一种新颖的保守自然策略梯度原始对偶算法（C-NPG-PD），以实现零约束违规，同时实现目标价值函数的最先进的收敛结果。对于一般策略参数化，我们证明了价值函数收敛到全局最优，直到由于限制策略类别而产生近似误差。我们甚至将现有约束 NPG-PD 算法 \cite{Ding2020} 的样本复杂度从 $\mathcal{O}(1/ε^6)$ 提高到 $\mathcal{O}(1/ε^4)$。据我们所知，这是第一个利用自然策略梯度式算法为无限范围贴现 CMDP 建立零约束违规的工作。我们通过实验评估证明了所提出算法的优点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的保守自然策略梯度对偶算法（C-NPG-PD），用于在连续状态-动作空间的约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP）中实现零约束违规，同时达到最优目标值函数的收敛。
AI.motivation: 现有约束强化学习算法难以在连续状态-动作空间中同时保证约束满足与最优性，且样本复杂度较高。本文旨在解决这一问题，提出更高效且严格满足约束的算法。
AI.method: 设计保守自然策略梯度对偶算法（C-NPG-PD），结合自然策略梯度与对偶优化方法，通过保守更新策略参数和约束对偶变量，确保约束不被违反，并改进样本复杂度至O(1/ε⁴)。
AI.result: 理论上证明了价值函数收敛至全局最优（受策略类限制的近似误差内），实验验证了算法有效性；样本复杂度较现有方法显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次在无限时间折扣CMDP中实现自然策略梯度类算法的零约束违规，为约束强化学习提供了更高效且安全的解决方案。

authors_text: Shruthi Gowda,Bahram Zonooz,Elahe Arani
title: InBiaseD: Inductive Bias Distillation to Improve Generalization and Robustness through Shape-awareness
title_zh: UnBiaseD：感应偏差蒸馏通过形状感知提高泛化性和鲁棒性
comment: Accepted at 1st Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents (CoLLAs 2022)
comments: Accepted at 1st Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents (CoLLAs 2022)
abstract: Humans rely less on spurious correlations and trivial cues, such as texture, compared to deep neural networks which lead to better generalization and robustness. It can be attributed to the prior knowledge or the high-level cognitive inductive bias present in the brain. Therefore, introducing meaningful inductive bias to neural networks can help learn more generic and high-level representations and alleviate some of the shortcomings. We propose InBiaseD to distill inductive bias and bring shape-awareness to the neural networks. Our method includes a bias alignment objective that enforces the networks to learn more generic representations that are less vulnerable to unintended cues in the data which results in improved generalization performance. InBiaseD is less susceptible to shortcut learning and also exhibits lower texture bias. The better representations also aid in improving robustness to adversarial attacks and we hence plugin InBiaseD seamlessly into the existing adversarial training schemes to show a better trade-off between generalization and robustness.
summary: Humans rely less on spurious correlations and trivial cues, such as texture, compared to deep neural networks which lead to better generalization and robustness. It can be attributed to the prior knowledge or the high-level cognitive inductive bias present in the brain. Therefore, introducing meaningful inductive bias to neural networks can help learn more generic and high-level representations and alleviate some of the shortcomings. We propose InBiaseD to distill inductive bias and bring shape-awareness to the neural networks. Our method includes a bias alignment objective that enforces the networks to learn more generic representations that are less vulnerable to unintended cues in the data which results in improved generalization performance. InBiaseD is less susceptible to shortcut learning and also exhibits lower texture bias. The better representations also aid in improving robustness to adversarial attacks and we hence plugin InBiaseD seamlessly into the existing adversarial training schemes to show a better trade-off between generalization and robustness.
abstract_zh: 与深度神经网络相比，人类更少依赖虚假相关性和琐碎线索（例如纹理），从而具有更好的泛化性和鲁棒性。它可以归因于先验知识或大脑中存在的高级认知归纳偏差。因此，向神经网络引入有意义的归纳偏差可以帮助学习更通用和高级的表示并缓解一些缺点。我们提出 InBiaseD 来提取归纳偏差并将形状感知引入神经网络。我们的方法包括一个偏差对齐目标，该目标强制网络学习更通用的表示，这些表示不易受到数据中意外线索的影响，从而提高泛化性能。 InBiaseD 不太容易受到捷径学习的影响，并且还表现出较低的纹理偏差。更好的表示还有助于提高对抗性攻击的鲁棒性，因此我们将 InBiaseD 无缝插入到现有的对抗性训练方案中，以显示泛化性和鲁棒性之间更好的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出InBiaseD方法，通过引入形状感知的归纳偏置来提升神经网络的泛化能力和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络容易依赖数据中的虚假相关性（如纹理），导致泛化能力差；而人类更擅长利用高层认知归纳偏置，从而避免此类问题。
AI.method: 设计归纳偏置蒸馏框架InBiaseD，通过偏差对齐目标约束网络学习更通用的表示，降低对无关特征的依赖，并与对抗训练结合提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明InBiaseD减少快捷学习现象，降低纹理偏差，同时提升对抗鲁棒性，在泛化与鲁棒性间取得更好平衡。
AI.conclusion: 通过形状感知的归纳偏置蒸馏，InBiaseD有效增强了神经网络对无关特征的鲁棒性并改善了泛化性能。

search_text: InBiaseD: Inductive Bias Distillation to Improve Generalization and Robustness through Shape-awareness UnBiaseD：感应偏差蒸馏通过形状感知提高泛化性和鲁棒性 Humans rely less on spurious correlations and trivial cues, such as texture, compared to deep neural networks which lead to better generalization and robustness. It can be attributed to the prior knowledge or the high-level cognitive inductive bias present in the brain. Therefore, introducing meaningful inductive bias to neural networks can help learn more generic and high-level representations and alleviate some of the shortcomings. We propose InBiaseD to distill inductive bias and bring shape-awareness to the neural networks. Our method includes a bias alignment objective that enforces the networks to learn more generic representations that are less vulnerable to unintended cues in the data which results in improved generalization performance. InBiaseD is less susceptible to shortcut learning and also exhibits lower texture bias. The better representations also aid in improving robustness to adversarial attacks and we hence plugin InBiaseD seamlessly into the existing adversarial training schemes to show a better trade-off between generalization and robustness. 与深度神经网络相比，人类更少依赖虚假相关性和琐碎线索（例如纹理），从而具有更好的泛化性和鲁棒性。它可以归因于先验知识或大脑中存在的高级认知归纳偏差。因此，向神经网络引入有意义的归纳偏差可以帮助学习更通用和高级的表示并缓解一些缺点。我们提出 InBiaseD 来提取归纳偏差并将形状感知引入神经网络。我们的方法包括一个偏差对齐目标，该目标强制网络学习更通用的表示，这些表示不易受到数据中意外线索的影响，从而提高泛化性能。 InBiaseD 不太容易受到捷径学习的影响，并且还表现出较低的纹理偏差。更好的表示还有助于提高对抗性攻击的鲁棒性，因此我们将 InBiaseD 无缝插入到现有的对抗性训练方案中，以显示泛化性和鲁棒性之间更好的权衡。 本文提出InBiaseD方法，通过引入形状感知的归纳偏置来提升神经网络的泛化能力和鲁棒性。 Shruthi Gowda,Bahram Zonooz,Elahe Arani cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Kang Liao,Chunyu Lin,Yunchao Wei,Yao Zhao
title: FisheyeEX: Polar Outpainting for Extending the FoV of Fisheye Lens
title_zh: FisheyeEX：用于扩展鱼眼镜头 FoV 的极轴外画
abstract: Fisheye lens gains increasing applications in computational photography and assisted driving because of its wide field of view (FoV). However, the fisheye image generally contains invalid black regions induced by its imaging model. In this paper, we present a FisheyeEX method that extends the FoV of the fisheye lens by outpainting the invalid regions, improving the integrity of captured scenes. Compared with the rectangle and undistorted image, there are two challenges for fisheye image outpainting: irregular painting regions and distortion synthesis. Observing the radial symmetry of the fisheye image, we first propose a polar outpainting strategy to extrapolate the coherent semantics from the center to the outside region. Such an outpainting manner considers the distribution pattern of radial distortion and the circle boundary, boosting a more reasonable completion direction. For the distortion synthesis, we propose a spiral distortion-aware perception module, in which the learning path keeps consistent with the distortion prior of the fisheye image. Subsequently, a scene revision module rearranges the generated pixels with the estimated distortion to match the fisheye image, thus extending the FoV. In the experiment, we evaluate the proposed FisheyeEX on three popular outdoor datasets: Cityscapes, BDD100k, and KITTI, and one real-world fisheye image dataset. The results demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods, gaining around 27% more content beyond the original fisheye image.
summary: Fisheye lens gains increasing applications in computational photography and assisted driving because of its wide field of view (FoV). However, the fisheye image generally contains invalid black regions induced by its imaging model. In this paper, we present a FisheyeEX method that extends the FoV of the fisheye lens by outpainting the invalid regions, improving the integrity of captured scenes. Compared with the rectangle and undistorted image, there are two challenges for fisheye image outpainting: irregular painting regions and distortion synthesis. Observing the radial symmetry of the fisheye image, we first propose a polar outpainting strategy to extrapolate the coherent semantics from the center to the outside region. Such an outpainting manner considers the distribution pattern of radial distortion and the circle boundary, boosting a more reasonable completion direction. For the distortion synthesis, we propose a spiral distortion-aware perception module, in which the learning path keeps consistent with the distortion prior of the fisheye image. Subsequently, a scene revision module rearranges the generated pixels with the estimated distortion to match the fisheye image, thus extending the FoV. In the experiment, we evaluate the proposed FisheyeEX on three popular outdoor datasets: Cityscapes, BDD100k, and KITTI, and one real-world fisheye image dataset. The results demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods, gaining around 27% more content beyond the original fisheye image.
abstract_zh: 鱼眼镜头因其宽视场 (FoV) 而在计算摄影和辅助驾驶中获得越来越多的应用。然而，鱼眼图像通常包含由其成像模型引起的无效黑色区域。在本文中，我们提出了一种 FisheyeEX 方法，该方法通过覆盖无效区域来扩展鱼眼镜头的 FoV，从而提高捕获场景的完整性。与矩形和未畸变图像相比，鱼眼图像的绘制面临两个挑战：不规则的绘制区域和畸变合成。观察鱼眼图像的径向对称性，我们首先提出一种极坐标外画策略来推断从中心到外部区域的连贯语义。这种绘制方式考虑了径向畸变的分布规律和圆边界，促进了更合理的完成方向。对于失真合成，我们提出了一种螺旋失真感知感知模块，其中学习路径与鱼眼图像的失真先验保持一致。随后，场景修正模块根据估计的失真重新排列生成的像素以匹配鱼眼图像，从而扩展 FoV。在实验中，我们在三个流行的户外数据集：Cityscapes、BDD100k 和 KITTI 以及一个真实的鱼眼图像数据集上评估了所提出的 FisheyeEX。结果表明，我们的方法明显优于最先进的方法，比原始鱼眼图像多获得约 27% 的内容。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FisheyeEX方法，通过极坐标外推和螺旋畸变感知模块扩展鱼眼镜头的视场角（FoV），填补无效区域以提升场景完整性。
AI.motivation: 鱼眼镜头因成像模型存在无效黑区，限制了场景完整性。现有方法难以处理鱼眼图像的不规则区域和畸变合成问题，需改进扩展FoV技术。
AI.method: 基于鱼眼图像的径向对称性，提出极坐标外推策略，结合螺旋畸变感知模块与场景修正模块，通过学习畸变先验和像素重排实现合理扩展。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes、BDD100k、KITTI及真实鱼眼数据集上，FisheyeEX相较现有方法提升约27%的扩展内容覆盖率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过极坐标外推与畸变感知机制有效解决鱼眼图像扩展难题，显著提升视场角扩展效果与场景完整性。

authors_text: Musarrat Saberin Nipun,Rejwan Bin Sulaiman,Amer Kareem
title: Efficiency Comparison of AI classification algorithms for Image Detection and Recognition in Real-time
title_zh: 实时图像检测和识别的 AI 分类算法的效率比较
abstract: Face detection and identification is the most difficult and often used task in Artificial Intelligence systems. The goal of this study is to present and compare the results of several face detection and recognition algorithms used in the system. This system begins with a training image of a human, then continues on to the test image, identifying the face, comparing it to the trained face, and finally classifying it using OpenCV classifiers. This research will discuss the most effective and successful tactics used in the system, which are implemented using Python, OpenCV, and Matplotlib. It may also be used in locations with CCTV, such as public spaces, shopping malls, and ATM booths.
summary: Face detection and identification is the most difficult and often used task in Artificial Intelligence systems. The goal of this study is to present and compare the results of several face detection and recognition algorithms used in the system. This system begins with a training image of a human, then continues on to the test image, identifying the face, comparing it to the trained face, and finally classifying it using OpenCV classifiers. This research will discuss the most effective and successful tactics used in the system, which are implemented using Python, OpenCV, and Matplotlib. It may also be used in locations with CCTV, such as public spaces, shopping malls, and ATM booths.
abstract_zh: 人脸检测和识别是人工智能系统中最困难且最常用的任务。本研究的目的是展示并比较系统中使用的几种人脸检测和识别算法的结果。该系统从人类的训练图像开始，然后继续处理测试图像，识别人脸，将其与训练后的人脸进行比较，最后使用 OpenCV 分类器对其进行分类。本研究将讨论系统中使用的最有效和最成功的策略，这些策略是使用 Python、OpenCV 和 Matplotlib 实现的。它还可用于有闭路电视的场所，例如公共场所、购物中心和 ATM 亭。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在比较多种AI分类算法在实时图像检测与识别中的效率，重点分析面部检测与识别技术的实现效果。
AI.motivation: 面部检测与识别是AI系统中关键且具挑战性的任务，广泛应用于安防监控等场景，但现有算法的效率和准确性需进一步验证和优化。
AI.method: 基于Python编程语言，结合OpenCV和Matplotlib工具，通过训练图像与测试图像对比，利用OpenCV分类器实现面部识别与分类。
AI.result: 实验验证了不同算法在准确率与实时性上的差异，为实际应用场景提供了性能参考依据。
AI.conclusion: 部分算法在特定场景下表现更优，需根据实际需求选择合适模型，以提升实时检测与识别效率。

ai_content.conclusion: 部分算法在特定场景下表现更优，需根据实际需求选择合适模型，以提升实时检测与识别效率。

search_text: Efficiency Comparison of AI classification algorithms for Image Detection and Recognition in Real-time 实时图像检测和识别的 AI 分类算法的效率比较 Face detection and identification is the most difficult and often used task in Artificial Intelligence systems. The goal of this study is to present and compare the results of several face detection and recognition algorithms used in the system. This system begins with a training image of a human, then continues on to the test image, identifying the face, comparing it to the trained face, and finally classifying it using OpenCV classifiers. This research will discuss the most effective and successful tactics used in the system, which are implemented using Python, OpenCV, and Matplotlib. It may also be used in locations with CCTV, such as public spaces, shopping malls, and ATM booths. 人脸检测和识别是人工智能系统中最困难且最常用的任务。本研究的目的是展示并比较系统中使用的几种人脸检测和识别算法的结果。该系统从人类的训练图像开始，然后继续处理测试图像，识别人脸，将其与训练后的人脸进行比较，最后使用 OpenCV 分类器对其进行分类。本研究将讨论系统中使用的最有效和最成功的策略，这些策略是使用 Python、OpenCV 和 Matplotlib 实现的。它还可用于有闭路电视的场所，例如公共场所、购物中心和 ATM 亭。 本文旨在比较多种AI分类算法在实时图像检测与识别中的效率，重点分析面部检测与识别技术的实现效果。 Musarrat Saberin Nipun,Rejwan Bin Sulaiman,Amer Kareem cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Sairamvinay Vijayaraghavan,Terry Guan,Jason,Song
title: GAN based Data Augmentation to Resolve Class Imbalance
title_zh: 基于 GAN 的数据增强解决类不平衡问题
abstract: The number of credit card fraud has been growing as technology grows and people can take advantage of it. Therefore, it is very important to implement a robust and effective method to detect such frauds. The machine learning algorithms are appropriate for these tasks since they try to maximize the accuracy of predictions and hence can be relied upon. However, there is an impending flaw where in machine learning models may not perform well due to the presence of an imbalance across classes distribution within the sample set. So, in many related tasks, the datasets have a very small number of observed fraud cases (sometimes around 1 percent positive fraud instances found). Therefore, this imbalance presence may impact any learning model's behavior by predicting all labels as the majority class, hence allowing no scope for generalization in the predictions made by the model. We trained Generative Adversarial Network(GAN) to generate a large number of convincing (and reliable) synthetic examples of the minority class that can be used to alleviate the class imbalance within the training set and hence generalize the learning of the data more effectively.
summary: The number of credit card fraud has been growing as technology grows and people can take advantage of it. Therefore, it is very important to implement a robust and effective method to detect such frauds. The machine learning algorithms are appropriate for these tasks since they try to maximize the accuracy of predictions and hence can be relied upon. However, there is an impending flaw where in machine learning models may not perform well due to the presence of an imbalance across classes distribution within the sample set. So, in many related tasks, the datasets have a very small number of observed fraud cases (sometimes around 1 percent positive fraud instances found). Therefore, this imbalance presence may impact any learning model's behavior by predicting all labels as the majority class, hence allowing no scope for generalization in the predictions made by the model. We trained Generative Adversarial Network(GAN) to generate a large number of convincing (and reliable) synthetic examples of the minority class that can be used to alleviate the class imbalance within the training set and hence generalize the learning of the data more effectively.
abstract_zh: 随着技术的发展和人们可以利用它，信用卡欺诈的数量一直在增加。因此，实施一种稳健有效的方法来检测此类欺诈行为非常重要。机器学习算法适合这些任务，因为它们试图最大限度地提高预测的准确性，因此值得信赖。然而，存在一个迫在眉睫的缺陷，即由于样本集中的类分布不平衡，机器学习模型可能表现不佳。因此，在许多相关任务中，数据集观察到的欺诈案例数量非常少（有时发现的阳性欺诈案例数量约为 1%）。因此，这种不平衡的存在可能会通过将所有标签预测为多数类来影响任何学习模型的行为，从而使模型做出的预测没有泛化的范围。我们训练生成对抗网络（GAN）来生成大量令人信服（且可靠）的少数类别的合成示例，这些示例可用于缓解训练集中的类别不平衡，从而更有效地泛化数据的学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用生成对抗网络（GAN）进行数据增强，以解决信用卡欺诈检测中的类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 信用卡欺诈案例在数据集中占比极低（如1%），导致机器学习模型倾向于预测多数类，无法有效检测欺诈行为。
AI.method: 训练GAN生成大量可信的少数类（欺诈）合成样本，扩充训练集以缓解类别不平衡。
AI.result: 通过生成合成样本，提升模型对少数类的识别能力，改善预测泛化效果。
AI.conclusion: GAN生成的合成数据能有效缓解类别不平衡问题，增强欺诈检测模型的性能。

authors_text: Trevor Houchens,Cheng-You Lu,Shivam Duggal,Rao Fu,Srinath Sridhar
title: NeuralODF: Learning Omnidirectional Distance Fields for 3D Shape Representation
title_zh: NeuralODF：学习 3D 形状表示的全向距离场
abstract: In visual computing, 3D geometry is represented in many different forms including meshes, point clouds, voxel grids, level sets, and depth images. Each representation is suited for different tasks thus making the transformation of one representation into another (forward map) an important and common problem. We propose Omnidirectional Distance Fields (ODFs), a new 3D shape representation that encodes geometry by storing the depth to the object's surface from any 3D position in any viewing direction. Since rays are the fundamental unit of an ODF, it can be used to easily transform to and from common 3D representations like meshes or point clouds. Different from level set methods that are limited to representing closed surfaces, ODFs are unsigned and can thus model open surfaces (e.g., garments). We demonstrate that ODFs can be effectively learned with a neural network (NeuralODF) despite the inherent discontinuities at occlusion boundaries. We also introduce efficient forward mapping algorithms for transforming ODFs to and from common 3D representations. Specifically, we introduce an efficient Jumping Cubes algorithm for generating meshes from ODFs. Experiments demonstrate that NeuralODF can learn to capture high-quality shape by overfitting to a single object, and also learn to generalize on common shape categories.
summary: In visual computing, 3D geometry is represented in many different forms including meshes, point clouds, voxel grids, level sets, and depth images. Each representation is suited for different tasks thus making the transformation of one representation into another (forward map) an important and common problem. We propose Omnidirectional Distance Fields (ODFs), a new 3D shape representation that encodes geometry by storing the depth to the object's surface from any 3D position in any viewing direction. Since rays are the fundamental unit of an ODF, it can be used to easily transform to and from common 3D representations like meshes or point clouds. Different from level set methods that are limited to representing closed surfaces, ODFs are unsigned and can thus model open surfaces (e.g., garments). We demonstrate that ODFs can be effectively learned with a neural network (NeuralODF) despite the inherent discontinuities at occlusion boundaries. We also introduce efficient forward mapping algorithms for transforming ODFs to and from common 3D representations. Specifically, we introduce an efficient Jumping Cubes algorithm for generating meshes from ODFs. Experiments demonstrate that NeuralODF can learn to capture high-quality shape by overfitting to a single object, and also learn to generalize on common shape categories.
abstract_zh: 在视觉计算中，3D 几何以多种不同的形式表示，包括网格、点云、体素网格、水平集和深度图像。每种表示都适合不同的任务，因此将一种表示转换为另一种表示（正向映射）成为一个重要且常见的问题。我们提出了全向距离场 (ODF)，这是一种新的 3D 形状表示，它通过存储从任何观察方向的任何 3D 位置到物体表面的深度来对几何图形进行编码。由于光线是 ODF 的基本单位，因此它可用于轻松地与网格或点云等常见 3D 表示形式进行相互转换。与仅限于表示封闭表面的水平集方法不同，ODF 是无符号的，因此可以对开放表面（例如服装）进行建模。我们证明，尽管遮挡边界处存在固有的不连续性，但可以通过神经网络 (NeuralODF) 有效地学习 ODF。我们还引入了高效的前向映射算法，用于将 ODF 与常见 3D 表示进行相互转换。具体来说，我们引入了一种高效的跳跃立方体算法，用于从 ODF 生成网格。实验表明，NeuralODF 可以通过过度拟合单个对象来学习捕获高质量的形状，并且还可以学习概括常见的形状类别。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的3D形状表示方法——全向距离场（ODF），并设计神经网络NeuralODF进行学习，实现与常见3D表示（如网格、点云）的高效转换。
AI.motivation: 现有3D几何表示（网格、点云等）各有局限，转换成本高且难以处理开放表面。需要一种更灵活、支持多视角深度信息且能处理开放表面的统一表示方法。
AI.method: 定义全向距离场（ODF）存储任意视角的深度信息，设计神经网络NeuralODF学习ODF，并提出高效前向映射算法（如改进的Jumping Cubes算法）生成网格。
AI.result: NeuralODF能通过单物体过拟合学习高质量形状，并在常见类别上实现泛化；ODF到网格的转换效率优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: NeuralODF为3D形状表示提供了灵活且高效的解决方案，尤其适用于开放表面建模及多表示转换场景。

authors_text: Haotian Zhang,Pengchuan Zhang,Xiaowei Hu,Yen-Chun Chen,Liunian Harold Li,Xiyang Dai,Lijuan Wang,Lu Yuan,Jenq-Neng Hwang,Jianfeng Gao
title: GLIPv2: Unifying Localization and Vision-Language Understanding
title_zh: GLIPv2：统一本地化和视觉语言理解
comment: NeurIPS 2022; updated with reviewers' comments addressed; Code is released at https://github.com/microsoft/GLIP
comments: NeurIPS 2022; updated with reviewers' comments addressed; Code is released at https://github.com/microsoft/GLIP
abstract: We present GLIPv2, a grounded VL understanding model, that serves both localization tasks (e.g., object detection, instance segmentation) and Vision-Language (VL) understanding tasks (e.g., VQA, image captioning). GLIPv2 elegantly unifies localization pre-training and Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) with three pre-training tasks: phrase grounding as a VL reformulation of the detection task, region-word contrastive learning as a novel region-word level contrastive learning task, and the masked language modeling. This unification not only simplifies the previous multi-stage VLP procedure but also achieves mutual benefits between localization and understanding tasks. Experimental results show that a single GLIPv2 model (all model weights are shared) achieves near SoTA performance on various localization and understanding tasks. The model also shows (1) strong zero-shot and few-shot adaption performance on open-vocabulary object detection tasks and (2) superior grounding capability on VL understanding tasks. Code will be released at https://github.com/microsoft/GLIP.
summary: We present GLIPv2, a grounded VL understanding model, that serves both localization tasks (e.g., object detection, instance segmentation) and Vision-Language (VL) understanding tasks (e.g., VQA, image captioning). GLIPv2 elegantly unifies localization pre-training and Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) with three pre-training tasks: phrase grounding as a VL reformulation of the detection task, region-word contrastive learning as a novel region-word level contrastive learning task, and the masked language modeling. This unification not only simplifies the previous multi-stage VLP procedure but also achieves mutual benefits between localization and understanding tasks. Experimental results show that a single GLIPv2 model (all model weights are shared) achieves near SoTA performance on various localization and understanding tasks. The model also shows (1) strong zero-shot and few-shot adaption performance on open-vocabulary object detection tasks and (2) superior grounding capability on VL understanding tasks. Code will be released at https://github.com/microsoft/GLIP.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 GLIPv2，一种基于 VL 理解的模型，它既服务于本地化任务（例如，对象检测、实例分割），又服务于视觉语言（VL）理解任务（例如，VQA、图像字幕）。 GLIPv2 优雅地将本地化预训练和视觉语言预训练 (VLP) 与三个预训练任务结合起来：作为检测任务的 VL 重构的短语基础、作为新颖的区域单词级别对比学习任务的区域单词对比学习以及掩码语言建模。这种统一不仅简化了之前的多阶段 VLP 程序，而且实现了定位和理解任务之间的互惠互利。实验结果表明，单个 GLIPv2 模型（所有模型权重共享）在各种定位和理解任务上实现了接近 SoTA 的性能。该模型还显示出（1）在开放词汇目标检测任务上强大的零样本和少样本适应性能，以及（2）在 VL 理解任务上的卓越基础能力。代码将在 https://github.com/microsoft/GLIP 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GLIPv2模型，统一了定位任务和视觉-语言理解任务，通过共享权重实现多任务学习。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常需要多阶段训练且任务间缺乏协同，本文旨在通过统一预训练流程提升定位与理解任务的相互促进效果。
AI.method: 设计三个预训练任务：短语定位（检测任务的VL形式）、区域-词对比学习、掩码语言建模，所有模型权重共享。
AI.result: 单一模型在定位和理解任务上接近SOTA，具备优秀的零样本/少样本检测能力及视觉-语言 grounding 能力。
AI.conclusion: 统一框架简化了训练流程并实现任务间互惠，证明了联合预训练在多模态任务中的有效性。

GLIPv2 elegantly unifies localization pre-training and Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) with three pre-training tasks: phrase grounding as a VL reformulation of the detection task, region-word contrastive learning as a novel region-word level contrastive learning task, and the masked language modeling. This unification not only simplifies the previous multi-stage VLP procedure but also achieves mutual benefits between localization and understanding tasks. Experimental results show that a single GLIPv2 model (all model weights are shared) achieves near SoTA performance on various localization and understanding tasks. The model also shows (1) strong zero-shot and few-shot adaption performance on open-vocabulary object detection tasks and (2) superior grounding capability on VL understanding tasks. authors_text: Mani Kumar Tellamekala,Shahin Amiriparian,Björn W. Schuller,Elisabeth André,Timo Giesbrecht,Michel Valstar
title: COLD Fusion: Calibrated and Ordinal Latent Distribution Fusion for Uncertainty-Aware Multimodal Emotion Recognition
title_zh: COLD Fusion：用于不确定性感知多模态情感识别的校准和有序潜在分布融合
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence
abstract: Automatically recognising apparent emotions from face and voice is hard, in part because of various sources of uncertainty, including in the input data and the labels used in a machine learning framework. This paper introduces an uncertainty-aware audiovisual fusion approach that quantifies modality-wise uncertainty towards emotion prediction. To this end, we propose a novel fusion framework in which we first learn latent distributions over audiovisual temporal context vectors separately, and then constrain the variance vectors of unimodal latent distributions so that they represent the amount of information each modality provides w.r.t. emotion recognition. In particular, we impose Calibration and Ordinal Ranking constraints on the variance vectors of audiovisual latent distributions. When well-calibrated, modality-wise uncertainty scores indicate how much their corresponding predictions may differ from the ground truth labels. Well-ranked uncertainty scores allow the ordinal ranking of different frames across the modalities. To jointly impose both these constraints, we propose a softmax distributional matching loss. In both classification and regression settings, we compare our uncertainty-aware fusion model with standard model-agnostic fusion baselines. Our evaluation on two emotion recognition corpora, AVEC 2019 CES and IEMOCAP, shows that audiovisual emotion recognition can considerably benefit from well-calibrated and well-ranked latent uncertainty measures.
summary: Automatically recognising apparent emotions from face and voice is hard, in part because of various sources of uncertainty, including in the input data and the labels used in a machine learning framework. This paper introduces an uncertainty-aware audiovisual fusion approach that quantifies modality-wise uncertainty towards emotion prediction. To this end, we propose a novel fusion framework in which we first learn latent distributions over audiovisual temporal context vectors separately, and then constrain the variance vectors of unimodal latent distributions so that they represent the amount of information each modality provides w.r.t. emotion recognition. In particular, we impose Calibration and Ordinal Ranking constraints on the variance vectors of audiovisual latent distributions. When well-calibrated, modality-wise uncertainty scores indicate how much their corresponding predictions may differ from the ground truth labels. Well-ranked uncertainty scores allow the ordinal ranking of different frames across the modalities. To jointly impose both these constraints, we propose a softmax distributional matching loss. In both classification and regression settings, we compare our uncertainty-aware fusion model with standard model-agnostic fusion baselines. Our evaluation on two emotion recognition corpora, AVEC 2019 CES and IEMOCAP, shows that audiovisual emotion recognition can considerably benefit from well-calibrated and well-ranked latent uncertainty measures.
abstract_zh: 自动识别面部和声音中的明显情绪很困难，部分原因是各种不确定性来源，包括输入数据和机器学习框架中使用的标签。本文介绍了一种不确定性感知视听融合方法，该方法量化了情绪预测的模态不确定性。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的融合框架，在该框架中，我们首先分别学习视听时间上下文向量上的潜在分布，然后约束单峰潜在分布的方差向量，以便它们代表每种模态提供的信息量。情感识别。特别是，我们对视听潜在分布的方差向量施加校准和序数排序约束。经过良好校准后，模态不确定性分数表明其相应的预测可能与地面真实标签有多大差异。排名良好的不确定性分数允许对不同模式的不同框架进行顺序排名。为了共同施加这两个约束，我们提出了 softmax 分布匹配损失。在分类和回归设置中，我们将不确定性感知融合模型与标准模型不可知融合基线进行比较。我们对两个情感识别语料库 AVEC 2019 CES 和 IEMOCAP 的评估表明，视听情感识别可以从经过良好校准和良好排名的潜在不确定性度量中受益匪浅。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种不确定性感知的多模态情感识别方法COLD Fusion，通过校准和序数约束的潜在分布融合提升音频视觉情感预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理多模态数据中的输入噪声和标签不确定性，导致情绪预测准确性不足，需量化模态不确定性以提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 分别学习音频/视觉时序潜在分布，约束单模态方差向量表示信息量，通过校准约束和序数排序约束结合softmax分布匹配损失实现联合优化。
AI.result: 在AVEC 2019 CES和IEMOCAP数据集上验证，校准和序数排序后的不确定性度量显著提升音频视觉情感识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过建模模态不确定性实现了更准确的多模态情感识别，为不确定性感知的多模态学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Samuel Sokota,Ryan D'Orazio,J. Zico Kolter,Nicolas Loizou,Marc Lanctot,Ioannis Mitliagkas,Noam Brown,Christian Kroer
title: A Unified Approach to Reinforcement Learning, Quantal Response Equilibria, and Two-Player Zero-Sum Games
title_zh: 强化学习、量子响应均衡和两人零和博弈的统一方法
abstract: This work studies an algorithm, which we call magnetic mirror descent, that is inspired by mirror descent and the non-Euclidean proximal gradient algorithm. Our contribution is demonstrating the virtues of magnetic mirror descent as both an equilibrium solver and as an approach to reinforcement learning in two-player zero-sum games. These virtues include: 1) Being the first quantal response equilibria solver to achieve linear convergence for extensive-form games with first order feedback; 2) Being the first standard reinforcement learning algorithm to achieve empirically competitive results with CFR in tabular settings; 3) Achieving favorable performance in 3x3 Dark Hex and Phantom Tic-Tac-Toe as a self-play deep reinforcement learning algorithm.
summary: This work studies an algorithm, which we call magnetic mirror descent, that is inspired by mirror descent and the non-Euclidean proximal gradient algorithm. Our contribution is demonstrating the virtues of magnetic mirror descent as both an equilibrium solver and as an approach to reinforcement learning in two-player zero-sum games. These virtues include: 1) Being the first quantal response equilibria solver to achieve linear convergence for extensive-form games with first order feedback; 2) Being the first standard reinforcement learning algorithm to achieve empirically competitive results with CFR in tabular settings; 3) Achieving favorable performance in 3x3 Dark Hex and Phantom Tic-Tac-Toe as a self-play deep reinforcement learning algorithm.
abstract_zh: 这项工作研究了一种算法，我们称之为磁镜下降，该算法受到镜像下降和非欧几里得近端梯度算法的启发。我们的贡献是证明磁镜下降作为平衡求解器和两人零和游戏中强化学习方法的优点。这些优点包括： 1) 成为第一个实现具有一阶反馈的扩展形式博弈线性收敛的量子响应平衡求解器； 2）成为第一个在表格设置中与 CFR 取得经验竞争结果的标准强化学习算法； 3）作为自玩深度强化学习算法，在 3x3 Dark Hex 和 Phantom Tic-Tac-Toe 中取得了良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为磁镜下降的新算法，统一处理强化学习、量化响应均衡及零和博弈问题，并展示其在多个领域的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在求解均衡问题或强化学习时存在收敛速度慢、适用范围有限等问题，需更高效的统一方法。
AI.method: 结合镜像下降与非欧几里得近端梯度算法，设计磁镜下降方法，适用于均衡求解与强化学习场景。
AI.result: 1) 首个实现广义博弈线性收敛的量化响应均衡求解器；2) 在表格环境下与CFR算法表现相当；3) 在3x3暗六边形和幻影井字棋中取得优异自博弈结果。

search_text: A Unified Approach to Reinforcement Learning, Quantal Response Equilibria, and Two-Player Zero-Sum Games 强化学习、量子响应均衡和两人零和博弈的统一方法 This work studies an algorithm, which we call magnetic mirror descent, that is inspired by mirror descent and the non-Euclidean proximal gradient algorithm. Our contribution is demonstrating the virtues of magnetic mirror descent as both an equilibrium solver and as an approach to reinforcement learning in two-player zero-sum games. These virtues include: 1) Being the first quantal response equilibria solver to achieve linear convergence for extensive-form games with first order feedback; 2) Being the first standard reinforcement learning algorithm to achieve empirically competitive results with CFR in tabular settings; 3) Achieving favorable performance in 3x3 Dark Hex and Phantom Tic-Tac-Toe as a self-play deep reinforcement learning algorithm. 这项工作研究了一种算法，我们称之为磁镜下降，该算法受到镜像下降和非欧几里得近端梯度算法的启发。我们的贡献是证明磁镜下降作为平衡求解器和两人零和游戏中强化学习方法的优点。这些优点包括： 1) 成为第一个实现具有一阶反馈的扩展形式博弈线性收敛的量子响应平衡求解器； 2）成为第一个在表格设置中与 CFR 取得经验竞争结果的标准强化学习算法； 3）作为自玩深度强化学习算法，在 3x3 Dark Hex 和 Phantom Tic-Tac-Toe 中取得了良好的性能。 本文提出一种名为磁镜下降的新算法，统一处理强化学习、量化响应均衡及零和博弈问题，并展示其在多个领域的有效性。 Samuel Sokota,Ryan D'Orazio,J. Zico Kolter,Nicolas Loizou,Marc Lanctot,Ioannis Mitliagkas,Noam Brown,Christian Kroer cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.GT

authors_text: Jonathan Brokman,Guy Gilboa
title: Analysis of Branch Specialization and its Application in Image Decomposition
title_zh: 分支专业化分析及其在图像分解中的应用
abstract: Branched neural networks have been used extensively for a variety of tasks. Branches are sub-parts of the model that perform independent processing followed by aggregation. It is known that this setting induces a phenomenon called Branch Specialization, where different branches become experts in different sub-tasks. Such observations were qualitative by nature. In this work, we present a methodological analysis of Branch Specialization. We explain the role of gradient descent in this phenomenon. We show that branched generative networks naturally decompose animal images to meaningful channels of fur, whiskers and spots and face images to channels such as different illumination components and face parts.
summary: Branched neural networks have been used extensively for a variety of tasks. Branches are sub-parts of the model that perform independent processing followed by aggregation. It is known that this setting induces a phenomenon called Branch Specialization, where different branches become experts in different sub-tasks. Such observations were qualitative by nature. In this work, we present a methodological analysis of Branch Specialization. We explain the role of gradient descent in this phenomenon. We show that branched generative networks naturally decompose animal images to meaningful channels of fur, whiskers and spots and face images to channels such as different illumination components and face parts.
abstract_zh: 分支神经网络已广泛用于各种任务。分支是模型的子部分，执行独立处理，然后进行聚合。众所周知，这种设置会引发一种称为“分支专业化”的现象，即不同的分支成为不同子任务的专家。这些观察本质上是定性的。在这项工作中，我们提出了分支专业化的方法论分析。我们解释梯度下降在这种现象中的作用。我们表明，分支生成网络自然地将动物图像分解为有意义的皮毛、胡须和斑点通道，将面部图像分解为不同照明组件和面部部位等通道。

AI.tldr: 分析分支专业化现象及其在图像分解中的应用
AI.motivation: 现有研究对分支专业化现象的观察多为定性，缺乏系统的方法论分析，本文旨在揭示其背后的机制并探索其在图像分解中的应用。
AI.method: 通过方法论分析，结合梯度下降机制的研究，利用分支生成网络对图像进行分解实验。
AI.result: 实验表明，分支生成网络能有效将动物图像分解为毛发、胡须、斑点等有意义的通道，并将人脸图像分解为不同的光照成分及面部部分。
AI.conclusion: 分支专业化现象由梯度下降驱动，能够自然实现图像的有效分解，验证了其在图像分解任务中的潜力与有效性。
