authors_text: Yue Wu,Jesús A. De Loera
title: Geometric Policy Iteration for Markov Decision Processes
title_zh: 马尔可夫决策过程的几何策略迭代
comment: Camera ready version for SIGKDD 2022
comments: Camera ready version for SIGKDD 2022
abstract: Recently discovered polyhedral structures of the value function for finite state-action discounted Markov decision processes (MDP) shed light on understanding the success of reinforcement learning. We investigate the value function polytope in greater detail and characterize the polytope boundary using a hyperplane arrangement. We further show that the value space is a union of finitely many cells of the same hyperplane arrangement and relate it to the polytope of the classical linear programming formulation for MDPs. Inspired by these geometric properties, we propose a new algorithm, Geometric Policy Iteration (GPI), to solve discounted MDPs. GPI updates the policy of a single state by switching to an action that is mapped to the boundary of the value function polytope, followed by an immediate update of the value function. This new update rule aims at a faster value improvement without compromising computational efficiency. Moreover, our algorithm allows asynchronous updates of state values which is more flexible and advantageous compared to traditional policy iteration when the state set is large. We prove that the complexity of GPI achieves the best known bound $\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{|\mathcal{A}|}{1 - γ}\log \frac{1}{1-γ}\right)$ of policy iteration and empirically demonstrate the strength of GPI on MDPs of various sizes.
summary: Recently discovered polyhedral structures of the value function for finite state-action discounted Markov decision processes (MDP) shed light on understanding the success of reinforcement learning. We investigate the value function polytope in greater detail and characterize the polytope boundary using a hyperplane arrangement. We further show that the value space is a union of finitely many cells of the same hyperplane arrangement and relate it to the polytope of the classical linear programming formulation for MDPs. Inspired by these geometric properties, we propose a new algorithm, Geometric Policy Iteration (GPI), to solve discounted MDPs. GPI updates the policy of a single state by switching to an action that is mapped to the boundary of the value function polytope, followed by an immediate update of the value function. This new update rule aims at a faster value improvement without compromising computational efficiency. Moreover, our algorithm allows asynchronous updates of state values which is more flexible and advantageous compared to traditional policy iteration when the state set is large. We prove that the complexity of GPI achieves the best known bound $\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{|\mathcal{A}|}{1 - γ}\log \frac{1}{1-γ}\right)$ of policy iteration and empirically demonstrate the strength of GPI on MDPs of various sizes.
abstract_zh: 最近发现的有限状态动作贴现马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 的价值函数的多面体结构有助于理解强化学习的成功。我们更详细地研究了值函数多胞形，并使用超平面排列来表征多胞形边界。我们进一步表明，值空间是相同超平面排列的有限多个单元的并集，并将其与 MDP 的经典线性规划公式的多面体相关联。受这些几何特性的启发，我们提出了一种新算法——几何策略迭代（GPI），来解决折扣 MDP。 GPI 通过切换到映射到值函数多胞体边界的操作来更新单个状态的策略，然后立即更新值函数。这种新的更新规则旨在在不影响计算效率的情况下更快地提高价值。此外，当状态集很大时，我们的算法允许状态值的异步更新，这与传统的策略迭代相比更加灵活和有利。我们证明了 GPI 的复杂性达到了策略迭代的已知边界 $\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{|\mathcal{A}|}{1 - γ}\log \frac{1}{1-γ}\right)$，并凭经验证明了 GPI 在不同规模的 MDP 上的强度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于几何性质的策略迭代算法（GPI），用于解决折扣马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）问题。
AI.motivation: 传统策略迭代算法在处理大规模状态空间时效率较低，而价值函数的多面体结构为改进算法提供了几何视角。
AI.method: 通过超平面排列表征价值函数多面体边界，设计异步更新策略，利用多面体顶点切换动作以加速价值改进。
AI.result: 理论证明GPI复杂度达到最优界O(|A|/(1-γ) log 1/(1-γ))，并在多种规模MDP上验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: GPI通过几何特性实现了高效策略更新，在保持计算效率的同时优于传统方法，适用于大规模状态空间场景。

authors_text: Pei Liu,Bo Fu,Feng Ye,Rui Yang,Bin Xu,Luping Ji
title: DSCA: A Dual-Stream Network with Cross-Attention on Whole-Slide Image Pyramids for Cancer Prognosis
title_zh: DSCA：一种对全幻灯片图像金字塔进行交叉关注的双流网络，用于癌症预测
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures, 7 tables
comments: 12 pages, 6 figures, 7 tables
abstract: The cancer prognosis on gigapixel Whole-Slide Images (WSIs) has always been a challenging task. To further enhance WSI visual representations, existing methods have explored image pyramids, instead of single-resolution images, in WSIs. In spite of this, they still face two major problems: high computational cost and the unnoticed semantical gap in multi-resolution feature fusion. To tackle these problems, this paper proposes to efficiently exploit WSI pyramids from a new perspective, the dual-stream network with cross-attention (DSCA). Our key idea is to utilize two sub-streams to process the WSI patches with two resolutions, where a square pooling is devised in a high-resolution stream to significantly reduce computational costs, and a cross-attention-based method is proposed to properly handle the fusion of dual-stream features. We validate our DSCA on three publicly-available datasets with a total number of 3,101 WSIs from 1,911 patients. Our experiments and ablation studies verify that (i) the proposed DSCA could outperform existing state-of-the-art methods in cancer prognosis, by an average C-Index improvement of around 4.6%; (ii) our DSCA network is more efficient in computation -- it has more learnable parameters (6.31M vs. 860.18K) but less computational costs (2.51G vs. 4.94G), compared to a typical existing multi-resolution network. (iii) the key components of DSCA, dual-stream and cross-attention, indeed contribute to our model's performance, gaining an average C-Index rise of around 2.0% while maintaining a relatively-small computational load. Our DSCA could serve as an alternative and effective tool for WSI-based cancer prognosis.
summary: The cancer prognosis on gigapixel Whole-Slide Images (WSIs) has always been a challenging task. To further enhance WSI visual representations, existing methods have explored image pyramids, instead of single-resolution images, in WSIs. In spite of this, they still face two major problems: high computational cost and the unnoticed semantical gap in multi-resolution feature fusion. To tackle these problems, this paper proposes to efficiently exploit WSI pyramids from a new perspective, the dual-stream network with cross-attention (DSCA). Our key idea is to utilize two sub-streams to process the WSI patches with two resolutions, where a square pooling is devised in a high-resolution stream to significantly reduce computational costs, and a cross-attention-based method is proposed to properly handle the fusion of dual-stream features. We validate our DSCA on three publicly-available datasets with a total number of 3,101 WSIs from 1,911 patients. Our experiments and ablation studies verify that (i) the proposed DSCA could outperform existing state-of-the-art methods in cancer prognosis, by an average C-Index improvement of around 4.6%; (ii) our DSCA network is more efficient in computation -- it has more learnable parameters (6.31M vs. 860.18K) but less computational costs (2.51G vs. 4.94G), compared to a typical existing multi-resolution network. (iii) the key components of DSCA, dual-stream and cross-attention, indeed contribute to our model's performance, gaining an average C-Index rise of around 2.0% while maintaining a relatively-small computational load. Our DSCA could serve as an alternative and effective tool for WSI-based cancer prognosis.
abstract_zh: 十亿像素全幻灯片图像（WSI）的癌症预后一直是一项具有挑战性的任务。为了进一步增强 WSI 视觉表示，现有方法在 WSI 中探索了图像金字塔，而不是单分辨率图像。尽管如此，他们仍然面临两个主要问题：高计算成本和多分辨率特征融合中未被注意到的语义差距。为了解决这些问题，本文提出从新的角度有效利用 WSI 金字塔，即具有交叉注意力的双流网络（DSCA）。我们的关键思想是利用两个子流来处理具有两种分辨率的WSI补丁，其中在高分辨率流中设计了方形池以显着降低计算成本，并提出了一种基于交叉注意力的方法来正确处理双流特征的融合。我们在三个公开数据集上验证了 DSCA，其中包含来自 1,911 名患者的 3,101 个 WSI。我们的实验和消融研究证实 (i) 所提出的 DSCA 在癌症预后方面可以优于现有的最先进方法，平均 C 指数改善约 4.6%； (ii) 与典型的现有多分辨率网络相比，我们的 DSCA 网络的计算效率更高——它具有更多的可学习参数（6.31M 与 860.18K），但计算成本更低（2.51G 与 4.94G）。 (iii) DSCA 的关键组成部分，双流和交叉注意力，确实对我们模型的性能做出了贡献，在保持相对较小的计算负载的同时，获得了约 2.0% 的平均 C-Index 上升。我们的 DSCA 可以作为基于 WSI 的癌症预后的替代且有效的工具。

AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理全切片图像金字塔时面临计算成本高和多分辨率特征融合语义鸿沟未被关注的问题，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计双流网络处理两种分辨率的WSI块，高分辨率流采用方块池化降低计算量，跨注意力机制融合双流特征。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上验证，C-Index平均提升4.6%，参数量6.31M但计算成本低于对比网络，关键组件贡献约2%性能提升。
AI.conclusion: DSCA为基于WSI的癌症预后分析提供了高效且有效的替代工具。

authors_text: Ziqiang Zhang,Junyi Ao,Long Zhou,Shujie Liu,Furu Wei,Jinyu Li
title: The YiTrans End-to-End Speech Translation System for IWSLT 2022 Offline Shared Task
title_zh: 用于IWSLT 2022离线共享任务的YiTrans端到端语音翻译系统
comment: 11 pages
comments: 11 pages
abstract: This paper describes the submission of our end-to-end YiTrans speech translation system for the IWSLT 2022 offline task, which translates from English audio to German, Chinese, and Japanese. The YiTrans system is built on large-scale pre-trained encoder-decoder models. More specifically, we first design a multi-stage pre-training strategy to build a multi-modality model with a large amount of labeled and unlabeled data. We then fine-tune the corresponding components of the model for the downstream speech translation tasks. Moreover, we make various efforts to improve performance, such as data filtering, data augmentation, speech segmentation, model ensemble, and so on. Experimental results show that our YiTrans system obtains a significant improvement than the strong baseline on three translation directions, and it achieves +5.2 BLEU improvements over last year's optimal end-to-end system on tst2021 English-German. Our final submissions rank first on English-German and English-Chinese end-to-end systems in terms of the automatic evaluation metric. We make our code and models publicly available.
summary: This paper describes the submission of our end-to-end YiTrans speech translation system for the IWSLT 2022 offline task, which translates from English audio to German, Chinese, and Japanese. The YiTrans system is built on large-scale pre-trained encoder-decoder models. More specifically, we first design a multi-stage pre-training strategy to build a multi-modality model with a large amount of labeled and unlabeled data. We then fine-tune the corresponding components of the model for the downstream speech translation tasks. Moreover, we make various efforts to improve performance, such as data filtering, data augmentation, speech segmentation, model ensemble, and so on. Experimental results show that our YiTrans system obtains a significant improvement than the strong baseline on three translation directions, and it achieves +5.2 BLEU improvements over last year's optimal end-to-end system on tst2021 English-German. Our final submissions rank first on English-German and English-Chinese end-to-end systems in terms of the automatic evaluation metric. We make our code and models publicly available.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们为 IWSLT 2022 离线任务提交的端到端 YiTrans 语音翻译系统，该系统将英语音频翻译为德语、中文和日语。 YiTrans 系统建立在大规模预训练的编码器-解码器模型之上。更具体地说，我们首先设计一个多阶段预训练策略，以构建具有大量标记和未标记数据的多模态模型。然后，我们针对下游语音翻译任务微调模型的相应组件。此外，我们还做出了各种努力来提高性能，例如数据过滤、数据增强、语音分割、模型集成等。实验结果表明，我们的 YiTrans 系统在三个翻译方向上比强基线获得了显着的改进，并且在 tst2021 英语-德语上比去年的最佳端到端系统实现了+5.2 BLEU 改进。就自动评估指标而言，我们的最终提交作品在英德和英汉端到端系统中排名第一。我们公开我们的代码和模型。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了用于IWSLT 2022离线任务的端到端YiTrans语音翻译系统，实现从英语音频到德语、中文和日语的翻译。
AI.motivation: 为提升多语言语音翻译效果，需结合大规模预训练模型与多阶段优化策略以解决数据不足和模型泛化问题。
AI.method: 设计多阶段预训练策略构建多模态模型，利用大量标注与未标注数据，通过数据过滤、增强、语音分割及模型集成等方法优化性能。
AI.result: YiTrans在三个翻译方向显著优于基线，英德翻译BLEU值较去年最优系统提升5.2点，自动评估指标排名英德与英中任务首位。
AI.conclusion: 提出的端到端系统通过多阶段预训练与优化技术有效提升翻译质量，公开代码与模型有助于推动相关研究。

authors_text: Zhengcheng Shen,Linh Kästner,Magdalena Yordanova,Jens Lambrecht
title: Imagination-augmented Navigation Based on 2D Laser Sensor Observations
title_zh: 基于 2D 激光传感器观测的想象力增强导航
comment: 7 pages, 9 figures
comments: 7 pages, 9 figures
abstract: Autonomous navigation of mobile robots is an essential task for various industries. Sensor data is crucial to ensure safe and reliable navigation. However, sensor observations are often limited by different factors. Imagination can assist to enhance the view and aid navigation in dangerous or unknown situations where only limited sensor observation is available. In this paper, we propose an imagination-enhanced navigation based on 2D semantic laser scan data. The system contains an imagination module, which can predict the entire occupied area of the object. The imagination module is trained in a supervised manner using a collected training dataset from a 2D simulator. Four different imagination models are trained, and the imagination results are evaluated. Subsequently, the imagination results are integrated into the local and global cost map to benefit the navigation procedure. The approach is validated on three different test maps, with seven different paths for each map. The quality and numeric results showed that the agent with the imagination module could generate more reliable paths without passing beneath the object, with the cost of a longer path and slower velocity.

The imagination module is trained in a supervised manner using a collected training dataset from a 2D simulator. Four different imagination models are trained, and the imagination results are evaluated. Subsequently, the imagination results are integrated into the local and global cost map to benefit the navigation procedure. The approach is validated on three different test maps, with seven different paths for each map. The quality and numeric results showed that the agent with the imagination module could generate more reliable paths without passing beneath the object, with the cost of a longer path and slower velocity.
abstract_zh: 移动机器人的自主导航是各行业的一项重要任务。传感器数据对于确保安全可靠的导航至关重要。然而，传感器观测常常受到不同因素的限制。想象力可以帮助增强视野，并在传感器观察有限的危险或未知情况下帮助导航。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于二维语义激光扫描数据的想象力增强导航。该系统包含一个想象模块，可以预测物体的整个占据区域。使用从 2D 模拟器收集的训练数据集以监督方式训练想象力模块。训练四种不同的想象模型，并对想象结果进行评估。随后，想象结果被整合到本地和全局成本地图中以有利于导航过程。该方法在三个不同的测试地图上进行了验证，每个地图有七个不同的路径。质量和数值结果表明，具有想象力模块的代理可以在不经过物体下方的情况下生成更可靠的路径，但代价是更长的路径和更慢的速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于2D语义激光扫描数据的想象增强导航系统，通过预测物体占用区域提升移动机器人在受限观测环境下的导航能力。
AI.motivation: 传感器观测存在局限性，传统导航在危险或未知场景中易失效，需通过想象机制补充环境信息以提升安全性与可靠性。
AI.method: 构建包含想象模块的导航系统，使用2D模拟器采集数据训练四个想象模型，将预测结果融合至局部和全局成本图中进行路径规划。
AI.result: 实验显示，引入想象模块的代理能生成避障更可靠的路径，但需牺牲路径长度和移动速度。
AI.conclusion: 想象增强方法有效提升了复杂环境下的导航安全性，但需权衡路径效率与可靠性之间的矛盾。

search_text: Imagination-augmented Navigation Based on 2D Laser Sensor Observations 基于 2D 激光传感器观测的想象力增强导航 Autonomous navigation of mobile robots is an essential task for various industries. Sensor data is crucial to ensure safe and reliable navigation. However, sensor observations are often limited by different factors. Imagination can assist to enhance the view and aid navigation in dangerous or unknown situations where only limited sensor observation is available. In this paper, we propose an imagination-enhanced navigation based on 2D semantic laser scan data. The system contains an imagination module, which can predict the entire occupied area of the object. The imagination module is trained in a supervised manner using a collected training dataset from a 2D simulator. Four different imagination models are trained, and the imagination results are evaluated. Subsequently, the imagination results are integrated into the local and global cost map to benefit the navigation procedure. The approach is validated on three different test maps, with seven different paths for each map. The quality and numeric results showed that the agent with the imagination module could generate more reliable paths without passing beneath the object, with the cost of a longer path and slower velocity. 移动机器人的自主导航是各行业的一项重要任务。传感器数据对于确保安全可靠的导航至关重要。然而，传感器观测常常受到不同因素的限制。想象力可以帮助增强视野，并在传感器观察有限的危险或未知情况下帮助导航。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于二维语义激光扫描数据的想象力增强导航。该系统包含一个想象模块，可以预测物体的整个占据区域。使用从 2D 模拟器收集的训练数据集以监督方式训练想象力模块。训练四种不同的想象模型，并对想象结果进行评估。随后，想象结果被整合到本地和全局成本地图中以有利于导航过程。该方法在三个不同的测试地图上进行了验证，每个地图有七个不同的路径。质量和数值结果表明，具有想象力模块的代理可以在不经过物体下方的情况下生成更可靠的路径，但代价是更长的路径和更慢的速度。 本文提出一种基于2D语义激光扫描数据的想象增强导航系统，通过预测物体占用区域提升移动机器人在受限观测环境下的导航能力。 Zhengcheng Shen,Linh Kästner,Magdalena Yordanova,Jens Lambrecht cs.RO

authors_text: Linh Kästner,Bassel Fatloun,Zhengcheng Shen,Daniel Gawrisch,Jens Lambrecht
title: Human-Following and -guiding in Crowded Environments using Semantic Deep-Reinforcement-Learning for Mobile Service Robots
title_zh: 使用移动服务机器人语义深度强化学习在拥挤环境中进行人类跟随和引导
comment: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation 2022, 7 pages, 4 figures
comments: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation 2022, 7 pages, 4 figures
abstract: Assistance robots have gained widespread attention in various industries such as logistics and human assistance. The tasks of guiding or following a human in a crowded environment such as airports or train stations to carry weight or goods is still an open problem. In these use cases, the robot is not only required to intelligently interact with humans, but also to navigate safely among crowds. Thus, especially highly dynamic environments pose a grand challenge due to the volatile behavior patterns and unpredictable movements of humans. In this paper, we propose a Deep-Reinforcement-Learning-based agent for human-guiding and -following tasks in crowded environments. Therefore, we incorporate semantic information to provide the agent with high-level information like the social states of humans, safety models, and class types. We evaluate our proposed approach against a benchmark approach without semantic information and demonstrated enhanced navigational safety and robustness. Moreover, we demonstrate that the agent could learn to adapt its behavior to humans, which improves the human-robot interaction significantly.
summary: Assistance robots have gained widespread attention in various industries such as logistics and human assistance. The tasks of guiding or following a human in a crowded environment such as airports or train stations to carry weight or goods is still an open problem. In these use cases, the robot is not only required to intelligently interact with humans, but also to navigate safely among crowds. Thus, especially highly dynamic environments pose a grand challenge due to the volatile behavior patterns and unpredictable movements of humans. In this paper, we propose a Deep-Reinforcement-Learning-based agent for human-guiding and -following tasks in crowded environments. Therefore, we incorporate semantic information to provide the agent with high-level information like the social states of humans, safety models, and class types. We evaluate our proposed approach against a benchmark approach without semantic information and demonstrated enhanced navigational safety and robustness. Moreover, we demonstrate that the agent could learn to adapt its behavior to humans, which improves the human-robot interaction significantly.
abstract_zh: 辅助机器人在物流、人力辅助等各个行业得到了广泛关注。在机场或火车站等拥挤的环境中引导或跟随人类运送重量或货物的任务仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这些用例中，机器人不仅需要与人类智能交互，而且还需要在人群中安全导航。因此，由于人类行为模式的不稳定和不可预测的运动，特别是高度动态的环境构成了巨大的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度强化学习的代理，用于在拥挤的环境中进行人类引导和跟随任务。因此，我们结合语义信息为代理提供高级信息，例如人类的社会状态、安全模型和类别类型。我们根据没有语义信息的基准方法评估了我们提出的方法，并证明了增强的导航安全性和鲁棒性。此外，我们证明代理可以学习使其行为适应人类，从而显着改善人机交互。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于语义深度强化学习的移动服务机器人方法，用于在拥挤环境中实现对人类的跟随与引导。
AI.motivation: 在机场、火车站等拥挤场景中，机器人需安全导航并智能交互，但现有方法难以应对人类行为的动态性与不可预测性。
AI.method: 融合语义信息（如社会状态、安全模型、人类类别）的深度强化学习框架，提升机器人对复杂环境的理解与决策能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在导航安全性与鲁棒性上优于无语义信息的基准方法，且能适应人类行为，显著改善人机交互。
AI.conclusion: 语义深度强化学习有效解决了拥挤环境中机器人跟随与引导的挑战，为服务机器人实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Lijun Gou,Jinrong Yang,Hangcheng Yu,Pan Wang,Xiaoping Li,Chao Deng
title: A Semantic Consistency Feature Alignment Object Detection Model Based on Mixed-Class Distribution Metrics
title_zh: 基于混合类分布度量的语义一致性特征对齐目标检测模型
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation is critical in various computer vision tasks, such as object detection, instance segmentation, etc. They attempt to reduce domain bias-induced performance degradation while also promoting model application speed. Previous works in domain adaptation object detection attempt to align image-level and instance-level shifts to eventually minimize the domain discrepancy, but they may align single-class features to mixed-class features in image-level domain adaptation because each image in the object detection task may be more than one class and object. In order to achieve single-class with single-class alignment and mixed-class with mixed-class alignment, we treat the mixed-class of the feature as a new class and propose a mixed-classes $H-divergence$ for object detection to achieve homogenous feature alignment and reduce negative transfer. Then, a Semantic Consistency Feature Alignment Model (SCFAM) based on mixed-classes $H-divergence$ was also presented. To improve single-class and mixed-class semantic information and accomplish semantic separation, the SCFAM model proposes Semantic Prediction Models (SPM) and Semantic Bridging Components (SBC). And the weight of the pix domain discriminator loss is then changed based on the SPM result to reduce sample imbalance. Extensive unsupervised domain adaption experiments on widely used datasets illustrate our proposed approach's robust object detection in domain bias settings.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation is critical in various computer vision tasks, such as object detection, instance segmentation, etc. They attempt to reduce domain bias-induced performance degradation while also promoting model application speed. Previous works in domain adaptation object detection attempt to align image-level and instance-level shifts to eventually minimize the domain discrepancy, but they may align single-class features to mixed-class features in image-level domain adaptation because each image in the object detection task may be more than one class and object. In order to achieve single-class with single-class alignment and mixed-class with mixed-class alignment, we treat the mixed-class of the feature as a new class and propose a mixed-classes $H-divergence$ for object detection to achieve homogenous feature alignment and reduce negative transfer. Then, a Semantic Consistency Feature Alignment Model (SCFAM) based on mixed-classes $H-divergence$ was also presented. To improve single-class and mixed-class semantic information and accomplish semantic separation, the SCFAM model proposes Semantic Prediction Models (SPM) and Semantic Bridging Components (SBC). And the weight of the pix domain discriminator loss is then changed based on the SPM result to reduce sample imbalance. Extensive unsupervised domain adaption experiments on widely used datasets illustrate our proposed approach's robust object detection in domain bias settings.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应在各种计算机视觉任务中至关重要，例如对象检测、实例分割等。它们试图减少域偏差引起的性能下降，同时提高模型应用速度。域适应对象检测中的先前工作尝试对齐图像级和实例级移位，以最终最小化域差异，但它们可能会将单类特征与图像级域适应中的混合类特征对齐，因为对象检测任务中的每个图像可能不止一个类和对象。为了实现单类与单类对齐和混合类与混合类对齐，我们将特征的混合类视为一个新类，并提出用于目标检测的混合类$H-divergence$，以实现同质特征对齐并减少负迁移。然后，还提出了基于混合类$H-divergence$的语义一致性特征对齐模型（SCFAM）。为了改善单类和混合类语义信息并实现语义分离，SCFAM模型提出了语义预测模型（SPM）和语义桥接组件（SBC）。然后根据SPM结果改变pix域鉴别器损失的权重以减少样本不平衡。在广泛使用的数据集上进行的广泛的无监督域适应实验说明了我们提出的方法在域偏差设置中的鲁棒对象检测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于混合类别分布度量的语义一致性特征对齐目标检测模型（SCFAM），以解决领域自适应中的单类别与混合类别特征对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应目标检测方法在对齐单类别与混合类别特征时存在负迁移问题，导致性能下降，需通过区分处理单类别与混合类别特征以提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出混合类别H散度度量，构建SCFAM模型，包含语义预测模块（SPM）和语义桥接组件（SBC），并根据SPM结果动态调整像素领域判别器损失权重以缓解样本不平衡。
AI.result: 在多个标准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在领域偏移场景下实现了更鲁棒的目标检测性能，优于现有领域自适应方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过区分处理单类别与混合类别特征对齐，结合动态损失权重调整，SCFAM有效减少了负迁移，提升了领域自适应目标检测的准确性与稳定性。

ai_content.motivation: 现有领域自适应目标检测方法在对齐单类别与混合类别特征时存在负迁移问题，导致性能下降，需通过区分处理单类别与混合类别特征以提升模型鲁棒性。
ai_content.method: 提出混合类别H散度度量，构建SCFAM模型，包含语义预测模块（SPM）和语义桥接组件（SBC），并根据SPM结果动态调整像素领域判别器损失权重以缓解样本不平衡。
ai_content.result: 在多个标准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在领域偏移场景下实现了更鲁棒的目标检测性能，优于现有领域自适应方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过区分处理单类别与混合类别特征对齐，结合动态损失权重调整，SCFAM有效减少了负迁移，提升了领域自适应目标检测的准确性与稳定性。

search_text: A Semantic Consistency Feature Alignment Object Detection Model Based on Mixed-Class Distribution Metrics 基于混合类分布度量的语义一致性特征对齐目标检测模型 Unsupervised domain adaptation is critical in various computer vision tasks, such as object detection, instance segmentation, etc. They attempt to reduce domain bias-induced performance degradation while also promoting model application speed. Previous works in domain adaptation object detection attempt to align image-level and instance-level shifts to eventually minimize the domain discrepancy, but they may align single-class features to mixed-class features in image-level domain adaptation because each image in the object detection task may be more than one class and object. In order to achieve single-class with single-class alignment and mixed-class with mixed-class alignment, we treat the mixed-class of the feature as a new class and propose a mixed-classes $H-divergence$ for object detection to achieve homogenous feature alignment and reduce negative transfer. Then, a Semantic Consistency Feature Alignment Model (SCFAM) based on mixed-classes $H-divergence$ was also presented. To improve single-class and mixed-class semantic information and accomplish semantic separation, the SCFAM model proposes Semantic Prediction Models (SPM) and Semantic Bridging Components (SBC). And the weight of the pix domain discriminator loss is then changed based on the SPM result to reduce sample imbalance. Extensive unsupervised domain adaption experiments on widely used datasets illustrate our proposed approach's robust object detection in domain bias settings. 无监督域适应在各种计算机视觉任务中至关重要，例如对象检测、实例分割等。它们试图减少域偏差引起的性能下降，同时提高模型应用速度。域适应对象检测中的先前工作尝试对齐图像级和实例级移位，以最终最小化域差异，但它们可能会将单类特征与图像级域适应中的混合类特征对齐，因为对象检测任务中的每个图像可能不止一个类和对象。为了实现单类与单类对齐和混合类与混合类对齐，我们将特征的混合类视为一个新类，并提出用于目标检测的混合类$H-divergence$，以实现同质特征对齐并减少负迁移。然后，还提出了基于混合类$H-divergence$的语义一致性特征对齐模型（SCFAM）。为了改善单类和混合类语义信息并实现语义分离，SCFAM模型提出了语义预测模型（SPM）和语义桥接组件（SBC）。然后根据SPM结果改变pix域鉴别器损失的权重以减少样本不平衡。在广泛使用的数据集上进行的广泛的无监督域适应实验说明了我们提出的方法在域偏差设置中的鲁棒对象检测。 本文提出了一种基于混合类别分布度量的语义一致性特征对齐目标检测模型（SCFAM），以解决领域自适应中的单类别与混合类别特征对齐问题。 Lijun Gou,Jinrong Yang,Hangcheng Yu,Pan Wang,Xiaoping Li,Chao Deng cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Junde Wu,Huihui Fang,Fangxin Shang,Dalu Yang,Zhaowei Wang,Jing Gao,Yehui Yang,Yanwu Xu
title: SeATrans: Learning Segmentation-Assisted diagnosis model via Transformer
title_zh: SeATrans：通过 Transformer 学习分段辅助诊断模型
abstract: Clinically, the accurate annotation of lesions/tissues can significantly facilitate the disease diagnosis. For example, the segmentation of optic disc/cup (OD/OC) on fundus image would facilitate the glaucoma diagnosis, the segmentation of skin lesions on dermoscopic images is helpful to the melanoma diagnosis, etc. With the advancement of deep learning techniques, a wide range of methods proved the lesions/tissues segmentation can also facilitate the automated disease diagnosis models. However, existing methods are limited in the sense that they can only capture static regional correlations in the images. Inspired by the global and dynamic nature of Vision Transformer, in this paper, we propose Segmentation-Assisted diagnosis Transformer (SeATrans) to transfer the segmentation knowledge to the disease diagnosis network. Specifically, we first propose an asymmetric multi-scale interaction strategy to correlate each single low-level diagnosis feature with multi-scale segmentation features. Then, an effective strategy called SeA-block is adopted to vitalize diagnosis feature via correlated segmentation features. To model the segmentation-diagnosis interaction, SeA-block first embeds the diagnosis feature based on the segmentation information via the encoder, and then transfers the embedding back to the diagnosis feature space by a decoder. Experimental results demonstrate that SeATrans surpasses a wide range of state-of-the-art (SOTA) segmentation-assisted diagnosis methods on several disease diagnosis tasks.
summary: Clinically, the accurate annotation of lesions/tissues can significantly facilitate the disease diagnosis. For example, the segmentation of optic disc/cup (OD/OC) on fundus image would facilitate the glaucoma diagnosis, the segmentation of skin lesions on dermoscopic images is helpful to the melanoma diagnosis, etc. With the advancement of deep learning techniques, a wide range of methods proved the lesions/tissues segmentation can also facilitate the automated disease diagnosis models. However, existing methods are limited in the sense that they can only capture static regional correlations in the images. Inspired by the global and dynamic nature of Vision Transformer, in this paper, we propose Segmentation-Assisted diagnosis Transformer (SeATrans) to transfer the segmentation knowledge to the disease diagnosis network. Specifically, we first propose an asymmetric multi-scale interaction strategy to correlate each single low-level diagnosis feature with multi-scale segmentation features. Then, an effective strategy called SeA-block is adopted to vitalize diagnosis feature via correlated segmentation features. To model the segmentation-diagnosis interaction, SeA-block first embeds the diagnosis feature based on the segmentation information via the encoder, and then transfers the embedding back to the diagnosis feature space by a decoder. Experimental results demonstrate that SeATrans surpasses a wide range of state-of-the-art (SOTA) segmentation-assisted diagnosis methods on several disease diagnosis tasks.
abstract_zh: 临床上，病灶/组织的准确注释可以显着促进疾病诊断。例如，眼底图像上视盘/视杯（OD/OC）的分割有助于青光眼的诊断，皮肤镜图像上皮肤病变的分割有助于黑色素瘤的诊断等。随着深度学习技术的进步，广泛的方法证明病变/组织分割也可以促进自动化疾病诊断模型。然而，现有方法的局限性在于它们只能捕获图像中的静态区域相关性。受视觉变压器的全局和动态性质的启发，在本文中，我们提出了分段辅助诊断变压器（SeATrans），将分段知识转移到疾病诊断网络。具体来说，我们首先提出一种不对称的多尺度交互策略，将每个单个低级诊断特征与多尺度分割特征相关联。然后，采用一种称为 SeA-block 的有效策略，通过相关的分割特征来激活诊断特征。为了对分割-诊断交互进行建模，SeA-block 首先通过编码器嵌入基于分割信息的诊断特征，然后通过解码器将嵌入传输回诊断特征空间。实验结果表明，SeATrans 在多种疾病诊断任务上超越了多种最先进（SOTA）分割辅助诊断方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的分割辅助诊断模型SeATrans，通过整合分割特征提升疾病诊断性能。
AI.motivation: 现有分割辅助诊断方法局限于静态局部特征关联，无法捕捉全局动态关系，而Vision Transformer的全局建模能力可有效传递分割知识以增强诊断。
AI.method: 设计不对称多尺度交互策略关联低级诊断特征与多尺度分割特征，并引入SeA-block模块通过编码器-解码器结构实现分割信息到诊断特征空间的嵌入与转换。
AI.result: 在多个疾病诊断任务中，SeATrans优于现有分割辅助诊断的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过分割与诊断的动态全局交互建模，SeATrans有效提升了分割辅助诊断的性能。

authors_text: Chengyang Ying,You Qiaoben,Xinning Zhou,Hang Su,Wenbo Ding,Jianyong Ai
title: Consistent Attack: Universal Adversarial Perturbation on Embodied Vision Navigation
title_zh: 一致攻击：对具体视觉导航的普遍对抗性扰动
comment: ef:Pattern Recognition Letters (PRL), 2023
comments: ef:Pattern Recognition Letters (PRL), 2023
abstract: Embodied agents in vision navigation coupled with deep neural networks have attracted increasing attention. However, deep neural networks have been shown vulnerable to malicious adversarial noises, which may potentially cause catastrophic failures in Embodied Vision Navigation. Among different adversarial noises, universal adversarial perturbations (UAP), i.e., a constant image-agnostic perturbation applied on every input frame of the agent, play a critical role in Embodied Vision Navigation since they are computation-efficient and application-practical during the attack. However, existing UAP methods ignore the system dynamics of Embodied Vision Navigation and might be sub-optimal. In order to extend UAP to the sequential decision setting, we formulate the disturbed environment under the universal noise $δ$, as a $δ$-disturbed Markov Decision Process ($δ$-MDP). Based on the formulation, we analyze the properties of $δ$-MDP and propose two novel Consistent Attack methods, named Reward UAP and Trajectory UAP, for attacking Embodied agents, which consider the dynamic of the MDP and calculate universal noises by estimating the disturbed distribution and the disturbed Q function. For various victim models, our Consistent Attack can cause a significant drop in their performance in the PointGoal task in Habitat with different datasets and different scenes. Extensive experimental results indicate that there exist serious potential risks for applying Embodied Vision Navigation methods to the real world.
summary: Embodied agents in vision navigation coupled with deep neural networks have attracted increasing attention. However, deep neural networks have been shown vulnerable to malicious adversarial noises, which may potentially cause catastrophic failures in Embodied Vision Navigation. Among different adversarial noises, universal adversarial perturbations (UAP), i.e., a constant image-agnostic perturbation applied on every input frame of the agent, play a critical role in Embodied Vision Navigation since they are computation-efficient and application-practical during the attack. However, existing UAP methods ignore the system dynamics of Embodied Vision Navigation and might be sub-optimal. In order to extend UAP to the sequential decision setting, we formulate the disturbed environment under the universal noise $δ$, as a $δ$-disturbed Markov Decision Process ($δ$-MDP). Based on the formulation, we analyze the properties of $δ$-MDP and propose two novel Consistent Attack methods, named Reward UAP and Trajectory UAP, for attacking Embodied agents, which consider the dynamic of the MDP and calculate universal noises by estimating the disturbed distribution and the disturbed Q function. For various victim models, our Consistent Attack can cause a significant drop in their performance in the PointGoal task in Habitat with different datasets and different scenes. Extensive experimental results indicate that there exist serious potential risks for applying Embodied Vision Navigation methods to the real world.
abstract_zh: 视觉导航中的实体代理与深度神经网络相结合引起了越来越多的关注。然而，深度神经网络已被证明容易受到恶意对抗性噪声的影响，这可能会导致嵌入式视觉导航发生灾难性故障。在不同的对抗噪声中，通用对抗扰动（UAP），即应用于代理的每个输入帧的恒定图像不可知扰动，在嵌入式视觉导航中发挥着关键作用，因为它们在攻击过程中计算效率高且应用实用。然而，现有的 UAP 方法忽略了嵌入式视觉导航的系统动力学，并且可能不是最优的。为了将 UAP 扩展到顺序决策设置，我们将通用噪声 $δ$ 下的受扰环境制定为 $δ$ 扰动马尔可夫决策过程 ($δ$-MDP)。基于该公式，我们分析了$δ$-MDP的性质，并提出了两种新颖的一致攻击方法，即奖励UAP和轨迹UAP，用于攻击Embodied智能体，它们考虑了MDP的动态性，并通过估计扰动分布和扰动Q函数来计算通用噪声。对于各种受害者模型，我们的一致性攻击会导致其在具有不同数据集和不同场景的 Habitat 中的 PointGoal 任务中的性能显着下降。大量的实验结果表明，将体现视觉导航方法应用于现实世界存在严重的潜在风险。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种新的通用对抗扰动方法（Reward UAP和Trajectory UAP），用于攻击具身视觉导航系统，通过考虑系统动态特性提升攻击效果。
AI.motivation: 现有通用对抗扰动方法未考虑具身视觉导航的系统动态特性，导致攻击效果不佳，需开发更符合序列决策场景的攻击方法。
AI.method: 将受扰环境建模为δ-扰动马尔可夫决策过程（δ-MDP），基于该模型提出两种方法：通过估计扰动分布和Q函数计算通用噪声，实现对具身智能体的持续攻击。
AI.result: 在Habitat平台的PointGoal任务中，针对多种模型和场景，攻击方法显著降低了导航性能，验证了具身视觉导航系统的潜在安全风险。
AI.conclusion: 现有UAP方法在具身导航场景中存在局限性，本文提出的Consistent Attack方法通过建模动态特性实现了更有效的攻击，凸显了提升系统鲁棒性的必要性。

search_text: Consistent Attack: Universal Adversarial Perturbation on Embodied Vision Navigation 一致攻击：对具体视觉导航的普遍对抗性扰动 Embodied agents in vision navigation coupled with deep neural networks have attracted increasing attention. However, deep neural networks have been shown vulnerable to malicious adversarial noises, which may potentially cause catastrophic failures in Embodied Vision Navigation. Among different adversarial noises, universal adversarial perturbations (UAP), i.e., a constant image-agnostic perturbation applied on every input frame of the agent, play a critical role in Embodied Vision Navigation since they are computation-efficient and application-practical during the attack. However, existing UAP methods ignore the system dynamics of Embodied Vision Navigation and might be sub-optimal. In order to extend UAP to the sequential decision setting, we formulate the disturbed environment under the universal noise $δ$, as a $δ$-disturbed Markov Decision Process ($δ$-MDP). Based on the formulation, we analyze the properties of $δ$-MDP and propose two novel Consistent Attack methods, named Reward UAP and Trajectory UAP, for attacking Embodied agents, which consider the dynamic of the MDP and calculate universal noises by estimating the disturbed distribution and the disturbed Q function. For various victim models, our Consistent Attack can cause a significant drop in their performance in the PointGoal task in Habitat with different datasets and different scenes. Extensive experimental results indicate that there exist serious potential risks for applying Embodied Vision Navigation methods to the real world. 视觉导航中的实体代理与深度神经网络相结合引起了越来越多的关注。然而，深度神经网络已被证明容易受到恶意对抗性噪声的影响，这可能会导致嵌入式视觉导航发生灾难性故障。在不同的对抗噪声中，通用对抗扰动（UAP），即应用于代理的每个输入帧的恒定图像不可知扰动，在嵌入式视觉导航中发挥着关键作用，因为它们在攻击过程中计算效率高且应用实用。然而，现有的 UAP 方法忽略了嵌入式视觉导航的系统动力学，并且可能不是最优的。为了将 UAP 扩展到顺序决策设置，我们将通用噪声 $δ$ 下的受扰环境制定为 $δ$ 扰动马尔可夫决策过程 ($δ$-MDP)。基于该公式，我们分析了$δ$-MDP的性质，并提出了两种新颖的一致攻击方法，即奖励UAP和轨迹UAP，用于攻击Embodied智能体，它们考虑了MDP的动态性，并通过估计扰动分布和扰动Q函数来计算通用噪声。对于各种受害者模型，我们的一致性攻击会导致其在具有不同数据集和不同场景的 Habitat 中的 PointGoal 任务中的性能显着下降。大量的实验结果表明，将体现视觉导航方法应用于现实世界存在严重的潜在风险。 本文提出两种新的通用对抗扰动方法（Reward UAP和Trajectory UAP），用于攻击具身视觉导航系统，通过考虑系统动态特性提升攻击效果。 Chengyang Ying,You Qiaoben,Xinning Zhou,Hang Su,Wenbo Ding,Jianyong Ai cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Ke Li,Heng Yang,Willem Visser
title: Evolutionary Multi-Task Injection Testing on Web Application Firewalls
title_zh: Web 应用程序防火墙的演化多任务注入测试
abstract: Web application firewall (WAF) plays an integral role nowadays to protect web applications from various malicious injection attacks such as SQL injection, XML injection, and PHP injection, to name a few. However, given the evolving sophistication of injection attacks and the increasing complexity of tuning a WAF, it is challenging to ensure that the WAF is free of injection vulnerabilities such that it will block all malicious injection attacks without wrongly affecting the legitimate message. Automatically testing the WAF is, therefore, a timely and essential task. In this paper, we propose DaNuoYi, an automatic injection testing tool that simultaneously generates test inputs for multiple types of injection attacks on a WAF. Our basic idea derives from the cross-lingual translation in the natural language processing domain. In particular, test inputs for different types of injection attacks are syntactically different but may be semantically similar. Sharing semantic knowledge across multiple programming languages can thus stimulate the generation of more sophisticated test inputs and discovering injection vulnerabilities of the WAF that are otherwise difficult to find. To this end, in DaNuoYi, we train several injection translation models by using multi-task learning that translates the test inputs between any pair of injection attacks. The model is then used by a novel multi-task evolutionary algorithm to co-evolve test inputs for different types of injection attacks facilitated by a shared mating pool and domain-specific mutation operators at each generation. We conduct experiments on three real-world open-source WAFs and six types of injection attacks, the results reveal that DaNuoYi generates up to 3.8x and 5.78x more valid test inputs (i.e., bypassing the underlying WAF) than its state-of-the-art single-task counterparts and the context-free grammar-based injection construction.

However, given the evolving sophistication of injection attacks and the increasing complexity of tuning a WAF, it is challenging to ensure that the WAF is free of injection vulnerabilities such that it will block all malicious injection attacks without wrongly affecting the legitimate message. Automatically testing the WAF is, therefore, a timely and essential task. In this paper, we propose DaNuoYi, an automatic injection testing tool that simultaneously generates test inputs for multiple types of injection attacks on a WAF. Our basic idea derives from the cross-lingual translation in the natural language processing domain. In particular, test inputs for different types of injection attacks are syntactically different but may be semantically similar. Sharing semantic knowledge across multiple programming languages can thus stimulate the generation of more sophisticated test inputs and discovering injection vulnerabilities of the WAF that are otherwise difficult to find. To this end, in DaNuoYi, we train several injection translation models by using multi-task learning that translates the test inputs between any pair of injection attacks. The model is then used by a novel multi-task evolutionary algorithm to co-evolve test inputs for different types of injection attacks facilitated by a shared mating pool and domain-specific mutation operators at each generation. We conduct experiments on three real-world open-source WAFs and six types of injection attacks, the results reveal that DaNuoYi generates up to 3.8x and 5.78x more valid test inputs (i.e., bypassing the underlying WAF) than its state-of-the-art single-task counterparts and the context-free grammar-based injection construction.
abstract_zh: Web 应用程序防火墙 (WAF) 如今在保护 Web 应用程序免受各种恶意注入攻击（例如 SQL 注入、XML 注入和 PHP 注入）方面发挥着不可或缺的作用。然而，鉴于注入攻击的复杂性不断发展以及调整 WAF 的复杂性不断增加，确保 WAF 不存在注入漏洞以阻止所有恶意注入攻击而不错误地影响合法消息是一项挑战。因此，自动测试WAF是一项及时且重要的任务。在本文中，我们提出了 DaNuoYi，一种自动注入测试工具，它可以同时为 WAF 上的多种类型的注入攻击生成测试输入。我们的基本思想来源于自然语言处理领域的跨语言翻译。特别是，不同类型注入攻击的测试输入在语法上不同，但在语义上可能相似。因此，跨多种编程语言共享语义知识可以刺激生成更复杂的测试输入，并发现难以发现的 WAF 注入漏洞。为此，在DaNuoYi中，我们通过使用多任务学习来训练多个注入翻译模型，在任何一对注入攻击之间翻译测试输入。然后，一种新颖的多任务进化算法使用该模型来共同进化不同类型注入攻击的测试输入，这由每一代的共享交配池和特定于域的突变算子促进。我们对三个真实世界的开源 WAF 和六种类型的注入攻击进行了实验，结果表明，与最先进的单任务对应物和基于上下文无关语法的注入构造相比，DaNuoYi 生成的有效测试输入（即绕过底层 WAF）分别高出 3.8 倍和 5.78 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DaNuoYi工具，通过多任务进化算法自动生成多种注入攻击的测试用例以检测Web应用防火墙（WAF）漏洞。
AI.motivation: 现有WAF难以应对日益复杂的注入攻击，且手动测试效率低，需自动化工具高效发现WAF的漏检漏洞。
AI.method: 基于自然语言处理中的跨语言翻译思想，利用多任务学习训练注入攻击翻译模型，并结合共享交配池和领域特定变异算子的多任务进化算法生成测试用例。
AI.result: 在三个开源WAF上测试显示，DaNuoYi生成的有效测试用例数量比单任务方法和上下文无关文法方法分别高出3.8倍和5.78倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过跨攻击类型的语义知识共享，DaNuoYi能更高效发现WAF的注入漏洞，为自动化安全测试提供新思路。

Web 应用程序防火墙 (WAF) 如今在保护 Web 应用程序免受各种恶意注入攻击（例如 SQL 注入、XML 注入和 PHP 注入）方面发挥着不可或缺的作用。然而，鉴于注入攻击的复杂性不断发展以及调整 WAF 的复杂性不断增加，确保 WAF 不存在注入漏洞以阻止所有恶意注入攻击而不错误地影响合法消息是一项挑战。因此，自动测试WAF是一项及时且重要的任务。在本文中，我们提出了 DaNuoYi，一种自动注入测试工具，它可以同时为 WAF 上的多种类型的注入攻击生成测试输入。我们的基本思想来源于自然语言处理领域的跨语言翻译。特别是，不同类型注入攻击的测试输入在语法上不同，但在语义上可能相似。因此，跨多种编程语言共享语义知识可以刺激生成更复杂的测试输入，并发现难以发现的 WAF 注入漏洞。为此，在DaNuoYi中，我们通过使用多任务学习来训练多个注入翻译模型，在任何一对注入攻击之间翻译测试输入。然后，一种新颖的多任务进化算法使用该模型来共同进化不同类型注入攻击的测试输入，这由每一代的共享交配池和特定于域的突变算子促进。我们对三个真实世界的开源 WAF 和六种类型的注入攻击进行了实验，结果表明，与最先进的单任务对应物和基于上下文无关语法的注入构造相比，DaNuoYi 生成的有效测试输入（即绕过底层 WAF）分别高出 3.8 倍和 5.78 倍。 本文提出DaNuoYi工具，通过多任务进化算法自动生成多种注入攻击的测试用例以检测Web应用防火墙（WAF）漏洞。 Ke Li,Heng Yang,Willem Visser cs.NE

authors_text: Qichao Ying,Xiaoxiao Hu,Yangming Zhou,Zhenxing Qian,Dan Zeng,Shiming Ge
title: Bootstrapping Multi-view Representations for Fake News Detection
title_zh: 用于假新闻检测的引导多视图表示
comment: Authors are from Fudan University, China. Under Review
comments: Authors are from Fudan University, China. Under Review
abstract: Previous researches on multimedia fake news detection include a series of complex feature extraction and fusion networks to gather useful information from the news. However, how cross-modal consistency relates to the fidelity of news and how features from different modalities affect the decision-making are still open questions. This paper presents a novel scheme of Bootstrapping Multi-view Representations (BMR) for fake news detection. Given a multi-modal news, we extract representations respectively from the views of the text, the image pattern and the image semantics. Improved Multi-gate Mixture-of-Expert networks (iMMoE) are proposed for feature refinement and fusion. Representations from each view are separately used to coarsely predict the fidelity of the whole news, and the multimodal representations are able to predict the cross-modal consistency. With the prediction scores, we reweigh each view of the representations and bootstrap them for fake news detection. Extensive experiments conducted on typical fake news detection datasets prove that the proposed BMR outperforms state-of-the-art schemes.
summary: Previous researches on multimedia fake news detection include a series of complex feature extraction and fusion networks to gather useful information from the news. However, how cross-modal consistency relates to the fidelity of news and how features from different modalities affect the decision-making are still open questions. This paper presents a novel scheme of Bootstrapping Multi-view Representations (BMR) for fake news detection. Given a multi-modal news, we extract representations respectively from the views of the text, the image pattern and the image semantics. Improved Multi-gate Mixture-of-Expert networks (iMMoE) are proposed for feature refinement and fusion. Representations from each view are separately used to coarsely predict the fidelity of the whole news, and the multimodal representations are able to predict the cross-modal consistency. With the prediction scores, we reweigh each view of the representations and bootstrap them for fake news detection. Extensive experiments conducted on typical fake news detection datasets prove that the proposed BMR outperforms state-of-the-art schemes.
abstract_zh: 先前对多媒体假新闻检测的研究包括一系列复杂的特征提取和融合网络，以从新闻中收集有用的信息。然而，跨模态一致性如何与新闻保真度相关以及不同模态的特征如何影响决策仍然是悬而未决的问题。本文提出了一种用于假新闻检测的引导多视图表示（BMR）的新颖方案。给定多模态新闻，我们分别从文本、图像模式和图像语义的视图中提取表示。提出了改进的多门混合专家网络（iMMoE）用于特征细化和融合。每个视图的表示分别用于粗略地预测整个新闻的保真度，并且多模态表示能够预测跨模态一致性。根据预测分数，我们重新权衡表示的每个视图，并引导它们进行假新闻检测。对典型假新闻检测数据集进行的大量实验证明，所提出的 BMR 优于最先进的方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BMR的多视角表示引导方法，用于通过整合文本、图像模式和语义信息来检测虚假新闻。
AI.motivation: 现有虚假新闻检测方法未能充分探讨跨模态一致性与新闻可信度的关系，以及不同模态特征对决策的影响机制，亟需改进多模态信息融合策略。
AI.method: 构建多视角表示体系，分别提取文本、图像模式和语义特征，设计改进型多门控专家混合网络(iMMoE)进行特征精炼与融合，通过预测可信度和跨模态一致性动态调整各视角权重实现自引导检测。
AI.result: 在典型虚假新闻数据集上的实验表明，BMR方法在检测性能上优于现有最先进方案。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证实了跨模态一致性建模与多视角表示引导的有效性，为虚假新闻检测提供了新的技术路径。

ai_content.method: 构建多视角表示体系，分别提取文本、图像模式和语义特征，设计改进型多门控专家混合网络(iMMoE)进行特征精炼与融合，通过预测可信度和跨模态一致性动态调整各视角权重实现自引导检测。
ai_content.result: 在典型虚假新闻数据集上的实验表明，BMR方法在检测性能上优于现有最先进方案。
ai_content.conclusion: 该研究证实了跨模态一致性建模与多视角表示引导的有效性，为虚假新闻检测提供了新的技术路径。

search_text: Bootstrapping Multi-view Representations for Fake News Detection 用于假新闻检测的引导多视图表示 Previous researches on multimedia fake news detection include a series of complex feature extraction and fusion networks to gather useful information from the news. However, how cross-modal consistency relates to the fidelity of news and how features from different modalities affect the decision-making are still open questions. This paper presents a novel scheme of Bootstrapping Multi-view Representations (BMR) for fake news detection. Given a multi-modal news, we extract representations respectively from the views of the text, the image pattern and the image semantics. Improved Multi-gate Mixture-of-Expert networks (iMMoE) are proposed for feature refinement and fusion. Representations from each view are separately used to coarsely predict the fidelity of the whole news, and the multimodal representations are able to predict the cross-modal consistency. With the prediction scores, we reweigh each view of the representations and bootstrap them for fake news detection. Extensive experiments conducted on typical fake news detection datasets prove that the proposed BMR outperforms state-of-the-art schemes. 先前对多媒体假新闻检测的研究包括一系列复杂的特征提取和融合网络，以从新闻中收集有用的信息。然而，跨模态一致性如何与新闻保真度相关以及不同模态的特征如何影响决策仍然是悬而未决的问题。本文提出了一种用于假新闻检测的引导多视图表示（BMR）的新颖方案。给定多模态新闻，我们分别从文本、图像模式和图像语义的视图中提取表示。提出了改进的多门混合专家网络（iMMoE）用于特征细化和融合。每个视图的表示分别用于粗略地预测整个新闻的保真度，并且多模态表示能够预测跨模态一致性。根据预测分数，我们重新权衡表示的每个视图，并引导它们进行假新闻检测。对典型假新闻检测数据集进行的大量实验证明，所提出的 BMR 优于最先进的方案。 本文提出了一种名为BMR的多视角表示引导方法，用于通过整合文本、图像模式和语义信息来检测虚假新闻。 Qichao Ying,Xiaoxiao Hu,Yangming Zhou,Zhenxing Qian,Dan Zeng,Shiming Ge cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaoxiao Long,Cheng Lin,Peng Wang,Taku Komura,Wenping Wang
title: SparseNeuS: Fast Generalizable Neural Surface Reconstruction from Sparse Views
title_zh: SparseNeuS：从稀疏视图快速广义神经表面重建
comment: Project page: https://www.xxlong.site/SparseNeuS/
comments: Project page: https://www.xxlong.site/SparseNeuS/
abstract: We introduce SparseNeuS, a novel neural rendering based method for the task of surface reconstruction from multi-view images. This task becomes more difficult when only sparse images are provided as input, a scenario where existing neural reconstruction approaches usually produce incomplete or distorted results. Moreover, their inability of generalizing to unseen new scenes impedes their application in practice. Contrarily, SparseNeuS can generalize to new scenes and work well with sparse images (as few as 2 or 3). SparseNeuS adopts signed distance function (SDF) as the surface representation, and learns generalizable priors from image features by introducing geometry encoding volumes for generic surface prediction. Moreover, several strategies are introduced to effectively leverage sparse views for high-quality reconstruction, including 1) a multi-level geometry reasoning framework to recover the surfaces in a coarse-to-fine manner; 2) a multi-scale color blending scheme for more reliable color prediction; 3) a consistency-aware fine-tuning scheme to control the inconsistent regions caused by occlusion and noise. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach not only outperforms the state-of-the-art methods, but also exhibits good efficiency, generalizability, and flexibility.
summary: We introduce SparseNeuS, a novel neural rendering based method for the task of surface reconstruction from multi-view images. This task becomes more difficult when only sparse images are provided as input, a scenario where existing neural reconstruction approaches usually produce incomplete or distorted results. Moreover, their inability of generalizing to unseen new scenes impedes their application in practice. Contrarily, SparseNeuS can generalize to new scenes and work well with sparse images (as few as 2 or 3). SparseNeuS adopts signed distance function (SDF) as the surface representation, and learns generalizable priors from image features by introducing geometry encoding volumes for generic surface prediction. Moreover, several strategies are introduced to effectively leverage sparse views for high-quality reconstruction, including 1) a multi-level geometry reasoning framework to recover the surfaces in a coarse-to-fine manner; 2) a multi-scale color blending scheme for more reliable color prediction; 3) a consistency-aware fine-tuning scheme to control the inconsistent regions caused by occlusion and noise. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach not only outperforms the state-of-the-art methods, but also exhibits good efficiency, generalizability, and flexibility.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 SparseNeuS，这是一种基于神经渲染的新颖方法，用于从多视图图像进行表面重建的任务。当仅提供稀疏图像作为输入时，此任务变得更加困难，在这种情况下，现有的神经重建方法通常会产生不完整或扭曲的结果。此外，它们无法推广到未见过的新场景，这阻碍了它们在实践中的应用。相反，SparseNeuS 可以推广到新场景，并且可以很好地处理稀疏图像（少至 2 或 3 个）。 SparseNeuS 采用有符号距离函数（SDF）作为表面表示，并通过引入用于通用表面预测的几何编码体从图像特征中学习可概括的先验。此外，引入了多种策略来有效利用稀疏视图进行高质量重建，包括1）多级几何推理框架以从粗到细的方式恢复表面； 2）多尺度颜色混合方案，实现更可靠的颜色预测； 3）一致性感知微调方案，用于控制由遮挡和噪声引起的不一致区域。大量的实验表明，我们的方法不仅优于最先进的方法，而且表现出良好的效率、通用性和灵活性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SparseNeuS方法，解决从稀疏视角图像进行高效且通用的神经表面重建问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经重建方法在稀疏视角下易产生不完整或失真结果，且难以泛化到新场景，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 采用符号距离函数(SDF)表示表面，通过几何编码体积学习通用先验；引入多级几何推理框架、多尺度颜色混合方案及一致性感知微调策略，有效利用稀疏视角进行高质量重建。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在效率、泛化性和灵活性上优于现有最佳方法，可使用2-3张图像重建并泛化到新场景。
AI.conclusion: SparseNeuS通过创新方法有效解决了稀疏视角重建与泛化难题，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

search_text: SparseNeuS: Fast Generalizable Neural Surface Reconstruction from Sparse Views SparseNeuS：从稀疏视图快速广义神经表面重建 We introduce SparseNeuS, a novel neural rendering based method for the task of surface reconstruction from multi-view images. This task becomes more difficult when only sparse images are provided as input, a scenario where existing neural reconstruction approaches usually produce incomplete or distorted results. Moreover, their inability of generalizing to unseen new scenes impedes their application in practice. Contrarily, SparseNeuS can generalize to new scenes and work well with sparse images (as few as 2 or 3). SparseNeuS adopts signed distance function (SDF) as the surface representation, and learns generalizable priors from image features by introducing geometry encoding volumes for generic surface prediction. Moreover, several strategies are introduced to effectively leverage sparse views for high-quality reconstruction, including 1) a multi-level geometry reasoning framework to recover the surfaces in a coarse-to-fine manner; 2) a multi-scale color blending scheme for more reliable color prediction; 3) a consistency-aware fine-tuning scheme to control the inconsistent regions caused by occlusion and noise. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach not only outperforms the state-of-the-art methods, but also exhibits good efficiency, generalizability, and flexibility. 我们介绍 SparseNeuS，这是一种基于神经渲染的新颖方法，用于从多视图图像进行表面重建的任务。当仅提供稀疏图像作为输入时，此任务变得更加困难，在这种情况下，现有的神经重建方法通常会产生不完整或扭曲的结果。此外，它们无法推广到未见过的新场景，这阻碍了它们在实践中的应用。相反，SparseNeuS 可以推广到新场景，并且可以很好地处理稀疏图像（少至 2 或 3 个）。 SparseNeuS 采用有符号距离函数（SDF）作为表面表示，并通过引入用于通用表面预测的几何编码体从图像特征中学习可概括的先验。此外，引入了多种策略来有效利用稀疏视图进行高质量重建，包括1）多级几何推理框架以从粗到细的方式恢复表面； 2）多尺度颜色混合方案，实现更可靠的颜色预测； 3）一致性感知微调方案，用于控制由遮挡和噪声引起的不一致区域。大量的实验表明，我们的方法不仅优于最先进的方法，而且表现出良好的效率、通用性和灵活性。 本文提出SparseNeuS方法，解决从稀疏视角图像进行高效且通用的神经表面重建问题。 Xiaoxiao Long,Cheng Lin,Peng Wang,Taku Komura,Wenping Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Qijun Luo,Xiao Li
title: Finite-Time Analysis of Fully Decentralized Single-Timescale Actor-Critic
title_zh: 完全去中心化单时间尺度 Actor-Critic 的有限时间分析
comment: accepted for publication in Transactions on Machine Learning Research
comments: accepted for publication in Transactions on Machine Learning Research
abstract: Decentralized Actor-Critic (AC) algorithms have been widely utilized for multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) and have achieved remarkable success. Apart from its empirical success, the theoretical convergence property of decentralized AC algorithms is largely unexplored. Most of the existing finite-time convergence results are derived based on either double-loop update or two-timescale step sizes rule, and this is the case even for centralized AC algorithm under a single-agent setting. In practice, the \emph{single-timescale} update is widely utilized, where actor and critic are updated in an alternating manner with step sizes being of the same order. In this work, we study a decentralized \emph{single-timescale} AC algorithm.Theoretically, using linear approximation for value and reward estimation, we show that the algorithm has sample complexity of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\varepsilon^{-2})$ under Markovian sampling, which matches the optimal complexity with a double-loop implementation (here, $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}$ hides a logarithmic term). When we reduce to the single-agent setting, our result yields new sample complexity for centralized AC using a single-timescale update scheme. The central to establishing our complexity results is \emph{the hidden smoothness of the optimal critic variable} we revealed. We also provide a local action privacy-preserving version of our algorithm and its analysis. Finally, we conduct experiments to show the superiority of our algorithm over the existing decentralized AC algorithms.
summary: Decentralized Actor-Critic (AC) algorithms have been widely utilized for multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) and have achieved remarkable success. Apart from its empirical success, the theoretical convergence property of decentralized AC algorithms is largely unexplored. Most of the existing finite-time convergence results are derived based on either double-loop update or two-timescale step sizes rule, and this is the case even for centralized AC algorithm under a single-agent setting. In practice, the \emph{single-timescale} update is widely utilized, where actor and critic are updated in an alternating manner with step sizes being of the same order. In this work, we study a decentralized \emph{single-timescale} AC algorithm.Theoretically, using linear approximation for value and reward estimation, we show that the algorithm has sample complexity of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\varepsilon^{-2})$ under Markovian sampling, which matches the optimal complexity with a double-loop implementation (here, $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}$ hides a logarithmic term). When we reduce to the single-agent setting, our result yields new sample complexity for centralized AC using a single-timescale update scheme. The central to establishing our complexity results is \emph{the hidden smoothness of the optimal critic variable} we revealed. We also provide a local action privacy-preserving version of our algorithm and its analysis. Finally, we conduct experiments to show the superiority of our algorithm over the existing decentralized AC algorithms.
abstract_zh: 去中心化 Actor-Critic（AC）算法已广泛应用于多智能体强化学习（MARL）并取得了显着的成功。除了实证上的成功之外，去中心化 AC 算法的理论收敛特性在很大程度上尚未被探索。现有的有限时间收敛结果大多是基于双循环更新或两个时间尺度步长规则得出的，即使对于单智能体设置下的集中式AC算法也是如此。在实践中，\emph{单时间尺度}更新被广泛使用，其中演员和评论家以交替的方式更新，步长大小具有相同的顺序。在这项工作中，我们研究了一种去中心化的\emph{single-timescale} AC算法。理论上，使用线性近似进行价值和奖励估计，我们表明该算法在马尔可夫采样下的样本复杂度为$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\varepsilon^{-2})$，这与双循环实现的最佳复杂度相匹配（这里，$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}$隐藏了对数项）。当我们减少到单代理设置时，我们的结果使用单时间尺度更新方案为集中式 AC 产生新的样本复杂性。建立复杂性结果的核心是我们揭示的\emph{最优评价变量的隐藏平滑度}。我们还提供我们的算法及其分析的本地操作隐私保护版本。最后，我们进行实验来证明我们的算法相对于现有的去中心化 AC 算法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了去中心化单时间尺度Actor-Critic算法的有限时间收敛性分析，提出了理论保证并验证了其优越性。
AI.motivation: 尽管去中心化Actor-Critic算法在多智能体强化学习中广泛应用，但其理论收敛性尤其是单时间尺度更新的分析仍不完善，现有结果多依赖双循环或双时间尺度方法。
AI.method: 通过价值和奖励估计的线性近似，揭示了最优评论家变量的隐藏平滑性，并基于此建立了单时间尺度算法的收敛性分析。
AI.result: 证明了算法在马尔可夫采样下的样本复杂度为O~(ε⁻²)，与双循环方法的最优复杂度一致，并在单智能体场景下获得了新的复杂度结果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法在理论上匹配最优复杂度，实验验证了其优于现有去中心化AC算法，同时提供了隐私保护版本的分析。

motivation: 尽管去中心化Actor-Critic算法在多智能体强化学习中广泛应用，但其理论收敛性尤其是单时间尺度更新的分析仍不完善，现有结果多依赖双循环或双时间尺度方法。
method: 通过价值和奖励估计的线性近似，揭示了最优评论家变量的隐藏平滑性，并基于此建立了单时间尺度算法的收敛性分析。
result: 证明了算法在马尔可夫采样下的样本复杂度为O~(ε⁻²)，与双循环方法的最优复杂度一致，并在单智能体场景下获得了新的复杂度结果。
conclusion: 提出的算法在理论上匹配最优复杂度，实验验证了其优于现有去中心化AC算法，同时提供了隐私保护版本的分析。
search_text: Finite-Time Analysis of Fully Decentralized Single-Timescale Actor-Critic 完全去中心化单时间尺度 Actor-Critic 的有限时间分析 Decentralized Actor-Critic (AC) algorithms have been widely utilized for multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) and have achieved remarkable success. Apart from its empirical success, the theoretical convergence property of decentralized AC algorithms is largely unexplored. Most of the existing finite-time convergence results are derived based on either double-loop update or two-timescale step sizes rule, and this is the case even for centralized AC algorithm under a single-agent setting. In practice, the \emph{single-timescale} update is widely utilized, where actor and critic are updated in an alternating manner with step sizes being of the same order. In this work, we study a decentralized \emph{single-timescale} AC algorithm.Theoretically, using linear approximation for value and reward estimation, we show that the algorithm has sample complexity of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\varepsilon^{-2})$ under Markovian sampling, which matches the optimal complexity with a double-loop implementation (here, $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}$ hides a logarithmic term). When we reduce to the single-agent setting, our result yields new sample complexity for centralized AC using a single-timescale update scheme. The central to establishing our complexity results is \emph{the hidden smoothness of the optimal critic variable} we revealed. We also provide a local action privacy-preserving version of our algorithm and its analysis. Finally, we conduct experiments to show the superiority of our algorithm over the existing decentralized AC algorithms. 去中心化 Actor-Critic（AC）算法已广泛应用于多智能体强化学习（MARL）并取得了显着的成功。除了实证上的成功之外，去中心化 AC 算法的理论收敛特性在很大程度上尚未被探索。现有的有限时间收敛结果大多是基于双循环更新或两个时间尺度步长规则得出的，即使对于单智能体设置下的集中式AC算法也是如此。在实践中，\emph{单时间尺度}更新被广泛使用，其中演员和评论家以交替的方式更新，步长大小具有相同的顺序。在这项工作中，我们研究了一种去中心化的\emph{single-timescale} AC算法。理论上，使用线性近似进行价值和奖励估计，我们表明该算法在马尔可夫采样下的样本复杂度为$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\varepsilon^{-2})$，这与双循环实现的最佳复杂度相匹配（这里，$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}$隐藏了对数项）。当我们减少到单代理设置时，我们的结果使用单时间尺度更新方案为集中式 AC 产生新的样本复杂性。建立复杂性结果的核心是我们揭示的\emph{最优评价变量的隐藏平滑度}。我们还提供我们的算法及其分析的本地操作隐私保护版本。最后，我们进行实验来证明我们的算法相对于现有的去中心化 AC 算法的优越性。 本文研究了去中心化单时间尺度Actor-Critic算法的有限时间收敛性分析，提出了理论保证并验证了其优越性。 Qijun Luo,Xiao Li cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zongyuan Huang,Shengyuan Xu,Menghan Wang,Hansi Wu,Yanyan Xu,Yaohui Jin
title: Human Mobility Prediction with Causal and Spatial-constrained Multi-task Network
title_zh: 利用因果和空间约束多任务网络进行人体流动预测
comment: Updated version (We have corrected the title error in the previous version.)
comments: Updated version (We have corrected the title error in the previous version.)
abstract: Modeling human mobility helps to understand how people are accessing resources and physically contacting with each other in cities, and thus contributes to various applications such as urban planning, epidemic control, and location-based advertisement. Next location prediction is one decisive task in individual human mobility modeling and is usually viewed as sequence modeling, solved with Markov or RNN-based methods. However, the existing models paid little attention to the logic of individual travel decisions and the reproducibility of the collective behavior of population. To this end, we propose a Causal and Spatial-constrained Long and Short-term Learner (CSLSL) for next location prediction. CSLSL utilizes a causal structure based on multi-task learning to explicitly model the "\textit{when$\rightarrow$what$\rightarrow$where}", a.k.a. "\textit{time$\rightarrow$activity$\rightarrow$location}" decision logic. We next propose a spatial-constrained loss function as an auxiliary task, to ensure the consistency between the predicted and actual spatial distribution of travelers' destinations. Moreover, CSLSL adopts modules named Long and Short-term Capturer (LSC) to learn the transition regularities across different time spans. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets show promising performance improvements of CSLSL over baselines and confirm the effectiveness of introducing the causality and consistency constraints. The implementation is available at https://github.com/urbanmobility/CSLSL.
summary: Modeling human mobility helps to understand how people are accessing resources and physically contacting with each other in cities, and thus contributes to various applications such as urban planning, epidemic control, and location-based advertisement. Next location prediction is one decisive task in individual human mobility modeling and is usually viewed as sequence modeling, solved with Markov or RNN-based methods. However, the existing models paid little attention to the logic of individual travel decisions and the reproducibility of the collective behavior of population. To this end, we propose a Causal and Spatial-constrained Long and Short-term Learner (CSLSL) for next location prediction. CSLSL utilizes a causal structure based on multi-task learning to explicitly model the "\textit{when$\rightarrow$what$\rightarrow$where}", a.k.a. "\textit{time$\rightarrow$activity$\rightarrow$location}" decision logic. We next propose a spatial-constrained loss function as an auxiliary task, to ensure the consistency between the predicted and actual spatial distribution of travelers' destinations. Moreover, CSLSL adopts modules named Long and Short-term Capturer (LSC) to learn the transition regularities across different time spans. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets show promising performance improvements of CSLSL over baselines and confirm the effectiveness of introducing the causality and consistency constraints. The implementation is available at https://github.com/urbanmobility/CSLSL.
abstract_zh: 对人员流动进行建模有助于了解人们如何在城市中获取资源并相互进行身体接触，从而有助于城市规划、流行病控制和基于位置的广告等各种应用。下一位置预测是个体人类移动建模中的一项决定性任务，通常被视为序列建模，通过马尔可夫或基于 RNN 的方法解决。然而，现有模型很少关注个体出行决策的逻辑和人群集体行为的再现性。为此，我们提出了一种用于下一个位置预测的因果和空间约束的长期和短期学习器（CSLSL）。 CSLSL 利用基于多任务学习的因果结构来显式建模“\textit{when$\rightarrow$what$\rightarrow$where}”，即“\textit{time$\rightarrow$activity$\rightarrow$location}”决策逻辑。接下来，我们提出一个空间约束损失函数作为辅助任务，以确保旅行者目的地的预测和实际空间分布之间的一致性。此外，CSLSL 采用名为长期和短期捕获器（LSC）的模块来学习不同时间跨度的转换规律。对三个真实世界数据集的广泛实验表明，CSSLL 相对于基线的性能有望得到改善，并证实了引入因果关系和一致性约束的有效性。该实施可在 https://github.com/urbanmobility/CSLSL 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合因果关系和空间约束的多任务网络CSLSL，用于提升人类移动轨迹预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有模型忽视个体出行决策逻辑（时间→活动→地点）及群体行为一致性，导致预测结果缺乏可解释性和群体行为复现性。
AI.method: 设计因果结构建模决策逻辑，引入空间约束损失函数确保目的地分布一致性，并采用长短时特征捕捉模块（LSC）学习跨时间跨度的转移规律。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上实验表明，CSLSL在预测性能上显著优于基线模型，验证了因果性与一致性约束的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模因果关系与空间约束，CSLSL有效提升了个体与群体层面的移动预测效果，为城市规划等应用提供可靠支持。

authors_text: Boyang Deng,Meiyan Lin,Shoulun Long
title: Adding New Categories in Object Detection Using Few-Shot Copy-Paste
title_zh: 使用少量复制粘贴在对象检测中添加新类别
abstract: Developing data-efficient instance detection models that can handle rare object categories remains a key challenge in computer vision. However, existing research often overlooks data collection strategies and evaluation metrics tailored to real-world scenarios involving neural networks. In this study, we systematically investigate data collection and augmentation techniques focused on object occlusion, aiming to mimic occlusion relationships observed in practical applications. Surprisingly, we find that even a simple occlusion mechanism is sufficient to achieve strong performance when introducing new object categories. Notably, by adding just 15 images of a new category to a large-scale training dataset containing over half a million images across hundreds of categories, the model achieves 95\% accuracy on an unseen test set with thousands of instances of the new category.
summary: Developing data-efficient instance detection models that can handle rare object categories remains a key challenge in computer vision. However, existing research often overlooks data collection strategies and evaluation metrics tailored to real-world scenarios involving neural networks. In this study, we systematically investigate data collection and augmentation techniques focused on object occlusion, aiming to mimic occlusion relationships observed in practical applications. Surprisingly, we find that even a simple occlusion mechanism is sufficient to achieve strong performance when introducing new object categories. Notably, by adding just 15 images of a new category to a large-scale training dataset containing over half a million images across hundreds of categories, the model achieves 95\% accuracy on an unseen test set with thousands of instances of the new category.
abstract_zh: 开发能够处理稀有对象类别的数据高效的实例检测模型仍然是计算机视觉中的一个关键挑战。然而，现有的研究经常忽视针对涉及神经网络的现实场景量身定制的数据收集策略和评估指标。在本研究中，我们系统地研究了针对对象遮挡的数据收集和增强技术，旨在模拟实际应用中观察到的遮挡关系。令人惊讶的是，我们发现即使是简单的遮挡机制也足以在引入新的对象类别时实现强大的性能。值得注意的是，通过将新类别的 15 个图像添加到包含数百个类别的超过 50 万张图像的大型训练数据集中，该模型在包含数千个新类别实例的未见过的测试集上实现了 95% 的准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过少量样本和复制粘贴方法向目标检测模型添加新类别的方式，并研究遮挡数据增强技术。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在处理稀有物体类别时忽视了真实场景下的数据收集策略和评估指标，而有效数据增强对模型性能至关重要。
AI.method: 通过简单复制粘贴生成新类别图像并模拟遮挡关系，仅向大规模数据集添加15张新类别图像进行训练。
AI.result: 在包含数千个新类别实例的测试集中，模型达到95%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 少量数据结合遮挡增强即可有效扩展目标检测模型的新类别识别能力，为数据高效模型提供新思路。

authors_text: Linh Kästner,Teham Bhuiyan,Tuan Anh Le,Elias Treis,Johannes Cox,Boris Meinardus,Jacek Kmiecik,Reyk Carstens,Duc Pichel,Bassel Fatloun,Niloufar Khorsandi,Jens Lambrecht
title: Arena-Bench: A Benchmarking Suite for Obstacle Avoidance Approaches in Highly Dynamic Environments
title_zh: Arena-Bench：高动态环境中避障方法的基准测试套件
comment: Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L), 2022, 8 pages, 6 figures
comments: Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L), 2022, 8 pages, 6 figures
abstract: The ability to autonomously navigate safely, especially within dynamic environments, is paramount for mobile robotics. In recent years, DRL approaches have shown superior performance in dynamic obstacle avoidance. However, these learning-based approaches are often developed in specially designed simulation environments and are hard to test against conventional planning approaches. Furthermore, the integration and deployment of these approaches into real robotic platforms are not yet completely solved. In this paper, we present Arena-bench, a benchmark suite to train, test, and evaluate navigation planners on different robotic platforms within 3D environments. It provides tools to design and generate highly dynamic evaluation worlds, scenarios, and tasks for autonomous navigation and is fully integrated into the robot operating system. To demonstrate the functionalities of our suite, we trained a DRL agent on our platform and compared it against a variety of existing different model-based and learning-based navigation approaches on a variety of relevant metrics. Finally, we deployed the approaches towards real robots and demonstrated the reproducibility of the results. The code is publicly available at github.com/ignc-research/arena-bench.
summary: The ability to autonomously navigate safely, especially within dynamic environments, is paramount for mobile robotics. In recent years, DRL approaches have shown superior performance in dynamic obstacle avoidance. However, these learning-based approaches are often developed in specially designed simulation environments and are hard to test against conventional planning approaches. Furthermore, the integration and deployment of these approaches into real robotic platforms are not yet completely solved. In this paper, we present Arena-bench, a benchmark suite to train, test, and evaluate navigation planners on different robotic platforms within 3D environments. It provides tools to design and generate highly dynamic evaluation worlds, scenarios, and tasks for autonomous navigation and is fully integrated into the robot operating system. To demonstrate the functionalities of our suite, we trained a DRL agent on our platform and compared it against a variety of existing different model-based and learning-based navigation approaches on a variety of relevant metrics. Finally, we deployed the approaches towards real robots and demonstrated the reproducibility of the results. The code is publicly available at github.com/ignc-research/arena-bench.
abstract_zh: 安全自主导航的能力，尤其是在动态环境中，对于移动机器人至关重要。近年来，DRL方法在动态避障方面表现出了优越的性能。然而，这些基于学习的方法通常是在专门设计的模拟环境中开发的，并且很难针对传统的规划方法进行测试。此外，将这些方法集成和部署到真实的机器人平台中尚未完全解决。在本文中，我们介绍了 Arena-bench，这是一个基准套件，用于在 3D 环境中的不同机器人平台上训练、测试和评估导航规划器。它提供了设计和生成用于自主导航的高度动态评估世界、场景和任务的工具，并完全集成到机器人操作系统中。为了演示我们套件的功能，我们在我们的平台上训练了一个 DRL 代理，并将其与各种现有的不同的基于模型和基于学习的导航方法在各种相关指标上进行比较。最后，我们将这些方法部署到真实的机器人上，并证明了结果的可重复性。该代码可在 github.com/ignc-research/arena-bench 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Arena-Bench基准测试套件，用于在三维动态环境中训练、测试和评估不同机器人平台的导航规划器。
AI.motivation: 动态环境下的自主导航对移动机器人至关重要，但现有基于深度强化学习的方法多依赖特定仿真环境，难以与传统规划方法对比，且实际部署仍存在挑战。
AI.method: 开发Arena-Bench工具套件，支持设计动态评估场景并集成于机器人操作系统，通过训练DRL代理并与多种模型驱动和学习驱动方法进行对比实验，验证其在真实机器人上的可复现性。
AI.result: 成功训练DRL代理并在多种指标上与现有方法对比，验证了基准套件的有效性，并通过实际机器人部署展示了结果的可复现性。
AI.conclusion: Arena-Bench为动态避障方法的评估与部署提供了统一平台，代码已开源，有助于推动导航算法的研究与实际应用。

In recent years, DRL approaches have shown superior performance in dynamic obstacle avoidance. However, these learning-based approaches are often developed in specially designed simulation environments and are hard to test against conventional planning approaches. Furthermore, the integration and deployment of these approaches into real robotic platforms are not yet completely solved. In this paper, we present Arena-bench, a benchmark suite to train, test, and evaluate navigation planners on different robotic platforms within 3D environments. It provides tools to design and generate highly dynamic evaluation worlds, scenarios, and tasks for autonomous navigation and is fully integrated into the robot operating system. To demonstrate the functionalities of our suite, we trained a DRL agent on our platform and compared it against a variety of existing different model-based and learning-based navigation approaches on a variety of relevant metrics. Finally, we deployed the approaches towards real robots and demonstrated the reproducibility of the results. authors_text: Juncheng Wang,Junyu Gao,Yuan Yuan,Qi Wang
title: Crowd Localization from Gaussian Mixture Scoped Knowledge and Scoped Teacher
title_zh: 来自高斯混合范围知识和范围教师的人群定位
comment: Accepted by IEEE TIP
comments: Accepted by IEEE TIP
abstract: Crowd localization is to predict each instance head position in crowd scenarios. Since the distance of instances being to the camera are variant, there exists tremendous gaps among scales of instances within an image, which is called the intrinsic scale shift. The core reason of intrinsic scale shift being one of the most essential issues in crowd localization is that it is ubiquitous in crowd scenes and makes scale distribution chaotic. To this end, the paper concentrates on access to tackle the chaos of the scale distribution incurred by intrinsic scale shift. We propose Gaussian Mixture Scope (GMS) to regularize the chaotic scale distribution. Concretely, the GMS utilizes a Gaussian mixture distribution to adapt to scale distribution and decouples the mixture model into sub-normal distributions to regularize the chaos within the sub-distributions. Then, an alignment is introduced to regularize the chaos among sub-distributions. However, despite that GMS is effective in regularizing the data distribution, it amounts to dislodging the hard samples in training set, which incurs overfitting. We assert that it is blamed on the block of transferring the latent knowledge exploited by GMS from data to model. Therefore, a Scoped Teacher playing a role of bridge in knowledge transform is proposed. What' s more, the consistency regularization is also introduced to implement knowledge transform. To that effect, the further constraints are deployed on Scoped Teacher to derive feature consistence between teacher and student end. With proposed GMS and Scoped Teacher implemented on five mainstream datasets of crowd localization, the extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our work. Moreover, comparing with existing crowd locators, our work achieves state-of-the-art via F1-meansure comprehensively on five datasets.

Since the distance of instances being to the camera are variant, there exists tremendous gaps among scales of instances within an image, which is called the intrinsic scale shift. The core reason of intrinsic scale shift being one of the most essential issues in crowd localization is that it is ubiquitous in crowd scenes and makes scale distribution chaotic. To this end, the paper concentrates on access to tackle the chaos of the scale distribution incurred by intrinsic scale shift. We propose Gaussian Mixture Scope (GMS) to regularize the chaotic scale distribution. Concretely, the GMS utilizes a Gaussian mixture distribution to adapt to scale distribution and decouples the mixture model into sub-normal distributions to regularize the chaos within the sub-distributions. Then, an alignment is introduced to regularize the chaos among sub-distributions. However, despite that GMS is effective in regularizing the data distribution, it amounts to dislodging the hard samples in training set, which incurs overfitting. We assert that it is blamed on the block of transferring the latent knowledge exploited by GMS from data to model. Therefore, a Scoped Teacher playing a role of bridge in knowledge transform is proposed. What' s more, the consistency regularization is also introduced to implement knowledge transform. To that effect, the further constraints are deployed on Scoped Teacher to derive feature consistence between teacher and student end. With proposed GMS and Scoped Teacher implemented on five mainstream datasets of crowd localization, the extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our work. Moreover, comparing with existing crowd locators, our work achieves state-of-the-art via F1-meansure comprehensively on five datasets.
abstract_zh: 人群定位是预测人群场景中每个实例的头部位置。由于实例到相机的距离不同，图像中实例的尺度之间存在巨大差距，这称为内在尺度偏移。内在尺度变化成为人群定位中最本质问题之一的核心原因是它在人群场景中普遍存在并导致尺度分布混乱。为此，本文重点关注如何解决因内在尺度转移而导致的尺度分布混乱问题。我们提出高斯混合范围（GMS）来规范混沌尺度分布。具体来说，GMS利用高斯混合分布来适应尺度分布，并将混合模型解耦为次正态分布，以规范子分布内的混沌。然后，引入对齐来规范子分布之间的混乱。然而，尽管GMS能够有效地规范数据分布，但它相当于将训练集中的硬样本移出，从而导致过拟合。我们断言，这归咎于 GMS 利用的潜在知识从数据到模型的转移受阻。因此，提出了一个在知识转化中发挥桥梁作用的范围教师。此外，还引入一致性正则化来实现知识转换。为此，在范围教师上部署进一步的约束，以得出教师端和学生端之间的特征一致性。通过在五个主流人群定位数据集上实施所提出的 GMS 和 Scoped Teacher，广泛的实验证明了我们工作的优越性。此外，与现有的人群定位器相比，我们的工作通过 F1 测量在五个数据集上全面实现了最先进的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高斯混合范围知识和范围教师的拥挤场景定位方法，旨在解决因实例尺度变化导致的定位混乱问题。
AI.motivation: 拥挤场景中实例与相机的距离差异导致尺度分布混乱（内在尺度偏移），这是拥挤定位中的核心挑战之一。
AI.method: 提出高斯混合范围（GMS）正则化尺度分布，并通过范围教师桥接知识迁移，结合一致性正则化约束师生模型特征一致性。
AI.result: 在五个主流数据集上实验表明，该方法在F1-measure指标上达到最先进的性能，优于现有拥挤定位方法。
AI.conclusion: GMS与范围教师的联合设计有效缓解了尺度混乱问题，通过知识迁移机制提升了模型鲁棒性与定位精度。

authors_text: Lachlan Chumbley,Morris Gu,Rhys Newbury,Jurgen Leitner,Akansel Cosgun
title: Integrating High-Resolution Tactile Sensing into Grasp Stability Prediction
title_zh: 将高分辨率触觉传感集成到抓取稳定性预测中
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures
abstract: We investigate how high-resolution tactile sensors can be utilized in combination with vision and depth sensing, to improve grasp stability prediction. Recent advances in simulating high-resolution tactile sensing, in particular the TACTO simulator, enabled us to evaluate how neural networks can be trained with a combination of sensing modalities. With the large amounts of data needed to train large neural networks, robotic simulators provide a fast way to automate the data collection process. We expand on the existing work through an ablation study and an increased set of objects taken from the YCB benchmark set. Our results indicate that while the combination of vision, depth, and tactile sensing provides the best prediction results on known objects, the network fails to generalize to unknown objects. Our work also addresses existing issues with robotic grasping in tactile simulation and how to overcome them.
summary: We investigate how high-resolution tactile sensors can be utilized in combination with vision and depth sensing, to improve grasp stability prediction. Recent advances in simulating high-resolution tactile sensing, in particular the TACTO simulator, enabled us to evaluate how neural networks can be trained with a combination of sensing modalities. With the large amounts of data needed to train large neural networks, robotic simulators provide a fast way to automate the data collection process. We expand on the existing work through an ablation study and an increased set of objects taken from the YCB benchmark set. Our results indicate that while the combination of vision, depth, and tactile sensing provides the best prediction results on known objects, the network fails to generalize to unknown objects. Our work also addresses existing issues with robotic grasping in tactile simulation and how to overcome them.
abstract_zh: 我们研究如何将高分辨率触觉传感器与视觉和深度传感结合使用，以改善抓取稳定性预测。模拟高分辨率触觉传感（特别是 TACTO 模拟器）的最新进展使我们能够评估如何结合传感模式来训练神经网络。由于训练大型神经网络需要大量数据，机器人模拟器提供了一种自动化数据收集过程的快速方法。我们通过消融研究和增加从 YCB 基准集中获取的对象集来扩展现有工作。我们的结果表明，虽然视觉、深度和触觉感知的结合提供了对已知物体的最佳预测结果，但网络无法推广到未知物体。我们的工作还解决了触觉模拟中机器人抓取的现有问题以及如何克服这些问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究将高分辨率触觉传感与视觉、深度传感结合，提升机械臂抓取稳定性预测的准确性，并探讨其在未知物体上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有抓取稳定性预测方法在未知物体上表现不足，需探索多模态传感数据融合以提高预测可靠性，同时解决触觉模拟中的技术瓶颈。
AI.method: 基于TACTO触觉模拟器生成多模态数据，结合视觉、深度和触觉信息训练神经网络；通过消融实验和YCB数据集扩展验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 多模态融合在已知物体上显著提升预测精度，但模型对未知物体泛化能力较差；提出改进方案缓解触觉模拟中的传感器噪声与物理交互误差问题。
AI.conclusion: 多模态传感数据融合可优化抓取预测，但需进一步研究未知物体的自适应机制与触觉模拟的真实性提升方法。
