search_text: Integrating High-Resolution Tactile Sensing into Grasp Stability Prediction 将高分辨率触觉传感集成到抓取稳定性预测中 We investigate how high-resolution tactile sensors can be utilized in combination with vision and depth sensing, to improve grasp stability prediction. Recent advances in simulating high-resolution tactile sensing, in particular the TACTO simulator, enabled us to evaluate how neural networks can be trained with a combination of sensing modalities. With the large amounts of data needed to train large neural networks, robotic simulators provide a fast way to automate the data collection process. We expand on the existing work through an ablation study and an increased set of objects taken from the YCB benchmark set. Our results indicate that while the combination of vision, depth, and tactile sensing provides the best prediction results on known objects, the network fails to generalize to unknown objects. Our work also addresses existing issues with robotic grasping in tactile simulation and how to overcome them. 我们研究如何将高分辨率触觉传感器与视觉和深度传感结合使用，以改善抓取稳定性预测。模拟高分辨率触觉传感（特别是 TACTO 模拟器）的最新进展使我们能够评估如何结合传感模式来训练神经网络。由于训练大型神经网络需要大量数据，机器人模拟器提供了一种自动化数据收集过程的快速方法。我们通过消融研究和增加从 YCB 基准集中获取的对象集来扩展现有工作。我们的结果表明，虽然视觉、深度和触觉感知的结合提供了对已知物体的最佳预测结果，但网络无法推广到未知物体。我们的工作还解决了触觉模拟中机器人抓取的现有问题以及如何克服这些问题。 本文研究将高分辨率触觉传感与视觉、深度传感结合，提升机械臂抓取稳定性预测的准确性，并探讨其在未知物体上的泛化能力。 Lachlan Chumbley,Morris Gu,Rhys Newbury,Jurgen Leitner,Akansel Cosgun cs.RO

authors_text: Lihuan Li,Maurice Pagnucco,Yang Song
title: Graph-based Spatial Transformer with Memory Replay for Multi-future Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction
title_zh: 具有记忆回放功能的基于图的空间变换器，用于多未来行人轨迹预测
comment: This paper has been accepted by CVPR 2022. Reference: Li, L., Pagnucco, M. and Song, Y., 2022. Graph-Based Spatial Transformer With Memory Replay for Multi-Future Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction. In Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (pp. 2231-2241)
comments: This paper has been accepted by CVPR 2022. Reference: Li, L., Pagnucco, M. and Song, Y., 2022. Graph-Based Spatial Transformer With Memory Replay for Multi-Future Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction. In Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (pp. 2231-2241)
abstract: Pedestrian trajectory prediction is an essential and challenging task for a variety of real-life applications such as autonomous driving and robotic motion planning. Besides generating a single future path, predicting multiple plausible future paths is becoming popular in some recent work on trajectory prediction. However, existing methods typically emphasize spatial interactions between pedestrians and surrounding areas but ignore the smoothness and temporal consistency of predictions. Our model aims to forecast multiple paths based on a historical trajectory by modeling multi-scale graph-based spatial transformers combined with a trajectory smoothing algorithm named ``Memory Replay'' utilizing a memory graph. Our method can comprehensively exploit the spatial information as well as correct the temporally inconsistent trajectories (e.g., sharp turns). We also propose a new evaluation metric named ``Percentage of Trajectory Usage'' to evaluate the comprehensiveness of diverse multi-future predictions. Our extensive experiments show that the proposed model achieves state-of-the-art performance on multi-future prediction and competitive results for single-future prediction. Code released at https://github.com/Jacobieee/ST-MR.
summary: Pedestrian trajectory prediction is an essential and challenging task for a variety of real-life applications such as autonomous driving and robotic motion planning. Besides generating a single future path, predicting multiple plausible future paths is becoming popular in some recent work on trajectory prediction. However, existing methods typically emphasize spatial interactions between pedestrians and surrounding areas but ignore the smoothness and temporal consistency of predictions. Our model aims to forecast multiple paths based on a historical trajectory by modeling multi-scale graph-based spatial transformers combined with a trajectory smoothing algorithm named ``Memory Replay'' utilizing a memory graph. Our method can comprehensively exploit the spatial information as well as correct the temporally inconsistent trajectories (e.g., sharp turns). We also propose a new evaluation metric named ``Percentage of Trajectory Usage'' to evaluate the comprehensiveness of diverse multi-future predictions. Our extensive experiments show that the proposed model achieves state-of-the-art performance on multi-future prediction and competitive results for single-future prediction. Code released at https://github.com/Jacobieee/ST-MR.
abstract_zh: 对于自动驾驶和机器人运动规划等各种现实应用来说，行人轨迹预测是一项重要且具有挑战性的任务。除了生成单个未来路径之外，在最近的一些轨迹预测工作中，预测多个可能的未来路径也变得越来越流行。然而，现有的方法通常强调行人与周围区域之间的空间相互作用，而忽略预测的平滑性和时间一致性。我们的模型旨在通过对基于多尺度图的空间变换器进行建模，并结合利用内存图的名为“内存重播”的轨迹平滑算法，来预测基于历史轨迹的多条路径。我们的方法可以综合利用空间信息并纠正时间不一致的轨迹（例如急转弯）。我们还提出了一种名为“轨迹使用百分比”的新评估指标来评估各种多重未来预测的全面性。我们的大量实验表明，所提出的模型在多重未来预测方面实现了最先进的性能，在单一未来预测方面取得了有竞争力的结果。代码发布于 https://github.com/Jacobieee/ST-MR。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图的空间变换器与记忆回放机制的模型，用于多未来行人轨迹预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法侧重于行人与周围环境的空间交互，但忽略了预测轨迹的平滑性与时间一致性，导致预测结果出现尖锐转弯等不自然现象。
AI.method: 结合多尺度图空间变换器与记忆回放算法，通过记忆图修正时间不一致轨迹，并提出新的评估指标「轨迹使用率百分比」衡量多未来预测的全面性。
AI.result: 在多未来预测任务中达到SOTA性能，在单未来预测中表现优异，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过融合空间建模与时间修正机制，有效提升了轨迹预测的准确性与多样性，新指标为多未来预测评估提供了新视角。

Besides generating a single future path, predicting multiple plausible future paths is becoming popular in some recent work on trajectory prediction. Our extensive experiments show that the proposed model achieves state-of-the-art performance on multi-future prediction and competitive results for single-future prediction. authors_text: Shaoru Wang,Jin Gao,Bing Li,Weiming Hu
title: Narrowing the Gap: Improved Detector Training with Noisy Location Annotations
title_zh: 缩小差距：通过嘈杂的位置注释改进检测器训练
abstract: Deep learning methods require massive of annotated data for optimizing parameters. For example, datasets attached with accurate bounding box annotations are essential for modern object detection tasks. However, labeling with such pixel-wise accuracy is laborious and time-consuming, and elaborate labeling procedures are indispensable for reducing man-made noise, involving annotation review and acceptance testing. In this paper, we focus on the impact of noisy location annotations on the performance of object detection approaches and aim to, on the user side, reduce the adverse effect of the noise. First, noticeable performance degradation is experimentally observed for both one-stage and two-stage detectors when noise is introduced to the bounding box annotations. For instance, our synthesized noise results in performance decrease from 38.9% AP to 33.6% AP for FCOS detector on COCO test split, and 37.8%AP to 33.7%AP for Faster R-CNN. Second, a self-correction technique based on a Bayesian filter for prediction ensemble is proposed to better exploit the noisy location annotations following a Teacher-Student learning paradigm. Experiments for both synthesized and real-world scenarios consistently demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, e.g., our method increases the degraded performance of the FCOS detector from 33.6% AP to 35.6% AP on COCO.
summary: Deep learning methods require massive of annotated data for optimizing parameters. For example, datasets attached with accurate bounding box annotations are essential for modern object detection tasks. However, labeling with such pixel-wise accuracy is laborious and time-consuming, and elaborate labeling procedures are indispensable for reducing man-made noise, involving annotation review and acceptance testing. In this paper, we focus on the impact of noisy location annotations on the performance of object detection approaches and aim to, on the user side, reduce the adverse effect of the noise. First, noticeable performance degradation is experimentally observed for both one-stage and two-stage detectors when noise is introduced to the bounding box annotations. For instance, our synthesized noise results in performance decrease from 38.9% AP to 33.6% AP for FCOS detector on COCO test split, and 37.8%AP to 33.7%AP for Faster R-CNN. Second, a self-correction technique based on a Bayesian filter for prediction ensemble is proposed to better exploit the noisy location annotations following a Teacher-Student learning paradigm. Experiments for both synthesized and real-world scenarios consistently demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, e.g., our method increases the degraded performance of the FCOS detector from 33.6% AP to 35.6% AP on COCO.
abstract_zh: 深度学习方法需要大量带注释的数据来优化参数。例如，附有准确边界框注释的数据集对于现代对象检测任务至关重要。然而，以如此像素级的精度进行标记是费力且耗时的，并且复杂的标记程序对于减少人为噪声是必不可少的，包括注释审查和验收测试。在本文中，我们重点研究噪声位置注释对对象检测方法性能的影响，并旨在在用户方面减少噪声的不利影响。首先，当边界框注释引入噪声时，实验观察到单级和两级检测器的性能明显下降。例如，我们的合成噪声导致 COCO 测试分割上的 FCOS 检测器的性能从 38.9% AP 下降到 33.6% AP，而 Faster R-CNN 的性能从 37.8% AP 下降到 33.7%。其次，提出了一种基于贝叶斯滤波器的预测集成的自校正技术，以更好地利用遵循师生学习范式的噪声位置注释。合成场景和真实场景的实验一致证明了我们方法的有效性，例如，我们的方法将 COCO 上 FCOS 检测器的性能下降从 33.6% AP 提高到 35.6% AP。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了噪声位置注释对目标检测性能的影响，并提出了一种自校正方法以减少噪声的负面影响。
AI.motivation: 精确的边界框标注耗时且易引入噪声，导致检测性能下降，需有效方法缓解噪声影响。
AI.method: 提出基于贝叶斯滤波的自校正技术，结合教师-学生学习框架，利用预测集成优化噪声注释。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在合成和真实噪声场景下均有效，如COCO数据集上FCOS的AP提升2个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效缓解了噪声注释的负面影响，为实际检测任务中的标注噪声问题提供了可行解决方案。

search_text: Narrowing the Gap: Improved Detector Training with Noisy Location Annotations 缩小差距：通过嘈杂的位置注释改进检测器训练 Deep learning methods require massive of annotated data for optimizing parameters. For example, datasets attached with accurate bounding box annotations are essential for modern object detection tasks. However, labeling with such pixel-wise accuracy is laborious and time-consuming, and elaborate labeling procedures are indispensable for reducing man-made noise, involving annotation review and acceptance testing. In this paper, we focus on the impact of noisy location annotations on the performance of object detection approaches and aim to, on the user side, reduce the adverse effect of the noise. First, noticeable performance degradation is experimentally observed for both one-stage and two-stage detectors when noise is introduced to the bounding box annotations. For instance, our synthesized noise results in performance decrease from 38.9% AP to 33.6% AP for FCOS detector on COCO test split, and 37.8%AP to 33.7%AP for Faster R-CNN. Second, a self-correction technique based on a Bayesian filter for prediction ensemble is proposed to better exploit the noisy location annotations following a Teacher-Student learning paradigm. Experiments for both synthesized and real-world scenarios consistently demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, e.g., our method increases the degraded performance of the FCOS detector from 33.6% AP to 35.6% AP on COCO. 深度学习方法需要大量带注释的数据来优化参数。例如，附有准确边界框注释的数据集对于现代对象检测任务至关重要。然而，以如此像素级的精度进行标记是费力且耗时的，并且复杂的标记程序对于减少人为噪声是必不可少的，包括注释审查和验收测试。在本文中，我们重点研究噪声位置注释对对象检测方法性能的影响，并旨在在用户方面减少噪声的不利影响。首先，当边界框注释引入噪声时，实验观察到单级和两级检测器的性能明显下降。例如，我们的合成噪声导致 COCO 测试分割上的 FCOS 检测器的性能从 38.9% AP 下降到 33.6% AP，而 Faster R-CNN 的性能从 37.8% AP 下降到 33.7%。其次，提出了一种基于贝叶斯滤波器的预测集成的自校正技术，以更好地利用遵循师生学习范式的噪声位置注释。合成场景和真实场景的实验一致证明了我们方法的有效性，例如，我们的方法将 COCO 上 FCOS 检测器的性能下降从 33.6% AP 提高到 35.6% AP。 本文研究了噪声位置注释对目标检测性能的影响，并提出了一种自校正方法以减少噪声的负面影响。 Shaoru Wang,Jin Gao,Bing Li,Weiming Hu cs.CV

authors_text: Zexi Chen,Yiyi Liao,Haozhe Du,Haodong Zhang,Xuecheng Xu,Haojian Lu,Rong Xiong,Yue Wang
title: DPCN++: Differentiable Phase Correlation Network for Versatile Pose Registration
title_zh: DPCN++：用于多功能姿势注册的可微相位相关网络
abstract: Pose registration is critical in vision and robotics. This paper focuses on the challenging task of initialization-free pose registration up to 7DoF for homogeneous and heterogeneous measurements. While recent learning-based methods show promise using differentiable solvers, they either rely on heuristically defined correspondences or are prone to local minima. We present a differentiable phase correlation (DPC) solver that is globally convergent and correspondence-free. When combined with simple feature extraction networks, our general framework DPCN++ allows for versatile pose registration with arbitrary initialization. Specifically, the feature extraction networks first learn dense feature grids from a pair of homogeneous/heterogeneous measurements. These feature grids are then transformed into a translation and scale invariant spectrum representation based on Fourier transform and spherical radial aggregation, decoupling translation and scale from rotation. Next, the rotation, scale, and translation are independently and efficiently estimated in the spectrum step-by-step using the DPC solver. The entire pipeline is differentiable and trained end-to-end. We evaluate DCPN++ on a wide range of registration tasks taking different input modalities, including 2D bird's-eye view images, 3D object and scene measurements, and medical images. Experimental results demonstrate that DCPN++ outperforms both classical and learning-based baselines, especially on partially observed and heterogeneous measurements.
summary: Pose registration is critical in vision and robotics. This paper focuses on the challenging task of initialization-free pose registration up to 7DoF for homogeneous and heterogeneous measurements. While recent learning-based methods show promise using differentiable solvers, they either rely on heuristically defined correspondences or are prone to local minima. We present a differentiable phase correlation (DPC) solver that is globally convergent and correspondence-free. When combined with simple feature extraction networks, our general framework DPCN++ allows for versatile pose registration with arbitrary initialization. Specifically, the feature extraction networks first learn dense feature grids from a pair of homogeneous/heterogeneous measurements. These feature grids are then transformed into a translation and scale invariant spectrum representation based on Fourier transform and spherical radial aggregation, decoupling translation and scale from rotation. Next, the rotation, scale, and translation are independently and efficiently estimated in the spectrum step-by-step using the DPC solver. The entire pipeline is differentiable and trained end-to-end. We evaluate DCPN++ on a wide range of registration tasks taking different input modalities, including 2D bird's-eye view images, 3D object and scene measurements, and medical images. Experimental results demonstrate that DCPN++ outperforms both classical and learning-based baselines, especially on partially observed and heterogeneous measurements.
abstract_zh: 姿势注册对于视觉和机器人技术至关重要。本文重点讨论了同质和异质测量中高达 7DoF 的免初始化姿态配准这一具有挑战性的任务。虽然最近基于学习的方法显示出使用可​​微分求解器的前景，但它们要么依赖于启发式定义的对应关系，要么容易出现局部最小值。我们提出了一种全局收敛且无对应关系的可微相位相关（DPC）求解器。当与简单的特征提取网络相结合时，我们的通用框架 DPCN++ 允许通过任意初始化进行多功能姿势注册。具体来说，特征提取网络首先从一对同质/异质测量中学习密集特征网格。然后，这些特征网格基于傅里叶变换和球面径向聚合，转换为平移和尺度不变的谱表示，将平移和尺度与旋转解耦。接下来，使用 DPC 求解器在频谱中逐步独立且高效地估计旋转、缩放和平移。整个管道是可微分的并且是端到端训练的。我们在采用不同输入模式的各种配准任务上评估 DCPN++，包括 2D 鸟瞰图像、3D 对象和场景测量以及医学图像。实验结果表明，DCPN++ 优于经典基线和基于学习的基线，尤其是在部分观察和异构测量方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DPCN++框架，实现无需初始化的7自由度位姿注册，适用于同质和异质测量数据。
AI.motivation: 现有学习方法依赖启发式对应关系或易陷入局部最优，缺乏全局收敛性与初始化无关的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过可微分相位相关（DPC）求解器，结合特征提取网络生成翻译/尺度不变频谱表示，分步估计旋转、尺度和翻译参数。
AI.result: 在2D鸟瞰图、3D场景及医学图像等多模态数据集上优于经典方法和学习基线，尤其在部分观测和异质数据中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: DPCN++通过频谱解耦与可微分求解实现了通用位姿注册，验证了其在复杂场景下的有效性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Sanghoon Myung,In Huh,Wonik Jang,Jae Myung Choe,Jisu Ryu,Dae Sin Kim,Kee-Eung Kim,Changwook Jeong
title: PAC-Net: A Model Pruning Approach to Inductive Transfer Learning
title_zh: PAC-Net：归纳迁移学习的模型修剪方法
comment: In Proceedings of the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning, Baltimore, Maryland, USA, PMLR 162, 2022
comments: In Proceedings of the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning, Baltimore, Maryland, USA, PMLR 162, 2022
abstract: Inductive transfer learning aims to learn from a small amount of training data for the target task by utilizing a pre-trained model from the source task. Most strategies that involve large-scale deep learning models adopt initialization with the pre-trained model and fine-tuning for the target task. However, when using over-parameterized models, we can often prune the model without sacrificing the accuracy of the source task. This motivates us to adopt model pruning for transfer learning with deep learning models. In this paper, we propose PAC-Net, a simple yet effective approach for transfer learning based on pruning. PAC-Net consists of three steps: Prune, Allocate, and Calibrate (PAC). The main idea behind these steps is to identify essential weights for the source task, fine-tune on the source task by updating the essential weights, and then calibrate on the target task by updating the remaining redundant weights. Under the various and extensive set of inductive transfer learning experiments, we show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance by a large margin.
summary: Inductive transfer learning aims to learn from a small amount of training data for the target task by utilizing a pre-trained model from the source task. Most strategies that involve large-scale deep learning models adopt initialization with the pre-trained model and fine-tuning for the target task. However, when using over-parameterized models, we can often prune the model without sacrificing the accuracy of the source task. This motivates us to adopt model pruning for transfer learning with deep learning models. In this paper, we propose PAC-Net, a simple yet effective approach for transfer learning based on pruning. PAC-Net consists of three steps: Prune, Allocate, and Calibrate (PAC). The main idea behind these steps is to identify essential weights for the source task, fine-tune on the source task by updating the essential weights, and then calibrate on the target task by updating the remaining redundant weights. Under the various and extensive set of inductive transfer learning experiments, we show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 归纳迁移学习旨在通过利用源任务的预训练模型，从目标任务的少量训练数据中学习。大多数涉及大规模深度学习模型的策略都采用预训练模型的初始化和针对目标任务的微调。然而，当使用过度参数化模型时，我们通常可以在不牺牲源任务准确性的情况下修剪模型。这促使我们采用模型剪枝来进行深度学习模型的迁移学习。在本文中，我们提出了 PAC-Net，这是一种基于剪枝的简单而有效的迁移学习方法。 PAC-Net 包含三个步骤：修剪、分配和校准 (PAC)。这些步骤背后的主要思想是确定源任务的基本权重，通过更新基本权重对源任务进行微调，然后通过更新剩余的冗余权重来校准目标任务。在各种广泛的归纳迁移学习实验中，我们表明我们的方法在很大程度上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模型剪枝的归纳迁移学习方法PAC-Net，旨在通过剪枝策略提高迁移学习的性能。
AI.motivation: 在迁移学习中，使用预训练模型进行微调是常见策略，但使用过参数化模型时，往往可以通过剪枝而不影响源任务的准确性。因此，作者提出利用模型剪枝来优化迁移学习。
AI.method: PAC-Net方法包含三个步骤：剪枝（Prune）、分配（Allocate）和校准（Calibrate）。首先识别源任务中的关键权重，然后在源任务上微调这些关键权重，最后在校准阶段更新剩余冗余权重以适应目标任务。
AI.result: 在多种归纳迁移学习实验中，PAC-Net方法表现出色，取得了显著优于现有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: PAC-Net通过剪枝策略有效提升了迁移学习的性能，为模型优化和迁移学习提供了新的思路。

Most strategies that involve large-scale deep learning models adopt initialization with the pre-trained model and fine-tuning for the target task. However, when using over-parameterized models, we can often prune the model without sacrificing the accuracy of the source task. This motivates us to adopt model pruning for transfer learning with deep learning models. In this paper, we propose PAC-Net, a simple yet effective approach for transfer learning based on pruning. PAC-Net consists of three steps: Prune, Allocate, and Calibrate (PAC). The main idea behind these steps is to identify essential weights for the source task, fine-tune on the source task by updating the essential weights, and then calibrate on the target task by updating the remaining redundant weights. Under the various and extensive set of inductive transfer learning experiments, we show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance by a large margin. 归纳迁移学习旨在通过利用源任务的预训练模型，从目标任务的少量训练数据中学习。大多数涉及大规模深度学习模型的策略都采用预训练模型的初始化和针对目标任务的微调。然而，当使用过度参数化模型时，我们通常可以在不牺牲源任务准确性的情况下修剪模型。这促使我们采用模型剪枝来进行深度学习模型的迁移学习。在本文中，我们提出了 PAC-Net，这是一种基于剪枝的简单而有效的迁移学习方法。 PAC-Net 包含三个步骤：修剪、分配和校准 (PAC)。这些步骤背后的主要思想是确定源任务的基本权重，通过更新基本权重对源任务进行微调，然后通过更新剩余的冗余权重来校准目标任务。在各种广泛的归纳迁移学习实验中，我们表明我们的方法在很大程度上实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种基于模型剪枝的归纳迁移学习方法PAC-Net，旨在通过剪枝策略提高迁移学习的性能。 Sanghoon Myung,In Huh,Wonik Jang,Jae Myung Choe,Jisu Ryu,Dae Sin Kim,Kee-Eung Kim,Changwook Jeong cs.LG,cs.AI,physics.comp-ph,stat.AP,stat.ML

authors_text: Maya Gilad,Moti Freiman
title: PD-DWI: Predicting response to neoadjuvant chemotherapy in invasive breast cancer with Physiologically-Decomposed Diffusion-Weighted MRI machine-learning model
title_zh: PD-DWI：利用生理分解扩散加权 MRI 机器学习模型预测浸润性乳腺癌新辅助化疗的反应
comment: Accepted to Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention - MICCAI 2022 to be held during Sept 18-22 in Singapore
comments: Accepted to Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention - MICCAI 2022 to be held during Sept 18-22 in Singapore
abstract: Early prediction of pathological complete response (pCR) following neoadjuvant chemotherapy (NAC) for breast cancer plays a critical role in surgical planning and optimizing treatment strategies. Recently, machine and deep-learning based methods were suggested for early pCR prediction from multi-parametric MRI (mp-MRI) data including dynamic contrast-enhanced MRI and diffusion-weighted MRI (DWI) with moderate success. We introduce PD-DWI, a physiologically decomposed DWI machine-learning model to predict pCR from DWI and clinical data. Our model first decomposes the raw DWI data into the various physiological cues that are influencing the DWI signal and then uses the decomposed data, in addition to clinical variables, as the input features of a radiomics-based XGBoost model. We demonstrated the added-value of our PD-DWI model over conventional machine-learning approaches for pCR prediction from mp-MRI data using the publicly available Breast Multi-parametric MRI for prediction of NAC Response (BMMR2) challenge. Our model substantially improves the area under the curve (AUC), compared to the current best result on the leaderboard (0.8849 vs. 0.8397) for the challenge test set. PD-DWI has the potential to improve prediction of pCR following NAC for breast cancer, reduce overall mp-MRI acquisition times and eliminate the need for contrast-agent injection.

Our model first decomposes the raw DWI data into the various physiological cues that are influencing the DWI signal and then uses the decomposed data, in addition to clinical variables, as the input features of a radiomics-based XGBoost model. We demonstrated the added-value of our PD-DWI model over conventional machine-learning approaches for pCR prediction from mp-MRI data using the publicly available Breast Multi-parametric MRI for prediction of NAC Response (BMMR2) challenge. Our model substantially improves the area under the curve (AUC), compared to the current best result on the leaderboard (0.8849 vs. 0.8397) for the challenge test set. PD-DWI has the potential to improve prediction of pCR following NAC for breast cancer, reduce overall mp-MRI acquisition times and eliminate the need for contrast-agent injection.
abstract_zh: 乳腺癌新辅助化疗（NAC）后病理完全缓解（pCR）的早期预测在手术计划和优化治疗策略中发挥着关键作用。最近，基于机器和深度学习的方法被建议用于多参数 MRI (mp-MRI) 数据的早期 pCR 预测，包括动态对比增强 MRI 和扩散加权 MRI (DWI)，并取得了一定的成功。我们介绍 PD-DWI，这是一种生理分解的 DWI 机器学习模型，用于根据 DWI 和临床数据预测 pCR。我们的模型首先将原始 DWI 数据分解为影响 DWI 信号的各种生理线索，然后使用分解的数据以及临床变量作为基于放射组学的 XGBoost 模型的输入特征。我们证明了我们的 PD-DWI 模型相对于传统机器学习方法的附加值，用于使用公开的乳房多参数 MRI 来预测 NAC 反应 (BMMR2) 挑战，从 mp-MRI 数据进行 pCR 预测。与挑战测试集排行榜上当前的最佳结果（0.8849 与 0.8397）相比，我们的模型显着改善了曲线下面积 (AUC)。 PD-DWI 有潜力改善乳腺癌 NAC 后 pCR 的预测，减少总体 mp-MRI 采集时间并消除注射造影剂的需要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生理分解扩散加权MRI（PD-DWI）的机器学习模型，用于预测乳腺癌新辅助化疗后的病理完全反应（pCR）。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多参数MRI的机器学习方法在预测pCR时效果有限，需改进模型以提高准确性并减少对比剂使用。
AI.method: 将原始DWI数据分解为生理特征，结合临床数据输入基于放射组学的XGBoost模型进行预测。
AI.result: 在BMMR2挑战数据集上，PD-DWI模型的AUC达到0.8849，优于当前最佳结果0.8397。
AI.conclusion: PD-DWI可提升pCR预测精度，缩短MRI采集时间，并避免对比剂注射需求。

authors_text: Yanjie Song,Luona Wei,Qing Yang,Jian Wu,Lining Xing,Yingwu Chen
title: RL-GA: A Reinforcement Learning-Based Genetic Algorithm for Electromagnetic Detection Satellite Scheduling Problem
title_zh: RL-GA：一种基于强化学习的电磁探测卫星调度问题遗传算法
comment: 29 pages, 9 figures, Accepted by Swarm and Evolutionary Computation
comments: 29 pages, 9 figures, Accepted by Swarm and Evolutionary Computation
abstract: The study of electromagnetic detection satellite scheduling problem (EDSSP) has attracted attention due to the detection requirements for a large number of targets. This paper proposes a mixed-integer programming model for the EDSSP problem and a genetic algorithm based on reinforcement learning (RL-GA). Numerous factors that affect electromagnetic detection are considered in the model, such as detection mode, bandwidth, and other factors. The RL-GA embeds a Q-learning method into an improved genetic algorithm, and the evolution of each individual depends on the decision of the agent. Q-learning is used to guide the population search process by choosing evolution operators. In this way, the search information can be effectively used by the reinforcement learning method. In the algorithm, we design a reward function to update the Q value. According to the problem characteristics, a new combination of <state, action> is proposed. The RL-GA also uses an elite individual retention strategy to improve search performance. After that, a task time window selection algorithm (TTWSA) is proposed to evaluate the performance of population evolution. Several experiments are used to examine the scheduling effect of the proposed algorithm. Through the experimental verification of multiple instances, it can be seen that the RL-GA can solve the EDSSP problem effectively. Compared with the state-of-the-art algorithms, the RL-GA performs better in several aspects.
summary: The study of electromagnetic detection satellite scheduling problem (EDSSP) has attracted attention due to the detection requirements for a large number of targets. This paper proposes a mixed-integer programming model for the EDSSP problem and a genetic algorithm based on reinforcement learning (RL-GA). Numerous factors that affect electromagnetic detection are considered in the model, such as detection mode, bandwidth, and other factors. The RL-GA embeds a Q-learning method into an improved genetic algorithm, and the evolution of each individual depends on the decision of the agent. Q-learning is used to guide the population search process by choosing evolution operators. In this way, the search information can be effectively used by the reinforcement learning method. In the algorithm, we design a reward function to update the Q value. According to the problem characteristics, a new combination of <state, action> is proposed. The RL-GA also uses an elite individual retention strategy to improve search performance. After that, a task time window selection algorithm (TTWSA) is proposed to evaluate the performance of population evolution. Several experiments are used to examine the scheduling effect of the proposed algorithm. Through the experimental verification of multiple instances, it can be seen that the RL-GA can solve the EDSSP problem effectively. Compared with the state-of-the-art algorithms, the RL-GA performs better in several aspects.
abstract_zh: 电磁探测卫星调度问题（EDSSP）的研究由于对大量目标的探测需求而受到关注。本文提出了一种针对 EDSSP 问题的混合整数规划模型和基于强化学习的遗传算法（RL-GA）。模型中考虑了众多影响电磁检测的因素，如检测模式、带宽等因素。 RL-GA将Q-learning方法嵌入到改进​​的遗传算法中，每个个体的进化取决于智能体的决策。 Q-学习用于通过选择进化算子来指导群体搜索过程。这样，搜索信息就可以被强化学习方法有效利用。在算法中，我们设计了一个奖励函数来更新Q值。根据问题特点，提出了一种新的<state,action>组合。 RL-GA 还使用精英个体保留策略来提高搜索性能。之后，提出了任务时间窗口选择算法（TTWSA）来评估群体进化的性能。通过多个实验来检验所提算法的调度效果。通过多个实例的实验验证，可以看出RL-GA能够有效解决EDSSP问题。与最先进的算法相比，RL-GA 在多个方面表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的遗传算法（RL-GA），用于解决电磁检测卫星调度问题（EDSSP），通过结合Q学习和改进的遗传算法优化任务调度。
AI.motivation: 电磁检测卫星需处理大量目标的复杂调度需求，传统算法难以兼顾多因素（如检测模式、带宽）并高效求解。
AI.method: 将Q学习嵌入改进的遗传算法，设计奖励函数更新Q值，引入精英个体保留策略，并提出任务时间窗口选择算法（TTWSA）评估进化效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，RL-GA在多个实例中有效解决EDSSP，相比现有算法在调度效果上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: RL-GA通过强化学习引导种群搜索，有效利用问题特征，为复杂电磁检测卫星调度提供了新方法。

authors_text: Yuhang Dong,Gongping Yang,Yilong Yin
title: DRNet: Decomposition and Reconstruction Network for Remote Physiological Measurement
title_zh: DRNet：用于远程生理测量的分解和重建网络
abstract: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) based physiological measurement has great application values in affective computing, non-contact health monitoring, telehealth monitoring, etc, which has become increasingly important especially during the COVID-19 pandemic. Existing methods are generally divided into two groups. The first focuses on mining the subtle blood volume pulse (BVP) signals from face videos, but seldom explicitly models the noises that dominate face video content. They are susceptible to the noises and may suffer from poor generalization ability in unseen scenarios. The second focuses on modeling noisy data directly, resulting in suboptimal performance due to the lack of regularity of these severe random noises. In this paper, we propose a Decomposition and Reconstruction Network (DRNet) focusing on the modeling of physiological features rather than noisy data. A novel cycle loss is proposed to constrain the periodicity of physiological information. Besides, a plug-and-play Spatial Attention Block (SAB) is proposed to enhance features along with the spatial location information. Furthermore, an efficient Patch Cropping (PC) augmentation strategy is proposed to synthesize augmented samples with different noise and features. Extensive experiments on different public datasets as well as the cross-database testing demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) based physiological measurement has great application values in affective computing, non-contact health monitoring, telehealth monitoring, etc, which has become increasingly important especially during the COVID-19 pandemic. Existing methods are generally divided into two groups. The first focuses on mining the subtle blood volume pulse (BVP) signals from face videos, but seldom explicitly models the noises that dominate face video content. They are susceptible to the noises and may suffer from poor generalization ability in unseen scenarios. The second focuses on modeling noisy data directly, resulting in suboptimal performance due to the lack of regularity of these severe random noises. In this paper, we propose a Decomposition and Reconstruction Network (DRNet) focusing on the modeling of physiological features rather than noisy data. A novel cycle loss is proposed to constrain the periodicity of physiological information. Besides, a plug-and-play Spatial Attention Block (SAB) is proposed to enhance features along with the spatial location information. Furthermore, an efficient Patch Cropping (PC) augmentation strategy is proposed to synthesize augmented samples with different noise and features. Extensive experiments on different public datasets as well as the cross-database testing demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 基于远程光电体积描记法（rPPG）的生理测量在情感计算、非接触式健康监测、远程健康监测等方面具有巨大的应用价值，特别是在COVID-19大流行期间变得越来越重要。现有的方法通常分为两组。第一个重点是从面部视频中挖掘微妙的血量脉冲（BVP）信号，但很少明确地对主导面部视频内容的噪声进行建模。它们很容易受到噪声的影响，并且在未见过的场景中泛化能力可能较差。第二个重点是直接对噪声数据进行建模，由于这些严重的随机噪声缺乏规律性，导致性能不佳。在本文中，我们提出了一种分解和重建网络（DRNet），专注于生理特征而不是噪声数据的建模。提出了一种新颖的循环损失来限制生理信息的周期性。此外，还提出了一种即插即用的空间注意力块（SAB）来增强特征以及空间位置信息。此外，提出了一种有效的补丁裁剪（PC）增强策略来合成具有不同噪声和特征的增强样本。对不同公共数据集的广泛实验以及跨数据库测试证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DRNet网络，用于解决远程生理测量中噪声干扰和泛化能力不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法或忽视噪声建模导致泛化能力差，或直接处理噪声数据效果不佳，无法有效提取生理特征。
AI.method: 设计分解重建网络DRNet，引入周期性约束的循环损失、空间注意力模块及补丁裁剪增强策略。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集及跨数据库测试中验证了方法的有效性，生理信号提取性能优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: DRNet通过聚焦生理特征建模和噪声分离，显著提升了远程生理测量的鲁棒性和适应性。

authors_text: Cailleteau Thomas
title: Knowledge as Fruits of Ignorance: A global Free Energy Principle of our way of thinking
title_zh: 知识是无知的果实：我们思维方式的全球自由能原理
comment: More about information theory applied to philosophy. However, as for the Free energy principle, the application of this is large and could be applied in any field requiring probabilities
comments: More about information theory applied to philosophy. However, as for the Free energy principle, the application of this is large and could be applied in any field requiring probabilities
abstract: In this second article, we show a simple use of the Ignorance as defined in "Jaynes & Shannon's Constrained Ignorance and Surprise". By giving an example about the journey of a person, we believe to show some simple, obvious but mathematically encoded philosophical implications about how we could think, learn and memorize. In this basic model we will separate how we learn from Ignorance, and how we anticipate the world using Bayes formula, both should however be more entangled to best reflect reality. In fact, as we have seen after achieving this work, applying Ignorance on the system constituting a person finally turns out to be the global approach of its local counterpart on systems like neurons, cells and other complex probabilistic systems, described using the free energy principle, a much more complex and detailed approach. The aim of this article is therefore to show, as seen from a person, another aspect of the application of the free energy principle which represents the constrained Shannon's entropy, and leads to Bayes'formula. We show that, using only ignorance as a single quantity, and its minimization as the main process, we can take into account his understandings, assertions, doubts and assumptions about how he perceives the world, by describing them mathematically.
summary: In this second article, we show a simple use of the Ignorance as defined in "Jaynes & Shannon's Constrained Ignorance and Surprise". By giving an example about the journey of a person, we believe to show some simple, obvious but mathematically encoded philosophical implications about how we could think, learn and memorize. In this basic model we will separate how we learn from Ignorance, and how we anticipate the world using Bayes formula, both should however be more entangled to best reflect reality. In fact, as we have seen after achieving this work, applying Ignorance on the system constituting a person finally turns out to be the global approach of its local counterpart on systems like neurons, cells and other complex probabilistic systems, described using the free energy principle, a much more complex and detailed approach. The aim of this article is therefore to show, as seen from a person, another aspect of the application of the free energy principle which represents the constrained Shannon's entropy, and leads to Bayes'formula. We show that, using only ignorance as a single quantity, and its minimization as the main process, we can take into account his understandings, assertions, doubts and assumptions about how he perceives the world, by describing them mathematically.
abstract_zh: 在第二篇文章中，我们展示了“杰恩斯和香农的受限无知和惊讶”中定义的无知的简单用法。通过举一个关于一个人的旅程的例子，我们相信可以展示一些简单、明显但经过数学编码的关于我们如何思考、学习和记忆的哲学含义。在这个基本模型中，我们将区分我们如何从无知中学习，以及我们如何使用贝叶斯公式预测世界，然而，两者应该更加纠缠才能最好地反映现实。事实上，正如我们在完成这项工作后所看到的，将无知应用于构成人的系统最终证明是其局部对应物在神经元、细胞和其他复杂概率系统等系统上的全局方法，使用自由能原理进行描述，这是一种更加复杂和详细的方法。因此，本文的目的是从一个人的角度展示自由能原理应用的另一个方面，它代表受限香农熵，并导出贝叶斯公式。我们表明，仅使用无知作为单个量，并将其最小化作为主要过程，我们可以通过数学描述来考虑他对如何感知世界的理解、断言、怀疑和假设。

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入'无知'概念，结合贝叶斯公式与自由能原理，探讨人类认知、学习与记忆的数学建模方法。
AI.motivation: 旨在揭示人类认知过程中的哲学内涵，并建立统一的数学框架解释从个体到复杂系统的知识获取机制。
AI.method: 以个人旅程为例，通过最小化'无知'量度，结合贝叶斯推理与自由能原理，构建认知建模的数学表达。
AI.result: 证明了个体认知过程可被抽象为自由能原理的全局应用，且与神经元等局部系统的概率模型存在内在一致性。
AI.conclusion: 无知的最小化是认知的核心过程，该框架为理解人类思维与复杂系统的自组织机制提供了新视角。

authors_text: Yuxiang Yang,Junjie Yang,Yufei Xu,Jing Zhang,Long Lan,Dacheng Tao
title: APT-36K: A Large-scale Benchmark for Animal Pose Estimation and Tracking
title_zh: APT-36K：动物姿势估计和跟踪的大规模基准
comment: Neurips 2022 dataset and benchmark track
comments: Neurips 2022 dataset and benchmark track
abstract: Animal pose estimation and tracking (APT) is a fundamental task for detecting and tracking animal keypoints from a sequence of video frames. Previous animal-related datasets focus either on animal tracking or single-frame animal pose estimation, and never on both aspects. The lack of APT datasets hinders the development and evaluation of video-based animal pose estimation and tracking methods, limiting real-world applications, e.g., understanding animal behavior in wildlife conservation. To fill this gap, we make the first step and propose APT-36K, i.e., the first large-scale benchmark for animal pose estimation and tracking. Specifically, APT-36K consists of 2,400 video clips collected and filtered from 30 animal species with 15 frames for each video, resulting in 36,000 frames in total. After manual annotation and careful double-check, high-quality keypoint and tracking annotations are provided for all the animal instances. Based on APT-36K, we benchmark several representative models on the following three tracks: (1) supervised animal pose estimation on a single frame under intra- and inter-domain transfer learning settings, (2) inter-species domain generalization test for unseen animals, and (3) animal pose estimation with animal tracking. Based on the experimental results, we gain some empirical insights and show that APT-36K provides a valuable animal pose estimation and tracking benchmark, offering new challenges and opportunities for future research. The code and dataset will be made publicly available at https://github.com/pandorgan/APT-36K.
summary: Animal pose estimation and tracking (APT) is a fundamental task for detecting and tracking animal keypoints from a sequence of video frames. Previous animal-related datasets focus either on animal tracking or single-frame animal pose estimation, and never on both aspects. The lack of APT datasets hinders the development and evaluation of video-based animal pose estimation and tracking methods, limiting real-world applications, e.g., understanding animal behavior in wildlife conservation. To fill this gap, we make the first step and propose APT-36K, i.e., the first large-scale benchmark for animal pose estimation and tracking. Specifically, APT-36K consists of 2,400 video clips collected and filtered from 30 animal species with 15 frames for each video, resulting in 36,000 frames in total. After manual annotation and careful double-check, high-quality keypoint and tracking annotations are provided for all the animal instances. Based on APT-36K, we benchmark several representative models on the following three tracks: (1) supervised animal pose estimation on a single frame under intra- and inter-domain transfer learning settings, (2) inter-species domain generalization test for unseen animals, and (3) animal pose estimation with animal tracking. Based on the experimental results, we gain some empirical insights and show that APT-36K provides a valuable animal pose estimation and tracking benchmark, offering new challenges and opportunities for future research. The code and dataset will be made publicly available at https://github.com/pandorgan/APT-36K.
abstract_zh: 动物姿态估计和跟踪（APT）是从视频帧序列中检测和跟踪动物关键点的基本任务。以前的动物相关数据集要么关注动物跟踪，要么关注单帧动物姿势估计，而不是同时关注这两个方面。 APT 数据集的缺乏阻碍了基于视频的动物姿态估计和跟踪方法的开发和评估，限制了现实世界的应用，例如了解野生动物保护中的动物行为。为了填补这一空白，我们迈出了第一步，提出了 APT-36K，即第一个用于动物姿态估计和跟踪的大规模基准。具体来说，APT-36K 由从 30 个动物物种收集和过滤的 2,400 个视频片段组成，每个视频有 15 帧，总共 36,000 帧。经过手动注释和仔细的双重检查，为所有动物实例提供了高质量的关键点和跟踪注释。基于APT-36K，我们在以下三个方面对几个代表性模型进行了基准测试：（1）在域内和域间迁移学习设置下对单帧进行监督动物姿势估计，（2）对未见过的动物进行物种间域泛化测试，以及（3）通过动物跟踪进行动物姿势估计。基于实验结果，我们获得了一些实证见解，并表明 APT-36K 提供了有价值的动物姿势估计和跟踪基准，为未来的研究提供了新的挑战和机遇。代码和数据集将在 https://github.com/pandorgan/APT-36K 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出APT-36K，首个大规模动物姿态估计与跟踪基准数据集，包含36,000帧标注数据，涵盖30种动物。
AI.motivation: 现有动物数据集仅关注单帧姿态估计或跟踪，缺乏兼顾两者的大规模数据集，限制了视频动物姿态估计与跟踪方法的发展。
AI.method: 收集并筛选30种动物的2,400个视频片段（每视频15帧），经人工标注与复核后，构建包含关键点与跟踪标注的高质量数据集，并在三个任务上进行基准测试。
AI.result: 实验表明APT-36K为动物姿态估计与跟踪提供了新挑战，验证了跨域迁移学习与跨物种泛化能力，并公开代码与数据集。
AI.conclusion: APT-36K为未来动物行为研究与野生动物保护中的视频分析方法提供了重要基准与研究机会。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出APT-36K，首个大规模动物姿态估计与跟踪基准数据集，包含36,000帧标注数据，涵盖30种动物。

search_text: APT-36K: A Large-scale Benchmark for Animal Pose Estimation and Tracking APT-36K：动物姿势估计和跟踪的大规模基准 Animal pose estimation and tracking (APT) is a fundamental task for detecting and tracking animal keypoints from a sequence of video frames. Previous animal-related datasets focus either on animal tracking or single-frame animal pose estimation, and never on both aspects. The lack of APT datasets hinders the development and evaluation of video-based animal pose estimation and tracking methods, limiting real-world applications, e.g., understanding animal behavior in wildlife conservation. To fill this gap, we make the first step and propose APT-36K, i.e., the first large-scale benchmark for animal pose estimation and tracking. Specifically, APT-36K consists of 2,400 video clips collected and filtered from 30 animal species with 15 frames for each video, resulting in 36,000 frames in total. After manual annotation and careful double-check, high-quality keypoint and tracking annotations are provided for all the animal instances. Based on APT-36K, we benchmark several representative models on the following three tracks: (1) supervised animal pose estimation on a single frame under intra- and inter-domain transfer learning settings, (2) inter-species domain generalization test for unseen animals, and (3) animal pose estimation with animal tracking. Based on the experimental results, we gain some empirical insights and show that APT-36K provides a valuable animal pose estimation and tracking benchmark, offering new challenges and opportunities for future research. The code and dataset will be made publicly available at https://github.com/pandorgan/APT-36K. 动物姿态估计和跟踪（APT）是从视频帧序列中检测和跟踪动物关键点的基本任务。以前的动物相关数据集要么关注动物跟踪，要么关注单帧动物姿势估计，而不是同时关注这两个方面。 APT 数据集的缺乏阻碍了基于视频的动物姿态估计和跟踪方法的开发和评估，限制了现实世界的应用，例如了解野生动物保护中的动物行为。为了填补这一空白，我们迈出了第一步，提出了 APT-36K，即第一个用于动物姿态估计和跟踪的大规模基准。具体来说，APT-36K 由从 30 个动物物种收集和过滤的 2,400 个视频片段组成，每个视频有 15 帧，总共 36,000 帧。经过手动注释和仔细的双重检查，为所有动物实例提供了高质量的关键点和跟踪注释。基于APT-36K，我们在以下三个方面对几个代表性模型进行了基准测试：（1）在域内和域间迁移学习设置下对单帧进行监督动物姿势估计，（2）对未见过的动物进行物种间域泛化测试，以及（3）通过动物跟踪进行动物姿势估计。基于实验结果，我们获得了一些实证见解，并表明 APT-36K 提供了有价值的动物姿势估计和跟踪基准，为未来的研究提供了新的挑战和机遇。代码和数据集将在 https://github.com/pandorgan/APT-36K 上公开提供。 本文提出APT-36K，首个大规模动物姿态估计与跟踪基准数据集，包含36,000帧标注数据，涵盖30种动物。 Yuxiang Yang,Junjie Yang,Yufei Xu,Jing Zhang,Long Lan,Dacheng Tao cs.CV

authors_text: Zhen Guo,Zelin Wan,Qisheng Zhang,Xujiang Zhao,Feng Chen,Jin-Hee Cho,Qi Zhang,Lance M. Kaplan,Dong H. Jeong,Audun Jøsang
title: A Survey on Uncertainty Reasoning and Quantification for Decision Making: Belief Theory Meets Deep Learning
title_zh: 关于决策的不确定性推理和量化的调查：信念理论遇上深度学习
comment: First four authors contributed equally
comments: First four authors contributed equally
abstract: An in-depth understanding of uncertainty is the first step to making effective decisions under uncertainty. Deep/machine learning (ML/DL) has been hugely leveraged to solve complex problems involved with processing high-dimensional data. However, reasoning and quantifying different types of uncertainties to achieve effective decision-making have been much less explored in ML/DL than in other Artificial Intelligence (AI) domains. In particular, belief/evidence theories have been studied in KRR since the 1960s to reason and measure uncertainties to enhance decision-making effectiveness. We found that only a few studies have leveraged the mature uncertainty research in belief/evidence theories in ML/DL to tackle complex problems under different types of uncertainty. In this survey paper, we discuss several popular belief theories and their core ideas dealing with uncertainty causes and types and quantifying them, along with the discussions of their applicability in ML/DL. In addition, we discuss three main approaches that leverage belief theories in Deep Neural Networks (DNNs), including Evidential DNNs, Fuzzy DNNs, and Rough DNNs, in terms of their uncertainty causes, types, and quantification methods along with their applicability in diverse problem domains. Based on our in-depth survey, we discuss insights, lessons learned, limitations of the current state-of-the-art bridging belief theories and ML/DL, and finally, future research directions.
summary: An in-depth understanding of uncertainty is the first step to making effective decisions under uncertainty. Deep/machine learning (ML/DL) has been hugely leveraged to solve complex problems involved with processing high-dimensional data. However, reasoning and quantifying different types of uncertainties to achieve effective decision-making have been much less explored in ML/DL than in other Artificial Intelligence (AI) domains. In particular, belief/evidence theories have been studied in KRR since the 1960s to reason and measure uncertainties to enhance decision-making effectiveness. We found that only a few studies have leveraged the mature uncertainty research in belief/evidence theories in ML/DL to tackle complex problems under different types of uncertainty. In this survey paper, we discuss several popular belief theories and their core ideas dealing with uncertainty causes and types and quantifying them, along with the discussions of their applicability in ML/DL. In addition, we discuss three main approaches that leverage belief theories in Deep Neural Networks (DNNs), including Evidential DNNs, Fuzzy DNNs, and Rough DNNs, in terms of their uncertainty causes, types, and quantification methods along with their applicability in diverse problem domains. Based on our in-depth survey, we discuss insights, lessons learned, limitations of the current state-of-the-art bridging belief theories and ML/DL, and finally, future research directions.
abstract_zh: 深入理解不确定性是在不确定性下做出有效决策的第一步。深度/机器学习 (ML/DL) 已被广泛用于解决与处理高维数据相关的复杂问题。然而，与其他人工智能 (AI) 领域相比，ML/DL 中对推理和量化不同类型的不确定性以实现有效决策的探索要少得多。特别是，自 20 世纪 60 年代以来，KRR 一直在研究信念/证据理论，以推理和衡量不确定性，以提高决策效率。我们发现，只有少数研究利用机器学习/深度学习中信念/证据理论的成熟不确定性研究来解决不同类型不确定性下的复杂问题。在这篇调查论文中，我们讨论了几种流行的信念理论及其处理不确定性原因和类型并对其进行量化的核心思想，并讨论了它们在 ML/DL 中的适用性。此外，我们还讨论了深度神经网络 (DNN) 中利用信念理论的三种主要方法，包括证据 DNN、模糊 DNN 和粗糙 DNN，讨论了它们的不确定性原因、类型和量化方法以及它们在不同问题领域的适用性。基于我们的深入调查，我们讨论了见解、经验教训、当前最先进的桥接信念理论和 ML/DL 的局限性，最后讨论了未来的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了信念理论与深度学习结合在不确定性推理与量化中的应用，探讨其在决策中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在处理不确定性方面研究不足，而信念理论具有成熟的不确定性处理方法，需将其与深度学习结合以提升决策效果。
AI.method: 通过文献综述，分析信念理论核心思想及其在深度学习中的三种方法（Evidential DNNs、Fuzzy DNNs、Rough DNNs），讨论其适用性与量化方式。
AI.result: 总结了现有方法的优缺点、适用场景及当前技术局限，指出融合信念理论与深度学习的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 未来需探索更有效的理论融合方法、加强理论分析与跨领域应用验证，以推动不确定性处理技术的发展。

authors_text: Dongwon Son,Myungsin Kim,Jaecheol Sim,Wonsik Shin
title: Reinforcement Learning for Vision-based Object Manipulation with Non-parametric Policy and Action Primitives
title_zh: 使用非参数策略和动作原语进行基于视觉的对象操作的强化学习
comment: ef:IROS 2021
comments: ef:IROS 2021
abstract: The object manipulation is a crucial ability for a service robot, but it is hard to solve with reinforcement learning due to some reasons such as sample efficiency. In this paper, to tackle this object manipulation, we propose a novel framework, AP-NPQL (Non-Parametric Q Learning with Action Primitives), that can efficiently solve the object manipulation with visual input and sparse reward, by utilizing a non-parametric policy for reinforcement learning and appropriate behavior prior for the object manipulation. We evaluate the efficiency and the performance of the proposed AP-NPQL for four object manipulation tasks on simulation (pushing plate, stacking box, flipping cup, and picking and placing plate), and it turns out that our AP-NPQL outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithms based on parametric policy and behavior prior in terms of learning time and task success rate. We also successfully transfer and validate the learned policy of the plate pick-and-place task to the real robot in a sim-to-real manner.
summary: The object manipulation is a crucial ability for a service robot, but it is hard to solve with reinforcement learning due to some reasons such as sample efficiency. In this paper, to tackle this object manipulation, we propose a novel framework, AP-NPQL (Non-Parametric Q Learning with Action Primitives), that can efficiently solve the object manipulation with visual input and sparse reward, by utilizing a non-parametric policy for reinforcement learning and appropriate behavior prior for the object manipulation. We evaluate the efficiency and the performance of the proposed AP-NPQL for four object manipulation tasks on simulation (pushing plate, stacking box, flipping cup, and picking and placing plate), and it turns out that our AP-NPQL outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithms based on parametric policy and behavior prior in terms of learning time and task success rate. We also successfully transfer and validate the learned policy of the plate pick-and-place task to the real robot in a sim-to-real manner.
abstract_zh: 物体操纵是服务机器人的一项至关重要的能力，但由于样本效率等原因，很难用强化学习来解决。在本文中，为了解决这种对象操纵问题，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，AP-NPQL（带有动作原语的非参数 Q 学习），它可以通过利用用于强化学习的非参数策略和对象操纵的适当行为先验，有效地解决具有视觉输入和稀疏奖励的对象操纵问题。我们在模拟中评估了所提出的 AP-NPQL 对于四个对象操作任务（推板、堆垛箱、翻转杯子和拾取和放置板）的效率和性能，结果表明，我们的 AP-NPQL 在学习时间和任务成功率方面优于基于参数化策略和行为先验的最先进算法。我们还以模拟到真实的方式成功地将学习的板拾取和放置任务策略转移并验证到真实的机器人。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非参数策略和动作原语的强化学习框架AP-NPQL，用于解决视觉输入下的物体操作问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在样本效率和稀疏奖励场景下难以有效解决视觉物体操作任务，需提升学习效率与成功率。
AI.method: 结合非参数Q学习与动作原语，利用行为先验优化策略，通过视觉输入实现物体操作。
AI.result: 在四个模拟任务中优于现有方法，学习时间缩短且成功率提升，并成功迁移到真实机器人。
AI.conclusion: AP-NPQL框架有效解决了视觉物体操作难题，为服务机器人实际应用提供了可行方案。

motivation: 传统强化学习在样本效率和稀疏奖励场景下难以有效解决视觉物体操作任务，需提升学习效率与成功率。
method: 结合非参数Q学习与动作原语，利用行为先验优化策略，通过视觉输入实现物体操作。
result: 在四个模拟任务中优于现有方法，学习时间缩短且成功率提升，并成功迁移到真实机器人。
conclusion: AP-NPQL框架有效解决了视觉物体操作难题，为服务机器人实际应用提供了可行方案。
search_text: Reinforcement Learning for Vision-based Object Manipulation with Non-parametric Policy and Action Primitives 使用非参数策略和动作原语进行基于视觉的对象操作的强化学习 The object manipulation is a crucial ability for a service robot, but it is hard to solve with reinforcement learning due to some reasons such as sample efficiency. In this paper, to tackle this object manipulation, we propose a novel framework, AP-NPQL (Non-Parametric Q Learning with Action Primitives), that can efficiently solve the object manipulation with visual input and sparse reward, by utilizing a non-parametric policy for reinforcement learning and appropriate behavior prior for the object manipulation. We evaluate the efficiency and the performance of the proposed AP-NPQL for four object manipulation tasks on simulation (pushing plate, stacking box, flipping cup, and picking and placing plate), and it turns out that our AP-NPQL outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithms based on parametric policy and behavior prior in terms of learning time and task success rate. We also successfully transfer and validate the learned policy of the plate pick-and-place task to the real robot in a sim-to-real manner. 物体操纵是服务机器人的一项至关重要的能力，但由于样本效率等原因，很难用强化学习来解决。在本文中，为了解决这种对象操纵问题，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，AP-NPQL（带有动作原语的非参数 Q 学习），它可以通过利用用于强化学习的非参数策略和对象操纵的适当行为先验，有效地解决具有视觉输入和稀疏奖励的对象操纵问题。我们在模拟中评估了所提出的 AP-NPQL 对于四个对象操作任务（推板、堆垛箱、翻转杯子和拾取和放置板）的效率和性能，结果表明，我们的 AP-NPQL 在学习时间和任务成功率方面优于基于参数化策略和行为先验的最先进算法。我们还以模拟到真实的方式成功地将学习的板拾取和放置任务策略转移并验证到真实的机器人。 本文提出一种基于非参数策略和动作原语的强化学习框架AP-NPQL，用于解决视觉输入下的物体操作问题。 Dongwon Son,Myungsin Kim,Jaecheol Sim,Wonsik Shin cs.RO

authors_text: Zhen Li,Yunfei Yang
title: Universality and approximation bounds for echo state networks with random weights
title_zh: 具有随机权重的回波状态网络的普适性和近似界限
abstract: We study the uniform approximation of echo state networks with randomly generated internal weights. These models, in which only the readout weights are optimized during training, have made empirical success in learning dynamical systems. Recent results showed that echo state networks with ReLU activation are universal. In this paper, we give an alternative construction and prove that the universality holds for general activation functions. Specifically, our main result shows that, under certain condition on the activation function, there exists a sampling procedure for the internal weights so that the echo state network can approximate any continuous casual time-invariant operators with high probability. In particular, for ReLU activation, we give explicit construction for these sampling procedures. We also quantify the approximation error of the constructed ReLU echo state networks for sufficiently regular operators.
summary: We study the uniform approximation of echo state networks with randomly generated internal weights. These models, in which only the readout weights are optimized during training, have made empirical success in learning dynamical systems. Recent results showed that echo state networks with ReLU activation are universal. In this paper, we give an alternative construction and prove that the universality holds for general activation functions. Specifically, our main result shows that, under certain condition on the activation function, there exists a sampling procedure for the internal weights so that the echo state network can approximate any continuous casual time-invariant operators with high probability. In particular, for ReLU activation, we give explicit construction for these sampling procedures. We also quantify the approximation error of the constructed ReLU echo state networks for sufficiently regular operators.
abstract_zh: 我们研究具有随机生成的内部权重的回声状态网络的均匀近似。这些模型在训练过程中仅优化读出权重，在学习动态系统方面取得了经验上的成功。最近的结果表明，具有 ReLU 激活的回声状态网络是通用的。在本文中，我们给出了另一种构造，并证明了通用激活函数的普遍性。具体来说，我们的主要结果表明，在激活函数的特定条件下，存在内部权重的采样过程，使得回声状态网络能够以高概率逼近任何连续偶然时不变算子。特别是，对于 ReLU 激活，我们给出了这些采样过程的显式构造。我们还量化了足够规则的算子所构造的 ReLU 回波状态网络的近似误差。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了随机权重回声状态网络的通用性及逼近能力，证明其在一般激活函数下的通用性，并给出具体构造和误差分析。
AI.motivation: 回声状态网络在动态系统学习中表现优异，但其通用性理论仅限于ReLU激活函数，需扩展至更一般情况并提供显式构造与误差量化。
AI.method: 通过替代构造方法，证明在激活函数满足特定条件下，随机采样内部权重可使网络以高概率逼近任意连续因果时不变算子，并针对ReLU给出显式采样方案。
AI.result: 证明了通用性适用于一般激活函数，且存在高概率逼近任意目标算子的采样方法；对ReLU网络量化了逼近误差，适用于足够正则的算子。
AI.conclusion: 扩展了回声状态网络的通用性理论至更广泛激活函数，提供了可操作的构造方法及误差界限，为实际应用提供了理论支持。

authors_text: Souradip Chakraborty,Amrit Singh Bedi,Alec Koppel,Pratap Tokekar,Dinesh Manocha
title: Dealing with Sparse Rewards in Continuous Control Robotics via Heavy-Tailed Policies
title_zh: 通过重尾策略处理连续控制机器人中的稀疏奖励
abstract: In this paper, we present a novel Heavy-Tailed Stochastic Policy Gradient (HT-PSG) algorithm to deal with the challenges of sparse rewards in continuous control problems. Sparse reward is common in continuous control robotics tasks such as manipulation and navigation, and makes the learning problem hard due to non-trivial estimation of value functions over the state space. This demands either reward shaping or expert demonstrations for the sparse reward environment. However, obtaining high-quality demonstrations is quite expensive and sometimes even impossible. We propose a heavy-tailed policy parametrization along with a modified momentum-based policy gradient tracking scheme (HT-SPG) to induce a stable exploratory behavior to the algorithm. The proposed algorithm does not require access to expert demonstrations. We test the performance of HT-SPG on various benchmark tasks of continuous control with sparse rewards such as 1D Mario, Pathological Mountain Car, Sparse Pendulum in OpenAI Gym, and Sparse MuJoCo environments (Hopper-v2). We show consistent performance improvement across all tasks in terms of high average cumulative reward. HT-SPG also demonstrates improved convergence speed with minimum samples, thereby emphasizing the sample efficiency of our proposed algorithm.
summary: In this paper, we present a novel Heavy-Tailed Stochastic Policy Gradient (HT-PSG) algorithm to deal with the challenges of sparse rewards in continuous control problems. Sparse reward is common in continuous control robotics tasks such as manipulation and navigation, and makes the learning problem hard due to non-trivial estimation of value functions over the state space. This demands either reward shaping or expert demonstrations for the sparse reward environment. However, obtaining high-quality demonstrations is quite expensive and sometimes even impossible. We propose a heavy-tailed policy parametrization along with a modified momentum-based policy gradient tracking scheme (HT-SPG) to induce a stable exploratory behavior to the algorithm. The proposed algorithm does not require access to expert demonstrations. We test the performance of HT-SPG on various benchmark tasks of continuous control with sparse rewards such as 1D Mario, Pathological Mountain Car, Sparse Pendulum in OpenAI Gym, and Sparse MuJoCo environments (Hopper-v2). We show consistent performance improvement across all tasks in terms of high average cumulative reward. HT-SPG also demonstrates improved convergence speed with minimum samples, thereby emphasizing the sample efficiency of our proposed algorithm.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的重尾随机策略梯度（HT-PSG）算法来应对连续控制问题中稀疏奖励的挑战。稀疏奖励在操作和导航等连续控制机器人任务中很常见，并且由于状态空间上的价值函数的非平凡估计而使得学习问题变得困难。这需要针对稀疏奖励环境进行奖励塑造或专家演示。然而，获得高质量的演示是相当昂贵的，有时甚至是不可能的。我们提出了重尾策略参数化以及改进的基于动量的策略梯度跟踪方案（HT-SPG），以诱导算法稳定的探索行为。所提出的算法不需要专家演示。我们在具有稀疏奖励的连续控制的各种基准任务上测试 HT-SPG 的性能，例如 1D Mario、Pathological Mountain Car、OpenAI Gym 中的稀疏摆和稀疏 MuJoCo 环境 (Hopper-v2)。我们在高平均累积奖励方面显示了所有任务的持续绩效改进。 HT-SPG 还展示了在最少样本的情况下提高了收敛速度，从而强调了我们提出的算法的样本效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为HT-PSG的算法，用于解决连续控制机器人中稀疏奖励带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 稀疏奖励在连续控制任务中普遍存在，导致价值函数估计困难，传统方法依赖奖励塑造或专家演示，但后者成本高昂且难以获取。
AI.method: 通过重尾策略参数化和改进的动量策略梯度跟踪方案（HT-SPG），在不依赖专家演示的情况下实现稳定探索。
AI.result: HT-SPG在多个稀疏奖励基准任务中表现出更高的平均累积奖励和更快的收敛速度，且样本效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: HT-PSG算法有效解决了稀疏奖励问题，无需专家演示即可实现高效学习，适用于多种连续控制场景。

authors_text: Shunquan Tan,Qiushi Li,Laiyuan Li,Bin Li,Jiwu Huang
title: STD-NET: Search of Image Steganalytic Deep-learning Architecture via Hierarchical Tensor Decomposition
title_zh: STD-NET：通过分层张量分解搜索图像隐写分析深度学习架构
comment: Submitted to IEEE T-DSC
comments: Submitted to IEEE T-DSC
abstract: Recent studies shows that the majority of existing deep steganalysis models have a large amount of redundancy, which leads to a huge waste of storage and computing resources. The existing model compression method cannot flexibly compress the convolutional layer in residual shortcut block so that a satisfactory shrinking rate cannot be obtained. In this paper, we propose STD-NET, an unsupervised deep-learning architecture search approach via hierarchical tensor decomposition for image steganalysis. Our proposed strategy will not be restricted by various residual connections, since this strategy does not change the number of input and output channels of the convolution block. We propose a normalized distortion threshold to evaluate the sensitivity of each involved convolutional layer of the base model to guide STD-NET to compress target network in an efficient and unsupervised approach, and obtain two network structures of different shapes with low computation cost and similar performance compared with the original one. Extensive experiments have confirmed that, on one hand, our model can achieve comparable or even better detection performance in various steganalytic scenarios due to the great adaptivity of the obtained network architecture. On the other hand, the experimental results also demonstrate that our proposed strategy is more efficient and can remove more redundancy compared with previous steganalytic network compression methods.
summary: Recent studies shows that the majority of existing deep steganalysis models have a large amount of redundancy, which leads to a huge waste of storage and computing resources. The existing model compression method cannot flexibly compress the convolutional layer in residual shortcut block so that a satisfactory shrinking rate cannot be obtained. In this paper, we propose STD-NET, an unsupervised deep-learning architecture search approach via hierarchical tensor decomposition for image steganalysis. Our proposed strategy will not be restricted by various residual connections, since this strategy does not change the number of input and output channels of the convolution block. We propose a normalized distortion threshold to evaluate the sensitivity of each involved convolutional layer of the base model to guide STD-NET to compress target network in an efficient and unsupervised approach, and obtain two network structures of different shapes with low computation cost and similar performance compared with the original one. Extensive experiments have confirmed that, on one hand, our model can achieve comparable or even better detection performance in various steganalytic scenarios due to the great adaptivity of the obtained network architecture. On the other hand, the experimental results also demonstrate that our proposed strategy is more efficient and can remove more redundancy compared with previous steganalytic network compression methods.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，现有的深度隐写分析模型大多存在大量冗余，导致存储和计算资源的巨大浪费。现有的模型压缩方法无法灵活地压缩残差捷径块中的卷积层，从而无法获得满意的收缩率。在本文中，我们提出了 STD-NET，这是一种通过分层张量分解进行图像隐写分析的无监督深度学习架构搜索方法。我们提出的策略不会受到各种残差连接的限制，因为该策略不会改变卷积块的输入和输出通道的数量。我们提出了一个归一化失真阈值来评估基础模型的每个涉及的卷积层的敏感性，以指导STD-NET以高效且无监督的方式压缩目标网络，并获得与原始网络相比计算成本低且性能相似的两种不同形状的网络结构。大量的实验证实，一方面，由于所获得的网络架构具有很强的适应性，我们的模型可以在各种隐写分析场景中实现可比甚至更好的检测性能。另一方面，实验结果也表明，与以前的隐写分析网络压缩方法相比，我们提出的策略更有效，并且可以消除更多冗余。

AI.tldr: 本文提出STD-NET，通过分层张量分解实现图像隐写分析深度学习架构的高效压缩。
AI.motivation: 现有深度隐写分析模型存在大量冗余，导致资源浪费，且传统压缩方法无法灵活压缩残差块中的卷积层。
AI.method: 基于分层张量分解的无监督架构搜索方法，结合归一化失真阈值指导压缩，保持输入输出通道数不变。
AI.result: 在多种隐写场景下检测性能与原模型相当或更优，且计算成本降低，冗余去除效率优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: STD-NET通过自适应网络架构搜索实现了高效压缩，在保持性能的同时显著减少计算资源消耗。

authors_text: Guo Lu,Xingtong Ge,Tianxiong Zhong,Jing Geng,Qiang Hu
title: Preprocessing Enhanced Image Compression for Machine Vision
title_zh: 机器视觉的预处理增强图像压缩
abstract: Recently, more and more images are compressed and sent to the back-end devices for the machine analysis tasks~(\textit{e.g.,} object detection) instead of being purely watched by humans. However, most traditional or learned image codecs are designed to minimize the distortion of the human visual system without considering the increased demand from machine vision systems. In this work, we propose a preprocessing enhanced image compression method for machine vision tasks to address this challenge. Instead of relying on the learned image codecs for end-to-end optimization, our framework is built upon the traditional non-differential codecs, which means it is standard compatible and can be easily deployed in practical applications. Specifically, we propose a neural preprocessing module before the encoder to maintain the useful semantic information for the downstream tasks and suppress the irrelevant information for bitrate saving. Furthermore, our neural preprocessing module is quantization adaptive and can be used in different compression ratios. More importantly, to jointly optimize the preprocessing module with the downstream machine vision tasks, we introduce the proxy network for the traditional non-differential codecs in the back-propagation stage. We provide extensive experiments by evaluating our compression method for two representative downstream tasks with different backbone networks. Experimental results show our method achieves a better trade-off between the coding bitrate and the performance of the downstream machine vision tasks by saving about 20% bitrate.
summary: Recently, more and more images are compressed and sent to the back-end devices for the machine analysis tasks~(\textit{e.g.,} object detection) instead of being purely watched by humans. However, most traditional or learned image codecs are designed to minimize the distortion of the human visual system without considering the increased demand from machine vision systems. In this work, we propose a preprocessing enhanced image compression method for machine vision tasks to address this challenge. Instead of relying on the learned image codecs for end-to-end optimization, our framework is built upon the traditional non-differential codecs, which means it is standard compatible and can be easily deployed in practical applications. Specifically, we propose a neural preprocessing module before the encoder to maintain the useful semantic information for the downstream tasks and suppress the irrelevant information for bitrate saving. Furthermore, our neural preprocessing module is quantization adaptive and can be used in different compression ratios. More importantly, to jointly optimize the preprocessing module with the downstream machine vision tasks, we introduce the proxy network for the traditional non-differential codecs in the back-propagation stage. We provide extensive experiments by evaluating our compression method for two representative downstream tasks with different backbone networks. Experimental results show our method achieves a better trade-off between the coding bitrate and the performance of the downstream machine vision tasks by saving about 20% bitrate.
abstract_zh: 最近，越来越多的图像被压缩并发送到后端设备以进行机器分析任务~（\textit{例如，}物体检测），而不是纯粹由人类观看。然而，大多数传统或学习的图像编解码器旨在最大限度地减少人类视觉系统的失真，而没有考虑机器视觉系统日益增长的需求。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于机器视觉任务的预处理增强图像压缩方法来应对这一挑战。我们的框架不是依赖学习的图像编解码器进行端到端优化，而是建立在传统的非差分编解码器之上，这意味着它是标准兼容的并且可以在实际应用中轻松部署。具体来说，我们在编码器之前提出了一个神经预处理模块，以维护下游任务的有用语义信息并抑制不相关信息以节省比特率。此外，我们的神经预处理模块是量化自适应的，可以用于不同的压缩比。更重要的是，为了与下游机器视觉任务联合优化预处理模块，我们在反向传播阶段引入了传统非差分编解码器的代理网络。我们通过评估具有不同骨干网络的两个代表性下游任务的压缩方法来提供广泛的实验。实验结果表明，我们的方法通过节省约 20% 的比特率，在编码比特率和下游机器视觉任务的性能之间实现了更好的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对机器视觉任务的预处理增强型图像压缩方法，通过优化编码前的预处理模块以提升压缩效率与下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 传统图像编解码器主要针对人类视觉系统优化，未考虑机器视觉任务对压缩后图像语义信息的需求，导致压缩效率与任务性能难以兼顾。
AI.method: 设计神经预处理模块在编码前保留语义信息并抑制冗余数据，结合量化自适应特性适配不同压缩比；通过引入代理网络实现与传统非微分编解码器的联合优化。
AI.result: 在两个代表性下游任务中，该方法在保持性能的同时节省约20%的比特率，验证了压缩效率与任务性能的平衡优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过预处理增强与传统编解码器兼容，有效解决了机器视觉场景下图像压缩的性能-效率矛盾，具备实际部署价值。

authors_text: Xilong Zhou,Miloš Hašan,Valentin Deschaintre,Paul Guerrero,Kalyan Sunkavalli,Nima Kalantari
title: TileGen: Tileable, Controllable Material Generation and Capture
title_zh: TileGen：可平铺、可控的材质生成和捕获
comment: 18 pages, 19 figures
comments: 18 pages, 19 figures
abstract: Recent methods (e.g. MaterialGAN) have used unconditional GANs to generate per-pixel material maps, or as a prior to reconstruct materials from input photographs. These models can generate varied random material appearance, but do not have any mechanism to constrain the generated material to a specific category or to control the coarse structure of the generated material, such as the exact brick layout on a brick wall. Furthermore, materials reconstructed from a single input photo commonly have artifacts and are generally not tileable, which limits their use in practical content creation pipelines. We propose TileGen, a generative model for SVBRDFs that is specific to a material category, always tileable, and optionally conditional on a provided input structure pattern. TileGen is a variant of StyleGAN whose architecture is modified to always produce tileable (periodic) material maps. In addition to the standard "style" latent code, TileGen can optionally take a condition image, giving a user direct control over the dominant spatial (and optionally color) features of the material. For example, in brick materials, the user can specify a brick layout and the brick color, or in leather materials, the locations of wrinkles and folds. Our inverse rendering approach can find a material perceptually matching a single target photograph by optimization. This reconstruction can also be conditional on a user-provided pattern. The resulting materials are tileable, can be larger than the target image, and are editable by varying the condition.

These models can generate varied random material appearance, but do not have any mechanism to constrain the generated material to a specific category or to control the coarse structure of the generated material, such as the exact brick layout on a brick wall. TileGen is a variant of StyleGAN whose architecture is modified to always produce tileable (periodic) material maps. In addition to the standard "style" latent code, TileGen can optionally take a condition image, giving a user direct control over the dominant spatial (and optionally color) features of the material. For example, in brick materials, the user can specify a brick layout and the brick color, or in leather materials, the locations of wrinkles and folds. Our inverse rendering approach can find a material perceptually matching a single target photograph by optimization. This reconstruction can also be conditional on a user-provided pattern. The resulting materials are tileable, can be larger than the target image, and are editable by varying the condition.
abstract_zh: 最近的方法（例如 MaterialGAN）已经使用无条件 GAN 来生成每像素材质图，或者作为从输入照片重建材质的先验。这些模型可以生成各种随机材质外观，但没有任何机制将生成的材质限制为特定类别或控制生成的材质的粗略结构，例如砖墙上的精确砖块布局。此外，从单个输入照片重建的材料通常具有伪影并且通常不可平铺，这限制了它们在实际内容创建管道中的使用。我们提出了 TileGen，这是一种 SVBRDF 的生成模型，它特定于材质类别，始终可平铺，并且可以选择以提供的输入结构模式为条件。 TileGen 是 StyleGAN 的一个变体，其架构经过修改以始终生成可平铺（周期性）材质贴图。除了标准的“样式”潜在代码之外，TileGen 还可以选择获取条件图像，使用户能够直接控制材质的主要空间（以及可选的颜色）特征。例如，在砖材料中，用户可以指定砖布局和砖颜色，或者在皮革材料中，指定皱纹和折叠的位置。我们的逆渲染方法可以通过优化找到在感知上与单个目标照片匹配的材质。这种重建也可以以用户提供的模式为条件。生成的材质是可平铺的，可以大于目标图像，并且可以通过改变条件进行编辑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TileGen，一种可生成和捕捉可平铺、可控材质的生成模型，解决现有方法在材质分类控制和结构细节上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有方法生成的材质缺乏对类别和粗粒度结构的控制，且从单张照片重建的材质存在伪影且不可平铺，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 基于StyleGAN架构改进，强制输出周期性材质图，并引入条件图像输入以控制材质的空间和颜色特征，结合逆渲染优化实现照片重建。
AI.result: 生成的材质可平铺、可扩展至目标图像外，并可通过调整条件图像进行编辑，重建结果与目标照片感知一致。
AI.conclusion: TileGen通过结构约束和条件控制，在材质生成与重建任务中实现了更高的可控性和实用性。

search_text: TileGen: Tileable, Controllable Material Generation and Capture TileGen：可平铺、可控的材质生成和捕获 Recent methods (e.g. MaterialGAN) have used unconditional GANs to generate per-pixel material maps, or as a prior to reconstruct materials from input photographs. These models can generate varied random material appearance, but do not have any mechanism to constrain the generated material to a specific category or to control the coarse structure of the generated material, such as the exact brick layout on a brick wall. Furthermore, materials reconstructed from a single input photo commonly have artifacts and are generally not tileable, which limits their use in practical content creation pipelines. We propose TileGen, a generative model for SVBRDFs that is specific to a material category, always tileable, and optionally conditional on a provided input structure pattern. TileGen is a variant of StyleGAN whose architecture is modified to always produce tileable (periodic) material maps. In addition to the standard "style" latent code, TileGen can optionally take a condition image, giving a user direct control over the dominant spatial (and optionally color) features of the material. For example, in brick materials, the user can specify a brick layout and the brick color, or in leather materials, the locations of wrinkles and folds. Our inverse rendering approach can find a material perceptually matching a single target photograph by optimization. This reconstruction can also be conditional on a user-provided pattern. The resulting materials are tileable, can be larger than the target image, and are editable by varying the condition. 最近的方法（例如 MaterialGAN）已经使用无条件 GAN 来生成每像素材质图，或者作为从输入照片重建材质的先验。这些模型可以生成各种随机材质外观，但没有任何机制将生成的材质限制为特定类别或控制生成的材质的粗略结构，例如砖墙上的精确砖块布局。此外，从单个输入照片重建的材料通常具有伪影并且通常不可平铺，这限制了它们在实际内容创建管道中的使用。我们提出了 TileGen，这是一种 SVBRDF 的生成模型，它特定于材质类别，始终可平铺，并且可以选择以提供的输入结构模式为条件。 TileGen 是 StyleGAN 的一个变体，其架构经过修改以始终生成可平铺（周期性）材质贴图。除了标准的“样式”潜在代码之外，TileGen 还可以选择获取条件图像，使用户能够直接控制材质的主要空间（以及可选的颜色）特征。例如，在砖材料中，用户可以指定砖布局和砖颜色，或者在皮革材料中，指定皱纹和折叠的位置。我们的逆渲染方法可以通过优化找到在感知上与单个目标照片匹配的材质。这种重建也可以以用户提供的模式为条件。生成的材质是可平铺的，可以大于目标图像，并且可以通过改变条件进行编辑。 本文提出TileGen，一种可生成和捕捉可平铺、可控材质的生成模型，解决现有方法在材质分类控制和结构细节上的不足。 Xilong Zhou,Miloš Hašan,Valentin Deschaintre,Paul Guerrero,Kalyan Sunkavalli,Nima Kalantari cs.GR,cs.CV

authors_text: Suyu Han,Guodong Wang,Donghua Liu
title: Indirect-Instant Attention Optimization for Crowd Counting in Dense Scenes
title_zh: 密集场景中人群计数的间接即时注意力优化
abstract: One of appealing approaches to guiding learnable parameter optimization, such as feature maps, is global attention, which enlightens network intelligence at a fraction of the cost. However, its loss calculation process still falls short: 1)We can only produce one-dimensional 'pseudo labels' for attention, since the artificial threshold involved in the procedure is not robust; 2) The attention awaiting loss calculation is necessarily high-dimensional, and decreasing it by convolution will inevitably introduce additional learnable parameters, thus confusing the source of the loss. To this end, we devise a simple but efficient Indirect-Instant Attention Optimization (IIAO) module based on SoftMax-Attention , which transforms high-dimensional attention map into a one-dimensional feature map in the mathematical sense for loss calculation midway through the network, while automatically providing adaptive multi-scale fusion to feature pyramid module. The special transformation yields relatively coarse features and, originally, the predictive fallibility of regions varies by crowd density distribution, so we tailor the Regional Correlation Loss (RCLoss) to retrieve continuous error-prone regions and smooth spatial information . Extensive experiments have proven that our approach surpasses previous SOTA methods in many benchmark datasets.
summary: One of appealing approaches to guiding learnable parameter optimization, such as feature maps, is global attention, which enlightens network intelligence at a fraction of the cost. However, its loss calculation process still falls short: 1)We can only produce one-dimensional 'pseudo labels' for attention, since the artificial threshold involved in the procedure is not robust; 2) The attention awaiting loss calculation is necessarily high-dimensional, and decreasing it by convolution will inevitably introduce additional learnable parameters, thus confusing the source of the loss. To this end, we devise a simple but efficient Indirect-Instant Attention Optimization (IIAO) module based on SoftMax-Attention , which transforms high-dimensional attention map into a one-dimensional feature map in the mathematical sense for loss calculation midway through the network, while automatically providing adaptive multi-scale fusion to feature pyramid module. The special transformation yields relatively coarse features and, originally, the predictive fallibility of regions varies by crowd density distribution, so we tailor the Regional Correlation Loss (RCLoss) to retrieve continuous error-prone regions and smooth spatial information . Extensive experiments have proven that our approach surpasses previous SOTA methods in many benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 指导可学习参数优化（例如特征图）的一种有吸引力的方法是全局注意力，它以很小的成本启发网络智能。然而，它的损失计算过程仍然存在不足：1）我们只能产生一维的“伪标签”用于注意力，因为该过程中涉及的人工阈值不稳健； 2）等待损失计算的注意力必然是高维的，通过卷积减少它必然会引入额外的可学习参数，从而混淆损失的来源。为此，我们设计了一种基于 SoftMax-Attention 的简单但高效的间接即时注意力优化（IIAO）模块，它将高维注意力图转换为数学意义上的一维特征图，用于网络中途的损失计算，同时自动为特征金字塔模块提供自适应多尺度融合。特殊的变换产生相对粗糙的特征，并且最初区域的预测错误性随人群密度分布而变化，因此我们定制区域相关损失（RCLoss）来检索连续的容易出错的区域和平滑的空间信息。大量实验证明我们的方法在许多基准数据集中超越了之前的 SOTA 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Indirect-Instant Attention Optimization (IIAO)的模块，用于在密集场景中进行人群计数，以优化注意力机制的损失计算过程。
AI.motivation: 传统的全局注意力机制在损失计算过程中存在不足，例如只能生成一维的伪标签，且高维注意力的降维过程会引入额外的可学习参数，导致损失来源混淆。
AI.method: 本文设计了一个基于SoftMax-Attention的IIAO模块，将高维注意力图转换为一维特征图用于损失计算，并结合区域相关性损失（RCLoss）来获取连续的错误区域并平滑空间信息。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法优于之前的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过IIAO模块和RCLoss有效地优化了注意力机制，提升了密集场景下人群计数的性能。

authors_text: Qile Zhao,Xianhong Zhao,Xu Ma,Xudong Chen,Gonzalo R. Arce
title: A Fast Alternating Minimization Algorithm for Coded Aperture Snapshot Spectral Imaging Based on Sparsity and Deep Image Priors
title_zh: 基于稀疏性和深度图像先验的编码孔径快照光谱成像快速交替最小化算法
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Coded aperture snapshot spectral imaging (CASSI) is a technique used to reconstruct three-dimensional hyperspectral images (HSIs) from one or several two-dimensional projection measurements. However, fewer projection measurements or more spectral channels leads to a severly ill-posed problem, in which case regularization methods have to be applied. In order to significantly improve the accuracy of reconstruction, this paper proposes a fast alternating minimization algorithm based on the sparsity and deep image priors (Fama-SDIP) of natural images. By integrating deep image prior (DIP) into the principle of compressive sensing (CS) reconstruction, the proposed algorithm can achieve state-of-the-art results without any training dataset. Extensive experiments show that Fama-SDIP method significantly outperforms prevailing leading methods on simulation and real HSI datasets.
summary: Coded aperture snapshot spectral imaging (CASSI) is a technique used to reconstruct three-dimensional hyperspectral images (HSIs) from one or several two-dimensional projection measurements. However, fewer projection measurements or more spectral channels leads to a severly ill-posed problem, in which case regularization methods have to be applied. In order to significantly improve the accuracy of reconstruction, this paper proposes a fast alternating minimization algorithm based on the sparsity and deep image priors (Fama-SDIP) of natural images. By integrating deep image prior (DIP) into the principle of compressive sensing (CS) reconstruction, the proposed algorithm can achieve state-of-the-art results without any training dataset. Extensive experiments show that Fama-SDIP method significantly outperforms prevailing leading methods on simulation and real HSI datasets.
abstract_zh: 编码孔径快照光谱成像 (CASSI) 是一种用于从一个或多个二维投影测量重建三维高光谱图像 (HSI) 的技术。然而，更少的投影测量或更多的光谱通道会导致严重不适定问题，在这种情况下必须应用正则化方法。为了显着提高重建的精度，本文提出了一种基于自然图像稀疏性和深度图像先验的快速交替最小化算法（Fama-SDIP）。通过将深度图像先验（DIP）集成到压缩感知（CS）重建原理中，所提出的算法无需任何训练数据集即可实现最先进的结果。大量实验表明，Fama-SDIP 方法在模拟和真实 HSI 数据集上显着优于主流的领先方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于稀疏性和深度图像先验的快速交替最小化算法，用于改进编码孔径快照光谱成像的高光谱图像重建。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在投影测量不足或多光谱通道时重建精度受限，需正则化方法，但传统方法效果有限，需更高效算法。
AI.method: 结合压缩感知与深度图像先验（DIP），设计快速交替最小化算法Fama-SDIP，无需训练数据，利用自然图像稀疏性与深度网络先验进行重建。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实高光谱数据集上，Fama-SDIP显著优于现有主流方法，重建精度更高。
AI.conclusion: Fama-SDIP算法有效提升CASSI重建质量，无需训练数据，具有实际应用价值。

ai_content.conclusion: Fama-SDIP算法有效提升CASSI重建质量，无需训练数据，具有实际应用价值。

ai_content_json.method: 结合压缩感知与深度图像先验（DIP），设计快速交替最小化算法Fama-SDIP，无需训练数据，利用自然图像稀疏性与深度网络先验进行重建。
ai_content_json.result: 在仿真与真实高光谱数据集上，Fama-SDIP显著优于现有主流方法，重建精度更高。
ai_content_json.conclusion: Fama-SDIP算法有效提升CASSI重建质量，无需训练数据，具有实际应用价值。
