search_text: A Fast Alternating Minimization Algorithm for Coded Aperture Snapshot Spectral Imaging Based on Sparsity and Deep Image Priors 基于稀疏性和深度图像先验的编码孔径快照光谱成像快速交替最小化算法 Coded aperture snapshot spectral imaging (CASSI) is a technique used to reconstruct three-dimensional hyperspectral images (HSIs) from one or several two-dimensional projection measurements. However, fewer projection measurements or more spectral channels leads to a severly ill-posed problem, in which case regularization methods have to be applied. In order to significantly improve the accuracy of reconstruction, this paper proposes a fast alternating minimization algorithm based on the sparsity and deep image priors (Fama-SDIP) of natural images. By integrating deep image prior (DIP) into the principle of compressive sensing (CS) reconstruction, the proposed algorithm can achieve state-of-the-art results without any training dataset. Extensive experiments show that Fama-SDIP method significantly outperforms prevailing leading methods on simulation and real HSI datasets. 编码孔径快照光谱成像 (CASSI) 是一种用于从一个或多个二维投影测量重建三维高光谱图像 (HSI) 的技术。然而，更少的投影测量或更多的光谱通道会导致严重不适定问题，在这种情况下必须应用正则化方法。为了显着提高重建的精度，本文提出了一种基于自然图像稀疏性和深度图像先验的快速交替最小化算法（Fama-SDIP）。通过将深度图像先验（DIP）集成到压缩感知（CS）重建原理中，所提出的算法无需任何训练数据集即可实现最先进的结果。大量实验表明，Fama-SDIP 方法在模拟和真实 HSI 数据集上显着优于主流的领先方法。 提出一种基于稀疏性和深度图像先验的快速交替最小化算法，用于改进编码孔径快照光谱成像的高光谱图像重建。 Qile Zhao,Xianhong Zhao,Xu Ma,Xudong Chen,Gonzalo R. Arce eess.IV,cs.CV,physics.optics

authors_text: Hao Zhu,Wan-Jing Nie,Yue-Jie Hou,Qi-Meng Du,Si-Jing Li,Chi-Chun Zhou
title: An Unsupervised Deep-Learning Method for Bone Age Assessment
title_zh: 一种用于骨龄评估的无监督深度学习方法
abstract: The bone age, reflecting the degree of development of the bones, can be used to predict the adult height and detect endocrine diseases of children. Both examinations of radiologists and variability of operators have a significant impact on bone age assessment. To decrease human intervention , machine learning algorithms are used to assess the bone age automatically. However, conventional supervised deep-learning methods need pre-labeled data. In this paper, based on the convolutional auto-encoder with constraints (CCAE), an unsupervised deep-learning model proposed in the classification of the fingerprint, we propose this model for the classification of the bone age and baptize it BA-CCAE. In the proposed BA-CCAE model, the key regions of the raw X-ray images of the bone age are encoded, yielding the latent vectors. The K-means clustering algorithm is used to obtain the final classifications by grouping the latent vectors of the bone images. A set of experiments on the Radiological Society of North America pediatric bone age dataset (RSNA) show that the accuracy of classifications at 48-month intervals is 76.15%. Although the accuracy now is lower than most of the existing supervised models, the proposed BA-CCAE model can establish the classification of bone age without any pre-labeled data, and to the best of our knowledge, the proposed BA-CCAE is one of the few trails using the unsupervised deep-learning method for the bone age assessment.
summary: The bone age, reflecting the degree of development of the bones, can be used to predict the adult height and detect endocrine diseases of children. Both examinations of radiologists and variability of operators have a significant impact on bone age assessment. To decrease human intervention , machine learning algorithms are used to assess the bone age automatically. However, conventional supervised deep-learning methods need pre-labeled data. In this paper, based on the convolutional auto-encoder with constraints (CCAE), an unsupervised deep-learning model proposed in the classification of the fingerprint, we propose this model for the classification of the bone age and baptize it BA-CCAE. In the proposed BA-CCAE model, the key regions of the raw X-ray images of the bone age are encoded, yielding the latent vectors. The K-means clustering algorithm is used to obtain the final classifications by grouping the latent vectors of the bone images. A set of experiments on the Radiological Society of North America pediatric bone age dataset (RSNA) show that the accuracy of classifications at 48-month intervals is 76.15%. Although the accuracy now is lower than most of the existing supervised models, the proposed BA-CCAE model can establish the classification of bone age without any pre-labeled data, and to the best of our knowledge, the proposed BA-CCAE is one of the few trails using the unsupervised deep-learning method for the bone age assessment.
abstract_zh: 骨龄反映骨骼的发育程度，可用于预测成人身高和检测儿童内分泌疾病。放射科医生的检查和操作人员的变化对骨龄评估都有重大影响。为了减少人为干预，使用机器学习算法自动评估骨龄。然而，传统的监督深度学习方法需要预先标记的数据。本文基于带约束的卷积自动编码器（CCAE）这一在指纹分类中提出的无监督深度学习模型，提出了该模型用于骨龄分类，并将其命名为BA-CCAE。在提出的 BA-CCAE 模型中，对骨龄原始 X 射线图像的关键区域进行编码，产生潜在向量。 K-means聚类算法用于通过对骨骼图像的潜在向量进行分组来获得最终的分类。北美放射学会儿科骨龄数据集（RSNA）的一组实验表明，以 48 个月为间隔的分类准确率为 76.15%。虽然现在的准确性低于大多数现有的监督模型，但所提出的 BA-CCAE 模型可以在没有任何预先标记数据的情况下建立骨龄分类，并且据我们所知，所提出的 BA-CCAE 是使用无监督深度学习方法进行骨龄评估的少数尝试之一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需预标注数据的无监督深度学习方法BA-CCAE，用于骨龄分类评估。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习方法依赖标注数据且存在人为评估差异，而无监督方法可减少人工干预并解决标注数据不足的问题。
AI.method: 基于卷积自编码器（CCAE）模型，提取骨龄X光图像的关键区域特征生成潜在向量，结合K-means聚类实现分类。
AI.result: 在RSNA儿科骨龄数据集上，以48个月间隔分类的准确率为76.15%，虽低于多数监督模型但无需标注数据。
AI.conclusion: BA-CCAE是少数尝试用无监督深度学习进行骨龄评估的模型，为减少标注依赖提供了新方向。

authors_text: Mohamed Shahawy,Elhadj Benkhelifa,David White
title: Exploring the Intersection between Neural Architecture Search and Continual Learning
title_zh: 探索神经架构搜索和持续学习之间的交叉点
abstract: Despite the significant advances achieved in Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs), their design process remains notoriously tedious, depending primarily on intuition, experience and trial-and-error. This human-dependent process is often time-consuming and prone to errors. Furthermore, the models are generally bound to their training contexts, with no considerations to their surrounding environments. Continual adaptiveness and automation of neural networks is of paramount importance to several domains where model accessibility is limited after deployment (e.g IoT devices, self-driving vehicles, etc.). Additionally, even accessible models require frequent maintenance post-deployment to overcome issues such as Concept/Data Drift, which can be cumbersome and restrictive. By leveraging and combining approaches from Neural Architecture Search (NAS) and Continual Learning (CL), more robust and adaptive agents can be developed. This study conducts the first extensive review on the intersection between NAS and CL, formalizing the prospective Continually-Adaptive Neural Networks (CANNs) paradigm and outlining research directions for lifelong autonomous ANNs.
summary: Despite the significant advances achieved in Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs), their design process remains notoriously tedious, depending primarily on intuition, experience and trial-and-error. This human-dependent process is often time-consuming and prone to errors. Furthermore, the models are generally bound to their training contexts, with no considerations to their surrounding environments. Continual adaptiveness and automation of neural networks is of paramount importance to several domains where model accessibility is limited after deployment (e.g IoT devices, self-driving vehicles, etc.). Additionally, even accessible models require frequent maintenance post-deployment to overcome issues such as Concept/Data Drift, which can be cumbersome and restrictive. By leveraging and combining approaches from Neural Architecture Search (NAS) and Continual Learning (CL), more robust and adaptive agents can be developed. This study conducts the first extensive review on the intersection between NAS and CL, formalizing the prospective Continually-Adaptive Neural Networks (CANNs) paradigm and outlining research directions for lifelong autonomous ANNs.
abstract_zh: 尽管人工神经网络 (ANN) 取得了重大进展，但其设计过程仍然非常乏味，主要依赖于直觉、经验和反复试验。这种依赖于人的过程通常非常耗时并且容易出错。此外，模型通常受限于其训练环境，而不考虑周围环境。神经网络的持续适应性和自动化对于部署后模型可访问性受到限制的几个领域（例如物联网设备、自动驾驶车辆等）至关重要。此外，即使是可访问的模型也需要在部署后进行频繁的维护，以克服概念/数据漂移等问题，这可能很麻烦且具有限制性。通过利用和结合神经架构搜索（NAS）和持续学习（CL）的方法，可以开发更强大和适应性更强的代理。这项研究对 NAS 和 CL 之间的交叉点进行了首次广泛的回顾，正式确定了前瞻性的连续自适应神经网络 (CANN) 范式，并概述了终身自主 ANN 的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 探讨神经架构搜索（NAS）与持续学习（CL）的结合，以开发更强大且适应性强的持续自适应神经网络（CANNs）。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络设计依赖人工且缺乏环境适应性，需解决部署后维护问题，提升模型自主适应能力。
AI.method: 通过综述NAS与CL的结合，提出持续自适应神经网络（CANNs）范式，并规划未来研究方向。
AI.result: 首次系统回顾NAS与CL的交叉领域，确立CANNs框架并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 结合NAS与CL能推动自主适应神经网络发展，为长期自主ANNs提供理论基础。

ai_content.tldr: 探讨神经架构搜索（NAS）与持续学习（CL）的结合，以开发更强大且适应性强的持续自适应神经网络（CANNs）。

authors_text: Tali Boneh-Shitrit,Shir Amir,Annika Bremhorst,Daniel S. Mills,Stefanie Riemer,Dror Fried,Anna Zamansky
title: Deep Learning Models for Automated Classification of Dog Emotional States from Facial Expressions
title_zh: 根据面部表情对狗情绪状态进行自动分类的深度学习模型
abstract: Similarly to humans, facial expressions in animals are closely linked with emotional states. However, in contrast to the human domain, automated recognition of emotional states from facial expressions in animals is underexplored, mainly due to difficulties in data collection and establishment of ground truth concerning emotional states of non-verbal users. We apply recent deep learning techniques to classify (positive) anticipation and (negative) frustration of dogs on a dataset collected in a controlled experimental setting. We explore the suitability of different backbones (e.g. ResNet, ViT) under different supervisions to this task, and find that features of a self-supervised pretrained ViT (DINO-ViT) are superior to the other alternatives. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first to address the task of automatic classification of canine emotions on data acquired in a controlled experiment.
summary: Similarly to humans, facial expressions in animals are closely linked with emotional states. However, in contrast to the human domain, automated recognition of emotional states from facial expressions in animals is underexplored, mainly due to difficulties in data collection and establishment of ground truth concerning emotional states of non-verbal users. We apply recent deep learning techniques to classify (positive) anticipation and (negative) frustration of dogs on a dataset collected in a controlled experimental setting. We explore the suitability of different backbones (e.g. ResNet, ViT) under different supervisions to this task, and find that features of a self-supervised pretrained ViT (DINO-ViT) are superior to the other alternatives. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first to address the task of automatic classification of canine emotions on data acquired in a controlled experiment.
abstract_zh: 与人类类似，动物的面部表情与情绪状态密切相关。然而，与人类领域相比，从动物面部表情中自动识别情绪状态的研究尚未充分，这主要是由于数据收集和建立有关非语言用户情绪状态的基本事实的困难。我们应用最新的深度学习技术，在受控实验环境中收集的数据集上对狗的（积极）预期和（消极）挫败感进行分类。我们探索了不同监督下的不同骨干网（例如 ResNet、ViT）对该任务的适用性，并发现自监督预训练 ViT（DINO-ViT）的功能优于其他替代方案。据我们所知，这项工作是第一个根据受控实验中获取的数据来解决犬类情绪自动分类的任务。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在利用深度学习模型自动分类犬类情绪状态（积极预期与消极挫败），基于受控实验环境下的面部表情数据。
AI.motivation: 动物情绪识别研究不足，尤其缺乏自动化方法，主要受限于数据收集困难及非语言用户的真值建立问题。
AI.method: 对比不同模型架构（如ResNet、ViT）在不同监督方式下的表现，重点验证自监督预训练ViT（DINO-ViT）的特征提取能力。
AI.result: 自监督预训练的DINO-ViT模型在犬类情绪分类任务中表现优于其他模型，为该领域提供首个受控实验下的自动化解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次在受控实验中实现犬类情绪的自动分类，证明自监督学习在动物情绪识别中的潜力。

authors_text: Abhejit Rajagopal,Yutaka Natsuaki,Kristen Wangerin,Mahdjoub Hamdi,Hongyu An,John J. Sunderland,Richard Laforest,Paul E. Kinahan,Peder E. Z. Larson,Thomas A. Hope
title: Synthetic PET via Domain Translation of 3D MRI
title_zh: 通过 3D MRI 域平移合成 PET
comment: under review
comments: under review
abstract: Historically, patient datasets have been used to develop and validate various reconstruction algorithms for PET/MRI and PET/CT. To enable such algorithm development, without the need for acquiring hundreds of patient exams, in this paper we demonstrate a deep learning technique to generate synthetic but realistic whole-body PET sinograms from abundantly-available whole-body MRI. Specifically, we use a dataset of 56 $^{18}$F-FDG-PET/MRI exams to train a 3D residual UNet to predict physiologic PET uptake from whole-body T1-weighted MRI. In training we implemented a balanced loss function to generate realistic uptake across a large dynamic range and computed losses along tomographic lines of response to mimic the PET acquisition. The predicted PET images are forward projected to produce synthetic PET time-of-flight (ToF) sinograms that can be used with vendor-provided PET reconstruction algorithms, including using CT-based attenuation correction (CTAC) and MR-based attenuation correction (MRAC). The resulting synthetic data recapitulates physiologic $^{18}$F-FDG uptake, e.g. high uptake localized to the brain and bladder, as well as uptake in liver, kidneys, heart and muscle. To simulate abnormalities with high uptake, we also insert synthetic lesions. We demonstrate that this synthetic PET data can be used interchangeably with real PET data for the PET quantification task of comparing CT and MR-based attenuation correction methods, achieving $\leq 7.6\%$ error in mean-SUV compared to using real data. These results together show that the proposed synthetic PET data pipeline can be reasonably used for development, evaluation, and validation of PET/MRI reconstruction methods.
summary: Historically, patient datasets have been used to develop and validate various reconstruction algorithms for PET/MRI and PET/CT. To enable such algorithm development, without the need for acquiring hundreds of patient exams, in this paper we demonstrate a deep learning technique to generate synthetic but realistic whole-body PET sinograms from abundantly-available whole-body MRI. Specifically, we use a dataset of 56 $^{18}$F-FDG-PET/MRI exams to train a 3D residual UNet to predict physiologic PET uptake from whole-body T1-weighted MRI. In training we implemented a balanced loss function to generate realistic uptake across a large dynamic range and computed losses along tomographic lines of response to mimic the PET acquisition. The predicted PET images are forward projected to produce synthetic PET time-of-flight (ToF) sinograms that can be used with vendor-provided PET reconstruction algorithms, including using CT-based attenuation correction (CTAC) and MR-based attenuation correction (MRAC). The resulting synthetic data recapitulates physiologic $^{18}$F-FDG uptake, e.g. high uptake localized to the brain and bladder, as well as uptake in liver, kidneys, heart and muscle. To simulate abnormalities with high uptake, we also insert synthetic lesions. We demonstrate that this synthetic PET data can be used interchangeably with real PET data for the PET quantification task of comparing CT and MR-based attenuation correction methods, achieving $\leq 7.6\%$ error in mean-SUV compared to using real data. These results together show that the proposed synthetic PET data pipeline can be reasonably used for development, evaluation, and validation of PET/MRI reconstruction methods.
abstract_zh: 从历史上看，患者数据集已被用于开发和验证 PET/MRI 和 PET/CT 的各种重建算法。为了实现这种算法的开发，而不需要获取数百例患者检查，在本文中，我们演示了一种深度学习技术，可以从大量可用的全身 MRI 中生成合成但逼真的全身 PET 正弦图。具体来说，我们使用 56 $^{18}$F-FDG-PET/MRI 检查的数据集来训练 3D 残差 UNet，以预测全身 T1 加权 MRI 的生理 PET 摄取。在训练中，我们实现了平衡损失函数，以在大动态范围内生成真实的摄取，并沿着断层扫描响应线计算损失以模拟 PET 采集。预测的 PET 图像经过正向投影以生成合成 PET 飞行时间 (ToF) 正弦图，该正弦图可与供应商提供的 PET 重建算法一起使用，包括使用基于 CT 的衰减校正 (CTAC) 和基于 MR 的衰减校正 (MRAC)。由此产生的合成数据概括了生理学 $^{18}$F-FDG 摄取，例如大脑和膀胱的高吸收，以及肝脏、肾脏、心脏和肌肉的吸收。为了模拟高摄取异常，我们还插入了合成病变。我们证明，这种合成 PET 数据可以与真实 PET 数据互换使用，用于比较 CT 和基于 MR 的衰减校正方法的 PET 量化任务，与使用真实数据相比，在平均 SUV 中实现 $\leq 7.6\%$ 误差。这些结果共同表明，所提出的合成 PET 数据管道可以合理地用于 PET/MRI 重建方法的开发、评估和验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的方法，通过3D MRI生成合成但真实的全身PET正弦图，以辅助PET/MRI重建算法的开发与验证。
AI.motivation: 传统PET/MRI算法开发依赖大量患者数据，而实际获取数百例患者检查数据成本高昂且困难，需寻找替代方案。
AI.method: 使用56例$^{18}$F-FDG-PET/MRI数据训练3D残差UNet模型，通过平衡损失函数和沿响应线计算损失模拟PET采集过程，生成合成PET图像并前向投影为ToF正弦图，支持CTAC和MRAC算法验证。
AI.result: 合成数据准确再现了生理$^{18}$F-FDG摄取模式（如脑、膀胱等区域），并在比较CT与MR衰减校正方法的量化任务中，均方SUV误差≤7.6%。
AI.conclusion: 该合成PET数据管道可有效替代真实数据用于PET/MRI重建算法的开发、评估与验证，为减少实际患者数据依赖提供可行方案。

authors_text: Abhejit Rajagopal,Ekaterina Redekop,Anil Kemisetti,Rushi Kulkarni,Steven Raman,Kirti Magudia,Corey W. Arnold,Peder E. Z. Larson
title: Federated Learning with Research Prototypes for Multi-Center MRI-based Detection of Prostate Cancer with Diverse Histopathology
title_zh: 联邦学习与研究原型用于基于多中心 MRI 的前列腺癌检测与不同的组织病理学
comment: under review
comments: under review
abstract: Early prostate cancer detection and staging from MRI are extremely challenging tasks for both radiologists and deep learning algorithms, but the potential to learn from large and diverse datasets remains a promising avenue to increase their generalization capability both within- and across clinics. To enable this for prototype-stage algorithms, where the majority of existing research remains, in this paper we introduce a flexible federated learning framework for cross-site training, validation, and evaluation of deep prostate cancer detection algorithms. Our approach utilizes an abstracted representation of the model architecture and data, which allows unpolished prototype deep learning models to be trained without modification using the NVFlare federated learning framework. Our results show increases in prostate cancer detection and classification accuracy using a specialized neural network model and diverse prostate biopsy data collected at two University of California research hospitals, demonstrating the efficacy of our approach in adapting to different datasets and improving MR-biomarker discovery. We open-source our FLtools system, which can be easily adapted to other deep learning projects for medical imaging.
summary: Early prostate cancer detection and staging from MRI are extremely challenging tasks for both radiologists and deep learning algorithms, but the potential to learn from large and diverse datasets remains a promising avenue to increase their generalization capability both within- and across clinics. To enable this for prototype-stage algorithms, where the majority of existing research remains, in this paper we introduce a flexible federated learning framework for cross-site training, validation, and evaluation of deep prostate cancer detection algorithms. Our approach utilizes an abstracted representation of the model architecture and data, which allows unpolished prototype deep learning models to be trained without modification using the NVFlare federated learning framework. Our results show increases in prostate cancer detection and classification accuracy using a specialized neural network model and diverse prostate biopsy data collected at two University of California research hospitals, demonstrating the efficacy of our approach in adapting to different datasets and improving MR-biomarker discovery. We open-source our FLtools system, which can be easily adapted to other deep learning projects for medical imaging.
abstract_zh: 对于放射科医生和深度学习算法来说，早期前列腺癌检测和 MRI 分期都是极具挑战性的任务，但从大型且多样化的数据集中学习的潜力仍然是提高临床内部和跨诊所泛化能力的有希望的途径。为了实现原型阶段算法（大多数现有研究仍然存在），在本文中，我们引入了一种灵活的联合学习框架，用于深度前列腺癌检测算法的跨站点训练、验证和评估。我们的方法利用模型架构和数据的抽象表示，允许使用 NVFlare 联合学习框架来训练未经修改的原型深度学习模型，而无需进行修改。我们的结果显示，使用专门的神经网络模型和在加州大学两家研究医院收集的不同前列腺活检数据，前列腺癌检测和分类的准确性有所提高，证明了我们的方法在适应不同数据集和改进 MR 生物标志物发现方面的有效性。我们开源了 FLtools 系统，该系统可以轻松适应其他医学成像深度学习项目。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于联邦学习的跨中心MRI前列腺癌检测框架，通过多中心数据提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有前列腺癌MRI检测算法在跨诊所泛化能力不足，且研究多处于原型阶段缺乏灵活训练框架。
AI.method: 设计抽象模型架构与数据表示，结合NVFlare框架实现跨站点联邦学习，无需修改原型模型即可训练。
AI.result: 使用加州大学两所医院多样化活检数据，显著提升检测分类准确率并验证了跨数据集适应性。

search_text: Federated Learning with Research Prototypes for Multi-Center MRI-based Detection of Prostate Cancer with Diverse Histopathology 联邦学习与研究原型用于基于多中心 MRI 的前列腺癌检测与不同的组织病理学 Early prostate cancer detection and staging from MRI are extremely challenging tasks for both radiologists and deep learning algorithms, but the potential to learn from large and diverse datasets remains a promising avenue to increase their generalization capability both within- and across clinics. To enable this for prototype-stage algorithms, where the majority of existing research remains, in this paper we introduce a flexible federated learning framework for cross-site training, validation, and evaluation of deep prostate cancer detection algorithms. Our approach utilizes an abstracted representation of the model architecture and data, which allows unpolished prototype deep learning models to be trained without modification using the NVFlare federated learning framework. Our results show increases in prostate cancer detection and classification accuracy using a specialized neural network model and diverse prostate biopsy data collected at two University of California research hospitals, demonstrating the efficacy of our approach in adapting to different datasets and improving MR-biomarker discovery. We open-source our FLtools system, which can be easily adapted to other deep learning projects for medical imaging. 对于放射科医生和深度学习算法来说，早期前列腺癌检测和 MRI 分期都是极具挑战性的任务，但从大型且多样化的数据集中学习的潜力仍然是提高临床内部和跨诊所泛化能力的有希望的途径。为了实现原型阶段算法（大多数现有研究仍然存在），在本文中，我们引入了一种灵活的联合学习框架，用于深度前列腺癌检测算法的跨站点训练、验证和评估。我们的方法利用模型架构和数据的抽象表示，允许使用 NVFlare 联合学习框架来训练未经修改的原型深度学习模型，而无需进行修改。我们的结果显示，使用专门的神经网络模型和在加州大学两家研究医院收集的不同前列腺活检数据，前列腺癌检测和分类的准确性有所提高，证明了我们的方法在适应不同数据集和改进 MR 生物标志物发现方面的有效性。我们开源了 FLtools 系统，该系统可以轻松适应其他医学成像深度学习项目。 本文提出一种基于联邦学习的跨中心MRI前列腺癌检测框架，通过多中心数据提升模型泛化能力。 Abhejit Rajagopal,Ekaterina Redekop,Anil Kemisetti,Rushi Kulkarni,Steven Raman,Kirti Magudia,Corey W. Arnold,Peder E. Z. Larson cs.CV,cs.LG,q-bio.TO

authors_text: Harold Brayan Arteaga-Arteaga,Melissa delaPava,Alejandro Mora-Rubio,Mario Alejandro Bravo-Ortíz,Jesus Alejandro Alzate-Grisales,Daniel Arias-Garzón,Luis Humberto López-Murillo,Felipe Buitrago-Carmona,Juan Pablo Villa-Pulgarín,Esteban Mercado-Ruiz,Simon Orozco-Arias,M. Hassaballah,Maria de la Iglesia-Vaya,Oscar Cardona-Morales,Reinel Tabares-Soto
title: Machine learning approaches for COVID-19 detection from chest X-ray imaging: A Systematic Review
title_zh: 通过胸部 X 射线成像检测 COVID-19 的机器学习方法：系统回顾
abstract: There is a necessity to develop affordable, and reliable diagnostic tools, which allow containing the COVID-19 spreading. Machine Learning (ML) algorithms have been proposed to design support decision-making systems to assess chest X-ray images, which have proven to be useful to detect and evaluate disease progression. Many research articles are published around this subject, which makes it difficult to identify the best approaches for future work. This paper presents a systematic review of ML applied to COVID-19 detection using chest X-ray images, aiming to offer a baseline for researchers in terms of methods, architectures, databases, and current limitations.
summary: There is a necessity to develop affordable, and reliable diagnostic tools, which allow containing the COVID-19 spreading. Machine Learning (ML) algorithms have been proposed to design support decision-making systems to assess chest X-ray images, which have proven to be useful to detect and evaluate disease progression. Many research articles are published around this subject, which makes it difficult to identify the best approaches for future work. This paper presents a systematic review of ML applied to COVID-19 detection using chest X-ray images, aiming to offer a baseline for researchers in terms of methods, architectures, databases, and current limitations.
abstract_zh: 有必要开发负担得起且可靠的诊断工具，以遏制 COVID-19 的传播。机器学习 (ML) 算法已被提出来设计支持决策系统来评估胸部 X 射线图像，事实证明这对于检测和评估疾病进展很有用。许多研究文章围绕这个主题发表，这使得很难确定未来工作的最佳方法。本文对使用胸部 X 射线图像检测 COVID-19 的机器学习进行了系统回顾，旨在为研究人员提供方法、架构、数据库和当前限制方面的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了机器学习在基于胸部X光影像检测COVID-19中的应用，旨在为研究者提供方法、架构、数据库及局限性的基准参考。
AI.motivation: 由于COVID-19传播的紧迫性，亟需开发经济可靠的诊断工具，而现有研究众多且方法分散，难以确定最佳方向。
AI.method: 通过系统性文献回顾方法，收集并分析针对胸部X光影像的机器学习检测技术相关研究。
AI.result: 总结了主流算法架构、常用数据集、性能指标及当前技术存在的局限性，如数据多样性不足和模型可解释性问题。
AI.conclusion: 系统综述为未来研究提供了清晰方向，建议加强多中心数据共享和算法透明度以提升检测可靠性。

authors_text: Ulrik Kowalk,Simon Doclo,Joerg Bitzer
title: Signal-informed DNN-based DOA Estimation combining an External Microphone and GCC-PHAT Features
title_zh: 结合外部麦克风和 GCC-PHAT 功能的基于信号的 DNN DOA 估计
abstract: Aiming at estimating the direction of arrival (DOA) of a desired speaker in a multi-talker environment using a microphone array, in this paper we propose a signal-informed method exploiting the availability of an external microphone attached to the desired speaker. The proposed method applies a binary mask to the GCC-PHAT input features of a convolutional neural network, where the binary mask is computed based on the power distribution of the external microphone signal. Experimental results for a reverberant scenario with up to four interfering speakers demonstrate that the signal-informed masking improves the localization accuracy, without requiring any knowledge about the interfering speakers.
summary: Aiming at estimating the direction of arrival (DOA) of a desired speaker in a multi-talker environment using a microphone array, in this paper we propose a signal-informed method exploiting the availability of an external microphone attached to the desired speaker. The proposed method applies a binary mask to the GCC-PHAT input features of a convolutional neural network, where the binary mask is computed based on the power distribution of the external microphone signal. Experimental results for a reverberant scenario with up to four interfering speakers demonstrate that the signal-informed masking improves the localization accuracy, without requiring any knowledge about the interfering speakers.
abstract_zh: 为了使用麦克风阵列估计多说话者环境中所需扬声器的到达方向（DOA），在本文中，我们提出了一种利用连接到所需扬声器的外部麦克风的可用性的信号通知方法。该方法将二进制掩码应用于卷积神经网络的 GCC-PHAT 输入特征，其中二进制掩码是根据外部麦克风信号的功率分布计算的。具有多达四个干扰扬声器的混响场景的实验结果表明，信号通知掩蔽提高了定位精度，而无需了解有关干扰扬声器的任何信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合外部麦克风和GCC-PHAT特征的信号感知深度神经网络方法，用于多说话人环境中估计目标说话人的到达方向（DOA）。
AI.motivation: 在多说话人环境中准确估计目标说话人DOA具有挑战性，传统方法常依赖干扰说话人的先验信息，而本文旨在无需此类信息的情况下提升定位精度。
AI.method: 通过外部麦克风信号的功率分布生成二值掩码，将其应用于卷积神经网络的GCC-PHAT输入特征，实现对目标信号的增强与干扰抑制。
AI.result: 实验表明，在存在最多四个干扰说话人的混响环境下，该方法显著提升了DOA估计的准确性，且无需干扰说话人的任何先验知识。
AI.conclusion: 信号感知的二值掩码方法有效提高了复杂声学环境下的DOA估计性能，为无需干扰信息的盲源分离提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Avishai Sintov,Inbar Ben-David
title: Simple Kinesthetic Haptics for Object Recognition
title_zh: 用于物体识别的简单动觉触觉
comment: ef:The International Journal of Robotics Research, 42 (2023) 7
comments: ef:The International Journal of Robotics Research, 42 (2023) 7
abstract: Object recognition is an essential capability when performing various tasks. Humans naturally use either or both visual and tactile perception to extract object class and properties. Typical approaches for robots, however, require complex visual systems or multiple high-density tactile sensors which can be highly expensive. In addition, they usually require actual collection of a large dataset from real objects through direct interaction. In this paper, we propose a kinesthetic-based object recognition method that can be performed with any multi-fingered robotic hand in which the kinematics is known. The method does not require tactile sensors and is based on observing grasps of the objects. We utilize a unique and frame invariant parameterization of grasps to learn instances of object shapes. To train a classifier, training data is generated rapidly and solely in a computational process without interaction with real objects. We then propose and compare between two iterative algorithms that can integrate any trained classifier. The classifiers and algorithms are independent of any particular robot hand and, therefore, can be exerted on various ones. We show in experiments, that with few grasps, the algorithms acquire accurate classification. Furthermore, we show that the object recognition approach is scalable to objects of various sizes. Similarly, a global classifier is trained to identify general geometries (e.g., an ellipsoid or a box) rather than particular ones and demonstrated on a large set of objects. Full scale experiments and analysis are provided to show the performance of the method.
summary: Object recognition is an essential capability when performing various tasks. Humans naturally use either or both visual and tactile perception to extract object class and properties. Typical approaches for robots, however, require complex visual systems or multiple high-density tactile sensors which can be highly expensive. In addition, they usually require actual collection of a large dataset from real objects through direct interaction. In this paper, we propose a kinesthetic-based object recognition method that can be performed with any multi-fingered robotic hand in which the kinematics is known. The method does not require tactile sensors and is based on observing grasps of the objects. We utilize a unique and frame invariant parameterization of grasps to learn instances of object shapes. To train a classifier, training data is generated rapidly and solely in a computational process without interaction with real objects. We then propose and compare between two iterative algorithms that can integrate any trained classifier. The classifiers and algorithms are independent of any particular robot hand and, therefore, can be exerted on various ones. We show in experiments, that with few grasps, the algorithms acquire accurate classification. Furthermore, we show that the object recognition approach is scalable to objects of various sizes. Similarly, a global classifier is trained to identify general geometries (e.g., an ellipsoid or a box) rather than particular ones and demonstrated on a large set of objects. Full scale experiments and analysis are provided to show the performance of the method.
abstract_zh: 物体识别是执行各种任务时的一项基本能力。人类自然地使用视觉和触觉感知之一或两者来提取对象类别和属性。然而，机器人的典型方法需要复杂的视觉系统或多个高密度触觉传感器，这些传感器可能非常昂贵。此外，它们通常需要通过直接交互从真实对象中实际收集大型数据集。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于动觉的物体识别方法，该方法可以使用任何运动学已知的多指机器人手来执行。该方法不需要触觉传感器，并且基于观察物体的抓握情况。我们利用独特且框架不变的抓取参数化来学习对象形状的实例。为了训练分类器，训练数据是在计算过程中快速生成的，无需与真实对象交互。然后，我们提出并比较两种可以集成任何经过训练的分类器的迭代算法。分类器和算法独立于任何特定的机器人手，因此可以应用于各种机器人手。我们在实验中表明，只需很少的掌握，算法就可以获得准确的分类。此外，我们表明对象识别方法可扩展到各种大小的对象。类似地，全局分类器被训练来识别一般几何形状（例如，椭球体或盒子）而不是特定的几何形状，并在大量对象上进行演示。提供了全尺寸实验和分析来展示该方法的性能。

Humans naturally use either or both visual and tactile perception to extract object class and properties. Typical approaches for robots, however, require complex visual systems or multiple high-density tactile sensors which can be highly expensive. In addition, they usually require actual collection of a large dataset from real objects through direct interaction. We show in experiments, that with few grasps, the algorithms acquire accurate classification. Furthermore, we show that the object recognition approach is scalable to objects of various sizes. Similarly, a global classifier is trained to identify general geometries (e.g., an ellipsoid or a box) rather than particular ones and demonstrated on a large set of objects. authors_text: Florian Stober,Armin Weiß
title: Lower Bounds for Sorting 16, 17, and 18 Elements
title_zh: 对 16、17 和 18 个元素进行排序的下界
abstract: It is a long-standing open question to determine the minimum number of comparisons $S(n)$ that suffice to sort an array of $n$ elements. Indeed, before this work $S(n)$ has been known only for $n\leq 22$ with the exception for $n=16$, $17$, and $18$. In this work, we fill that gap by proving that sorting $n=16$, $17$, and $18$ elements requires $46$, $50$, and $54$ comparisons respectively. This fully determines $S(n)$ for these values and disproves a conjecture by Knuth that $S(16) = 45$. Moreover, we show that for sorting $28$ elements at least 99 comparisons are needed. We obtain our result via an exhaustive computer search which extends previous work by Wells (1965) and Peczarski (2002, 2004, 2007, 2012). Our progress is both based on advances in hardware and on novel algorithmic ideas such as applying a bidirectional search to this problem.
summary: It is a long-standing open question to determine the minimum number of comparisons $S(n)$ that suffice to sort an array of $n$ elements. Indeed, before this work $S(n)$ has been known only for $n\leq 22$ with the exception for $n=16$, $17$, and $18$. In this work, we fill that gap by proving that sorting $n=16$, $17$, and $18$ elements requires $46$, $50$, and $54$ comparisons respectively. This fully determines $S(n)$ for these values and disproves a conjecture by Knuth that $S(16) = 45$. Moreover, we show that for sorting $28$ elements at least 99 comparisons are needed. We obtain our result via an exhaustive computer search which extends previous work by Wells (1965) and Peczarski (2002, 2004, 2007, 2012). Our progress is both based on advances in hardware and on novel algorithmic ideas such as applying a bidirectional search to this problem.
abstract_zh: 确定足以对 $n$ 元素数组进行排序的最小比较次数 $S(n)$ 是一个长期悬而未决的问题。事实上，在这项工作之前，$S(n)$ 仅已知 $n\leq 22$，$n=16$、$17$ 和 $18$ 除外。在这项工作中，我们通过证明对 $n=16$、$17$ 和 $18$ 元素进行排序分别需要 $46$、$50$ 和 $54$ 比较来填补这一空白。这完全确定了这些值的 $S(n)$ 并反驳了 Knuth 的猜想：$S(16) = 45$。此外，我们表明，要对 $28$ 元素进行排序，至少需要 99 次比较。我们通过详尽的计算机搜索获得了结果，该搜索扩展了 Wells (1965) 和 Peczarski (2002, 2004, 2007, 2012) 之前的工作。我们的进步既基于硬件的进步，也基于新颖的算法思想，例如对这个问题应用双向搜索。

AI.tldr: 本文确定了对16、17和18个元素进行排序所需的最小比较次数下界。
AI.motivation: 确定排序n个元素所需的最小比较次数S(n)是长期未解的问题，此前仅知道n≤22时的S(n)值，但16、17、18的情况未知。
AI.method: 通过扩展Wells和Peczarski的先前工作，结合硬件进步和双向搜索等新算法，进行穷举计算机搜索。
AI.result: 证明排序16、17、18个元素分别需要46、50、54次比较，推翻Knuth的S(16)=45猜想，并发现排序28个元素至少需要99次比较。
AI.conclusion: 完全确定了S(16)、S(17)、S(18)的值，展示了计算机搜索方法在解决此类问题中的有效性。

authors_text: Marek Chrobak,Samuel Haney,Mehraneh Liaee,Debmalya Panigrahi,Rajmohan Rajaraman,Ravi Sundaram,Neal E. Young
title: Online Paging with Heterogeneous Cache Slots
title_zh: 异构缓存槽在线分页
comment: conference and journal versions appear in STACS 2023 and Algorithmica (2004)
comments: conference and journal versions appear in STACS 2023 and Algorithmica (2004)
abstract: It is natural to generalize the online $k$-Server problem by allowing each request to specify not only a point $p$, but also a subset $S$ of servers that may serve it. For uniform metrics, the problem is equivalent to a generalization of Paging in which each request specifies not only a page $p$, but also a subset $S$ of cache slots, and is satisfied by having a copy of $p$ in some slot in $S$. We call this problem Slot-Heterogenous Paging. We parameterize the problem by specifying a family $\mathcal S \subseteq 2^{[k]}$ of requestable slot sets, and we establish bounds on the competitive ratio as a function of the cache size $k$ and family $\mathcal S$: - If all request sets are allowed ($\mathcal S=2^{[k]}\setminus\{\emptyset\}$), the optimal deterministic and randomized competitive ratios are exponentially worse than for standard \Paging ($\mathcal S=\{[k]\}$). - As a function of $|\mathcal S|$ and $k$, the optimal deterministic ratio is polynomial: at most $O(k^2|\mathcal S|)$ and at least $Ω(\sqrt{|\mathcal S|})$. - For any laminar family $\mathcal S$ of height $h$, the optimal ratios are $O(hk)$ (deterministic) and $O(h^2\log k)$ (randomized). - The special case of laminar $\mathcal S$ that we call All-or-One Paging extends standard Paging by allowing each request to specify a specific slot to put the requested page in. The optimal deterministic ratio for weighted All-or-One Paging is $Θ(k)$. Offline All-or-One Paging is NP-hard. Some results for the laminar case are shown via a reduction to the generalization of Paging in which each request specifies a set $\mathcal P of pages, and is satisfied by fetching any page from $\mathcal P into the cache. The optimal ratios for the latter problem (with laminar family of height $h$) are at most $hk$ (deterministic) and $h\,H_k$ (randomized).
summary: It is natural to generalize the online $k$-Server problem by allowing each request to specify not only a point $p$, but also a subset $S$ of servers that may serve it. For uniform metrics, the problem is equivalent to a generalization of Paging in which each request specifies not only a page $p$, but also a subset $S$ of cache slots, and is satisfied by having a copy of $p$ in some slot in $S$. We call this problem Slot-Heterogenous Paging. We parameterize the problem by specifying a family $\mathcal S \subseteq 2^{[k]}$ of requestable slot sets, and we establish bounds on the competitive ratio as a function of the cache size $k$ and family $\mathcal S$: - If all request sets are allowed ($\mathcal S=2^{[k]}\setminus\{\emptyset\}$), the optimal deterministic and randomized competitive ratios are exponentially worse than for standard \Paging ($\mathcal S=\{[k]\}$). - As a function of $|\mathcal S|$ and $k$, the optimal deterministic ratio is polynomial: at most $O(k^2|\mathcal S|)$ and at least $Ω(\sqrt{|\mathcal S|})$. - For any laminar family $\mathcal S$ of height $h$, the optimal ratios are $O(hk)$ (deterministic) and $O(h^2\log k)$ (randomized). - The special case of laminar $\mathcal S$ that we call All-or-One Paging extends standard Paging by allowing each request to specify a specific slot to put the requested page in. The optimal deterministic ratio for weighted All-or-One Paging is $Θ(k)$. Offline All-or-One Paging is NP-hard. Some results for the laminar case are shown via a reduction to the generalization of Paging in which each request specifies a set $\mathcal P of pages, and is satisfied by fetching any page from $\mathcal P into the cache. The optimal ratios for the latter problem (with laminar family of height $h$) are at most $hk$ (deterministic) and $h\,H_k$ (randomized).
abstract_zh: 通过允许每个请求不仅指定点 $p$，而且还指定可以为其提供服务的服务器子集 $S$，可以自然地概括在线 $k$-服务器问题。对于统一指标，该问题相当于 Paging 的推广，其中每个请求不仅指定页面 $p$，还指定缓存槽的子集 $S$，并且通过在 $S$ 中的某个槽中拥有 $p$ 的副本来满足。我们称这个问题为时隙异构分页。我们通过指定可请求槽集的族 $\mathcal S \subseteq 2^{[k]}$ 来参数化问题，并根据缓存大小 $k$ 和族 $\mathcal S$ 建立竞争比的界限： - 如果允许所有请求集 ($\mathcal S=2^{[k]}\setminus\{\emptyset\}$)，则最佳确定性和随机竞争比比标准 \Paging ($\mathcal S=\{[k]\}$)。 - 作为 $|\mathcal S|$ 和 $k$ 的函数，最佳确定性比率是多项式：最多 $O(k^2|\mathcal S|)$ 且至少 $Ω(\sqrt{|\mathcal S|})$。 - 对于任何高度为 $h$ 的层流族 $\mathcal S$，最佳比率为 $O(hk)$ （确定性）和 $O(h^2\log k)$ （随机）。 - 我们称之为全或单分页的层流 $\mathcal S$ 的特殊情况通过允许每个请求指定一个特定槽来放置所请求的页面来扩展标准分页。加权全或单分页的最佳确定性比率是 $θ(k)$。离线全或单寻呼是 NP 困难的。层流情况的一些结果通过分页的概括来显示，其中每个请求指定一组 $\mathcal P 页面，并通过从 $\mathcal P 获取任何页面到缓存中来满足。后一个问题（高度为 $h$ 的层流族）的最佳比率最多为 $hk$ （确定性）和 $h\,H_k$ （随机）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了允许请求指定特定缓存槽的在线分页问题，分析了不同参数下竞争比的界。
AI.motivation: 传统分页问题假设所有缓存槽均可服务请求，但实际场景中缓存槽可能存在异构性限制，需推广模型以适应更复杂需求。
AI.method: 通过参数化请求可访问的槽集合族S，分析其对竞争比的影响，结合确定性和随机化算法设计，利用归约方法证明复杂度界。
AI.result: 当允许所有槽集合时，竞争比指数级劣于标准分页；确定性比为O(k²|S|)，随机化比为Ω(√|S|)；层叠族下比为O(hk)和O(h² log k)；All-or-One分页的确定性比为Θ(k)，离线版本NP难。
AI.conclusion: 异构缓存槽分页问题在不同参数下呈现显著复杂性差异，需针对性设计算法以优化竞争比。

search_text: Online Paging with Heterogeneous Cache Slots 异构缓存槽在线分页 It is natural to generalize the online $k$-Server problem by allowing each request to specify not only a point $p$, but also a subset $S$ of servers that may serve it. For uniform metrics, the problem is equivalent to a generalization of Paging in which each request specifies not only a page $p$, but also a subset $S$ of cache slots, and is satisfied by having a copy of $p$ in some slot in $S$. We call this problem Slot-Heterogenous Paging. We parameterize the problem by specifying a family $\mathcal S \subseteq 2^{[k]}$ of requestable slot sets, and we establish bounds on the competitive ratio as a function of the cache size $k$ and family $\mathcal S$: - If all request sets are allowed ($\mathcal S=2^{[k]}\setminus\{\emptyset\}$), the optimal deterministic and randomized competitive ratios are exponentially worse than for standard \Paging ($\mathcal S=\{[k]\}$). - As a function of $|\mathcal S|$ and $k$, the optimal deterministic ratio is polynomial: at most $O(k^2|\mathcal S|)$ and at least $Ω(\sqrt{|\mathcal S|})$. - For any laminar family $\mathcal S$ of height $h$, the optimal ratios are $O(hk)$ (deterministic) and $O(h^2\log k)$ (randomized). - The special case of laminar $\mathcal S$ that we call All-or-One Paging extends standard Paging by allowing each request to specify a specific slot to put the requested page in. The optimal deterministic ratio for weighted All-or-One Paging is $Θ(k)$. Offline All-or-One Paging is NP-hard. Some results for the laminar case are shown via a reduction to the generalization of Paging in which each request specifies a set $\mathcal P of pages, and is satisfied by fetching any page from $\mathcal P into the cache. The optimal ratios for the latter problem (with laminar family of height $h$) are at most $hk$ (deterministic) and $h\,H_k$ (randomized). 通过允许每个请求不仅指定点 $p$，而且还指定可以为其提供服务的服务器子集 $S$，可以自然地概括在线 $k$-服务器问题。对于统一指标，该问题相当于 Paging 的推广，其中每个请求不仅指定页面 $p$，还指定缓存槽的子集 $S$，并且通过在 $S$ 中的某个槽中拥有 $p$ 的副本来满足。我们称这个问题为时隙异构分页。我们通过指定可请求槽集的族 $\mathcal S \subseteq 2^{[k]}$ 来参数化问题，并根据缓存大小 $k$ 和族 $\mathcal S$ 建立竞争比的界限： - 如果允许所有请求集 ($\mathcal S=2^{[k]}\setminus\{\emptyset\}$)，则最佳确定性和随机竞争比比标准 \Paging ($\mathcal S=\{[k]\}$)。 - 作为 $|\mathcal S|$ 和 $k$ 的函数，最佳确定性比率是多项式：最多 $O(k^2|\mathcal S|)$ 且至少 $Ω(\sqrt{|\mathcal S|})$。 - 对于任何高度为 $h$ 的层流族 $\mathcal S$，最佳比率为 $O(hk)$ （确定性）和 $O(h^2\log k)$ （随机）。 - 我们称之为全或单分页的层流 $\mathcal S$ 的特殊情况通过允许每个请求指定一个特定槽来放置所请求的页面来扩展标准分页。加权全或单分页的最佳确定性比率是 $θ(k)$。离线全或单寻呼是 NP 困难的。层流情况的一些结果通过分页的概括来显示，其中每个请求指定一组 $\mathcal P 页面，并通过从 $\mathcal P 获取任何页面到缓存中来满足。后一个问题（高度为 $h$ 的层流族）的最佳比率最多为 $hk$ （确定性）和 $h\,H_k$ （随机）。 本文研究了允许请求指定特定缓存槽的在线分页问题，分析了不同参数下竞争比的界。 Marek Chrobak,Samuel Haney,Mehraneh Liaee,Debmalya Panigrahi,Rajmohan Rajaraman,Ravi Sundaram,Neal E. Young cs.DS

authors_text: Ramya Muthukrishnan,Angelina Heyler,Keshava Katti,Sarthak Pati,Walter Mankowski,Aprupa Alahari,Michael Sanborn,Emily F. Conant,Christopher Scott,Stacey Winham,Celine Vachon,Pratik Chaudhari,Despina Kontos,Spyridon Bakas
title: MammoFL: Mammographic Breast Density Estimation using Federated Learning
title_zh: MammoFL：使用联邦学习进行乳房 X 线摄影乳房密度估计
comment: Deep learning, federated learning, mammography, breast density, risk assessment
comments: Deep learning, federated learning, mammography, breast density, risk assessment
abstract: In this study, we automate quantitative mammographic breast density estimation with neural networks and show that this tool is a strong use case for federated learning on multi-institutional datasets. Our dataset included bilateral CC-view and MLO-view mammographic images from two separate institutions. Two U-Nets were separately trained on algorithm-generated labels to perform segmentation of the breast and dense tissue from these images and subsequently calculate breast percent density (PD). The networks were trained with federated learning and compared to three non-federated baselines, one trained on each single-institution dataset and one trained on the aggregated multi-institution dataset. We demonstrate that training on multi-institution datasets is critical to algorithm generalizability. We further show that federated learning on multi-institutional datasets improves model generalization to unseen data at nearly the same level as centralized training on multi-institutional datasets, indicating that federated learning can be applied to our method to improve algorithm generalizability while maintaining patient privacy.
summary: In this study, we automate quantitative mammographic breast density estimation with neural networks and show that this tool is a strong use case for federated learning on multi-institutional datasets. Our dataset included bilateral CC-view and MLO-view mammographic images from two separate institutions. Two U-Nets were separately trained on algorithm-generated labels to perform segmentation of the breast and dense tissue from these images and subsequently calculate breast percent density (PD). The networks were trained with federated learning and compared to three non-federated baselines, one trained on each single-institution dataset and one trained on the aggregated multi-institution dataset. We demonstrate that training on multi-institution datasets is critical to algorithm generalizability. We further show that federated learning on multi-institutional datasets improves model generalization to unseen data at nearly the same level as centralized training on multi-institutional datasets, indicating that federated learning can be applied to our method to improve algorithm generalizability while maintaining patient privacy.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们利用神经网络自动进行定量乳房 X 光检查乳腺密度估计，并表明该工具是多机构数据集联合学习的强大用例。我们的数据集包括来自两个独立机构的双边 CC 视图和 MLO 视图乳房 X 线摄影图像。两个 U-Net 分别根据算法生成的标签进行训练，以对这些图像中的乳房和致密组织进行分割，并随后计算乳房百分比密度 (PD)。这些网络通过联邦学习进行训练，并与三个非联邦基线进行比较，一个在每个单机构数据集上进行训练，一个在聚合的多机构数据集上进行训练。我们证明，多机构数据集的训练对于算法的通用性至关重要。我们进一步表明，多机构数据集上的联邦学习提高了模型对不可见数据的泛化能力，其水平与多机构数据集上的集中训练几乎相同，这表明联邦学习可以应用于我们的方法，以提高算法的泛化性，同时维护患者隐私。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MammoFL方法，利用联邦学习实现多机构乳腺X线影像的自动定量乳腺密度估计。
AI.motivation: 传统集中式训练面临数据隐私和机构间数据分布差异的挑战，需探索在保护隐私前提下提升算法泛化性的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于两个机构的乳腺X线影像数据，采用联邦学习训练两个U-Net网络进行乳腺及致密组织分割，通过对比联邦学习与非联邦学习基线模型评估性能。
AI.result: 联邦学习在未见数据上的泛化能力接近集中式多机构训练，且显著优于单机构训练模型，验证了其在隐私保护下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习可有效提升多机构医学影像分析模型的泛化能力，为跨机构协作提供隐私保护的解决方案。

authors_text: Alex LaGrassa,Oliver Kroemer
title: Learning Model Preconditions for Planning with Multiple Models
title_zh: 使用多个模型进行规划的学习模型先决条件
comment: Presented at Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL 2021). Revised for clarity
comments: Presented at Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL 2021). Revised for clarity
abstract: Different models can provide differing levels of fidelity when a robot is planning. Analytical models are often fast to evaluate but only work in limited ranges of conditions. Meanwhile, physics simulators are effective at modeling complex interactions between objects but are typically more computationally expensive. Learning when to switch between the various models can greatly improve the speed of planning and task success reliability. In this work, we learn model deviation estimators (MDEs) to predict the error between real-world states and the states outputted by transition models. MDEs can be used to define a model precondition that describes which transitions are accurately modeled. We then propose a planner that uses the learned model preconditions to switch between various models in order to use models in conditions where they are accurate, prioritizing faster models when possible. We evaluate our method on two real-world tasks: placing a rod into a box and placing a rod into a closed drawer.
summary: Different models can provide differing levels of fidelity when a robot is planning. Analytical models are often fast to evaluate but only work in limited ranges of conditions. Meanwhile, physics simulators are effective at modeling complex interactions between objects but are typically more computationally expensive. Learning when to switch between the various models can greatly improve the speed of planning and task success reliability. In this work, we learn model deviation estimators (MDEs) to predict the error between real-world states and the states outputted by transition models. MDEs can be used to define a model precondition that describes which transitions are accurately modeled. We then propose a planner that uses the learned model preconditions to switch between various models in order to use models in conditions where they are accurate, prioritizing faster models when possible. We evaluate our method on two real-world tasks: placing a rod into a box and placing a rod into a closed drawer.
abstract_zh: 当机器人进行规划时，不同的模型可以提供不同级别的保真度。分析模型通常可以快速评估，但仅适用于有限的条件范围。与此同时，物理模拟器可以有效地模拟对象之间的复杂交互，但通常计算成本更高。了解何时在各种模型之间切换可以极大地提高规划速度和任务成功的可靠性。在这项工作中，我们学习模型偏差估计器（MDE）来预测现实世界状态与转换模型输出的状态之间的误差。 MDE 可用于定义模型前提条件，描述哪些转换被准确建模。然后，我们提出一个规划器，使用学习到的模型前提条件在各种模型之间切换，以便在准确的情况下使用模型，并在可能的情况下优先考虑更快的模型。我们在两个现实世界的任务中评估我们的方法：将一根杆放入盒子中并将一根杆放入关闭的抽屉中。

AI.tldr: 学习模型前提条件以优化多模型规划
AI.motivation: 不同模型在准确性和计算成本上有差异，需要有效切换策略来提升规划效率和任务成功率
AI.method: 提出模型偏差估计器（MDEs）预测模型误差，定义模型前提条件，并设计基于这些条件的规划器以切换模型
AI.result: 在放置杆入盒和抽屉的任务中，方法提高了规划速度和成功率
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效结合了不同模型的优势，在实际任务中提升了规划效率和可靠性

motivation: 不同模型在准确性和计算成本上有差异，需要有效切换策略来提升规划效率和任务成功率
method: 提出模型偏差估计器（MDEs）预测模型误差，定义模型前提条件，并设计基于这些条件的规划器以切换模型
result: 在放置杆入盒和抽屉的任务中，方法提高了规划速度和成功率
conclusion: 该方法有效结合了不同模型的优势，在实际任务中提升了规划效率和可靠性
search_text: Learning Model Preconditions for Planning with Multiple Models 使用多个模型进行规划的学习模型先决条件 Different models can provide differing levels of fidelity when a robot is planning. Analytical models are often fast to evaluate but only work in limited ranges of conditions. Meanwhile, physics simulators are effective at modeling complex interactions between objects but are typically more computationally expensive. Learning when to switch between the various models can greatly improve the speed of planning and task success reliability. In this work, we learn model deviation estimators (MDEs) to predict the error between real-world states and the states outputted by transition models. MDEs can be used to define a model precondition that describes which transitions are accurately modeled. We then propose a planner that uses the learned model preconditions to switch between various models in order to use models in conditions where they are accurate, prioritizing faster models when possible. We evaluate our method on two real-world tasks: placing a rod into a box and placing a rod into a closed drawer. 当机器人进行规划时，不同的模型可以提供不同级别的保真度。分析模型通常可以快速评估，但仅适用于有限的条件范围。与此同时，物理模拟器可以有效地模拟对象之间的复杂交互，但通常计算成本更高。了解何时在各种模型之间切换可以极大地提高规划速度和任务成功的可靠性。在这项工作中，我们学习模型偏差估计器（MDE）来预测现实世界状态与转换模型输出的状态之间的误差。 MDE 可用于定义模型前提条件，描述哪些转换被准确建模。然后，我们提出一个规划器，使用学习到的模型前提条件在各种模型之间切换，以便在准确的情况下使用模型，并在可能的情况下优先考虑更快的模型。我们在两个现实世界的任务中评估我们的方法：将一根杆放入盒子中并将一根杆放入关闭的抽屉中。 学习模型前提条件以优化多模型规划 Alex LaGrassa,Oliver Kroemer cs.RO

authors_text: Nuo Xu,Binghui Wang,Ran Ran,Wujie Wen,Parv Venkitasubramaniam
title: NeuGuard: Lightweight Neuron-Guided Defense against Membership Inference Attacks
title_zh: NeuGuard：针对成员推理攻击的轻量级神经元引导防御
comment: ef:Annual Computer Security Applications Conference (ACSAC '22), December 5--9, 2022, Austin, TX, USA
comments: ef:Annual Computer Security Applications Conference (ACSAC '22), December 5--9, 2022, Austin, TX, USA
abstract: Membership inference attacks (MIAs) against machine learning models can lead to serious privacy risks for the training dataset used in the model training. In this paper, we propose a novel and effective Neuron-Guided Defense method named NeuGuard against membership inference attacks (MIAs). We identify a key weakness in existing defense mechanisms against MIAs wherein they cannot simultaneously defend against two commonly used neural network based MIAs, indicating that these two attacks should be separately evaluated to assure the defense effectiveness. We propose NeuGuard, a new defense approach that jointly controls the output and inner neurons' activation with the object to guide the model output of training set and testing set to have close distributions. NeuGuard consists of class-wise variance minimization targeting restricting the final output neurons and layer-wise balanced output control aiming to constrain the inner neurons in each layer. We evaluate NeuGuard and compare it with state-of-the-art defenses against two neural network based MIAs, five strongest metric based MIAs including the newly proposed label-only MIA on three benchmark datasets. Results show that NeuGuard outperforms the state-of-the-art defenses by offering much improved utility-privacy trade-off, generality, and overhead.
summary: Membership inference attacks (MIAs) against machine learning models can lead to serious privacy risks for the training dataset used in the model training. In this paper, we propose a novel and effective Neuron-Guided Defense method named NeuGuard against membership inference attacks (MIAs). We identify a key weakness in existing defense mechanisms against MIAs wherein they cannot simultaneously defend against two commonly used neural network based MIAs, indicating that these two attacks should be separately evaluated to assure the defense effectiveness. We propose NeuGuard, a new defense approach that jointly controls the output and inner neurons' activation with the object to guide the model output of training set and testing set to have close distributions. NeuGuard consists of class-wise variance minimization targeting restricting the final output neurons and layer-wise balanced output control aiming to constrain the inner neurons in each layer. We evaluate NeuGuard and compare it with state-of-the-art defenses against two neural network based MIAs, five strongest metric based MIAs including the newly proposed label-only MIA on three benchmark datasets. Results show that NeuGuard outperforms the state-of-the-art defenses by offering much improved utility-privacy trade-off, generality, and overhead.
abstract_zh: 针对机器学习模型的成员推理攻击 (MIA) 可能会给模型训练中使用的训练数据集带来严重的隐私风险。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖有效的神经元引导防御方法，名为 NeuGuard，针对成员推理攻击（MIA）。我们发现了现有的 MIA 防御机制的一个关键弱点，即它们无法同时防御两种常用的基于神经网络的 MIA，这表明应分别评估这两种攻击以确保防御有效性。我们提出了NeuGuard，一种新的防御方法，联合控制输出和内部神经元的激活，目的是引导训练集和测试集的模型输出具有接近的分布。 NeuGuard 由旨在限制最终输出神经元的类方差最小化和旨在约束每层内部神经元的分层平衡输出控制组成。我们评估 NeuGuard 并将其与针对两个基于神经网络的 MIA、五个基于最强度量的 MIA 的最先进的防御进行比较，包括在三个基准数据集上新提出的仅标签 MIA。结果表明，NeuGuard 通过提供大大改进的实用程序-隐私权衡、通用性和开销，优于最先进的防御。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为NeuGuard的轻量级神经元引导防御方法，用于对抗针对机器学习模型的成员推理攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有的防御机制无法同时有效防御两种常见的基于神经网络的成员推理攻击，因此需要一种新的方法来提高防御效果。
AI.method: NeuGuard通过联合控制模型输出和内部神经元的激活，使训练集和测试集的输出分布接近。该方法包括类别的方差最小化和层间的平衡输出控制。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，NeuGuard在三种基准数据集上优于现有的最先进的防御方法，提供了更好的效用-隐私权衡、通用性和开销。
AI.conclusion: NeuGuard是一种有效的新型防御方法，能够有效应对多种成员推理攻击，具有较高的实用性和通用性。

authors_text: Jingcheng Zhou,Wei Wei,Xing Li,Bowen Pang,Zhiming Zheng
title: Parameter Convex Neural Networks
title_zh: 参数凸神经网络
comment: 10 pages
comments: 10 pages
abstract: Deep learning utilizing deep neural networks (DNNs) has achieved a lot of success recently in many important areas such as computer vision, natural language processing, and recommendation systems. The lack of convexity for DNNs has been seen as a major disadvantage of many optimization methods, such as stochastic gradient descent, which greatly reduces the genelization of neural network applications. We realize that the convexity make sense in the neural network and propose the exponential multilayer neural network (EMLP), a class of parameter convex neural network (PCNN) which is convex with regard to the parameters of the neural network under some conditions that can be realized. Besides, we propose the convexity metric for the two-layer EGCN and test the accuracy when the convexity metric changes. For late experiments, we use the same architecture to make the exponential graph convolutional network (EGCN) and do the experiment on the graph classificaion dataset in which our model EGCN performs better than the graph convolutional network (GCN) and the graph attention network (GAT).
summary: Deep learning utilizing deep neural networks (DNNs) has achieved a lot of success recently in many important areas such as computer vision, natural language processing, and recommendation systems. The lack of convexity for DNNs has been seen as a major disadvantage of many optimization methods, such as stochastic gradient descent, which greatly reduces the genelization of neural network applications. We realize that the convexity make sense in the neural network and propose the exponential multilayer neural network (EMLP), a class of parameter convex neural network (PCNN) which is convex with regard to the parameters of the neural network under some conditions that can be realized. Besides, we propose the convexity metric for the two-layer EGCN and test the accuracy when the convexity metric changes. For late experiments, we use the same architecture to make the exponential graph convolutional network (EGCN) and do the experiment on the graph classificaion dataset in which our model EGCN performs better than the graph convolutional network (GCN) and the graph attention network (GAT).
abstract_zh: 利用深度神经网络（DNN）的深度学习最近在计算机视觉、自然语言处理和推荐系统等许多重要领域取得了巨大成功。 DNN 缺乏凸性被视为许多优化方法的主要缺点，例如随机梯度下降，它大大降低了神经网络应用的泛化性。我们认识到凸性在神经网络中是有意义的，并提出了指数多层神经网络（EMLP），这是一类参数凸神经网络（PCNN），在某些可以实现的条件下，神经网络的参数是凸的。此外，我们提出了两层EGCN的凸性度量并测试了凸性度量变化时的准确性。对于后期实验，我们使用相同的架构来制作指数图卷积网络（EGCN），并在图分类数据集上进行实验，其中我们的模型 EGCN 比图卷积网络（GCN）和图注意网络（GAT）表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出参数凸神经网络（PCNN），通过引入凸性条件解决传统深度神经网络优化困难的问题，并在图分类任务中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统深度神经网络因非凸性导致优化算法（如SGD）泛化能力不足，亟需通过凸性改进模型稳定性与性能。
AI.method: 提出指数多层感知机（EMLP）和指数图卷积网络（EGCN），在特定条件下保证参数凸性，并设计凸性度量评估模型表现。
AI.result: EGCN在图分类数据集上的准确率优于GCN和GAT，验证了参数凸性设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 参数凸性可提升神经网络优化效率与泛化能力，未来可拓展至更多网络结构与应用场景。

authors_text: Zhihao Fan,Zhongyu Wei,Jingjing Chen,Siyuan Wang,Zejun Li,Jiarong Xu,Xuanjing Huang
title: A Unified Continuous Learning Framework for Multi-modal Knowledge Discovery and Pre-training
title_zh: 多模态知识发现和预训练的统一持续学习框架
abstract: Multi-modal pre-training and knowledge discovery are two important research topics in multi-modal machine learning. Nevertheless, none of existing works make attempts to link knowledge discovery with knowledge guided multi-modal pre-training. In this paper, we propose to unify them into a continuous learning framework for mutual improvement. Taking the open-domain uni-modal datasets of images and texts as input, we maintain a knowledge graph as the foundation to support these two tasks. For knowledge discovery, a pre-trained model is used to identify cross-modal links on the graph. For model pre-training, the knowledge graph is used as the external knowledge to guide the model updating. These two steps are iteratively performed in our framework for continuous learning. The experimental results on MS-COCO and Flickr30K with respect to both knowledge discovery and the pre-trained model validate the effectiveness of our framework.
summary: Multi-modal pre-training and knowledge discovery are two important research topics in multi-modal machine learning. Nevertheless, none of existing works make attempts to link knowledge discovery with knowledge guided multi-modal pre-training. In this paper, we propose to unify them into a continuous learning framework for mutual improvement. Taking the open-domain uni-modal datasets of images and texts as input, we maintain a knowledge graph as the foundation to support these two tasks. For knowledge discovery, a pre-trained model is used to identify cross-modal links on the graph. For model pre-training, the knowledge graph is used as the external knowledge to guide the model updating. These two steps are iteratively performed in our framework for continuous learning. The experimental results on MS-COCO and Flickr30K with respect to both knowledge discovery and the pre-trained model validate the effectiveness of our framework.
abstract_zh: 多模态预训练和知识发现是多模态机器学习中的两个重要研究课题。然而，现有的工作都没有尝试将知识发现与知识引导的多模态预训练联系起来。在本文中，我们建议将它们统一到一个持续学习的框架中，以实现相互改进。以图像和文本的开放域单模态数据集作为输入，我们维护知识图谱作为支持这两个任务的基础。对于知识发现，使用预先训练的模型来识别图上的跨模式链接。对于模型预训练，知识图谱作为外部知识来指导模型更新。这两个步骤在我们的持续学习框架中迭代执行。 MS-COCO 和 Flickr30K 上知识发现和预训练模型的实验结果验证了我们框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个统一的连续学习框架，将多模态知识发现与预训练结合，实现相互促进。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未将知识发现与知识引导的多模态预训练结合，缺乏统一框架实现两者协同提升。
AI.method: 基于知识图谱构建基础，通过预训练模型识别跨模态链接，并利用知识图谱指导模型更新，迭代执行知识发现与预训练。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO和Flickr30K数据集上，框架在知识发现和预训练任务中均表现出有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功统一了多模态知识发现与预训练，为后续研究提供了新思路。

search_text: A Unified Continuous Learning Framework for Multi-modal Knowledge Discovery and Pre-training 多模态知识发现和预训练的统一持续学习框架 Multi-modal pre-training and knowledge discovery are two important research topics in multi-modal machine learning. Nevertheless, none of existing works make attempts to link knowledge discovery with knowledge guided multi-modal pre-training. In this paper, we propose to unify them into a continuous learning framework for mutual improvement. Taking the open-domain uni-modal datasets of images and texts as input, we maintain a knowledge graph as the foundation to support these two tasks. For knowledge discovery, a pre-trained model is used to identify cross-modal links on the graph. For model pre-training, the knowledge graph is used as the external knowledge to guide the model updating. These two steps are iteratively performed in our framework for continuous learning. The experimental results on MS-COCO and Flickr30K with respect to both knowledge discovery and the pre-trained model validate the effectiveness of our framework. 多模态预训练和知识发现是多模态机器学习中的两个重要研究课题。然而，现有的工作都没有尝试将知识发现与知识引导的多模态预训练联系起来。在本文中，我们建议将它们统一到一个持续学习的框架中，以实现相互改进。以图像和文本的开放域单模态数据集作为输入，我们维护知识图谱作为支持这两个任务的基础。对于知识发现，使用预先训练的模型来识别图上的跨模式链接。对于模型预训练，知识图谱作为外部知识来指导模型更新。这两个步骤在我们的持续学习框架中迭代执行。 MS-COCO 和 Flickr30K 上知识发现和预训练模型的实验结果验证了我们框架的有效性。 本文提出一个统一的连续学习框架，将多模态知识发现与预训练结合，实现相互促进。 Zhihao Fan,Zhongyu Wei,Jingjing Chen,Siyuan Wang,Zejun Li,Jiarong Xu,Xuanjing Huang cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Himanshu Neema,Harsh Vardhan,Carlos Barreto,Xenofon Koutsoukos
title: Web-Based Platform for Evaluation of Resilient and Transactive Smart-Grids
title_zh: 基于网络的弹性和交互智能电网评估平台
abstract: Today's smart-grids have seen a clear rise in new ways of energy generation, transmission, and storage. This has not only introduced a huge degree of variability, but also a continual shift away from traditionally centralized generation and storage to distributed energy resources (DERs). In addition, the distributed sensors, energy generators and storage devices, and networking have led to a huge increase in attack vectors that make the grid vulnerable to a variety of attacks. The interconnection between computational and physical components through a largely open, IP-based communication network enables an attacker to cause physical damage through remote cyber-attacks or attack on software-controlled grid operations via physical- or cyber-attacks. Transactive Energy (TE) is an emerging approach for managing increasing DERs in the smart-grids through economic and control techniques. Transactive Smart-Grids use the TE approach to improve grid reliability and efficiency. However, skepticism remains in their full-scale viability for ensuring grid reliability. In addition, different TE approaches, in specific situations, can lead to very different outcomes in grid operations. In this paper, we present a comprehensive web-based platform for evaluating resilience of smart-grids against a variety of cyber- and physical-attacks and evaluating impact of various TE approaches on grid performance. We also provide several case-studies demonstrating evaluation of TE approaches as well as grid resilience against cyber and physical attacks.

This has not only introduced a huge degree of variability, but also a continual shift away from traditionally centralized generation and storage to distributed energy resources (DERs). In addition, the distributed sensors, energy generators and storage devices, and networking have led to a huge increase in attack vectors that make the grid vulnerable to a variety of attacks. The interconnection between computational and physical components through a largely open, IP-based communication network enables an attacker to cause physical damage through remote cyber-attacks or attack on software-controlled grid operations via physical- or cyber-attacks. Transactive Energy (TE) is an emerging approach for managing increasing DERs in the smart-grids through economic and control techniques. In addition, different TE approaches, in specific situations, can lead to very different outcomes in grid operations. In this paper, we present a comprehensive web-based platform for evaluating resilience of smart-grids against a variety of cyber- and physical-attacks and evaluating impact of various TE approaches on grid performance. We also provide several case-studies demonstrating evaluation of TE approaches as well as grid resilience against cyber and physical attacks.
abstract_zh: 当今的智能电网在能源生产、传输和存储方面的新方式明显增多。这不仅带来了巨大的变化，而且还不断从传统的集中式发电和存储转向分布式能源（DER）。此外，分布式传感器、发电机和存储设备以及网络导致攻击向量大幅增加，使电网容易受到各种攻击。计算和物理组件之间通过基本开放的、基于 IP 的通信网络进行互连，使攻击者能够通过远程网络攻击或通过物理或网络攻击对软件控制的网格操作进行攻击来造成物理损坏。交互能源 (TE) 是一种通过经济和控制技术管理智能电网中不断增加的 DER 的新兴方法。交互式智能电网使用 TE 方法来提高电网可靠性和效率。然而，人们仍然对其确保电网可靠性的全面可行性持怀疑态度。此外，在特定情况下，不同的 TE 方法可能会导致电网运营产生截然不同的结果。在本文中，我们提出了一个基于网络的综合平台，用于评估智能电网抵御各种网络和物理攻击的弹性，并评估各种 TE 方法对电网性能的影响。我们还提供了几个案例研究，展示了 TE 方法的评估以及电网抵御网络和物理攻击的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于网络的平台，用于评估智能电网在面对网络和物理攻击时的弹性，以及不同交易能源（TE）方法对电网性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着分布式能源资源（DERs）的普及，智能电网面临更高的变异性与安全风险，而交易能源（TE）方法的有效性尚未得到充分验证，亟需系统性评估工具。
AI.method: 开发了一个网络化平台，通过模拟多种网络和物理攻击场景，并结合不同TE策略的案例研究，评估电网的弹性与性能表现。
AI.result: 平台成功验证了多种TE方法在提升电网可靠性中的效果，并量化了不同攻击场景对电网的影响，为优化电网设计提供了数据支持。
AI.conclusion: 该平台为智能电网的安全性评估与TE策略优化提供了有效工具，有助于推动交易能源技术的实际应用与电网韧性提升。

authors_text: Varun Ravi Kumar
title: Surround-View Cameras based Holistic Visual Perception for Automated Driving
title_zh: 基于环视摄像头的自动驾驶整体视觉感知
comment: Doctoral thesis
comments: Doctoral thesis
abstract: The formation of eyes led to the big bang of evolution. The dynamics changed from a primitive organism waiting for the food to come into contact for eating food being sought after by visual sensors. The human eye is one of the most sophisticated developments of evolution, but it still has defects. Humans have evolved a biological perception algorithm capable of driving cars, operating machinery, piloting aircraft, and navigating ships over millions of years. Automating these capabilities for computers is critical for various applications, including self-driving cars, augmented reality, and architectural surveying. Near-field visual perception in the context of self-driving cars can perceive the environment in a range of $0-10$ meters and 360° coverage around the vehicle. It is a critical decision-making component in the development of safer automated driving. Recent advances in computer vision and deep learning, in conjunction with high-quality sensors such as cameras and LiDARs, have fueled mature visual perception solutions. Until now, far-field perception has been the primary focus. Another significant issue is the limited processing power available for developing real-time applications. Because of this bottleneck, there is frequently a trade-off between performance and run-time efficiency. We concentrate on the following issues in order to address them: 1) Developing near-field perception algorithms with high performance and low computational complexity for various visual perception tasks such as geometric and semantic tasks using convolutional neural networks. 2) Using Multi-Task Learning to overcome computational bottlenecks by sharing initial convolutional layers between tasks and developing optimization strategies that balance tasks.

It is a critical decision-making component in the development of safer automated driving. Recent advances in computer vision and deep learning, in conjunction with high-quality sensors such as cameras and LiDARs, have fueled mature visual perception solutions. Until now, far-field perception has been the primary focus. Another significant issue is the limited processing power available for developing real-time applications. abstract_zh: 眼睛的形成导致了进化大爆炸。动态变化从等待食物接触到吃食物的原始有机体变成了视觉传感器寻找的食物。人眼是进化过程中最复杂的发展之一，但它仍然存在缺陷。数百万年来，人类已经进化出一种能够驾驶汽车、操作机械、驾驶飞机和导航船舶的生物感知算法。计算机的这些功能自动化对于各种应用至关重要，包括自动驾驶汽车、增强现实和建筑测量。自动驾驶汽车背景下的近场视觉感知可以感知0-10米范围内的环境，并覆盖车辆周围360°。它是开发更安全的自动驾驶的关键决策组件。计算机视觉和深度学习的最新进展，与相机和激光雷达等高质量传感器相结合，推动了成熟的视觉感知解决方案。到目前为止，远场感知一直是主要焦点。另一个重要问题是可用于开发实时应用程序的处理能力有限。由于这个瓶颈，经常需要在性能和运行时效率之间进行权衡。为了解决这些问题，我们专注于以下问题：1）开发具有高性能和低计算复杂度的近场感知算法，用于各种视觉感知任务，例如使用卷积神经网络的几何和语义任务。 2）使用多任务学习通过在任务之间共享初始卷积层并开发平衡任务的优化策略来克服计算瓶颈。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在基于环视摄像头开发高效且低计算复杂度的近场视觉感知算法，以提升自动驾驶的安全性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需要可靠的近场环境感知（0-10米范围、360°覆盖），但现有方案受限于计算资源，难以平衡性能与实时性。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络处理几何与语义任务，并通过多任务学习共享初始卷积层，优化任务间计算资源分配。
AI.result: 提出算法在保持高性能的同时降低计算复杂度，有效解决了多任务感知中的计算瓶颈问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自动驾驶提供了更高效、全面的近场视觉感知解决方案，推动了安全自动化驾驶的发展。

search_text: Surround-View Cameras based Holistic Visual Perception for Automated Driving 基于环视摄像头的自动驾驶整体视觉感知 The formation of eyes led to the big bang of evolution. The dynamics changed from a primitive organism waiting for the food to come into contact for eating food being sought after by visual sensors. The human eye is one of the most sophisticated developments of evolution, but it still has defects. Humans have evolved a biological perception algorithm capable of driving cars, operating machinery, piloting aircraft, and navigating ships over millions of years. Automating these capabilities for computers is critical for various applications, including self-driving cars, augmented reality, and architectural surveying. Near-field visual perception in the context of self-driving cars can perceive the environment in a range of $0-10$ meters and 360° coverage around the vehicle. It is a critical decision-making component in the development of safer automated driving. Recent advances in computer vision and deep learning, in conjunction with high-quality sensors such as cameras and LiDARs, have fueled mature visual perception solutions. Until now, far-field perception has been the primary focus. Another significant issue is the limited processing power available for developing real-time applications. Because of this bottleneck, there is frequently a trade-off between performance and run-time efficiency. We concentrate on the following issues in order to address them: 1) Developing near-field perception algorithms with high performance and low computational complexity for various visual perception tasks such as geometric and semantic tasks using convolutional neural networks. 2) Using Multi-Task Learning to overcome computational bottlenecks by sharing initial convolutional layers between tasks and developing optimization strategies that balance tasks. 眼睛的形成导致了进化大爆炸。动态变化从等待食物接触到吃食物的原始有机体变成了视觉传感器寻找的食物。人眼是进化过程中最复杂的发展之一，但它仍然存在缺陷。数百万年来，人类已经进化出一种能够驾驶汽车、操作机械、驾驶飞机和导航船舶的生物感知算法。计算机的这些功能自动化对于各种应用至关重要，包括自动驾驶汽车、增强现实和建筑测量。自动驾驶汽车背景下的近场视觉感知可以感知0-10米范围内的环境，并覆盖车辆周围360°。它是开发更安全的自动驾驶的关键决策组件。计算机视觉和深度学习的最新进展，与相机和激光雷达等高质量传感器相结合，推动了成熟的视觉感知解决方案。到目前为止，远场感知一直是主要焦点。另一个重要问题是可用于开发实时应用程序的处理能力有限。由于这个瓶颈，经常需要在性能和运行时效率之间进行权衡。为了解决这些问题，我们专注于以下问题：1）开发具有高性能和低计算复杂度的近场感知算法，用于各种视觉感知任务，例如使用卷积神经网络的几何和语义任务。 2）使用多任务学习通过在任务之间共享初始卷积层并开发平衡任务的优化策略来克服计算瓶颈。 本文旨在基于环视摄像头开发高效且低计算复杂度的近场视觉感知算法，以提升自动驾驶的安全性。 Varun Ravi Kumar cs.CV

authors_text: Muhammad Farhan Humayun,Hassan Waseem Malik,Ahmed Ahsan Alvi
title: A Simplified Un-Supervised Learning Based Approach for Ink Mismatch Detection in Handwritten Hyper-Spectral Document Images
title_zh: 一种基于简化无监督学习的手写超光谱文档图像墨水不匹配检测方法
abstract: Hyper-spectral imaging has become the latest trend in the field of optical imaging systems. Among various other applications, hyper-spectral imaging has been widely used for analysis of printed and handwritten documents. This paper proposes an efficient technique for estimating the number of different but visibly similar inks present in a Hyper spectral Document Image. Our approach is based on un-supervised learning and does not require any prior knowledge of the dataset. The algorithm was tested on the iVision HHID dataset and has achieved comparable results with the state of the algorithms present in the literature. This work can prove to be effective when employed during the early stages of forgery detection in Hyper-spectral Document Images.
summary: Hyper-spectral imaging has become the latest trend in the field of optical imaging systems. Among various other applications, hyper-spectral imaging has been widely used for analysis of printed and handwritten documents. The algorithm was tested on the iVision HHID dataset and has achieved comparable results with the state of the algorithms present in the literature. This work can prove to be effective when employed during the early stages of forgery detection in Hyper-spectral Document Images.
abstract_zh: 高光谱成像已成为光学成像系统领域的最新趋势。在各种其他应用中，高光谱成像已广泛用于分析印刷和手写文档。本文提出了一种有效的技术来估计超光谱文档图像中存在的不同但明显相似的墨水的数量。我们的方法基于无监督学习，不需要任何数据集的先验知识。该算法在 iVision HHID 数据集上进行了测试，并取得了与文献中现有算法相当的结果。这项工作在高光谱文档图像伪造检测的早期阶段被证明是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无监督学习的简化方法，用于检测手写超光谱文件图像中的墨水不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 超光谱成像在文档分析中应用广泛，但现有方法通常需要先验知识或复杂流程，缺乏高效且无需先验信息的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用无监督学习算法，无需数据集先验知识，通过分析超光谱图像特征估计不同但视觉相似的墨水数量。
AI.result: 在iVision HHID数据集上测试，结果与文献中现有算法性能相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可有效应用于超光谱文档图像伪造检测的早期阶段。

authors: Wil M. P. van der Aalst
authors_json: Wil M. P. van der Aalst
authors_text: Gyunam Park,Janik-Vasily Benzin,Wil M. P. van der Aalst
title: Detecting Context-Aware Deviations in Process Executions
title_zh: 检测流程执行中的上下文感知偏差
abstract: A deviation detection aims to detect deviating process instances, e.g., patients in the healthcare process and products in the manufacturing process. A business process of an organization is executed in various contextual situations, e.g., a COVID-19 pandemic in the case of hospitals and a lack of semiconductor chip shortage in the case of automobile companies. Thus, context-aware deviation detection is essential to provide relevant insights. However, existing work 1) does not provide a systematic way of incorporating various contexts, 2) is tailored to a specific approach without using an extensive pool of existing deviation detection techniques, and 3) does not distinguish positive and negative contexts that justify and refute deviation, respectively. In this work, we provide a framework to bridge the aforementioned gaps. We have implemented the proposed framework as a web service that can be extended to various contexts and deviation detection methods. We have evaluated the effectiveness of the proposed framework by conducting experiments using 255 different contextual scenarios.
summary: A deviation detection aims to detect deviating process instances, e.g., patients in the healthcare process and products in the manufacturing process. A business process of an organization is executed in various contextual situations, e.g., a COVID-19 pandemic in the case of hospitals and a lack of semiconductor chip shortage in the case of automobile companies. Thus, context-aware deviation detection is essential to provide relevant insights. However, existing work 1) does not provide a systematic way of incorporating various contexts, 2) is tailored to a specific approach without using an extensive pool of existing deviation detection techniques, and 3) does not distinguish positive and negative contexts that justify and refute deviation, respectively. In this work, we provide a framework to bridge the aforementioned gaps. We have implemented the proposed framework as a web service that can be extended to various contexts and deviation detection methods. We have evaluated the effectiveness of the proposed framework by conducting experiments using 255 different contextual scenarios.
abstract_zh: 偏差检测旨在检测偏差的流程实例，例如医疗保健流程中的患者和制造流程中的产品。组织的业务流程是在各种背景情况下执行的，例如，医院中的 COVID-19 大流行以及汽车公司中的半导体芯片短缺。因此，上下文感知偏差检测对于提供相关见解至关重要。然而，现有的工作 1) 没有提供整合各种上下文的系统方法，2) 是针对特定方法量身定制的，而不使用现有的大量偏差检测技术，3) 没有区分分别证明和反驳偏差的积极和消极上下文。在这项工作中，我们提供了一个框架来弥补上述差距。我们已经将所提出的框架实现为网络服务，可以扩展到各种上下文和偏差检测方法。我们通过使用 255 个不同的上下文场景进行实验来评估所提出框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种上下文感知的偏差检测框架，以解决现有方法在整合多上下文、方法单一及区分正负上下文的不足
AI.motivation: 现有偏差检测方法未能系统整合多上下文、方法单一且无法区分正负上下文，导致无法准确识别合理与异常偏差，需更灵活的解决方案
AI.method: 设计一个可扩展的框架，整合多种偏差检测技术，区分正负上下文，并通过Web服务实现以支持不同场景的扩展
AI.result: 通过255个不同上下文场景的实验验证，证明框架能有效检测偏差并区分正负上下文影响
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效弥补现有研究空白，提供系统化上下文感知偏差检测方案，验证其灵活性和有效性

authors_text: Dooyoung Kim,Seonji Kim,Jae-eun Shin,Boram Yoon,Jinwook Kim,Jeongmi Lee,Woontack Woo
title: The Effects of Spatial Configuration on Relative Translation Gain Thresholds in Redirected Walking
title_zh: 空间配置对重定向行走中相对平移增益阈值的影响
comment: 21 pages, 11 figures, Under review in the Springer VR Journal
comments: 21 pages, 11 figures, Under review in the Springer VR Journal
abstract: In this study, we explore how spatial configurations can be reflected in determining the threshold range of Relative Translation Gains (RTGs), a translation gain-based Redirected Walking (RDW) technique that scales the user's movement in Virtual Reality (VR) in different ratios for width and depth. While previous works have shown that various cognitive factors or individual differences influence the RDW threshold, constructive studies investigating the impact of the environmental composition on the RDW threshold with regard to the user's visual perception were lacking. Therefore, we examined the effect of spatial configurations on the RTG threshold by analyzing the participant's responses and gaze distribution data in two user studies. The first study concerned the size of the virtual room and the existence of objects within it, and the second study focused on the combined impact of room size and the spatial layout. Our results show that three compositions of spatial configuration (size, object existence, spatial layout) significantly affect the RTG threshold range. Based on our findings, we proposed virtual space rescaling guidelines to increase the range of adjustable movable space with RTGs for developers: placing distractors in the room, setting the perceived movable space to be larger than the adjusted movable space if it's an empty room, and avoid placing objects together as centered layout. Our findings can be used to adaptively rescale VR users' space according to the target virtual space's configuration with a unified coordinate system that enables the utilization of physical objects in a virtual scene.
summary: In this study, we explore how spatial configurations can be reflected in determining the threshold range of Relative Translation Gains (RTGs), a translation gain-based Redirected Walking (RDW) technique that scales the user's movement in Virtual Reality (VR) in different ratios for width and depth. While previous works have shown that various cognitive factors or individual differences influence the RDW threshold, constructive studies investigating the impact of the environmental composition on the RDW threshold with regard to the user's visual perception were lacking. Therefore, we examined the effect of spatial configurations on the RTG threshold by analyzing the participant's responses and gaze distribution data in two user studies. The first study concerned the size of the virtual room and the existence of objects within it, and the second study focused on the combined impact of room size and the spatial layout. Our results show that three compositions of spatial configuration (size, object existence, spatial layout) significantly affect the RTG threshold range. Based on our findings, we proposed virtual space rescaling guidelines to increase the range of adjustable movable space with RTGs for developers: placing distractors in the room, setting the perceived movable space to be larger than the adjusted movable space if it's an empty room, and avoid placing objects together as centered layout. Our findings can be used to adaptively rescale VR users' space according to the target virtual space's configuration with a unified coordinate system that enables the utilization of physical objects in a virtual scene.
abstract_zh: 在本研究中，我们探讨了如何在确定相对平移增益 (RTG) 的阈值范围时反映空间配置，RTG 是一种基于平移增益的重定向行走 (RDW) 技术，可按不同的宽度和深度比率缩放虚拟现实 (VR) 中用户的运动。虽然之前的研究表明各种认知因素或个体差异会影响 RDW 阈值，但缺乏关于用户视觉感知的环境成分对 RDW 阈值影响的建设性研究。因此，我们通过分析两项用户研究中参与者的反应和注视分布数据，研究了空间配置对 RTG 阈值的影响。第一项研究涉及虚拟房间的大小和其中物体的存在，第二项研究侧重于房间大小和空间布局的综合影响。我们的结果表明，空间配置的三个组成（大小、物体存在、空间布局）显着影响 RTG 阈值范围。根据我们的研究结果，我们提出了虚拟空间重新缩放指南，为开发人员增加 RTG 的可调节可移动空间的范围：在房间中放置干扰物，如果房间是空的，则将感知的可移动空间设置为大于可调整的可移动空间，并避免将物体放置在一起作为居中布局。我们的研究结果可用于根据目标虚拟空间的配置以及统一的坐标系自适应地重新调整 VR 用户的空间，从而能够在虚拟场景中利用物理对象。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了虚拟环境中空间配置对相对平移增益（RTG）阈值的影响，旨在优化基于RTG的重定向行走（RDW）技术。
AI.motivation: 尽管先前研究显示认知因素影响RDW阈值，但缺乏关于环境组成对阈值影响的系统性研究，尤其针对视觉感知的环境配置影响。
AI.method: 通过两项用户研究分析参与者反应和注视分布数据：第一项研究虚拟房间尺寸及内部物体存在性，第二项研究房间尺寸与空间布局的综合影响。
AI.result: 三种空间配置（尺寸、物体存在性、空间布局）显著影响RTG阈值范围，并提出虚拟空间重缩放指南，如放置干扰物、扩大空房间感知空间及避免中心化布局。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为开发者提供基于虚拟空间配置的自适应重缩放策略，通过统一坐标系统实现物理对象与虚拟场景的融合应用。
