search_text: The Effects of Spatial Configuration on Relative Translation Gain Thresholds in Redirected Walking 空间配置对重定向行走中相对平移增益阈值的影响 In this study, we explore how spatial configurations can be reflected in determining the threshold range of Relative Translation Gains (RTGs), a translation gain-based Redirected Walking (RDW) technique that scales the user's movement in Virtual Reality (VR) in different ratios for width and depth. While previous works have shown that various cognitive factors or individual differences influence the RDW threshold, constructive studies investigating the impact of the environmental composition on the RDW threshold with regard to the user's visual perception were lacking. Therefore, we examined the effect of spatial configurations on the RTG threshold by analyzing the participant's responses and gaze distribution data in two user studies. The first study concerned the size of the virtual room and the existence of objects within it, and the second study focused on the combined impact of room size and the spatial layout. Our results show that three compositions of spatial configuration (size, object existence, spatial layout) significantly affect the RTG threshold range. Based on our findings, we proposed virtual space rescaling guidelines to increase the range of adjustable movable space with RTGs for developers: placing distractors in the room, setting the perceived movable space to be larger than the adjusted movable space if it's an empty room, and avoid placing objects together as centered layout. Our findings can be used to adaptively rescale VR users' space according to the target virtual space's configuration with a unified coordinate system that enables the utilization of physical objects in a virtual scene. 在本研究中，我们探讨了如何在确定相对平移增益 (RTG) 的阈值范围时反映空间配置，RTG 是一种基于平移增益的重定向行走 (RDW) 技术，可按不同的宽度和深度比率缩放虚拟现实 (VR) 中用户的运动。虽然之前的研究表明各种认知因素或个体差异会影响 RDW 阈值，但缺乏关于用户视觉感知的环境成分对 RDW 阈值影响的建设性研究。因此，我们通过分析两项用户研究中参与者的反应和注视分布数据，研究了空间配置对 RTG 阈值的影响。第一项研究涉及虚拟房间的大小和其中物体的存在，第二项研究侧重于房间大小和空间布局的综合影响。我们的结果表明，空间配置的三个组成（大小、物体存在、空间布局）显着影响 RTG 阈值范围。根据我们的研究结果，我们提出了虚拟空间重新缩放指南，为开发人员增加 RTG 的可调节可移动空间的范围：在房间中放置干扰物，如果房间是空的，则将感知的可移动空间设置为大于可调整的可移动空间，并避免将物体放置在一起作为居中布局。我们的研究结果可用于根据目标虚拟空间的配置以及统一的坐标系自适应地重新调整 VR 用户的空间，从而能够在虚拟场景中利用物理对象。 本研究探讨了虚拟环境中空间配置对相对平移增益（RTG）阈值的影响，旨在优化基于RTG的重定向行走（RDW）技术。 Dooyoung Kim,Seonji Kim,Jae-eun Shin,Boram Yoon,Jinwook Kim,Jeongmi Lee,Woontack Woo cs.HC

authors_text: Jeongwon Park,Lin Yang
title: Model-based Offline Imitation Learning with Non-expert Data
title_zh: 基于模型的非专家数据离线模仿学习
abstract: Although Behavioral Cloning (BC) in theory suffers compounding errors, its scalability and simplicity still makes it an attractive imitation learning algorithm. In contrast, imitation approaches with adversarial training typically does not share the same problem, but necessitates interactions with the environment. Meanwhile, most imitation learning methods only utilises optimal datasets, which could be significantly more expensive to obtain than its suboptimal counterpart. A question that arises is, can we utilise the suboptimal dataset in a principled manner, which otherwise would have been idle? We propose a scalable model-based offline imitation learning algorithmic framework that leverages datasets collected by both suboptimal and optimal policies, and show that its worst case suboptimality becomes linear in the time horizon with respect to the expert samples. We empirically validate our theoretical results and show that the proposed method \textit{always} outperforms BC in the low data regime on simulated continuous control domains
summary: Although Behavioral Cloning (BC) in theory suffers compounding errors, its scalability and simplicity still makes it an attractive imitation learning algorithm. In contrast, imitation approaches with adversarial training typically does not share the same problem, but necessitates interactions with the environment. Meanwhile, most imitation learning methods only utilises optimal datasets, which could be significantly more expensive to obtain than its suboptimal counterpart. A question that arises is, can we utilise the suboptimal dataset in a principled manner, which otherwise would have been idle? We propose a scalable model-based offline imitation learning algorithmic framework that leverages datasets collected by both suboptimal and optimal policies, and show that its worst case suboptimality becomes linear in the time horizon with respect to the expert samples. We empirically validate our theoretical results and show that the proposed method \textit{always} outperforms BC in the low data regime on simulated continuous control domains
abstract_zh: 尽管行为克隆（BC）在理论上存在复合错误，但其可扩展性和简单性仍然使其成为一种有吸引力的模仿学习算法。相比之下，采用对抗性训练的模仿方法通常不会遇到同样的问题，但需要与环境进行交互。与此同时，大多数模仿学习方法仅利用最佳数据集，而获得最佳数据集的成本可能比次优数据集的成本要高得多。出现的一个问题是，我们能否以有原则的方式利用次优数据集，否则这些数据集就会闲置？我们提出了一种基于可扩展模型的离线模仿学习算法框架，该框架利用次优和最优策略收集的数据集，并表明其最坏情况次优性在时间范围内相对于专家样本变为线性。我们凭经验验证了我们的理论结果，并表明所提出的方法 \textit{always} 在模拟连续控制域的低数据状态下优于 BC

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模型的离线模仿学习框架，通过结合专家数据和非专家（次优）数据，解决传统行为克隆方法的误差累积问题。
AI.motivation: 传统行为克隆（BC）方法存在误差累积问题，而对抗训练方法需要环境交互且难以利用次优数据；专家数据获取成本高，次优数据未被有效利用。
AI.method: 设计一个基于模型的离线模仿学习框架，同时利用专家和次优数据，通过理论分析证明其最坏情况下的次优性与时间跨度呈线性关系。
AI.result: 在模拟连续控制任务中，该方法在低数据量场景下始终优于传统BC方法，且理论结果与实验验证一致。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合次优数据的模型基离线模仿学习方法，能在有限数据下实现优于BC的性能，为实际应用提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Renwei Yang,YiKe Liu,Bing Zeng
title: A Two-stage Method for Non-extreme Value Salt-and-Pepper Noise Removal
title_zh: 非极值椒盐噪声去除的两阶段方法
comment: UESTC course project
comments: UESTC course project
abstract: There are several previous methods based on neural network can have great performance in denoising salt and pepper noise. However, those methods are based on a hypothesis that the value of salt and pepper noise is exactly 0 and 255. It is not true in the real world. The result of those methods deviate sharply when the value is different from 0 and 255. To overcome this weakness, our method aims at designing a convolutional neural network to detect the noise pixels in a wider range of value and then a filter is used to modify pixel value to 0, which is beneficial for further filtering. Additionally, another convolutional neural network is used to conduct the denoising and restoration work.
summary: There are several previous methods based on neural network can have great performance in denoising salt and pepper noise. However, those methods are based on a hypothesis that the value of salt and pepper noise is exactly 0 and 255. It is not true in the real world. The result of those methods deviate sharply when the value is different from 0 and 255. To overcome this weakness, our method aims at designing a convolutional neural network to detect the noise pixels in a wider range of value and then a filter is used to modify pixel value to 0, which is beneficial for further filtering. Additionally, another convolutional neural network is used to conduct the denoising and restoration work.
abstract_zh: 之前有几种基于神经网络的方法在椒盐噪声去噪方面有很好的表现。然而，这些方法基于椒盐噪声的值恰好为 0 和 255 的假设。这在现实世界中并不正确。当值不同于0和255时，这些方法的结果会急剧偏离。为了克服这个弱点，我们的方法旨在设计一个卷积神经网络来检测更广泛值范围内的噪声像素，然后使用滤波器将像素值修改为0，这有利于进一步过滤。此外，另一个卷积神经网络用于进行去噪和恢复工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段卷积神经网络方法，用于去除非极端值椒盐噪声。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络去噪方法假设椒盐噪声值仅为0和255，但实际场景中噪声值可能偏离该范围，导致去噪效果下降。
AI.method: 第一阶段使用CNN检测广域值噪声像素并置零，第二阶段通过另一CNN进行去噪修复。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法在非极端值噪声场景下优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段方法有效解决了非极端值椒盐噪声的去噪问题，提升了实际应用适应性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段卷积神经网络方法，用于去除非极端值椒盐噪声。
ai_content.motivation: 传统神经网络去噪方法假设椒盐噪声值仅为0和255，但实际场景中噪声值可能偏离该范围，导致去噪效果下降。

search_text: A Two-stage Method for Non-extreme Value Salt-and-Pepper Noise Removal 非极值椒盐噪声去除的两阶段方法 There are several previous methods based on neural network can have great performance in denoising salt and pepper noise. However, those methods are based on a hypothesis that the value of salt and pepper noise is exactly 0 and 255. It is not true in the real world. The result of those methods deviate sharply when the value is different from 0 and 255. To overcome this weakness, our method aims at designing a convolutional neural network to detect the noise pixels in a wider range of value and then a filter is used to modify pixel value to 0, which is beneficial for further filtering. Additionally, another convolutional neural network is used to conduct the denoising and restoration work. 之前有几种基于神经网络的方法在椒盐噪声去噪方面有很好的表现。然而，这些方法基于椒盐噪声的值恰好为 0 和 255 的假设。这在现实世界中并不正确。当值不同于0和255时，这些方法的结果会急剧偏离。为了克服这个弱点，我们的方法旨在设计一个卷积神经网络来检测更广泛值范围内的噪声像素，然后使用滤波器将像素值修改为0，这有利于进一步过滤。此外，另一个卷积神经网络用于进行去噪和恢复工作。 本文提出一种两阶段卷积神经网络方法，用于去除非极端值椒盐噪声。 Renwei Yang,YiKe Liu,Bing Zeng cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Han Liu,Bingning Wang,Ting Yao,Haijin Liang,Jianjin Xu,Xiaolin Hu
title: Bridging the Gap Between Training and Inference of Bayesian Controllable Language Models
title_zh: 弥合贝叶斯可控语言模型的训练和推理之间的差距
comment: Submitted to Neurips 2022
comments: Submitted to Neurips 2022
abstract: Large-scale pre-trained language models have achieved great success on natural language generation tasks. However, it is difficult to control the pre-trained language models to generate sentences with the desired attribute such as topic and sentiment, etc. Recently, Bayesian Controllable Language Models (BCLMs) have been shown to be efficient in controllable language generation. Rather than fine-tuning the parameters of pre-trained language models, BCLMs use external discriminators to guide the generation of pre-trained language models. However, the mismatch between training and inference of BCLMs limits the performance of the models. To address the problem, in this work we propose a "Gemini Discriminator" for controllable language generation which alleviates the mismatch problem with a small computational cost. We tested our method on two controllable language generation tasks: sentiment control and topic control. On both tasks, our method reached achieved new state-of-the-art results in automatic and human evaluations.
summary: Large-scale pre-trained language models have achieved great success on natural language generation tasks. However, it is difficult to control the pre-trained language models to generate sentences with the desired attribute such as topic and sentiment, etc. Recently, Bayesian Controllable Language Models (BCLMs) have been shown to be efficient in controllable language generation. Rather than fine-tuning the parameters of pre-trained language models, BCLMs use external discriminators to guide the generation of pre-trained language models. However, the mismatch between training and inference of BCLMs limits the performance of the models. To address the problem, in this work we propose a "Gemini Discriminator" for controllable language generation which alleviates the mismatch problem with a small computational cost. We tested our method on two controllable language generation tasks: sentiment control and topic control. On both tasks, our method reached achieved new state-of-the-art results in automatic and human evaluations.
abstract_zh: 大规模预训练语言模型在自然语言生成任务上取得了巨大成功。然而，很难控制预训练的语言模型来生成具有所需属性（例如主题和情感等）的句子。最近，贝叶斯可控语言模型（BCLM）已被证明在可控语言生成方面非常有效。 BCLM 不是微调预训练语言模型的参数，而是使用外部判别器来指导预训练语言模型的生成。然而，BCLM 的训练和推理之间的不匹配限制了模型的性能。为了解决这个问题，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于可控语言生成的“Gemini Discriminator”，它以较小的计算成本缓解了不匹配问题。我们在两个可控语言生成任务上测试了我们的方法：情绪控制和主题控制。在这两项任务中，我们的方法在自动和人工评估方面都取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决贝叶斯可控语言模型（BCLMs）在训练与推理阶段的性能差距问题，提出一种高效的方法以提升可控语言生成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有BCLMs依赖外部判别器指导生成，但训练与推理阶段的不匹配导致模型性能受限，需寻找低成本解决方案以提升可控性。
AI.method: 提出一种名为'Gemini Discriminator'的新判别器，通过优化训练与推理过程的对齐，以较低计算成本缓解不匹配问题。
AI.result: 在情感控制和主题控制任务中，该方法在自动评估和人工评估中均达到新的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: Gemini Discriminator有效解决了BCLMs的训练推理差距问题，为可控语言生成提供了高效且实用的解决方案。

authors_text: A Arunkumar,Vrunda N Sukhadia,S. Umesh
title: Investigation of Ensemble features of Self-Supervised Pretrained Models for Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: 自动语音识别自监督预训练模型的集成特征研究
comment: 4 pages , 2 figures,submitted to interspeech 2022
comments: 4 pages , 2 figures,submitted to interspeech 2022
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) based models have been shown to generate powerful representations that can be used to improve the performance of downstream speech tasks. Several state-of-the-art SSL models are available, and each of these models optimizes a different loss which gives rise to the possibility of their features being complementary. This paper proposes using an ensemble of such SSL representations and models, which exploits the complementary nature of the features extracted by the various pretrained models. We hypothesize that this results in a richer feature representation and shows results for the ASR downstream task. To this end, we use three SSL models that have shown excellent results on ASR tasks, namely HuBERT, Wav2vec2.0, and WaveLM. We explore the ensemble of models fine-tuned for the ASR task and the ensemble of features using the embeddings obtained from the pre-trained models for a downstream ASR task. We get improved performance over individual models and pre-trained features using Librispeech(100h) and WSJ dataset for the downstream tasks.
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) based models have been shown to generate powerful representations that can be used to improve the performance of downstream speech tasks. Several state-of-the-art SSL models are available, and each of these models optimizes a different loss which gives rise to the possibility of their features being complementary. This paper proposes using an ensemble of such SSL representations and models, which exploits the complementary nature of the features extracted by the various pretrained models. We hypothesize that this results in a richer feature representation and shows results for the ASR downstream task. To this end, we use three SSL models that have shown excellent results on ASR tasks, namely HuBERT, Wav2vec2.0, and WaveLM. We explore the ensemble of models fine-tuned for the ASR task and the ensemble of features using the embeddings obtained from the pre-trained models for a downstream ASR task. We get improved performance over individual models and pre-trained features using Librispeech(100h) and WSJ dataset for the downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 基于自监督学习 (SSL) 的模型已被证明可以生成强大的表示，可用于提高下游语音任务的性能。有几种最先进的 SSL 模型可供使用，并且每种模型都优化了不同的损失，这使得它们的功能有可能互补。本文建议使用此类 SSL 表示和模型的集合，它利用了各种预训练模型提取的特征的互补性。我们假设这会产生更丰富的特征表示并显示 ASR 下游任务的结果。为此，我们使用了三个在 ASR 任务上表现出色的 SSL 模型，即 HuBERT、Wav2vec2.0 和 WaveLM。我们探索针对 ASR 任务微调的模型集合，以及使用从下游 ASR 任务的预训练模型获得的嵌入的特征集合。我们使用 Librispeech(100h) 和 WSJ 数据集进行下游任务，获得了比单个模型和预训练特征更高的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过集成多个自监督预训练模型的特征来提升自动语音识别（ASR）性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 不同自监督学习模型的特征具有互补性，集成这些特征可能生成更丰富的表示，从而提升下游ASR任务的性能。
AI.method: 采用三种SSL模型（HuBERT、Wav2vec2.0、WaveLM），通过集成微调后的模型和预训练模型的特征嵌入，进行下游ASR任务的实验。
AI.result: 在Librispeech(100h)和WSJ数据集上，集成方法在ASR任务中的表现优于单一模型和预训练特征。
AI.conclusion: 集成不同自监督预训练模型的互补特征能有效提升ASR性能，验证了特征互补性的有效性。

authors_text: Abhijeet Narang,Abhigyan Raj,Mihaela Pop,Mehran Ebrahimi
title: Deep Learning-Based MR Image Re-parameterization
title_zh: 基于深度学习的 MR 图像重新参数化
comment: A. Narang, A. Raj, M. Pop and M. Ebrahimi, "Deep Learning-Based MR Image Re-parameterization," 2023 Congress in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, & Applied Computing (CSCE), Las Vegas, NV, USA, 2023, pp. 536-541, doi: 10.1109/CSCE60160.2023.00094
comments: A. Narang, A. Raj, M. Pop and M. Ebrahimi, "Deep Learning-Based MR Image Re-parameterization," 2023 Congress in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, & Applied Computing (CSCE), Las Vegas, NV, USA, 2023, pp. 536-541, doi: 10.1109/CSCE60160.2023.00094
abstract: Magnetic resonance (MR) image re-parameterization refers to the process of generating via simulations of an MR image with a new set of MRI scanning parameters. Different parameter values generate distinct contrast between different tissues, helping identify pathologic tissue. Typically, more than one scan is required for diagnosis; however, acquiring repeated scans can be costly, time-consuming, and difficult for patients. Thus, using MR image re-parameterization to predict and estimate the contrast in these imaging scans can be an effective alternative. In this work, we propose a novel deep learning (DL) based convolutional model for MRI re-parameterization. Based on our preliminary results, DL-based techniques hold the potential to learn the non-linearities that govern the re-parameterization.
summary: Magnetic resonance (MR) image re-parameterization refers to the process of generating via simulations of an MR image with a new set of MRI scanning parameters. Different parameter values generate distinct contrast between different tissues, helping identify pathologic tissue. Typically, more than one scan is required for diagnosis; however, acquiring repeated scans can be costly, time-consuming, and difficult for patients. Thus, using MR image re-parameterization to predict and estimate the contrast in these imaging scans can be an effective alternative. In this work, we propose a novel deep learning (DL) based convolutional model for MRI re-parameterization. Based on our preliminary results, DL-based techniques hold the potential to learn the non-linearities that govern the re-parameterization.
abstract_zh: 磁共振 (MR) 图像重新参数化是指通过使用一组新的 MRI 扫描参数模拟 MR 图像来生成的过程。不同的参数值会在不同组织之间产生明显的对比度，有助于识别病理组织。通常，诊断需要多次扫描；然而，获得重复扫描可能成本高昂、耗时且对患者来说很困难。因此，使用 MR 图像重新参数化来预测和估计这些成像扫描中的对比度可能是一种有效的替代方案。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于深度学习（DL）的卷积模型，用于 MRI 重新参数化。根据我们的初步结果，基于深度学习的技术具有学习控制重新参数化的非线性的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的卷积模型，用于生成不同MRI扫描参数下的图像，以减少实际扫描需求。
AI.motivation: 多次MRI扫描成本高、耗时且患者难以承受，需通过预测不同参数下的图像对比度来减少实际扫描次数。
AI.method: 设计深度学习卷积模型，学习MRI重参数化过程中的非线性关系以生成模拟图像。
AI.result: 初步实验表明深度学习技术能有效捕捉重参数化非线性特性，预测结果具有潜在临床价值。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习为MRI图像重参数化提供新方法，可作为传统多次扫描的替代方案，需进一步验证模型泛化能力。

search_text: Deep Learning-Based MR Image Re-parameterization 基于深度学习的 MR 图像重新参数化 Magnetic resonance (MR) image re-parameterization refers to the process of generating via simulations of an MR image with a new set of MRI scanning parameters. Different parameter values generate distinct contrast between different tissues, helping identify pathologic tissue. Typically, more than one scan is required for diagnosis; however, acquiring repeated scans can be costly, time-consuming, and difficult for patients. Thus, using MR image re-parameterization to predict and estimate the contrast in these imaging scans can be an effective alternative. In this work, we propose a novel deep learning (DL) based convolutional model for MRI re-parameterization. Based on our preliminary results, DL-based techniques hold the potential to learn the non-linearities that govern the re-parameterization. 磁共振 (MR) 图像重新参数化是指通过使用一组新的 MRI 扫描参数模拟 MR 图像来生成的过程。不同的参数值会在不同组织之间产生明显的对比度，有助于识别病理组织。通常，诊断需要多次扫描；然而，获得重复扫描可能成本高昂、耗时且对患者来说很困难。因此，使用 MR 图像重新参数化来预测和估计这些成像扫描中的对比度可能是一种有效的替代方案。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于深度学习（DL）的卷积模型，用于 MRI 重新参数化。根据我们的初步结果，基于深度学习的技术具有学习控制重新参数化的非线性的潜力。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的卷积模型，用于生成不同MRI扫描参数下的图像，以减少实际扫描需求。 Abhijeet Narang,Abhigyan Raj,Mihaela Pop,Mehran Ebrahimi eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Wei Li,Qiming Zhang,Jing Zhang,Zhen Huang,Xinmei Tian,Dacheng Tao
title: Toward Real-world Single Image Deraining: A New Benchmark and Beyond
title_zh: 迈向现实世界的单图像除雨：新基准及超越
abstract: Single image deraining (SID) in real scenarios attracts increasing attention in recent years. Due to the difficulty in obtaining real-world rainy/clean image pairs, previous real datasets suffer from low-resolution images, homogeneous rain streaks, limited background variation, and even misalignment of image pairs, resulting in incomprehensive evaluation of SID methods. To address these issues, we establish a new high-quality dataset named RealRain-1k, consisting of $1,120$ high-resolution paired clean and rainy images with low- and high-density rain streaks, respectively. Images in RealRain-1k are automatically generated from a large number of real-world rainy video clips through a simple yet effective rain density-controllable filtering method, and have good properties of high image resolution, background diversity, rain streaks variety, and strict spatial alignment. RealRain-1k also provides abundant rain streak layers as a byproduct, enabling us to build a large-scale synthetic dataset named SynRain-13k by pasting the rain streak layers on abundant natural images. Based on them and existing datasets, we benchmark more than 10 representative SID methods on three tracks: (1) fully supervised learning on RealRain-1k, (2) domain generalization to real datasets, and (3) syn-to-real transfer learning. The experimental results (1) show the difference of representative methods in image restoration performance and model complexity, (2) validate the significance of the proposed datasets for model generalization, and (3) provide useful insights on the superiority of learning from diverse domains and shed lights on the future research on real-world SID. The datasets will be released at https://github.com/hiker-lw/RealRain-1k
summary: Single image deraining (SID) in real scenarios attracts increasing attention in recent years. Due to the difficulty in obtaining real-world rainy/clean image pairs, previous real datasets suffer from low-resolution images, homogeneous rain streaks, limited background variation, and even misalignment of image pairs, resulting in incomprehensive evaluation of SID methods. To address these issues, we establish a new high-quality dataset named RealRain-1k, consisting of $1,120$ high-resolution paired clean and rainy images with low- and high-density rain streaks, respectively. Images in RealRain-1k are automatically generated from a large number of real-world rainy video clips through a simple yet effective rain density-controllable filtering method, and have good properties of high image resolution, background diversity, rain streaks variety, and strict spatial alignment. RealRain-1k also provides abundant rain streak layers as a byproduct, enabling us to build a large-scale synthetic dataset named SynRain-13k by pasting the rain streak layers on abundant natural images. Based on them and existing datasets, we benchmark more than 10 representative SID methods on three tracks: (1) fully supervised learning on RealRain-1k, (2) domain generalization to real datasets, and (3) syn-to-real transfer learning. The experimental results (1) show the difference of representative methods in image restoration performance and model complexity, (2) validate the significance of the proposed datasets for model generalization, and (3) provide useful insights on the superiority of learning from diverse domains and shed lights on the future research on real-world SID. The datasets will be released at https://github.com/hiker-lw/RealRain-1k
abstract_zh: 近年来，真实场景中的单图像去雨（SID）引起了越来越多的关注。由于难以获得真实世界的雨/晴图像对，以前的真实数据集存在图像分辨率低、雨条纹均匀、背景变化有限，甚至图像对错位的问题，导致SID方法的评估不全面。为了解决这些问题，我们建立了一个名为 RealRain-1k 的新高质量数据集，其中包含价值 1,120 美元的高分辨率配对的清洁图像和雨图像，分别具有低密度和高密度雨条纹。 RealRain-1k中的图像是根据大量现实世界的下雨视频片段，通过简单而有效的雨密度可控过滤方法自动生成的，具有图像分辨率高、背景多样性、雨条纹多样和严格的空间对齐等良好特性。 RealRain-1k 还提供丰富的雨条纹图层作为副产品，使我们能够通过将雨条纹图层粘贴到丰富的自然图像上来构建名为 SynRain-13k 的大规模合成数据集。基于它们和现有数据集，我们在三个轨道上对 10 多种代表性 SID 方法进行了基准测试：（1）RealRain-1k 上的完全监督学习，（2）对真实数据集的领域泛化，以及（3）syn-to-real 迁移学习。实验结果（1）显示了代表性方法在图像恢复性能和模型复杂性方面的差异，（2）验证了所提出的数据集对于模型泛化的重要性，（3）提供了关于从不同领域学习的优越性的有用见解，并为现实世界 SID 的未来研究提供了有用的见解。数据集将在 https://github.com/hiker-lw/RealRain-1k 发布

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个高质量真实降雨图像数据集RealRain-1k，并基于该数据集及合成数据集SynRain-13k对多种单图像去雨方法进行基准测试。
AI.motivation: 现有真实场景降雨数据集存在分辨率低、雨条单一、背景单调及图像对不匹配等问题，难以全面评估去雨方法性能。
AI.method: 通过可控过滤方法从真实降雨视频生成RealRain-1k数据集，并利用雨条图层构建SynRain-13k；在三个任务轨道上对10余种方法进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验揭示了不同方法在性能与复杂度上的差异，验证了新数据集对模型泛化能力的提升作用，并发现多领域学习的优越性。
AI.conclusion: RealRain-1k和SynRain-13k为真实场景去雨研究提供新基准，强调了跨领域学习对提升模型鲁棒性的关键作用。

authors_text: Yuvraj Misra,Tarun Kumar Agarwal
title: Modeling of High and Low Resistant States in Single Defect Atomristors
title_zh: 单缺陷原子电阻的高阻态和低阻态建模
abstract: Resistance-change random access memory (RRAM) devices are nanoscale metal-insulator-metal structures that can store information in their resistance states, namely the high resistance (HRS) and low resistance (LRS) states. They are a potential candidate for a universal memory as these non-volatile memory elements can offer fast-switching, long retention and switching cycles, and additionally, are also suitable for direct applications in neuromorphic computing. In this study, we first present a model to analyze different resistance states of RRAM devices or so-called "atomristors" that utilize novel 2D materials as the switching materials instead of insulators. The developed model is then used to study the electrical characteristics of a single defect monolayer MoS$_{2}$ memristor. The change in the device resistance between the HRS and LRS is associated to the change in the tunneling probability when the vacancy defects in the 2D material are substituted by the metal atoms from the electrodes. The distortion due to defects and substituted metal atom is captured in the 1D potential energy profile by averaging the effect along the transverse direction. This simplification enables us to model single defect memristors with a less extensive quantum transport model while taking into account the presence of defects.
summary: Resistance-change random access memory (RRAM) devices are nanoscale metal-insulator-metal structures that can store information in their resistance states, namely the high resistance (HRS) and low resistance (LRS) states. They are a potential candidate for a universal memory as these non-volatile memory elements can offer fast-switching, long retention and switching cycles, and additionally, are also suitable for direct applications in neuromorphic computing. In this study, we first present a model to analyze different resistance states of RRAM devices or so-called "atomristors" that utilize novel 2D materials as the switching materials instead of insulators. The developed model is then used to study the electrical characteristics of a single defect monolayer MoS$_{2}$ memristor. The change in the device resistance between the HRS and LRS is associated to the change in the tunneling probability when the vacancy defects in the 2D material are substituted by the metal atoms from the electrodes. The distortion due to defects and substituted metal atom is captured in the 1D potential energy profile by averaging the effect along the transverse direction. This simplification enables us to model single defect memristors with a less extensive quantum transport model while taking into account the presence of defects.
abstract_zh: 电阻变化随机存取存储器（RRAM）器件是纳米级金属-绝缘体-金属结构，可以在电阻状态（即高电阻（HRS）和低电阻（LRS）状态）存储信息。它们是通用存储器的潜在候选者，因为这些非易失性存储器元件可以提供快速切换、长保留和切换周期，此外，还适合在神经形态计算中直接应用。在这项研究中，我们首先提出了一个模型来分析 RRAM 器件或所谓的“原子电阻器”的不同电阻状态，这些器件利用新型 2D 材料而不是绝缘体作为开关材料。然后使用开发的模型来研究单缺陷单层 MoS$_{2}$ 忆阻器的电气特性。当二维材料中的空位缺陷被电极中的金属原子取代时，HRS 和 LRS 之间器件电阻的变化与隧道概率的变化相关。通过沿横向平均效应，在一维势能分布中捕获由于缺陷和取代金属原子引起的变形。这种简化使我们能够使用不太广泛的量子传输模型对单缺陷忆阻器进行建模，同时考虑到缺陷的存在。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种模型，用于分析基于二维材料的单缺陷原子晶体管（atomristors）的高电阻态（HRS）和低电阻态（LRS）的电阻变化机制。
AI.motivation: 传统RRAM器件存在性能瓶颈，而二维材料（如MoS₂）作为新型开关材料可提升器件性能，但其缺陷与金属原子替代机制对电阻变化的影响尚不明确，需建立理论模型进行研究。
AI.method: 通过构建一维势能模型，将缺陷引起的畸变和金属原子替代效应沿横向方向平均化，简化量子输运计算，从而模拟单缺陷MoS₂忆阻器的电学特性。
AI.result: 模型成功揭示了HRS与LRS间的电阻变化与缺陷处隧穿概率变化的关联，验证了金属原子替代缺陷导致的势垒调制机制。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为理解二维材料基单缺陷忆阻器的电阻切换机理提供了有效工具，为优化下一代非易失性存储器和类脑计算器件设计奠定理论基础。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种模型，用于分析基于二维材料的单缺陷原子晶体管（atomristors）的高电阻态（HRS）和低电阻态（LRS）的电阻变化机制。
ai_content.motivation: 传统RRAM器件存在性能瓶颈，而二维材料（如MoS₂）作为新型开关材料可提升器件性能，但其缺陷与金属原子替代机制对电阻变化的影响尚不明确，需建立理论模型进行研究。
ai_content.method: 通过构建一维势能模型，将缺陷引起的畸变和金属原子替代效应沿横向方向平均化，简化量子输运计算，从而模拟单缺陷MoS₂忆阻器的电学特性。
ai_content.result: 模型成功揭示了HRS与LRS间的电阻变化与缺陷处隧穿概率变化的关联，验证了金属原子替代缺陷导致的势垒调制机制。
ai_content.conclusion: 该模型为理解二维材料基单缺陷忆阻器的电阻切换机理提供了有效工具，为优化下一代非易失性存储器和类脑计算器件设计奠定理论基础。

search_text: Modeling of High and Low Resistant States in Single Defect Atomristors 单缺陷原子电阻的高阻态和低阻态建模 Resistance-change random access memory (RRAM) devices are nanoscale metal-insulator-metal structures that can store information in their resistance states, namely the high resistance (HRS) and low resistance (LRS) states. They are a potential candidate for a universal memory as these non-volatile memory elements can offer fast-switching, long retention and switching cycles, and additionally, are also suitable for direct applications in neuromorphic computing. In this study, we first present a model to analyze different resistance states of RRAM devices or so-called "atomristors" that utilize novel 2D materials as the switching materials instead of insulators. The developed model is then used to study the electrical characteristics of a single defect monolayer MoS$_{2}$ memristor. The change in the device resistance between the HRS and LRS is associated to the change in the tunneling probability when the vacancy defects in the 2D material are substituted by the metal atoms from the electrodes. The distortion due to defects and substituted metal atom is captured in the 1D potential energy profile by averaging the effect along the transverse direction. This simplification enables us to model single defect memristors with a less extensive quantum transport model while taking into account the presence of defects. 电阻变化随机存取存储器（RRAM）器件是纳米级金属-绝缘体-金属结构，可以在电阻状态（即高电阻（HRS）和低电阻（LRS）状态）存储信息。它们是通用存储器的潜在候选者，因为这些非易失性存储器元件可以提供快速切换、长保留和切换周期，此外，还适合在神经形态计算中直接应用。在这项研究中，我们首先提出了一个模型来分析 RRAM 器件或所谓的“原子电阻器”的不同电阻状态，这些器件利用新型 2D 材料而不是绝缘体作为开关材料。然后使用开发的模型来研究单缺陷单层 MoS$_{2}$ 忆阻器的电气特性。当二维材料中的空位缺陷被电极中的金属原子取代时，HRS 和 LRS 之间器件电阻的变化与隧道概率的变化相关。通过沿横向平均效应，在一维势能分布中捕获由于缺陷和取代金属原子引起的变形。这种简化使我们能够使用不太广泛的量子传输模型对单缺陷忆阻器进行建模，同时考虑到缺陷的存在。 本文提出了一种模型，用于分析基于二维材料的单缺陷原子晶体管（atomristors）的高电阻态（HRS）和低电阻态（LRS）的电阻变化机制。 Yuvraj Misra,Tarun Kumar Agarwal cs.ET

authors_text: Athanasios Vlontzos,Daniel Rueckert,Bernhard Kainz
title: A Review of Causality for Learning Algorithms in Medical Image Analysis
title_zh: 医学图像分析中学习算法的因果关系综述
comment: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://www.melba-journal.org/papers/2022:028.html". ; Paper ID: 2022:028
comments: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://www.melba-journal.org/papers/2022:028.html". ; Paper ID: 2022:028
abstract: Medical image analysis is a vibrant research area that offers doctors and medical practitioners invaluable insight and the ability to accurately diagnose and monitor disease. Machine learning provides an additional boost for this area. However, machine learning for medical image analysis is particularly vulnerable to natural biases like domain shifts that affect algorithmic performance and robustness. In this paper we analyze machine learning for medical image analysis within the framework of Technology Readiness Levels and review how causal analysis methods can fill a gap when creating robust and adaptable medical image analysis algorithms. We review methods using causality in medical imaging AI/ML and find that causal analysis has the potential to mitigate critical problems for clinical translation but that uptake and clinical downstream research has been limited so far.
summary: Medical image analysis is a vibrant research area that offers doctors and medical practitioners invaluable insight and the ability to accurately diagnose and monitor disease. Machine learning provides an additional boost for this area. However, machine learning for medical image analysis is particularly vulnerable to natural biases like domain shifts that affect algorithmic performance and robustness. In this paper we analyze machine learning for medical image analysis within the framework of Technology Readiness Levels and review how causal analysis methods can fill a gap when creating robust and adaptable medical image analysis algorithms. We review methods using causality in medical imaging AI/ML and find that causal analysis has the potential to mitigate critical problems for clinical translation but that uptake and clinical downstream research has been limited so far.
abstract_zh: 医学图像分析是一个充满活力的研究领域，为医生和医疗从业者提供了宝贵的见解以及准确诊断和监测疾病的能力。机器学习为这一领域提供了额外的推动力。然而，用于医学图像分析的机器学习特别容易受到自然偏差的影响，例如影响算法性能和鲁棒性的域转移。在本文中，我们在技术准备水平的框架内分析了用于医学图像分析的机器学习，并回顾了因果分析方法如何在创建强大且适应性强的医学图像分析算法时填补空白。我们回顾了医学成像 AI/ML 中使用因果关系的方法，发现因果分析有潜力缓解临床转化的关键问题，但迄今为止，这种吸收和临床下游研究仍然有限。

AI.tldr: 综述因果分析在医疗图像分析算法中的应用，以提升算法鲁棒性与适应性。
AI.motivation: 解决医疗图像分析中因领域转移导致的算法性能下降问题，提升临床转化的可行性。
AI.method: 基于技术成熟度等级框架，回顾因果分析方法在医疗影像AI/ML中的应用，评估其潜力与限制。
AI.result: 发现因果分析能缓解临床转化的关键问题，但目前临床应用和下游研究仍较为有限。
AI.conclusion: 因果分析在提升医疗影像算法鲁棒性方面潜力显著，需进一步研究推动其临床转化与应用。

authors_text: Ahmed Khalifa,Michael Cerny Green,Julian Togelius
title: Mutation Models: Learning to Generate Levels by Imitating Evolution
title_zh: 突变模型：学习通过模仿进化来生成水平
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, and 2 tables. Published at PCGWorkshop 2022 at FDG 2022
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, and 2 tables. Published at PCGWorkshop 2022 at FDG 2022
abstract: Search-based procedural content generation (PCG) is a well-known method for level generation in games. Its key advantage is that it is generic and able to satisfy functional constraints. However, due to the heavy computational costs to run these algorithms online, search-based PCG is rarely utilized for real-time generation. In this paper, we introduce mutation models, a new type of iterative level generator based on machine learning. We train a model to imitate the evolutionary process and use the trained model to generate levels. This trained model is able to modify noisy levels sequentially to create better levels without the need for a fitness function during inference. We evaluate our trained models on a 2D maze generation task. We compare several different versions of the method: training the models either at the end of evolution (normal evolution) or every 100 generations (assisted evolution) and using the model as a mutation function during evolution. Using the assisted evolution process, the final trained models are able to generate mazes with a success rate of 99% and high diversity of 86%. The trained model is many times faster than the evolutionary process it was trained on. This work opens the door to a new way of learning level generators guided by an evolutionary process, meaning automatic creation of generators with specifiable constraints and objectives that are fast enough for runtime deployment in games.
summary: Search-based procedural content generation (PCG) is a well-known method for level generation in games. Its key advantage is that it is generic and able to satisfy functional constraints. However, due to the heavy computational costs to run these algorithms online, search-based PCG is rarely utilized for real-time generation. In this paper, we introduce mutation models, a new type of iterative level generator based on machine learning. We train a model to imitate the evolutionary process and use the trained model to generate levels. This trained model is able to modify noisy levels sequentially to create better levels without the need for a fitness function during inference. We evaluate our trained models on a 2D maze generation task. We compare several different versions of the method: training the models either at the end of evolution (normal evolution) or every 100 generations (assisted evolution) and using the model as a mutation function during evolution. Using the assisted evolution process, the final trained models are able to generate mazes with a success rate of 99% and high diversity of 86%. The trained model is many times faster than the evolutionary process it was trained on. This work opens the door to a new way of learning level generators guided by an evolutionary process, meaning automatic creation of generators with specifiable constraints and objectives that are fast enough for runtime deployment in games.
abstract_zh: 基于搜索的程序内容生成（PCG）是游戏中众所周知的关卡生成方法。它的主要优点是它是通用的并且能够满足功能约束。然而，由于在线运行这些算法的计算成本很高，基于搜索的 PCG 很少用于实时生成。在本文中，我们介绍了突变模型，一种基于机器学习的新型迭代级别生成器。我们训练一个模型来模仿进化过程，并使用训练后的模型来生成级别。这种经过训练的模型能够顺序修改噪声级别以创建更好的级别，而无需在推理过程中使用适应度函数。我们在 2D 迷宫生成任务上评估我们训练的模型。我们比较了该方法的几个不同版本：在进化结束时（正常进化）或每 100 代（辅助进化）训练模型，并在进化过程中使用模型作为突变函数。使用辅助进化过程，最终训练的模型能够生成迷宫，成功率高达 99%，多样性高达 86%。训练后的模型比训练时的进化过程快很多倍。这项工作为一种由进化过程引导的学习关卡生成器的新方法打开了大门，这意味着自动创建具有可指定约束和目标的生成器，这些生成器的速度足以在游戏中运行时部署。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的突变模型，通过模仿进化过程生成游戏关卡，无需推理时的适应度函数。
AI.motivation: 基于搜索的程序化内容生成（PCG）方法计算成本高，难以实现实时生成，需寻找更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 训练模型模拟进化过程，通过正常进化（训练于进化末期）或辅助进化（每100代训练）两种方式，利用模型作为突变函数生成关卡。
AI.result: 辅助进化模型在2D迷宫生成任务中达到99%成功率和86%多样性，速度远超原始进化过程。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为学习受进化过程指导的关卡生成器提供了新途径，可满足游戏运行时的快速生成需求。

Using the assisted evolution process, the final trained models are able to generate mazes with a success rate of 99% and high diversity of 86%. This work opens the door to a new way of learning level generators guided by an evolutionary process, meaning automatic creation of generators with specifiable constraints and objectives that are fast enough for runtime deployment in games. 基于搜索的程序内容生成（PCG）是游戏中众所周知的关卡生成方法。它的主要优点是它是通用的并且能够满足功能约束。然而，由于在线运行这些算法的计算成本很高，基于搜索的 PCG 很少用于实时生成。在本文中，我们介绍了突变模型，一种基于机器学习的新型迭代级别生成器。我们训练一个模型来模仿进化过程，并使用训练后的模型来生成级别。这种经过训练的模型能够顺序修改噪声级别以创建更好的级别，而无需在推理过程中使用适应度函数。我们在 2D 迷宫生成任务上评估我们训练的模型。我们比较了该方法的几个不同版本：在进化结束时（正常进化）或每 100 代（辅助进化）训练模型，并在进化过程中使用模型作为突变函数。使用辅助进化过程，最终训练的模型能够生成迷宫，成功率高达 99%，多样性高达 86%。训练后的模型比训练时的进化过程快很多倍。这项工作为一种由进化过程引导的学习关卡生成器的新方法打开了大门，这意味着自动创建具有可指定约束和目标的生成器，这些生成器的速度足以在游戏中运行时部署。 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的突变模型，通过模仿进化过程生成游戏关卡，无需推理时的适应度函数。 Ahmed Khalifa,Michael Cerny Green,Julian Togelius cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Valentin Popescu,Dima Damen,Toby Perrett
title: An Evaluation of OCR on Egocentric Data
title_zh: 对以自我为中心的数据进行 OCR 评估
comment: Extended Abstract, EPIC workshop at CVPR 22
comments: Extended Abstract, EPIC workshop at CVPR 22
abstract: In this paper, we evaluate state-of-the-art OCR methods on Egocentric data. We annotate text in EPIC-KITCHENS images, and demonstrate that existing OCR methods struggle with rotated text, which is frequently observed on objects being handled. We introduce a simple rotate-and-merge procedure which can be applied to pre-trained OCR models that halves the normalized edit distance error. This suggests that future OCR attempts should incorporate rotation into model design and training procedures.
summary: In this paper, we evaluate state-of-the-art OCR methods on Egocentric data. We annotate text in EPIC-KITCHENS images, and demonstrate that existing OCR methods struggle with rotated text, which is frequently observed on objects being handled. We introduce a simple rotate-and-merge procedure which can be applied to pre-trained OCR models that halves the normalized edit distance error. This suggests that future OCR attempts should incorporate rotation into model design and training procedures.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们评估了针对自我中心数据的最先进的 OCR 方法。我们对 EPIC-KITCHENS 图像中的文本进行注释，并证明现有的 OCR 方法很难处理旋转文本，这种情况在正在处理的物体上经常观察到。我们引入了一个简单的旋转和合并程序，该程序可应用于预训练的 OCR 模型，将归一化编辑距离误差减半。这表明未来的 OCR 尝试应该将轮换纳入模型设计和训练程序中。

AI.tldr: 评估OCR方法在第一人称视角数据上的表现，特别是旋转文本的处理效果。
AI.motivation: 现有OCR方法在处理第一人称视角中常见的旋转文本时效果不佳，需要改进。
AI.method: 提出旋转和合并方法，应用于预训练OCR模型以处理旋转文本。
AI.result: 归一化编辑距离错误减少了一半。
AI.conclusion: 未来OCR方法应在模型设计和训练中纳入旋转处理。

authors_text: Benhan Li,Shengdong Du,Tianrui Li,Jie Hu,Zhen Jia
title: DRAformer: Differentially Reconstructed Attention Transformer for Time-Series Forecasting
title_zh: DRAformer：用于时间序列预测的差分重构注意力变压器
abstract: Time-series forecasting plays an important role in many real-world scenarios, such as equipment life cycle forecasting, weather forecasting, and traffic flow forecasting. It can be observed from recent research that a variety of transformer-based models have shown remarkable results in time-series forecasting. However, there are still some issues that limit the ability of transformer-based models on time-series forecasting tasks: (i) learning directly on raw data is susceptible to noise due to its complex and unstable feature representation; (ii) the self-attention mechanisms pay insufficient attention to changing features and temporal dependencies. In order to solve these two problems, we propose a transformer-based differentially reconstructed attention model DRAformer. Specifically, DRAformer has the following innovations: (i) learning against differenced sequences, which preserves clear and stable sequence features by differencing and highlights the changing properties of sequences; (ii) the reconstructed attention: integrated distance attention exhibits sequential distance through a learnable Gaussian kernel, distributed difference attention calculates distribution difference by mapping the difference sequence to the adaptive feature space, and the combination of the two effectively focuses on the sequences with prominent associations; (iii) the reconstructed decoder input, which extracts sequence features by integrating variation information and temporal correlations, thereby obtaining a more comprehensive sequence representation. Extensive experiments on four large-scale datasets demonstrate that DRAformer outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Time-series forecasting plays an important role in many real-world scenarios, such as equipment life cycle forecasting, weather forecasting, and traffic flow forecasting. It can be observed from recent research that a variety of transformer-based models have shown remarkable results in time-series forecasting. However, there are still some issues that limit the ability of transformer-based models on time-series forecasting tasks: (i) learning directly on raw data is susceptible to noise due to its complex and unstable feature representation; (ii) the self-attention mechanisms pay insufficient attention to changing features and temporal dependencies. In order to solve these two problems, we propose a transformer-based differentially reconstructed attention model DRAformer. Specifically, DRAformer has the following innovations: (i) learning against differenced sequences, which preserves clear and stable sequence features by differencing and highlights the changing properties of sequences; (ii) the reconstructed attention: integrated distance attention exhibits sequential distance through a learnable Gaussian kernel, distributed difference attention calculates distribution difference by mapping the difference sequence to the adaptive feature space, and the combination of the two effectively focuses on the sequences with prominent associations; (iii) the reconstructed decoder input, which extracts sequence features by integrating variation information and temporal correlations, thereby obtaining a more comprehensive sequence representation. Extensive experiments on four large-scale datasets demonstrate that DRAformer outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 时间序列预测在许多现实场景中发挥着重要作用，例如设备生命周期预测、天气预报和交通流量预测。从最近的研究可以看出，各种基于Transformer的模型在时间序列预测方面都显示出了显着的效果。然而，仍然存在一些问题限制了基于 Transformer 的模型在时间序列预测任务上的能力：（i）直接对原始数据进行学习由于其复杂且不稳定的特征表示而容易受到噪声的影响； (ii) 自注意力机制对变化的特征和时间依赖性的关注不够。为了解决这两个问题，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的差分重构注意力模型 DRAformer。具体来说，DRAformer具有以下创新点：（i）针对差分序列进行学习，通过差分保留清晰稳定的序列特征，突出序列的变化属性； (ii)重构注意力：综合距离注意力通过可学习的高斯核展现序列距离，分布式差异注意力通过将差异序列映射到自适应特征空间来计算分布差异，两者的结合有效地关注具有显着关联的序列； (iii)重构的解码器输入，通过整合变化信息和时间相关性来提取序列特征，从而获得更全面的序列表示。对四个大型数据集的大量实验表明，DRAformer 的性能优于最先进的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DRAformer模型，通过差分序列学习和重建注意力机制改进时间序列预测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer模型在时间序列预测中存在噪声敏感和注意力机制对动态特征捕捉不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用差分序列学习保留稳定特征，设计集成距离注意力与分布差注意力的重建机制，结合变体信息与时间相关性的解码器输入。
AI.result: 在四个大规模数据集上实验表明，DRAformer优于现有先进基线模型。
AI.conclusion: DRAformer通过差分重建机制有效解决了时间序列预测中的噪声干扰和动态特征捕捉难题。

authors_text: Mingchuan Tian,Guangway Teng,Yipeng Bao
title: Kaggle Kinship Recognition Challenge: Introduction of Convolution-Free Model to boost conventional
title_zh: Kaggle 亲属关系识别挑战：引入无卷积模型以增强传统识别能力
abstract: This work aims to explore a convolution-free base classifier that can be used to widen the variations of the conventional ensemble classifier. Specifically, we propose Vision Transformers as base classifiers to combine with CNNs for a unique ensemble solution in Kaggle kinship recognition. In this paper, we verify our proposed idea by implementing and optimizing variants of the Vision Transformer model on top of the existing CNN models. The combined models achieve better scores than conventional ensemble classifiers based solely on CNN variants. We demonstrate that highly optimized CNN ensembles publicly available on the Kaggle Discussion board can easily achieve a significant boost in ROC score by simply ensemble with variants of the Vision Transformer model due to low correlation.
summary: This work aims to explore a convolution-free base classifier that can be used to widen the variations of the conventional ensemble classifier. Specifically, we propose Vision Transformers as base classifiers to combine with CNNs for a unique ensemble solution in Kaggle kinship recognition. In this paper, we verify our proposed idea by implementing and optimizing variants of the Vision Transformer model on top of the existing CNN models. The combined models achieve better scores than conventional ensemble classifiers based solely on CNN variants. We demonstrate that highly optimized CNN ensembles publicly available on the Kaggle Discussion board can easily achieve a significant boost in ROC score by simply ensemble with variants of the Vision Transformer model due to low correlation.
abstract_zh: 这项工作旨在探索一种无卷积基分类器，可用于扩大传统集成分类器的变化。具体来说，我们建议将 Vision Transformer 作为基分类器，与 CNN 相结合，在 Kaggle 亲属关系识别中提供独特的集成解决方案。在本文中，我们通过在现有 CNN 模型之上实现和优化 Vision Transformer 模型的变体来验证我们提出的想法。组合模型比仅基于 CNN 变体的传统集成分类器取得了更好的分数。我们证明，由于相关性较低，Kaggle 讨论板上公开提供的高度优化的 CNN 集成可以通过简单地与 Vision Transformer 模型的变体集成来轻松实现 ROC 分数的显着提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无卷积模型，通过结合Vision Transformer与CNN构建集成方案，提升Kaggle亲属识别任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN集成方法存在模型多样性不足的局限，而Vision Transformer作为非卷积模型可提供差异化的特征表达，从而提升集成效果。
AI.method: 以Vision Transformer为基分类器，与现有CNN模型组合形成集成方案，并优化其变体以适配亲属识别任务。
AI.result: 组合模型在ROC评分上优于纯CNN集成方案，且公开的CNN集成模型通过与Vision Transformer简单集成即可显著提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 引入低相关性的Vision Transformer可有效增强传统CNN集成模型的多样性，从而提升整体性能。

In this paper, we verify our proposed idea by implementing and optimizing variants of the Vision Transformer model on top of the existing CNN models. The combined models achieve better scores than conventional ensemble classifiers based solely on CNN variants. We demonstrate that highly optimized CNN ensembles publicly available on the Kaggle Discussion board can easily achieve a significant boost in ROC score by simply ensemble with variants of the Vision Transformer model due to low correlation. 这项工作旨在探索一种无卷积基分类器，可用于扩大传统集成分类器的变化。具体来说，我们建议将 Vision Transformer 作为基分类器，与 CNN 相结合，在 Kaggle 亲属关系识别中提供独特的集成解决方案。在本文中，我们通过在现有 CNN 模型之上实现和优化 Vision Transformer 模型的变体来验证我们提出的想法。组合模型比仅基于 CNN 变体的传统集成分类器取得了更好的分数。我们证明，由于相关性较低，Kaggle 讨论板上公开提供的高度优化的 CNN 集成可以通过简单地与 Vision Transformer 模型的变体集成来轻松实现 ROC 分数的显着提升。 本文提出一种无卷积模型，通过结合Vision Transformer与CNN构建集成方案，提升Kaggle亲属识别任务的性能。 Mingchuan Tian,Guangway Teng,Yipeng Bao cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Qiang Hu,Yuejun Guo,Xiaofei Xie,Maxime Cordy,Lei Ma,Mike Papadakis,Yves Le Traon
title: CodeS: Towards Code Model Generalization Under Distribution Shift
title_zh: CodeS：在分布转移下迈向代码模型泛化
comment: accepted by ICSE'23-NIER
comments: accepted by ICSE'23-NIER
abstract: Distribution shift has been a longstanding challenge for the reliable deployment of deep learning (DL) models due to unexpected accuracy degradation. Although DL has been becoming a driving force for large-scale source code analysis in the big code era, limited progress has been made on distribution shift analysis and benchmarking for source code tasks. To fill this gap, this paper initiates to propose CodeS, a distribution shift benchmark dataset, for source code learning. Specifically, CodeS supports two programming languages (Java and Python) and five shift types (task, programmer, time-stamp, token, and concrete syntax tree). Extensive experiments based on CodeS reveal that 1) out-of-distribution detectors from other domains (e.g., computer vision) do not generalize to source code, 2) all code classification models suffer from distribution shifts, 3) representation-based shifts have a higher impact on the model than others, and 4) pre-trained bimodal models are relatively more resistant to distribution shifts.
summary: Distribution shift has been a longstanding challenge for the reliable deployment of deep learning (DL) models due to unexpected accuracy degradation. Although DL has been becoming a driving force for large-scale source code analysis in the big code era, limited progress has been made on distribution shift analysis and benchmarking for source code tasks. To fill this gap, this paper initiates to propose CodeS, a distribution shift benchmark dataset, for source code learning. Specifically, CodeS supports two programming languages (Java and Python) and five shift types (task, programmer, time-stamp, token, and concrete syntax tree). Extensive experiments based on CodeS reveal that 1) out-of-distribution detectors from other domains (e.g., computer vision) do not generalize to source code, 2) all code classification models suffer from distribution shifts, 3) representation-based shifts have a higher impact on the model than others, and 4) pre-trained bimodal models are relatively more resistant to distribution shifts.
abstract_zh: 由于意外的准确性下降，分布转移一直是深度学习 (DL) 模型可靠部署的长期挑战。尽管深度学习已经成为大代码时代大规模源代码分析的驱动力，但在源代码任务的分布偏移分析和基准测试方面取得的进展有限。为了填补这一空白，本文提出了CodeS，一个分布转移基准数据集，用于源代码学习。具体来说，CodeS 支持两种编程语言（Java 和 Python）和五种转变类型（任务、程序员、时间戳、令牌和具体语法树）。基于 CodeS 的大量实验表明：1）来自其他领域（例如计算机视觉）的分布外检测器不能推广到源代码，2）所有代码分类模型都会遭受分布偏移，3）基于表示的偏移对模型的影响比其他模型更大，4）预训练的双峰模型相对更能抵抗分布偏移。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CodeS基准数据集，用于评估代码模型在分布偏移下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在代码任务的分布偏移分析和基准测试方面进展有限，需填补这一空白以推动可靠部署。
AI.method: 构建支持Java/Python两种语言及五种偏移类型的CodeS数据集，并进行大规模实验验证。
AI.result: 1) 其他领域检测方法不适用于代码；2) 所有代码分类模型均受分布偏移影响；3) 表示层偏移影响最大；4) 预训练双模态模型更具鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: CodeS为代码模型分布偏移研究提供基准，揭示当前模型局限性并指明改进方向。

authors_text: Dingyi Rong,Jiancheng Yang,Bingbing Ni,Bilian Ke
title: Differentiable Projection from Optical Coherence Tomography B-Scan without Retinal Layer Segmentation Supervision
title_zh: 无视网膜层分割监督的光学相干断层扫描 B 扫描的可微投影
comment: ISBI2022
comments: ISBI2022
abstract: Projection map (PM) from optical coherence tomography (OCT) B-scan is an important tool to diagnose retinal diseases, which typically requires retinal layer segmentation. In this study, we present a novel end-to-end framework to predict PMs from B-scans. Instead of segmenting retinal layers explicitly, we represent them implicitly as predicted coordinates. By pixel interpolation on uniformly sampled coordinates between retinal layers, the corresponding PMs could be easily obtained with pooling. Notably, all the operators are differentiable; therefore, this Differentiable Projection Module (DPM) enables end-to-end training with the ground truth of PMs rather than retinal layer segmentation. Our framework produces high-quality PMs, significantly outperforming baselines, including a vanilla CNN without DPM and an optimization-based DPM without a deep prior. Furthermore, the proposed DPM, as a novel neural representation of areas/volumes between curves/surfaces, could be of independent interest for geometric deep learning.
summary: Projection map (PM) from optical coherence tomography (OCT) B-scan is an important tool to diagnose retinal diseases, which typically requires retinal layer segmentation. In this study, we present a novel end-to-end framework to predict PMs from B-scans. Instead of segmenting retinal layers explicitly, we represent them implicitly as predicted coordinates. By pixel interpolation on uniformly sampled coordinates between retinal layers, the corresponding PMs could be easily obtained with pooling. Notably, all the operators are differentiable; therefore, this Differentiable Projection Module (DPM) enables end-to-end training with the ground truth of PMs rather than retinal layer segmentation. Our framework produces high-quality PMs, significantly outperforming baselines, including a vanilla CNN without DPM and an optimization-based DPM without a deep prior. Furthermore, the proposed DPM, as a novel neural representation of areas/volumes between curves/surfaces, could be of independent interest for geometric deep learning.
abstract_zh: 光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) B 扫描的投影图 (PM) 是诊断视网膜疾病的重要工具，通常需要视网膜层分割。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的端到端框架来通过 B 扫描预测 PM。我们没有明确地分割视网膜层，而是将它们隐式地表示为预测坐标。通过在视网膜层之间均匀采样的坐标上进行像素插值，可以通过池化轻松获得相应的 PM。值得注意的是，所有运算符都是可微的；因此，该可微投影模块 (DPM) 能够使用 PM 的基本事实（而不是视网膜层分割）进行端到端训练。我们的框架产生高质量的 PM，显着优于基线，包括没有 DPM 的普通 CNN 和没有深度先验的基于优化的 DPM。此外，所提出的 DPM 作为曲线/曲面之间面积/体积的新型神经表示，可能对几何深度学习具有独立的意义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需视网膜层分割即可从光学相干断层扫描（OCT）B扫描生成投影图（PM）的端到端框架。
AI.motivation: 传统PM生成依赖耗时的视网膜层分割，而本文旨在通过隐式表示层结构并利用可微分操作，简化流程并提升效率。
AI.method: 设计可微分投影模块（DPM），通过预测层间隐式坐标并进行像素插值，结合池化操作生成PM，实现端到端训练。
AI.result: 框架在PM生成质量上显著优于基线方法（如无DPM的CNN和无深度先验的优化DPM）。
AI.conclusion: DPM作为曲线/曲面间区域的新型神经表示，为几何深度学习提供了独立价值的工具。

authors_text: Deepak Mittal,Amir H. Poorjam,Debottam Dutta,Debarpan Bhattacharya,Zemin Yu,Sriram Ganapathy,Maneesh Singh
title: Svadhyaya system for the Second Diagnosing COVID-19 using Acoustics Challenge 2021
title_zh: 使用 2021 年声学挑战赛第二次诊断 COVID-19 的 Svadhyaya 系统
abstract: This report describes the system used for detecting COVID-19 positives using three different acoustic modalities, namely speech, breathing, and cough in the second DiCOVA challenge. The proposed system is based on the combination of 4 different approaches, each focusing more on one aspect of the problem, and reaches the blind test AUCs of 86.41, 77.60, and 84.55, in the breathing, cough, and speech tracks, respectively, and the AUC of 85.37 in the fusion of these three tracks.
summary: This report describes the system used for detecting COVID-19 positives using three different acoustic modalities, namely speech, breathing, and cough in the second DiCOVA challenge. The proposed system is based on the combination of 4 different approaches, each focusing more on one aspect of the problem, and reaches the blind test AUCs of 86.41, 77.60, and 84.55, in the breathing, cough, and speech tracks, respectively, and the AUC of 85.37 in the fusion of these three tracks.
abstract_zh: 本报告描述了在第二次 DiCOVA 挑战中使用三种不同的声学模式（即言语、呼吸和咳嗽）检测 COVID-19 阳性的系统。所提出的系统基于 4 种不同方法的组合，每种方法更关注问题的一个方面，并在呼吸、咳嗽和语音轨迹中分别达到了 86.41、77.60 和 84.55 的盲测 AUC，在这三个轨迹的融合中达到了 85.37 的 AUC。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合语音、呼吸和咳嗽三种声学模态的系统，用于检测COVID-19阳性病例。
AI.motivation: 通过声学信号进行无接触式COVID-19检测，具有较高的实用价值和隐私保护优势。
AI.method: 融合四种不同方法分别处理语音、呼吸和咳嗽数据，并通过多模态融合提升检测性能。
AI.result: 呼吸、咳嗽、语音模态的AUC分别为86.41、77.60、84.55，三者融合后AUC达到85.37。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合策略有效提升了COVID-19声学检测的准确性，验证了声学信号在疾病诊断中的潜力。

result: 呼吸、咳嗽、语音模态的AUC分别为86.41、77.60、84.55，三者融合后AUC达到85.37。
conclusion: 多模态融合策略有效提升了COVID-19声学检测的准确性，验证了声学信号在疾病诊断中的潜力。
search_text: Svadhyaya system for the Second Diagnosing COVID-19 using Acoustics Challenge 2021 使用 2021 年声学挑战赛第二次诊断 COVID-19 的 Svadhyaya 系统 This report describes the system used for detecting COVID-19 positives using three different acoustic modalities, namely speech, breathing, and cough in the second DiCOVA challenge. The proposed system is based on the combination of 4 different approaches, each focusing more on one aspect of the problem, and reaches the blind test AUCs of 86.41, 77.60, and 84.55, in the breathing, cough, and speech tracks, respectively, and the AUC of 85.37 in the fusion of these three tracks. 本报告描述了在第二次 DiCOVA 挑战中使用三种不同的声学模式（即言语、呼吸和咳嗽）检测 COVID-19 阳性的系统。所提出的系统基于 4 种不同方法的组合，每种方法更关注问题的一个方面，并在呼吸、咳嗽和语音轨迹中分别达到了 86.41、77.60 和 84.55 的盲测 AUC，在这三个轨迹的融合中达到了 85.37 的 AUC。 该论文提出了一种结合语音、呼吸和咳嗽三种声学模态的系统，用于检测COVID-19阳性病例。 Deepak Mittal,Amir H. Poorjam,Debottam Dutta,Debarpan Bhattacharya,Zemin Yu,Sriram Ganapathy,Maneesh Singh eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Harsh Purohit,Takashi Endo,Masaaki Yamamoto,Yohei Kawaguchi
title: Hierarchical Conditional Variational Autoencoder Based Acoustic Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 基于分层条件变分自动编码器的声学异常检测
abstract: This paper aims to develop an acoustic signal-based unsupervised anomaly detection method for automatic machine monitoring. Existing approaches such as deep autoencoder (DAE), variational autoencoder (VAE), conditional variational autoencoder (CVAE) etc. have limited representation capabilities in the latent space and, hence, poor anomaly detection performance. Different models have to be trained for each different kind of machines to accurately perform the anomaly detection task. To solve this issue, we propose a new method named as hierarchical conditional variational autoencoder (HCVAE). This method utilizes available taxonomic hierarchical knowledge about industrial facility to refine the latent space representation. This knowledge helps model to improve the anomaly detection performance as well. We demonstrated the generalization capability of a single HCVAE model for different types of machines by using appropriate conditions. Additionally, to show the practicability of the proposed approach, (i) we evaluated HCVAE model on different domain and (ii) we checked the effect of partial hierarchical knowledge. Our results show that HCVAE method validates both of these points, and it outperforms the baseline system on anomaly detection task by utmost 15 % on the AUC score metric.
summary: This paper aims to develop an acoustic signal-based unsupervised anomaly detection method for automatic machine monitoring. Existing approaches such as deep autoencoder (DAE), variational autoencoder (VAE), conditional variational autoencoder (CVAE) etc. have limited representation capabilities in the latent space and, hence, poor anomaly detection performance. Different models have to be trained for each different kind of machines to accurately perform the anomaly detection task. To solve this issue, we propose a new method named as hierarchical conditional variational autoencoder (HCVAE). This method utilizes available taxonomic hierarchical knowledge about industrial facility to refine the latent space representation. This knowledge helps model to improve the anomaly detection performance as well. We demonstrated the generalization capability of a single HCVAE model for different types of machines by using appropriate conditions. Additionally, to show the practicability of the proposed approach, (i) we evaluated HCVAE model on different domain and (ii) we checked the effect of partial hierarchical knowledge. Our results show that HCVAE method validates both of these points, and it outperforms the baseline system on anomaly detection task by utmost 15 % on the AUC score metric.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在开发一种基于声学信号的无监督异常检测方法，用于自动机器监控。现有的方法，如深度自动编码器（DAE）、变分自动编码器（VAE）、条件变分自动编码器（CVAE）等，在潜在空间中的表示能力有限，因此异常检测性能较差。必须针对每种不同类型的机器训练不同的模型才能准确地执行异常检测任务。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种称为分层条件变分自动编码器（HCVAE）的新方法。该方法利用有关工业设施的可用分类层次知识来细化潜在空间表示。这些知识也有助于模型提高异常检测性能。我们通过使用适当的条件证明了单个 HCVAE 模型对于不同类型机器的泛化能力。此外，为了证明所提出方法的实用性，（i）我们评估了不同领域的 HCVAE 模型，（ii）我们检查了部分分层知识的效果。我们的结果表明，HCVAE 方法验证了这两点，并且在 AUC 评分指标上，其异常检测任务的性能比基线系统高出最多 15%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分层条件变分自编码器（HCVAE）的声学异常检测方法，用于工业设备的自动监控。
AI.motivation: 现有深度自编码器（DAE）、变分自编码器（VAE）等方法在潜在空间表示能力有限，且需为不同设备单独训练模型，导致泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 通过整合工业设施的分类层次知识优化潜在空间表示，利用条件信息实现单模型对多类型设备的适配，并在不同领域及部分层次知识条件下验证方法有效性。
AI.result: HCVAE在AUC指标上较基线系统提升最高15%，且能跨设备类型和领域泛化，验证了层次知识的有效性。
AI.conclusion: HCVAE通过层次知识增强表征能力，显著提升异常检测性能并实现模型泛化，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Yuelin Wang,Kai Yi,Xinliang Liu,Yu Guang Wang,Shi Jin
title: ACMP: Allen-Cahn Message Passing with Attractive and Repulsive Forces for Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: ACMP：图神经网络的具有吸引力和排斥力的 Allen-Cahn 消息传递
comment: 26 pages, 5 figures. NeurIPS 2022 Workshop on GLFrontiers (Oral). ICLR 2023 (Spotlight)
comments: 26 pages, 5 figures. NeurIPS 2022 Workshop on GLFrontiers (Oral). ICLR 2023 (Spotlight)
abstract: Neural message passing is a basic feature extraction unit for graph-structured data considering neighboring node features in network propagation from one layer to the next. We model such process by an interacting particle system with attractive and repulsive forces and the Allen-Cahn force arising in the modeling of phase transition. The dynamics of the system is a reaction-diffusion process which can separate particles without blowing up. This induces an Allen-Cahn message passing (ACMP) for graph neural networks where the numerical iteration for the particle system solution constitutes the message passing propagation. ACMP which has a simple implementation with a neural ODE solver can propel the network depth up to one hundred of layers with theoretically proven strictly positive lower bound of the Dirichlet energy. It thus provides a deep model of GNNs circumventing the common GNN problem of oversmoothing. GNNs with ACMP achieve state of the art performance for real-world node classification tasks on both homophilic and heterophilic datasets. Codes are available at https://github.com/ykiiiiii/ACMP.
summary: Neural message passing is a basic feature extraction unit for graph-structured data considering neighboring node features in network propagation from one layer to the next. We model such process by an interacting particle system with attractive and repulsive forces and the Allen-Cahn force arising in the modeling of phase transition. The dynamics of the system is a reaction-diffusion process which can separate particles without blowing up. This induces an Allen-Cahn message passing (ACMP) for graph neural networks where the numerical iteration for the particle system solution constitutes the message passing propagation. ACMP which has a simple implementation with a neural ODE solver can propel the network depth up to one hundred of layers with theoretically proven strictly positive lower bound of the Dirichlet energy. It thus provides a deep model of GNNs circumventing the common GNN problem of oversmoothing. GNNs with ACMP achieve state of the art performance for real-world node classification tasks on both homophilic and heterophilic datasets. Codes are available at https://github.com/ykiiiiii/ACMP.
abstract_zh: 神经消息传递是图结构数据的基本特征提取单元，考虑网络从一层到下一层传播中的相邻节点特征。我们通过相互作用的粒子系统来模拟这一过程，该系统具有吸引力和排斥力以及相变建模中产生的艾伦-卡恩力。系统的动力学是一个反应扩散过程，可以在不爆炸的情况下分离颗粒。这引发了图神经网络的 Allen-Cahn 消息传递（ACMP），其中粒子系统解的数值迭代构成了消息传递传播。 ACMP 具有神经 ODE 求解器的简单实现，可以将网络深度提升至一百层，并且理论上证明了狄利克雷能量的严格正下界。因此，它提供了一种 GNN 的深度模型，规避了常见的 GNN 过度平滑问题。具有 ACMP 的 GNN 在同质和异质数据集上的现实世界节点分类任务中实现了最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/ykiiiiii/ACMP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ACMP方法，通过引入Allen-Cahn方程中的吸引和排斥力机制，改进图神经网络的消息传递过程以解决过平滑问题。
AI.motivation: 传统图神经网络在深度增加时易出现过平滑问题，而现有方法难以有效控制节点特征的分离与传播。本文受相变模型启发，提出基于物理动力学的新型消息传递机制。
AI.method: 将消息传递建模为包含吸引/排斥力的粒子系统，结合Allen-Cahn反应扩散方程，通过数值迭代实现消息传播，并利用神经ODE求解器保证深度网络稳定性。
AI.result: ACMP在同质性和异质性数据集上均达到节点分类任务的最先进性能，且可稳定训练百层深度网络。
AI.conclusion: ACMP通过引入物理动力学机制有效缓解了GNN的过平滑问题，为构建深层图神经网络提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jinsei Hanawa,Tomoaki Niiyama,Yutaka Endo,Satoshi Sunada
title: Gigahertz-rate random speckle projection for high-speed single-pixel image classification
title_zh: 用于高速单像素图像分类的千兆赫率随机散斑投影
comment: 7 pages, 7 figures
comments: 7 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Imaging techniques based on single-pixel detection, such as ghost imaging, can reconstruct or recognize a target scene from multiple measurements using a sequence of random mask patterns. However, the processing speed is limited by the low rate of the pattern generation. In this study, we propose an ultrafast method for random speckle pattern generation, which has the potential to overcome the limited processing speed. The proposed approach is based on multimode fiber speckles induced by fast optical phase modulation. We experimentally demonstrate dynamic speckle projection with phase modulation at 10 GHz rates, which is five to six orders of magnitude higher than conventional modulation approaches using spatial light modulators. Moreover, we combine the proposed generation approach with a wavelength-division multiplexing technique and apply it for image classification. As a proof-of-concept demonstration, we show that 28x28-pixel images of digits acquired at GHz rates can be accurately classified using a simple neural network. The proposed approach opens a novel pathway for an all-optical image processor.
summary: Imaging techniques based on single-pixel detection, such as ghost imaging, can reconstruct or recognize a target scene from multiple measurements using a sequence of random mask patterns. However, the processing speed is limited by the low rate of the pattern generation. In this study, we propose an ultrafast method for random speckle pattern generation, which has the potential to overcome the limited processing speed. The proposed approach is based on multimode fiber speckles induced by fast optical phase modulation. We experimentally demonstrate dynamic speckle projection with phase modulation at 10 GHz rates, which is five to six orders of magnitude higher than conventional modulation approaches using spatial light modulators. Moreover, we combine the proposed generation approach with a wavelength-division multiplexing technique and apply it for image classification. As a proof-of-concept demonstration, we show that 28x28-pixel images of digits acquired at GHz rates can be accurately classified using a simple neural network. The proposed approach opens a novel pathway for an all-optical image processor.
abstract_zh: 基于单像素检测的成像技术（例如重影成像）可以使用一系列随机掩模图案从多次测量中重建或识别目标场景。然而，处理速度受到模式生成率低的限制。在本研究中，我们提出了一种用于随机散斑图案生成的超快方法，该方法有可能克服有限的处理速度。所提出的方法基于快速光相位调制引起的多模光纤散斑。我们通过实验演示了在 10 GHz 速率下进行相位调制的动态散斑投影，这比使用空间光调制器的传统调制方法高出五到六个数量级。此外，我们将所提出的生成方法与波分复用技术相结合，并将其应用于图像分类。作为概念验证演示，我们展示了可以使用简单的神经网络对以 GHz 速率采集的 28x28 像素数字图像进行准确分类。所提出的方法为全光学图像处理器开辟了一条新途径。

AI.motivation: 传统单像素成像技术受限于随机掩模生成速率低，导致处理速度不足，亟需突破速度瓶颈。
AI.method: 利用多模光纤通过快速光学相位调制生成随机斑点，结合波分复用技术实现10GHz速率的动态斑点投影与图像分类。
AI.result: 实验验证了10GHz速率下28x28像素数字图像的准确分类，证明了该方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为全光图像处理器提供了全新路径，显著提升了单像素成像的处理速度。

search_text: Gigahertz-rate random speckle projection for high-speed single-pixel image classification 用于高速单像素图像分类的千兆赫率随机散斑投影 Imaging techniques based on single-pixel detection, such as ghost imaging, can reconstruct or recognize a target scene from multiple measurements using a sequence of random mask patterns. However, the processing speed is limited by the low rate of the pattern generation. In this study, we propose an ultrafast method for random speckle pattern generation, which has the potential to overcome the limited processing speed. The proposed approach is based on multimode fiber speckles induced by fast optical phase modulation. We experimentally demonstrate dynamic speckle projection with phase modulation at 10 GHz rates, which is five to six orders of magnitude higher than conventional modulation approaches using spatial light modulators. Moreover, we combine the proposed generation approach with a wavelength-division multiplexing technique and apply it for image classification. As a proof-of-concept demonstration, we show that 28x28-pixel images of digits acquired at GHz rates can be accurately classified using a simple neural network. The proposed approach opens a novel pathway for an all-optical image processor. 基于单像素检测的成像技术（例如重影成像）可以使用一系列随机掩模图案从多次测量中重建或识别目标场景。然而，处理速度受到模式生成率低的限制。在本研究中，我们提出了一种用于随机散斑图案生成的超快方法，该方法有可能克服有限的处理速度。所提出的方法基于快速光相位调制引起的多模光纤散斑。我们通过实验演示了在 10 GHz 速率下进行相位调制的动态散斑投影，这比使用空间光调制器的传统调制方法高出五到六个数量级。此外，我们将所提出的生成方法与波分复用技术相结合，并将其应用于图像分类。作为概念验证演示，我们展示了可以使用简单的神经网络对以 GHz 速率采集的 28x28 像素数字图像进行准确分类。所提出的方法为全光学图像处理器开辟了一条新途径。 本文提出了一种基于多模光纤的超高速随机斑点投影方法，用于实现单像素图像分类。 Jinsei Hanawa,Tomoaki Niiyama,Yutaka Endo,Satoshi Sunada physics.optics,cs.ET

authors_text: Hewei Liu,Renwei Yang,Shuyuan Zhu,Xing Wen,Bing Zeng
title: Luminance-Guided Chrominance Image Enhancement for HEVC Intra Coding
title_zh: HEVC 帧内编码的亮度引导色度图像增强
comment: ISCAS 2022
comments: ISCAS 2022
abstract: In this paper, we propose a luminance-guided chrominance image enhancement convolutional neural network for HEVC intra coding. Specifically, we firstly develop a gated recursive asymmetric-convolution block to restore each degraded chrominance image, which generates an intermediate output. Then, guided by the luminance image, the quality of this intermediate output is further improved, which finally produces the high-quality chrominance image. When our proposed method is adopted in the compression of color images with HEVC intra coding, it achieves 28.96% and 16.74% BD-rate gains over HEVC for the U and V images, respectively, which accordingly demonstrate its superiority.
summary: In this paper, we propose a luminance-guided chrominance image enhancement convolutional neural network for HEVC intra coding. Specifically, we firstly develop a gated recursive asymmetric-convolution block to restore each degraded chrominance image, which generates an intermediate output. Then, guided by the luminance image, the quality of this intermediate output is further improved, which finally produces the high-quality chrominance image. When our proposed method is adopted in the compression of color images with HEVC intra coding, it achieves 28.96% and 16.74% BD-rate gains over HEVC for the U and V images, respectively, which accordingly demonstrate its superiority.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 HEVC 帧内编码的亮度引导色度图像增强卷积神经网络。具体来说，我们首先开发一个门控递归非对称卷积块来恢复每个退化的色度图像，从而生成中间输出。然后，在亮度图像的引导下，进一步提高中间输出的质量，最终产生高质量的色度图像。当我们提出的方法采用 HEVC 帧内编码压缩彩色图像时，U 和 V 图像的 BD 速率分别比 HEVC 提高了 28.96% 和 16.74%，从而证明了其优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于亮度引导的色度图像增强卷积神经网络，用于HEVC帧内编码中的色度图像质量提升。
AI.motivation: HEVC帧内编码中色度分量（U/V）因压缩率较高易出现质量退化，传统方法难以有效恢复细节信息，需探索更高效的增强算法。
AI.method: 设计门控递归非对称卷积块恢复退化色度图像，通过亮度图像引导优化中间输出，最终生成高质量色度图像。
AI.result: 在HEVC压缩中，该方法使U分量BD-rate降低28.96%，V分量降低16.74%，显著优于原始HEVC性能。
AI.conclusion: 亮度引导的色度增强方法能有效提升HEVC帧内编码的色度质量，验证了该网络结构在图像压缩中的优越性。

authors_text: Subhadip Mukherjee,Andreas Hauptmann,Ozan Öktem,Marcelo Pereyra,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb
title: Learned reconstruction methods with convergence guarantees
title_zh: 学习具有收敛保证的重建方法
abstract: In recent years, deep learning has achieved remarkable empirical success for image reconstruction. This has catalyzed an ongoing quest for precise characterization of correctness and reliability of data-driven methods in critical use-cases, for instance in medical imaging. Notwithstanding the excellent performance and efficacy of deep learning-based methods, concerns have been raised regarding their stability, or lack thereof, with serious practical implications. Significant advances have been made in recent years to unravel the inner workings of data-driven image recovery methods, challenging their widely perceived black-box nature. In this article, we will specify relevant notions of convergence for data-driven image reconstruction, which will form the basis of a survey of learned methods with mathematically rigorous reconstruction guarantees. An example that is highlighted is the role of ICNN, offering the possibility to combine the power of deep learning with classical convex regularization theory for devising methods that are provably convergent. This survey article is aimed at both methodological researchers seeking to advance the frontiers of our understanding of data-driven image reconstruction methods as well as practitioners, by providing an accessible description of useful convergence concepts and by placing some of the existing empirical practices on a solid mathematical foundation.
summary: In recent years, deep learning has achieved remarkable empirical success for image reconstruction. This has catalyzed an ongoing quest for precise characterization of correctness and reliability of data-driven methods in critical use-cases, for instance in medical imaging. Notwithstanding the excellent performance and efficacy of deep learning-based methods, concerns have been raised regarding their stability, or lack thereof, with serious practical implications. Significant advances have been made in recent years to unravel the inner workings of data-driven image recovery methods, challenging their widely perceived black-box nature. In this article, we will specify relevant notions of convergence for data-driven image reconstruction, which will form the basis of a survey of learned methods with mathematically rigorous reconstruction guarantees. An example that is highlighted is the role of ICNN, offering the possibility to combine the power of deep learning with classical convex regularization theory for devising methods that are provably convergent. This survey article is aimed at both methodological researchers seeking to advance the frontiers of our understanding of data-driven image reconstruction methods as well as practitioners, by providing an accessible description of useful convergence concepts and by placing some of the existing empirical practices on a solid mathematical foundation.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度学习在图像重建方面取得了显着的实证成功。这促进了对关键用例（例如医学成像）中数据驱动方法的正确性和可靠性的精确表征的不断追求。尽管基于深度学习的方法具有出色的性能和功效，但人们对其稳定性或缺乏稳定性提出了担忧，这具有严重的实际影响。近年来，在揭示数据驱动图像恢复方法的内部工作原理方面取得了重大进展，挑战了其广泛认知的黑盒性质。在本文中，我们将详细说明数据驱动图像重建的收敛相关概念，这将构成具有数学严格重建保证的学习方法调查的基础。一个突出的例子是 ICNN 的作用，它提供了将深度学习的力量与经典凸正则化理论相结合的可能性，以设计可证明收敛的方法。这篇调查文章针对的是寻求推进我们对数据驱动图像重建方法理解前沿的方法论研究人员以及实践者，通过提供有用的收敛概念的易于理解的描述并将一些现有的经验实践置于坚实的数学基础上。

AI.tldr: 综述数据驱动图像重建方法的收敛性，结合深度学习与传统凸正则化理论，提供数学严格保证的重建方法。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在图像重建中表现优异，但其稳定性问题影响实际应用，需建立数学理论保证其可靠性，特别是在医疗影像等关键领域。
AI.method: 通过结合输入凸神经网络（ICNN）与传统凸正则化理论，构建具有数学收敛性保证的图像重建方法。
AI.result: 系统梳理了图像重建方法的收敛性概念，为现有经验方法提供了数学理论支撑，并展示了ICNN在结合深度学习与凸正则化中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为数据驱动图像重建方法的理论分析提供框架，促进其在医疗等关键领域的可靠应用，同时为未来研究指明方向。

In this article, we will specify relevant notions of convergence for data-driven image reconstruction, which will form the basis of a survey of learned methods with mathematically rigorous reconstruction guarantees. An example that is highlighted is the role of ICNN, offering the possibility to combine the power of deep learning with classical convex regularization theory for devising methods that are provably convergent. This survey article is aimed at both methodological researchers seeking to advance the frontiers of our understanding of data-driven image reconstruction methods as well as practitioners, by providing an accessible description of useful convergence concepts and by placing some of the existing empirical practices on a solid mathematical foundation. 近年来，深度学习在图像重建方面取得了显着的实证成功。这促进了对关键用例（例如医学成像）中数据驱动方法的正确性和可靠性的精确表征的不断追求。尽管基于深度学习的方法具有出色的性能和功效，但人们对其稳定性或缺乏稳定性提出了担忧，这具有严重的实际影响。近年来，在揭示数据驱动图像恢复方法的内部工作原理方面取得了重大进展，挑战了其广泛认知的黑盒性质。在本文中，我们将详细说明数据驱动图像重建的收敛相关概念，这将构成具有数学严格重建保证的学习方法调查的基础。一个突出的例子是 ICNN 的作用，它提供了将深度学习的力量与经典凸正则化理论相结合的可能性，以设计可证明收敛的方法。这篇调查文章针对的是寻求推进我们对数据驱动图像重建方法理解前沿的方法论研究人员以及实践者，通过提供有用的收敛概念的易于理解的描述并将一些现有的经验实践置于坚实的数学基础上。 综述数据驱动图像重建方法的收敛性，结合深度学习与传统凸正则化理论，提供数学严格保证的重建方法。 Subhadip Mukherjee,Andreas Hauptmann,Ozan Öktem,Marcelo Pereyra,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Sergi Fernández,Mario Montagud,Gianluca Cernigliaro,David Rincón
title: Multi-party Holomeetings: Toward a New Era of Low-Cost Volumetric Holographic Meetings in Virtual Reality
title_zh: 多方全息会议：迈向虚拟现实低成本体积全息会议的新时代
comment: 36 pages
comments: 36 pages
abstract: Fueled by advances in multi-party communications, increasingly mature immersive technologies being adopted, and the COVID-19 pandemic, a new wave of social virtual reality (VR) platforms have emerged to support socialization, interaction, and collaboration among multiple remote users who are integrated into shared virtual environments. Social VR aims to increase levels of (co-)presence and interaction quality by overcoming the limitations of 2D windowed representations in traditional multi-party video conferencing tools, although most existing solutions rely on 3D avatars to represent users. This article presents a social VR platform that supports real-time volumetric holographic representations of users that are based on point clouds captured by off-the-shelf RGB-D sensors, and it analyzes the platform's potential for conducting interactive holomeetings (i.e., holoconferencing scenarios). This work evaluates such a platform's performance and readiness for conducting meetings with up to four users, and it provides insights into aspects of the user experience when using single-camera and low-cost capture systems in scenarios with both frontal and side viewpoints. Overall, the obtained results confirm the platform's maturity and the potential of holographic communications for conducting interactive multi-party meetings, even when using low-cost systems and single-camera capture systems in scenarios where users are sitting or have a limited translational movement along the X, Y, and Z axes within the 3D virtual environment (commonly known as 3 Degrees of Freedom plus, 3DoF+)
summary: Fueled by advances in multi-party communications, increasingly mature immersive technologies being adopted, and the COVID-19 pandemic, a new wave of social virtual reality (VR) platforms have emerged to support socialization, interaction, and collaboration among multiple remote users who are integrated into shared virtual environments. Social VR aims to increase levels of (co-)presence and interaction quality by overcoming the limitations of 2D windowed representations in traditional multi-party video conferencing tools, although most existing solutions rely on 3D avatars to represent users. This article presents a social VR platform that supports real-time volumetric holographic representations of users that are based on point clouds captured by off-the-shelf RGB-D sensors, and it analyzes the platform's potential for conducting interactive holomeetings (i.e., holoconferencing scenarios). This work evaluates such a platform's performance and readiness for conducting meetings with up to four users, and it provides insights into aspects of the user experience when using single-camera and low-cost capture systems in scenarios with both frontal and side viewpoints. Overall, the obtained results confirm the platform's maturity and the potential of holographic communications for conducting interactive multi-party meetings, even when using low-cost systems and single-camera capture systems in scenarios where users are sitting or have a limited translational movement along the X, Y, and Z axes within the 3D virtual environment (commonly known as 3 Degrees of Freedom plus, 3DoF+)
abstract_zh: 在多方通信的进步、日益成熟的沉浸式技术的采用以及 COVID-19 大流行的推动下，出现了新一波社交虚拟现实 (VR) 平台，以支持集成到共享虚拟环境中的多个远程用户之间的社交、交互和协作。尽管大多数现有解决方案依赖 3D 化身来代表用户，但社交 VR 旨在​​通过克服传统多方视频会议工具中 2D 窗口表示的限制来提高（共）存在水平和交互质量。本文介绍了一个社交 VR 平台，该平台支持基于现成 RGB-D 传感器捕获的点云的用户实时体积全息表示，并分析了该平台进行交互式全息会议（即全息会议场景）的潜力。这项工作评估了此类平台的性能和与最多四名用户举行会议的准备情况，并提供了在具有正面和侧面视点的场景中使用单摄像头和低成本捕获系统时用户体验的各个方面的见解。总体而言，所获得的结果证实了该平台的成熟度以及全息通信在进行交互式多方会议方面的潜力，即使在用户坐着或在 3D 虚拟环境中沿 X、Y 和 Z 轴进行有限平移运动的情况下使用低成本系统和单摄像头捕获系统时也是如此（通常称为 3 自由度+，3DoF+）

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于低成本单摄像头和RGB-D传感器的社交VR平台，支持多用户实时体感全息会议，并验证其可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统视频会议受限于2D画面，现有VR方案依赖3D化身，难以提供自然沉浸感。疫情推动远程协作需求，需探索低成本高效全息通信方案。
AI.method: 利用商用RGB-D传感器捕获点云生成用户体感全息影像，构建支持4人会议的VR平台，通过单摄像头系统测试不同视角下的交互体验。
AI.result: 实验表明平台可稳定支持4人全息会议，单摄像头系统在有限移动范围内（3DoF+）能提供可接受的沉浸感和交互质量。
AI.conclusion: 低成本全息通信技术已具备开展多用户VR会议的成熟度，为未来远程协作提供了更具沉浸感的解决方案。
