authors_text: Zecheng Yu,Yifei Huang,Ryosuke Furuta,Takuma Yagi,Yusuke Goutsu,Yoichi Sato
title: Precise Affordance Annotation for Egocentric Action Video Datasets
title_zh: 以自我为中心的动作视频数据集的精确可供性注释
comment: Technical report for CVPR 2022 EPIC-Ego4D Workshop
comments: Technical report for CVPR 2022 EPIC-Ego4D Workshop
abstract: Object affordance is an important concept in human-object interaction, providing information on action possibilities based on human motor capacity and objects' physical property thus benefiting tasks such as action anticipation and robot imitation learning. However, existing datasets often: 1) mix up affordance with object functionality; 2) confuse affordance with goal-related action; and 3) ignore human motor capacity. This paper proposes an efficient annotation scheme to address these issues by combining goal-irrelevant motor actions and grasp types as affordance labels and introducing the concept of mechanical action to represent the action possibilities between two objects. We provide new annotations by applying this scheme to the EPIC-KITCHENS dataset and test our annotation with tasks such as affordance recognition. We qualitatively verify that models trained with our annotation can distinguish affordance and mechanical actions.
summary: Object affordance is an important concept in human-object interaction, providing information on action possibilities based on human motor capacity and objects' physical property thus benefiting tasks such as action anticipation and robot imitation learning. However, existing datasets often: 1) mix up affordance with object functionality; 2) confuse affordance with goal-related action; and 3) ignore human motor capacity. This paper proposes an efficient annotation scheme to address these issues by combining goal-irrelevant motor actions and grasp types as affordance labels and introducing the concept of mechanical action to represent the action possibilities between two objects. We provide new annotations by applying this scheme to the EPIC-KITCHENS dataset and test our annotation with tasks such as affordance recognition. We qualitatively verify that models trained with our annotation can distinguish affordance and mechanical actions.
abstract_zh: 物体可供性是人与物体交互中的一个重要概念，它根据人类运动能力和物体的物理属性提供有关动作可能性的信息，从而有利于动作预期和机器人模仿学习等任务。然而，现有的数据集经常：1）将可供性与对象功能混合在一起； 2）混淆可供性与目标相关的行动； 3）忽略人体运动能力。本文提出了一种有效的注释方案来解决这些问题，将与目标无关的运动动作和抓握类型结合起来作为可供性标签，并引入机械动作的概念来表示两个对象之间的动作可能性。我们通过将此方案应用于 EPIC-KITCHENS 数据集来提供新的注释，并通过功能可见性识别等任务测试我们的注释。我们定性地验证使用我们的注释训练的模型可以区分可供性和机械动作。

AI.tldr: 提出一种精确标注第一人称动作视频数据集中物体可操作性的方法，解决现有数据集存在的混淆问题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集混淆可操作性与物体功能、目标相关动作，并忽略人类运动能力，导致模型难以准确识别动作可能性。
AI.method: 结合目标无关的运动动作和抓取类型作为可操作性标签，引入机械动作概念表示物体间动作可能性，并应用于EPIC-KITCHENS数据集进行标注。
AI.result: 通过可操作性识别任务验证，使用新标注训练的模型能有效区分可操作性与机械动作。
AI.conclusion: 新标注方案有效解决现有数据集问题，提升动作识别模型性能。

authors_text: Hiroki Ito,AprilPyone MaungMaung,Sayaka Shiota,Hitoshi Kiya
title: Access Control of Semantic Segmentation Models Using Encrypted Feature Maps
title_zh: 使用加密特征图的语义分割模型的访问控制
abstract: In this paper, we propose an access control method with a secret key for semantic segmentation models for the first time so that unauthorized users without a secret key cannot benefit from the performance of trained models. The method enables us not only to provide a high segmentation performance to authorized users but to also degrade the performance for unauthorized users. We first point out that, for the application of semantic segmentation, conventional access control methods which use encrypted images for classification tasks are not directly applicable due to performance degradation. Accordingly, in this paper, selected feature maps are encrypted with a secret key for training and testing models, instead of input images. In an experiment, the protected models allowed authorized users to obtain almost the same performance as that of non-protected models but also with robustness against unauthorized access without a key.
summary: In this paper, we propose an access control method with a secret key for semantic segmentation models for the first time so that unauthorized users without a secret key cannot benefit from the performance of trained models. The method enables us not only to provide a high segmentation performance to authorized users but to also degrade the performance for unauthorized users. We first point out that, for the application of semantic segmentation, conventional access control methods which use encrypted images for classification tasks are not directly applicable due to performance degradation. Accordingly, in this paper, selected feature maps are encrypted with a secret key for training and testing models, instead of input images. In an experiment, the protected models allowed authorized users to obtain almost the same performance as that of non-protected models but also with robustness against unauthorized access without a key.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们首次提出了一种用于语义分割模型的带有密钥的访问控制方法，使得没有密钥的未经授权的用户无法从训练模型的性能中受益。该方法使我们不仅能够为授权用户提供高分段性能，而且还能降低未授权用户的性能。我们首先指出，对于语义分割的应用，使用加密图像进行分类任务的传统访问控制方法由于性能下降而无法直接应用。因此，在本文中，使用秘密密钥对选定的特征图（而不是输入图像）进行加密，以用于训练和测试模型。在实验中，受保护的模型允许授权用户获得与非受保护模型几乎相同的性能，而且还具有鲁棒性，可以防止未经密钥的未经授权的访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于加密特征图的语义分割模型访问控制方法，通过秘密密钥确保未经授权的用户无法利用模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统分类任务中通过加密输入图像实现访问控制的方法会导致语义分割性能显著下降，需寻找新的保护机制。
AI.method: 在训练和测试阶段对选定的特征图而非输入图像进行加密，结合秘密密钥实现访问控制。
AI.result: 保护后的模型对授权用户保持接近原始模型的高性能，同时有效抵御无密钥用户的非法访问。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保障模型性能的同时实现了有效的访问控制，为语义分割模型的安全性提供了新解决方案。

search_text: Access Control of Semantic Segmentation Models Using Encrypted Feature Maps 使用加密特征图的语义分割模型的访问控制 In this paper, we propose an access control method with a secret key for semantic segmentation models for the first time so that unauthorized users without a secret key cannot benefit from the performance of trained models. The method enables us not only to provide a high segmentation performance to authorized users but to also degrade the performance for unauthorized users. We first point out that, for the application of semantic segmentation, conventional access control methods which use encrypted images for classification tasks are not directly applicable due to performance degradation. Accordingly, in this paper, selected feature maps are encrypted with a secret key for training and testing models, instead of input images. In an experiment, the protected models allowed authorized users to obtain almost the same performance as that of non-protected models but also with robustness against unauthorized access without a key. 在本文中，我们首次提出了一种用于语义分割模型的带有密钥的访问控制方法，使得没有密钥的未经授权的用户无法从训练模型的性能中受益。该方法使我们不仅能够为授权用户提供高分段性能，而且还能降低未授权用户的性能。我们首先指出，对于语义分割的应用，使用加密图像进行分类任务的传统访问控制方法由于性能下降而无法直接应用。因此，在本文中，使用秘密密钥对选定的特征图（而不是输入图像）进行加密，以用于训练和测试模型。在实验中，受保护的模型允许授权用户获得与非受保护模型几乎相同的性能，而且还具有鲁棒性，可以防止未经密钥的未经授权的访问。 本文提出一种基于加密特征图的语义分割模型访问控制方法，通过秘密密钥确保未经授权的用户无法利用模型性能。 Hiroki Ito,AprilPyone MaungMaung,Sayaka Shiota,Hitoshi Kiya cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Wai-Yin Lam,Bryan Andrews,Joseph Ramsey
title: Greedy Relaxations of the Sparsest Permutation Algorithm
title_zh: 最稀疏排列算法的贪心松弛
comment: 36 pages, 16 figures, 4 tables, 2 algorithms, accepted, UAI (Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence) 2022
comments: 36 pages, 16 figures, 4 tables, 2 algorithms, accepted, UAI (Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence) 2022
abstract: There has been an increasing interest in methods that exploit permutation reasoning to search for directed acyclic causal models, including the "Ordering Search" of Teyssier and Kohler and GSP of Solus, Wang and Uhler. We extend the methods of the latter by a permutation-based operation, tuck, and develop a class of algorithms, namely GRaSP, that are efficient and pointwise consistent under increasingly weaker assumptions than faithfulness. The most relaxed form of GRaSP outperforms many state-of-the-art causal search algorithms in simulation, allowing efficient and accurate search even for dense graphs and graphs with more than 100 variables.
summary: There has been an increasing interest in methods that exploit permutation reasoning to search for directed acyclic causal models, including the "Ordering Search" of Teyssier and Kohler and GSP of Solus, Wang and Uhler. We extend the methods of the latter by a permutation-based operation, tuck, and develop a class of algorithms, namely GRaSP, that are efficient and pointwise consistent under increasingly weaker assumptions than faithfulness. The most relaxed form of GRaSP outperforms many state-of-the-art causal search algorithms in simulation, allowing efficient and accurate search even for dense graphs and graphs with more than 100 variables.
abstract_zh: 人们对利用排列推理来搜索有向非循环因果模型的方法越来越感兴趣，包括 Teyssier 和 Kohler 的“排序搜索”以及 Solus、Wang 和 Uhler 的 GSP。我们通过基于排列的操作 tuck 扩展了后者的方法，并开发了一类算法，即 GRaSP，它在比忠实度越来越弱的假设下是高效且点一致的。 GRaSP 最宽松的形式在模拟中优于许多最先进的因果搜索算法，即使对于密集图和具有 100 多个变量的图也能进行高效、准确的搜索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于排列的贪婪松弛算法GRaSP，用于在更弱假设下高效搜索有向无环因果模型。
AI.motivation: 现有因果搜索算法依赖较强假设（如忠实性），难以处理密集图或大规模变量场景，需更灵活的方法。
AI.method: 通过引入排列操作'tuck'，开发GRaSP算法类，在保持点一致性的同时放宽假设条件。
AI.result: GRaSP在模拟实验中超越多种前沿算法，尤其在密集图和超100变量场景下展现高效性与准确性。
AI.conclusion: GRaSP为因果发现提供了在弱假设下处理复杂结构的新范式，扩展了现有方法的适用边界。

authors_text: Sujia Zhu,Yue Shen,Zihao Zhu,Wang Xia,Baofeng Chang,Ronghua Liang,Guodao Sun
title: VAC2: Visual Analysis of Combined Causality in Event Sequences
title_zh: VAC2：事件序列中组合因果关系的可视化分析
abstract: Identifying causality behind complex systems plays a significant role in different domains, such as decision making, policy implementations, and management recommendations. However, existing causality studies on temporal event sequences data mainly focus on individual causal discovery, which is incapable of exploiting combined causality. To fill the absence of combined causes discovery on temporal event sequence data,eliminating and recruiting principles are defined to balance the effectiveness and controllability on cause combinations. We also leverage the Granger causality algorithm based on the reactive point processes to describe impelling or inhibiting behavior patterns among entities. In addition, we design an informative and aesthetic visual metaphor of "electrocircuit" to encode aggregated causality for ensuring our causality visualization is non-overlapping and non-intersecting. Diverse sorting strategies and aggregation layout are also embedded into our parallel-based, directed and weighted hypergraph for illustrating combined causality. Our developed combined causality visual analysis system can help users effectively explore combined causes as well as an individual cause. This interactive system supports multi-level causality exploration with diverse ordering strategies and a focus and context technique to help users obtain different levels of information abstraction. The usefulness and effectiveness of the system are further evaluated by conducting a pilot user study and two case studies on event sequence data.
summary: Identifying causality behind complex systems plays a significant role in different domains, such as decision making, policy implementations, and management recommendations. However, existing causality studies on temporal event sequences data mainly focus on individual causal discovery, which is incapable of exploiting combined causality. To fill the absence of combined causes discovery on temporal event sequence data,eliminating and recruiting principles are defined to balance the effectiveness and controllability on cause combinations. We also leverage the Granger causality algorithm based on the reactive point processes to describe impelling or inhibiting behavior patterns among entities. In addition, we design an informative and aesthetic visual metaphor of "electrocircuit" to encode aggregated causality for ensuring our causality visualization is non-overlapping and non-intersecting. Diverse sorting strategies and aggregation layout are also embedded into our parallel-based, directed and weighted hypergraph for illustrating combined causality. Our developed combined causality visual analysis system can help users effectively explore combined causes as well as an individual cause. This interactive system supports multi-level causality exploration with diverse ordering strategies and a focus and context technique to help users obtain different levels of information abstraction. The usefulness and effectiveness of the system are further evaluated by conducting a pilot user study and two case studies on event sequence data.
abstract_zh: 识别复杂系统背后的因果关系在决策、政策实施和管理建议等不同领域发挥着重要作用。然而，现有的时间事件序列数据的因果关系研究主要集中在个体因果发现上，无法利用组合因果关系。针对时间事件序列数据组合原因发现的不足，定义消除原则和补充原则，以平衡原因组合的有效性和可控性。我们还利用基于反应点过程的格兰杰因果关系算法来描述实体之间的推动或抑制行为模式。此外，我们设计了一种信息丰富且美观的“电路”视觉隐喻来编码聚合因果关系，以确保我们的因果关系可视化不重叠和不相交。多样化的排序策略和聚合布局也嵌入到我们基于并行、有向和加权的超图中，以说明组合因果关系。我们开发的组合因果关系可视化分析系统可以帮助用户有效地探索组合原因以及个体原因。该交互式系统支持多层次因果关系探索，具有多种排序策略以及焦点和上下文技术，可帮助用户获得不同级别的信息抽象。通过对事件序列数据进行试点用户研究和两个案例研究，进一步评估了该系统的实用性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VAC2系统，用于对事件序列中的组合因果关系进行可视化分析，解决现有方法无法有效探索组合因果关系的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有时间事件序列的因果性研究主要关注单个因果发现，无法挖掘组合因果关系，而组合因果分析对决策制定和政策实施具有重要意义。
AI.method: 定义消除与招募原则平衡组合因果的有效性与可控性，结合Granger因果算法与反应点过程描述实体间行为模式，设计非重叠的电电路隐喻可视化方案，并嵌入多级排序策略与聚合布局的有向加权超图。
AI.result: 开发的VAC2系统支持多级因果探索，通过用户研究和两个案例验证了其在事件序列数据中的实用性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: VAC2系统通过创新的可视化方法和交互设计，有效支持了组合因果与单个因果的探索，为复杂系统分析提供了新工具。

Our developed combined causality visual analysis system can help users effectively explore combined causes as well as an individual cause. This interactive system supports multi-level causality exploration with diverse ordering strategies and a focus and context technique to help users obtain different levels of information abstraction. The usefulness and effectiveness of the system are further evaluated by conducting a pilot user study and two case studies on event sequence data. 识别复杂系统背后的因果关系在决策、政策实施和管理建议等不同领域发挥着重要作用。然而，现有的时间事件序列数据的因果关系研究主要集中在个体因果发现上，无法利用组合因果关系。针对时间事件序列数据组合原因发现的不足，定义消除原则和补充原则，以平衡原因组合的有效性和可控性。我们还利用基于反应点过程的格兰杰因果关系算法来描述实体之间的推动或抑制行为模式。此外，我们设计了一种信息丰富且美观的“电路”视觉隐喻来编码聚合因果关系，以确保我们的因果关系可视化不重叠和不相交。多样化的排序策略和聚合布局也嵌入到我们基于并行、有向和加权的超图中，以说明组合因果关系。我们开发的组合因果关系可视化分析系统可以帮助用户有效地探索组合原因以及个体原因。该交互式系统支持多层次因果关系探索，具有多种排序策略以及焦点和上下文技术，可帮助用户获得不同级别的信息抽象。通过对事件序列数据进行试点用户研究和两个案例研究，进一步评估了该系统的实用性和有效性。 本文提出VAC2系统，用于对事件序列中的组合因果关系进行可视化分析，解决现有方法无法有效探索组合因果关系的问题。 Sujia Zhu,Yue Shen,Zihao Zhu,Wang Xia,Baofeng Chang,Ronghua Liang,Guodao Sun cs.CV

authors_text: Yatao Li,Jianfeng Zhan
title: SAIBench: Benchmarking AI for Science
title_zh: SAIBench：科学人工智能基准测试
comment: Published in BenchCouncil Transactions on Benchmarks, Standards and Evaluations (TBench)
comments: Published in BenchCouncil Transactions on Benchmarks, Standards and Evaluations (TBench)
abstract: Scientific research communities are embracing AI-based solutions to target tractable scientific tasks and improve research workflows. However, the development and evaluation of such solutions are scattered across multiple disciplines. We formalize the problem of scientific AI benchmarking, and propose a system called SAIBench in the hope of unifying the efforts and enabling low-friction on-boarding of new disciplines. The system approaches this goal with SAIL, a domain-specific language to decouple research problems, AI models, ranking criteria, and software/hardware configuration into reusable modules. We show that this approach is flexible and can adapt to problems, AI models, and evaluation methods defined in different perspectives. The project homepage is https://www.computercouncil.org/SAIBench
summary: Scientific research communities are embracing AI-based solutions to target tractable scientific tasks and improve research workflows. However, the development and evaluation of such solutions are scattered across multiple disciplines. We formalize the problem of scientific AI benchmarking, and propose a system called SAIBench in the hope of unifying the efforts and enabling low-friction on-boarding of new disciplines. The system approaches this goal with SAIL, a domain-specific language to decouple research problems, AI models, ranking criteria, and software/hardware configuration into reusable modules. We show that this approach is flexible and can adapt to problems, AI models, and evaluation methods defined in different perspectives. The project homepage is https://www.computercouncil.org/SAIBench
abstract_zh: 科学研究界正在采用基于人工智能的解决方案来解决易于处理的科学任务并改善研究工作流程。然而，此类解决方案的开发和评估分散在多个学科中。我们将科学的人工智能基准测试问题正式化，并提出了一个名为 SAIBench 的系统，希望能够统一努力并实现新学科的低摩擦。该系统使用 SAIL 来实现这一目标，SAIL 是一种特定领域语言，可将研究问题、AI 模型、排名标准和软件/硬件配置解耦为可重用模块。我们证明了这种方法是灵活的，可以适应不同角度定义的问题、人工智能模型和评估方法。项目主页是 https://www.computercouncil.org/SAIBench

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAIBench系统，旨在统一科学领域AI解决方案的基准测试，通过模块化设计促进跨学科研究。
AI.motivation: 当前科学AI的发展和评估分散在不同学科，缺乏统一标准和低摩擦的跨领域协作框架。
AI.method: 设计SAIL领域特定语言，将科学问题、AI模型、评估指标及软硬件配置解耦为可复用模块。
AI.result: 验证了该方法在适应不同科学问题、模型和评估方法上的灵活性与可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: SAIBench为科学AI基准测试提供了统一框架，可降低新学科接入门槛并促进跨领域协作。

authors_text: Jia Li,Yongfeng Huang,Heng Chang,Yu Rong
title: Semi-Supervised Hierarchical Graph Classification
title_zh: 半监督层次图分类
comment: Accepted by TPAMI. Journal extension of arXiv:1904.05003
comments: Accepted by TPAMI. Journal extension of arXiv:1904.05003
abstract: Node classification and graph classification are two graph learning problems that predict the class label of a node and the class label of a graph respectively. A node of a graph usually represents a real-world entity, e.g., a user in a social network, or a document in a document citation network. In this work, we consider a more challenging but practically useful setting, in which a node itself is a graph instance. This leads to a hierarchical graph perspective which arises in many domains such as social network, biological network and document collection. We study the node classification problem in the hierarchical graph where a 'node' is a graph instance. As labels are usually limited, we design a novel semi-supervised solution named SEAL-CI. SEAL-CI adopts an iterative framework that takes turns to update two modules, one working at the graph instance level and the other at the hierarchical graph level. To enforce a consistency among different levels of hierarchical graph, we propose the Hierarchical Graph Mutual Information (HGMI) and further present a way to compute HGMI with theoretical guarantee. We demonstrate the effectiveness of this hierarchical graph modeling and the proposed SEAL-CI method on text and social network data.
summary: Node classification and graph classification are two graph learning problems that predict the class label of a node and the class label of a graph respectively. A node of a graph usually represents a real-world entity, e.g., a user in a social network, or a document in a document citation network. In this work, we consider a more challenging but practically useful setting, in which a node itself is a graph instance. This leads to a hierarchical graph perspective which arises in many domains such as social network, biological network and document collection. We study the node classification problem in the hierarchical graph where a 'node' is a graph instance. As labels are usually limited, we design a novel semi-supervised solution named SEAL-CI. SEAL-CI adopts an iterative framework that takes turns to update two modules, one working at the graph instance level and the other at the hierarchical graph level. To enforce a consistency among different levels of hierarchical graph, we propose the Hierarchical Graph Mutual Information (HGMI) and further present a way to compute HGMI with theoretical guarantee. We demonstrate the effectiveness of this hierarchical graph modeling and the proposed SEAL-CI method on text and social network data.
abstract_zh: 节点分类和图分类是两个图学习问题，分别预测节点的类标签和图的类标签。图的节点通常代表现实世界的实体，例如社交网络中的用户或文档引用网络中的文档。在这项工作中，我们考虑了一个更具挑战性但实际上有用的设置，其中节点本身是一个图实例。这导致了在社交网络、生物网络和文档收集等许多领域中出现的层次图视角。我们研究层次图中的节点分类问题，其中“节点”是图实例。由于标签通常是有限的，我们设计了一种新颖的半监督解决方案，名为 SEAL-CI。 SEAL-CI采用迭代框架，轮流更新两个模块，一个在图实例级别工作，另一个在层次图级别工作。为了保证不同层次的层次图之间的一致性，我们提出了层次图互信息（HGMI），并进一步提出了一种在理论保证下计算 HGMI 的方法。我们证明了这种层次图建模和所提出的 SEAL-CI 方法在文本和社交网络数据上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督分层图分类方法SEAL-CI，用于处理节点本身为图实例的分层图结构分类问题。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中节点常包含复杂子结构（如社交网络用户关系、文档引用网络），但标注数据稀缺，需设计能利用分层结构信息的半监督学习方法。
AI.method: 构建迭代框架交替更新图实例层和分层图层模块，提出分层图互信息（HGMI）度量并保证理论计算有效性。
AI.result: 在文本和社交网络数据集上验证了分层图建模和SEAL-CI方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SEAL-CI通过分层结构建模和互信息约束，在标注数据有限情况下显著提升了分层图分类性能。

authors_text: Curtis Hawthorne,Ian Simon,Adam Roberts,Neil Zeghidour,Josh Gardner,Ethan Manilow,Jesse Engel
title: Multi-instrument Music Synthesis with Spectrogram Diffusion
title_zh: 具有频谱图扩散的多乐器音乐合成
abstract: An ideal music synthesizer should be both interactive and expressive, generating high-fidelity audio in realtime for arbitrary combinations of instruments and notes. Recent neural synthesizers have exhibited a tradeoff between domain-specific models that offer detailed control of only specific instruments, or raw waveform models that can train on any music but with minimal control and slow generation. In this work, we focus on a middle ground of neural synthesizers that can generate audio from MIDI sequences with arbitrary combinations of instruments in realtime. This enables training on a wide range of transcription datasets with a single model, which in turn offers note-level control of composition and instrumentation across a wide range of instruments. We use a simple two-stage process: MIDI to spectrograms with an encoder-decoder Transformer, then spectrograms to audio with a generative adversarial network (GAN) spectrogram inverter. We compare training the decoder as an autoregressive model and as a Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM) and find that the DDPM approach is superior both qualitatively and as measured by audio reconstruction and Fréchet distance metrics. Given the interactivity and generality of this approach, we find this to be a promising first step towards interactive and expressive neural synthesis for arbitrary combinations of instruments and notes.
summary: An ideal music synthesizer should be both interactive and expressive, generating high-fidelity audio in realtime for arbitrary combinations of instruments and notes. Recent neural synthesizers have exhibited a tradeoff between domain-specific models that offer detailed control of only specific instruments, or raw waveform models that can train on any music but with minimal control and slow generation. In this work, we focus on a middle ground of neural synthesizers that can generate audio from MIDI sequences with arbitrary combinations of instruments in realtime. This enables training on a wide range of transcription datasets with a single model, which in turn offers note-level control of composition and instrumentation across a wide range of instruments. We use a simple two-stage process: MIDI to spectrograms with an encoder-decoder Transformer, then spectrograms to audio with a generative adversarial network (GAN) spectrogram inverter. We compare training the decoder as an autoregressive model and as a Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM) and find that the DDPM approach is superior both qualitatively and as measured by audio reconstruction and Fréchet distance metrics. Given the interactivity and generality of this approach, we find this to be a promising first step towards interactive and expressive neural synthesis for arbitrary combinations of instruments and notes.
abstract_zh: 理想的音乐合成器应该具有交互性和表现力，能够为乐器和音符的任意组合实时生成高保真音频。最近的神经合成器在特定领域模型和原始波形模型之间进行了权衡，特定领域模型仅提供对特定乐器的详细控制，而原始波形模型可以在任何音乐上进行训练，但控制最少且生成速度较慢。在这项工作中，我们专注于神经合成器的中间立场，它可以通过任意乐器组合实时从 MIDI 序列生成音频。这使得能够使用单一模型对各种转录数据集进行训练，从而提供跨各种乐器的作曲和乐器的音符级控制。我们使用一个简单的两阶段过程：使用编码器-解码器 Transformer 将 MIDI 转换为频谱图，然后使用生成对抗网络 (GAN) 频谱图逆变器将频谱图转换为音频。我们将解码器训练为自回归模型和去噪扩散概率模型 (DDPM) 进行比较，发现 DDPM 方法在质量上以及通过音频重建和 Fréchet 距离度量来衡量都更优越。考虑到这种方法的交互性和通用性，我们发现这是朝着乐器和音符的任意组合的交互式和表达性神经合成迈出的有希望的第一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于频谱扩散的多乐器音乐合成方法，通过MIDI序列实时生成任意乐器组合的高质量音频。
AI.motivation: 现有神经合成器存在领域专用模型控制精细但泛化差，或波形模型泛化好但控制弱且生成慢的矛盾，需寻找兼顾实时性、表达力和泛化的中间方案。
AI.method: 采用两阶段流程：MIDI到频谱使用编码器-解码器Transformer，频谱到音频使用GAN频谱逆变换器；对比自回归模型与去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM），最终采用DDPM方案。
AI.result: DDPM方法在音频重建质量和Fréchet距离指标上优于自回归模型，实现跨乐器的音符级控制与实时生成。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为实现任意乐器组合的交互式、高表达力神经合成提供了有效途径。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于频谱扩散的多乐器音乐合成方法，通过MIDI序列实时生成任意乐器组合的高质量音频。
ai_content.motivation: 现有神经合成器存在领域专用模型控制精细但泛化差，或波形模型泛化好但控制弱且生成慢的矛盾，需寻找兼顾实时性、表达力和泛化的中间方案。
ai_content.method: 采用两阶段流程：MIDI到频谱使用编码器-解码器Transformer，频谱到音频使用GAN频谱逆变换器；对比自回归模型与去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM），最终采用DDPM方案。
ai_content.result: DDPM方法在音频重建质量和Fréchet距离指标上优于自回归模型，实现跨乐器的音符级控制与实时生成。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为实现任意乐器组合的交互式、高表达力神经合成提供了有效途径。

search_text: Multi-instrument Music Synthesis with Spectrogram Diffusion 具有频谱图扩散的多乐器音乐合成 An ideal music synthesizer should be both interactive and expressive, generating high-fidelity audio in realtime for arbitrary combinations of instruments and notes. Recent neural synthesizers have exhibited a tradeoff between domain-specific models that offer detailed control of only specific instruments, or raw waveform models that can train on any music but with minimal control and slow generation. In this work, we focus on a middle ground of neural synthesizers that can generate audio from MIDI sequences with arbitrary combinations of instruments in realtime. This enables training on a wide range of transcription datasets with a single model, which in turn offers note-level control of composition and instrumentation across a wide range of instruments. We use a simple two-stage process: MIDI to spectrograms with an encoder-decoder Transformer, then spectrograms to audio with a generative adversarial network (GAN) spectrogram inverter. We compare training the decoder as an autoregressive model and as a Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM) and find that the DDPM approach is superior both qualitatively and as measured by audio reconstruction and Fréchet distance metrics. Given the interactivity and generality of this approach, we find this to be a promising first step towards interactive and expressive neural synthesis for arbitrary combinations of instruments and notes. 理想的音乐合成器应该具有交互性和表现力，能够为乐器和音符的任意组合实时生成高保真音频。最近的神经合成器在特定领域模型和原始波形模型之间进行了权衡，特定领域模型仅提供对特定乐器的详细控制，而原始波形模型可以在任何音乐上进行训练，但控制最少且生成速度较慢。在这项工作中，我们专注于神经合成器的中间立场，它可以通过任意乐器组合实时从 MIDI 序列生成音频。这使得能够使用单一模型对各种转录数据集进行训练，从而提供跨各种乐器的作曲和乐器的音符级控制。我们使用一个简单的两阶段过程：使用编码器-解码器 Transformer 将 MIDI 转换为频谱图，然后使用生成对抗网络 (GAN) 频谱图逆变器将频谱图转换为音频。我们将解码器训练为自回归模型和去噪扩散概率模型 (DDPM) 进行比较，发现 DDPM 方法在质量上以及通过音频重建和 Fréchet 距离度量来衡量都更优越。考虑到这种方法的交互性和通用性，我们发现这是朝着乐器和音符的任意组合的交互式和表达性神经合成迈出的有希望的第一步。 本文提出一种基于频谱扩散的多乐器音乐合成方法，通过MIDI序列实时生成任意乐器组合的高质量音频。 Curtis Hawthorne,Ian Simon,Adam Roberts,Neil Zeghidour,Josh Gardner,Ethan Manilow,Jesse Engel cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Jinyin Chen,Mingjun Li,Tao Liu,Haibin Zheng,Yao Cheng,Changting Lin
title: Rethinking the Defense Against Free-rider Attack From the Perspective of Model Weight Evolving Frequency
title_zh: 从模型权值演化频率角度重新思考搭便车攻击防御
abstract: Federated learning (FL) is a distributed machine learning approach where multiple clients collaboratively train a joint model without exchanging their data. Despite FL's unprecedented success in data privacy-preserving, its vulnerability to free-rider attacks has attracted increasing attention. Existing defenses may be ineffective against highly camouflaged or high percentages of free riders. To address these challenges, we reconsider the defense from a novel perspective, i.e., model weight evolving frequency.Empirically, we gain a novel insight that during the FL's training, the model weight evolving frequency of free-riders and that of benign clients are significantly different. Inspired by this insight, we propose a novel defense method based on the model Weight Evolving Frequency, referred to as WEF-Defense.Specifically, we first collect the weight evolving frequency (defined as WEF-Matrix) during local training. For each client, it uploads the local model's WEF-Matrix to the server together with its model weight for each iteration. The server then separates free-riders from benign clients based on the difference in the WEF-Matrix. Finally, the server uses a personalized approach to provide different global models for corresponding clients. Comprehensive experiments conducted on five datasets and five models demonstrate that WEF-Defense achieves better defense effectiveness than the state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Federated learning (FL) is a distributed machine learning approach where multiple clients collaboratively train a joint model without exchanging their data. Despite FL's unprecedented success in data privacy-preserving, its vulnerability to free-rider attacks has attracted increasing attention. Existing defenses may be ineffective against highly camouflaged or high percentages of free riders. To address these challenges, we reconsider the defense from a novel perspective, i.e., model weight evolving frequency.Empirically, we gain a novel insight that during the FL's training, the model weight evolving frequency of free-riders and that of benign clients are significantly different. Inspired by this insight, we propose a novel defense method based on the model Weight Evolving Frequency, referred to as WEF-Defense.Specifically, we first collect the weight evolving frequency (defined as WEF-Matrix) during local training. For each client, it uploads the local model's WEF-Matrix to the server together with its model weight for each iteration. The server then separates free-riders from benign clients based on the difference in the WEF-Matrix. Finally, the server uses a personalized approach to provide different global models for corresponding clients. Comprehensive experiments conducted on five datasets and five models demonstrate that WEF-Defense achieves better defense effectiveness than the state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 是一种分布式机器学习方法，多个客户端在不交换数据的情况下协作训练联合​​模型。尽管 FL 在数据隐私保护方面取得了前所未有的成功，但其搭便车攻击的脆弱性引起了越来越多的关注。现有的防御措施可能对高度伪装或高比例的搭便车者无效。为了应对这些挑战，我们从一个新的角度重新考虑防御，即模型权重演化频率。根据经验，我们获得了一个新的见解：在 FL 的训练过程中，搭便车者和良性客户的模型权重演化频率显着不同。受此启发，我们提出了一种基于模型权重演化频率的新颖防御方法，称为WEF-Defense。具体来说，我们首先在本地训练期间收集权重演化频率（定义为WEF-Matrix）。对于每个客户端，它将本地模型的 WEF 矩阵及其每次迭代的模型权重上传到服务器。然后，服务器根据 WEF 矩阵的差异将搭便车者与良性客户端分开。最后，服务器采用个性化的方式为相应的客户端提供不同的全局模型。对五个数据集和五个模型进行的综合实验表明，WEF-Defense 比最先进的基线实现了更好的防御效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模型权重演化频率的新型防御方法（WEF-Defense），用于应对联邦学习中的搭便车攻击问题。
AI.motivation: 现有防御方法难以有效应对高度伪装或高比例的搭便车攻击，需从模型权重演化频率的新视角重新考虑防御策略。
AI.method: 通过收集客户端本地训练中的权重演化频率矩阵（WEF-Matrix），服务器根据该矩阵差异区分搭便车者与正常客户端，并为其提供个性化全局模型。
AI.result: 在五个数据集和五个模型上的实验表明，WEF-Defense在防御效果上优于现有最先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文从模型权重演化频率角度提出的新防御框架，为联邦学习中的安全问题提供了有效解决方案和新研究方向。

authors_text: Zhibin Bao,Sabir Hossain,Haoxiang Lang,Xianke Lin
title: High-Definition Map Generation Technologies For Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 自动驾驶高清地图生成技术
comment: 25 pages, 17 figures, submitted to a journal
comments: 25 pages, 17 figures, submitted to a journal
abstract: Autonomous driving has been among the most popular and challenging topics in the past few years. On the road to achieving full autonomy, researchers have utilized various sensors, such as LiDAR, camera, Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU), and GPS, and developed intelligent algorithms for autonomous driving applications such as object detection, object segmentation, obstacle avoidance, and path planning. High-definition (HD) maps have drawn lots of attention in recent years. Because of the high precision and informative level of HD maps in localization, it has immediately become one of the critical components of autonomous driving. From big organizations like Baidu Apollo, NVIDIA, and TomTom to individual researchers, researchers have created HD maps for different scenes and purposes for autonomous driving. It is necessary to review the state-of-the-art methods for HD map generation. This paper reviews recent HD map generation technologies that leverage both 2D and 3D map generation. This review introduces the concept of HD maps and their usefulness in autonomous driving and gives a detailed overview of HD map generation techniques. We will also discuss the limitations of the current HD map generation technologies to motivate future research.
summary: Autonomous driving has been among the most popular and challenging topics in the past few years. On the road to achieving full autonomy, researchers have utilized various sensors, such as LiDAR, camera, Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU), and GPS, and developed intelligent algorithms for autonomous driving applications such as object detection, object segmentation, obstacle avoidance, and path planning. High-definition (HD) maps have drawn lots of attention in recent years. Because of the high precision and informative level of HD maps in localization, it has immediately become one of the critical components of autonomous driving. From big organizations like Baidu Apollo, NVIDIA, and TomTom to individual researchers, researchers have created HD maps for different scenes and purposes for autonomous driving. It is necessary to review the state-of-the-art methods for HD map generation. This paper reviews recent HD map generation technologies that leverage both 2D and 3D map generation. This review introduces the concept of HD maps and their usefulness in autonomous driving and gives a detailed overview of HD map generation techniques. We will also discuss the limitations of the current HD map generation technologies to motivate future research.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶一直是过去几年最热门和最具挑战性的话题之一。在实现完全自动驾驶的道路上，研究人员利用激光雷达、摄像头、惯性测量单元（IMU）和GPS等各种传感器，开发了用于自动驾驶应用的智能算法，例如目标检测、目标分割、避障和路径规划等。近年来，高清（HD）地图引起了广泛关注。由于高精地图定位精度高、信息量大，立即成为自动驾驶的关键组成部分之一。从百度 Apollo、NVIDIA、TomTom 等大型组织到个人研究人员，研究人员为自动驾驶的不同场景和目的创建了高清地图。有必要回顾高精地图生成的最新方法。本文回顾了最新利用 2D 和 3D 地图生成的高清地图生成技术。本综述介绍了高清地图的概念及其在自动驾驶中的用途，并详细概述了高清地图生成技术。我们还将讨论当前高清地图生成技术的局限性，以激发未来的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了自动驾驶领域中高精度地图生成技术的最新进展，涵盖2D和3D地图生成方法，并讨论其局限性。
AI.motivation: 高精度地图因定位精度高、信息丰富，成为自动驾驶的关键组件，但现有技术仍存在局限，需进一步研究。
AI.method: 通过回顾百度Apollo、NVIDIA、TomTom等机构及研究人员的工作，系统梳理高精度地图生成技术，并分析其优缺点。
AI.result: 总结了高精度地图的概念、生成技术及其在自动驾驶中的应用，明确了当前技术的不足之处。
AI.conclusion: 高精度地图对自动驾驶至关重要，未来需在技术改进和跨场景适用性方面开展更多研究。

result: 总结了高精度地图的概念、生成技术及其在自动驾驶中的应用，明确了当前技术的不足之处。
conclusion: 高精度地图对自动驾驶至关重要，未来需在技术改进和跨场景适用性方面开展更多研究。
search_text: High-Definition Map Generation Technologies For Autonomous Driving 自动驾驶高清地图生成技术 Autonomous driving has been among the most popular and challenging topics in the past few years. On the road to achieving full autonomy, researchers have utilized various sensors, such as LiDAR, camera, Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU), and GPS, and developed intelligent algorithms for autonomous driving applications such as object detection, object segmentation, obstacle avoidance, and path planning. High-definition (HD) maps have drawn lots of attention in recent years. Because of the high precision and informative level of HD maps in localization, it has immediately become one of the critical components of autonomous driving. From big organizations like Baidu Apollo, NVIDIA, and TomTom to individual researchers, researchers have created HD maps for different scenes and purposes for autonomous driving. It is necessary to review the state-of-the-art methods for HD map generation. This paper reviews recent HD map generation technologies that leverage both 2D and 3D map generation. This review introduces the concept of HD maps and their usefulness in autonomous driving and gives a detailed overview of HD map generation techniques. We will also discuss the limitations of the current HD map generation technologies to motivate future research. 自动驾驶一直是过去几年最热门和最具挑战性的话题之一。在实现完全自动驾驶的道路上，研究人员利用激光雷达、摄像头、惯性测量单元（IMU）和GPS等各种传感器，开发了用于自动驾驶应用的智能算法，例如目标检测、目标分割、避障和路径规划等。近年来，高清（HD）地图引起了广泛关注。由于高精地图定位精度高、信息量大，立即成为自动驾驶的关键组成部分之一。从百度 Apollo、NVIDIA、TomTom 等大型组织到个人研究人员，研究人员为自动驾驶的不同场景和目的创建了高清地图。有必要回顾高精地图生成的最新方法。本文回顾了最新利用 2D 和 3D 地图生成的高清地图生成技术。本综述介绍了高清地图的概念及其在自动驾驶中的用途，并详细概述了高清地图生成技术。我们还将讨论当前高清地图生成技术的局限性，以激发未来的研究。 本文综述了自动驾驶领域中高精度地图生成技术的最新进展，涵盖2D和3D地图生成方法，并讨论其局限性。 Zhibin Bao,Sabir Hossain,Haoxiang Lang,Xianke Lin cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Minghan Zhu,Maani Ghaffari,William A. Clark,Huei Peng
title: E2PN: Efficient SE(3)-Equivariant Point Network
title_zh: E2PN：高效SE(3)-等变点网络
comment: CVPR 2023, 16 pages. See https://github.com/minghanz/E2PN for code
comments: CVPR 2023, 16 pages. See https://github.com/minghanz/E2PN for code
abstract: This paper proposes a convolution structure for learning SE(3)-equivariant features from 3D point clouds. It can be viewed as an equivariant version of kernel point convolutions (KPConv), a widely used convolution form to process point cloud data. Compared with existing equivariant networks, our design is simple, lightweight, fast, and easy to be integrated with existing task-specific point cloud learning pipelines. We achieve these desirable properties by combining group convolutions and quotient representations. Specifically, we discretize SO(3) to finite groups for their simplicity while using SO(2) as the stabilizer subgroup to form spherical quotient feature fields to save computations. We also propose a permutation layer to recover SO(3) features from spherical features to preserve the capacity to distinguish rotations. Experiments show that our method achieves comparable or superior performance in various tasks, including object classification, pose estimation, and keypoint-matching, while consuming much less memory and running faster than existing work. The proposed method can foster the development of equivariant models for real-world applications based on point clouds.
summary: This paper proposes a convolution structure for learning SE(3)-equivariant features from 3D point clouds. It can be viewed as an equivariant version of kernel point convolutions (KPConv), a widely used convolution form to process point cloud data. Compared with existing equivariant networks, our design is simple, lightweight, fast, and easy to be integrated with existing task-specific point cloud learning pipelines. We achieve these desirable properties by combining group convolutions and quotient representations. Specifically, we discretize SO(3) to finite groups for their simplicity while using SO(2) as the stabilizer subgroup to form spherical quotient feature fields to save computations. We also propose a permutation layer to recover SO(3) features from spherical features to preserve the capacity to distinguish rotations. Experiments show that our method achieves comparable or superior performance in various tasks, including object classification, pose estimation, and keypoint-matching, while consuming much less memory and running faster than existing work. The proposed method can foster the development of equivariant models for real-world applications based on point clouds.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于从 3D 点云学习 SE(3) 等变特征的卷积结构。它可以被视为核点卷积（KPConv）的等变版本，这是一种广泛使用的处理点云数据的卷积形式。与现有的等变网络相比，我们的设计简单、轻量、快速，并且易于与现有的特定任务点云学习管道集成。我们通过组合群卷积和商表示来实现这些理想的属性。具体来说，为了简单起见，我们将 SO(3) 离散化为有限群，同时使用 SO(2) 作为稳定子群来形成球商特征场以节省计算量。我们还提出了一个排列层来从球形特征中恢复 SO(3) 特征，以保留区分旋转的能力。实验表明，我们的方法在各种任务中实现了可比或优越的性能，包括对象分类、姿态估计和关键点匹配，同时比现有工作消耗更少的内存并且运行速度更快。所提出的方法可以促进基于点云的实际应用的等变模型的开发。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的SE(3)-等变点网络(E2PN)，用于从3D点云中学习等变特征。
AI.motivation: 现有等变网络结构复杂、计算量大，难以高效集成到实际点云处理流程中，亟需一种轻量快速的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过结合群卷积与商表示方法，离散化SO(3)为有限群并利用SO(2)构建球面商特征场，同时引入置换层恢复SO(3)特征以保持旋转区分能力。
AI.result: 在物体分类、姿态估计和关键点匹配任务中表现优于或接近现有方法，同时内存消耗更少且运行速度更快。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为基于点云的现实场景等变模型开发提供了高效可行的新范式。

authors_text: Cristina Garbacea,Qiaozhu Mei
title: Why is constrained neural language generation particularly challenging?
title_zh: 为什么受限神经语言生成特别具有挑战性？
comment: This survey is specifically focused on constrained neural language generation. For a more general survey of NLG literature, please see "Neural language generation: Formulation, methods, and evaluation" at arXiv:2007.15780
comments: This survey is specifically focused on constrained neural language generation. For a more general survey of NLG literature, please see "Neural language generation: Formulation, methods, and evaluation" at arXiv:2007.15780
abstract: Recent advances in deep neural language models combined with the capacity of large scale datasets have accelerated the development of natural language generation systems that produce fluent and coherent texts (to various degrees of success) in a multitude of tasks and application contexts. However, controlling the output of these models for desired user and task needs is still an open challenge. This is crucial not only to customizing the content and style of the generated language, but also to their safe and reliable deployment in the real world. We present an extensive survey on the emerging topic of constrained neural language generation in which we formally define and categorize the problems of natural language generation by distinguishing between conditions and constraints (the latter being testable conditions on the output text instead of the input), present constrained text generation tasks, and review existing methods and evaluation metrics for constrained text generation. Our aim is to highlight recent progress and trends in this emerging field, informing on the most promising directions and limitations towards advancing the state-of-the-art of constrained neural language generation research.
summary: Recent advances in deep neural language models combined with the capacity of large scale datasets have accelerated the development of natural language generation systems that produce fluent and coherent texts (to various degrees of success) in a multitude of tasks and application contexts. However, controlling the output of these models for desired user and task needs is still an open challenge. This is crucial not only to customizing the content and style of the generated language, but also to their safe and reliable deployment in the real world. We present an extensive survey on the emerging topic of constrained neural language generation in which we formally define and categorize the problems of natural language generation by distinguishing between conditions and constraints (the latter being testable conditions on the output text instead of the input), present constrained text generation tasks, and review existing methods and evaluation metrics for constrained text generation. Our aim is to highlight recent progress and trends in this emerging field, informing on the most promising directions and limitations towards advancing the state-of-the-art of constrained neural language generation research.
abstract_zh: 深度神经语言模型的最新进展与大规模数据集的能力相结合，加速了自然语言生成系统的开发，该系统可以在多种任务和应用环境中生成流畅且连贯的文本（取得了不同程度的成功）。然而，控制这些模型的输出以满足所需的用户和任务需求仍然是一个开放的挑战。这不仅对于定制生成语言的内容和风格至关重要，而且对于它们在现实世界中安全可靠的部署也至关重要。我们对受约束的神经语言生成这一新兴主题进行了广泛的调查，其中我们通过区分条件和约束（后者是输出文本而不是输入的可测试条件）来正式定义和分类自然语言生成的问题，提出受约束的文本生成任务，并回顾约束文本生成的现有方法和评估指标。我们的目标是强调这一新兴领域的最新进展和趋势，通报推动约束神经语言生成研究最先进的最有希望的方向和局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文对约束神经语言生成领域进行综述，定义问题类别，回顾现有方法与评估指标，分析研究进展与挑战。
AI.motivation: 尽管神经语言模型已能生成流畅文本，但如何控制输出以满足用户需求及安全部署仍是关键挑战，需系统梳理该领域研究现状。
AI.method: 通过区分条件与约束，形式化定义问题，分类约束生成任务，并总结现有方法及评估指标，分析技术趋势与局限性。
AI.result: 总结了约束生成的最新进展，指出基于解码策略、强化学习等方法的成效，同时揭示评估体系不完善等现存问题。
AI.conclusion: 约束神经语言生成是重要研究方向，需在生成质量、约束满足与评估方法间寻求平衡，未来需更系统的研究框架。

authors_text: Alzayat Saleh,Marcus Sheaves,Dean Jerry,Mostafa Rahimi Azghadi
title: Applications of Deep Learning in Fish Habitat Monitoring: A Tutorial and Survey
title_zh: 深度学习在鱼类栖息地监测中的应用：教程和调查
comment: 26 pages, 7 figures. Submitted to the journal, Expert Systems With Applications
comments: 26 pages, 7 figures. Submitted to the journal, Expert Systems With Applications
abstract: Marine ecosystems and their fish habitats are becoming increasingly important due to their integral role in providing a valuable food source and conservation outcomes. Due to their remote and difficult to access nature, marine environments and fish habitats are often monitored using underwater cameras. These cameras generate a massive volume of digital data, which cannot be efficiently analysed by current manual processing methods, which involve a human observer. DL is a cutting-edge AI technology that has demonstrated unprecedented performance in analysing visual data. Despite its application to a myriad of domains, its use in underwater fish habitat monitoring remains under explored. In this paper, we provide a tutorial that covers the key concepts of DL, which help the reader grasp a high-level understanding of how DL works. The tutorial also explains a step-by-step procedure on how DL algorithms should be developed for challenging applications such as underwater fish monitoring. In addition, we provide a comprehensive survey of key deep learning techniques for fish habitat monitoring including classification, counting, localization, and segmentation. Furthermore, we survey publicly available underwater fish datasets, and compare various DL techniques in the underwater fish monitoring domains. We also discuss some challenges and opportunities in the emerging field of deep learning for fish habitat processing. This paper is written to serve as a tutorial for marine scientists who would like to grasp a high-level understanding of DL, develop it for their applications by following our step-by-step tutorial, and see how it is evolving to facilitate their research efforts. At the same time, it is suitable for computer scientists who would like to survey state-of-the-art DL-based methodologies for fish habitat monitoring.

In this paper, we provide a tutorial that covers the key concepts of DL, which help the reader grasp a high-level understanding of how DL works. The tutorial also explains a step-by-step procedure on how DL algorithms should be developed for challenging applications such as underwater fish monitoring. In addition, we provide a comprehensive survey of key deep learning techniques for fish habitat monitoring including classification, counting, localization, and segmentation. Furthermore, we survey publicly available underwater fish datasets, and compare various DL techniques in the underwater fish monitoring domains. We also discuss some challenges and opportunities in the emerging field of deep learning for fish habitat processing. This paper is written to serve as a tutorial for marine scientists who would like to grasp a high-level understanding of DL, develop it for their applications by following our step-by-step tutorial, and see how it is evolving to facilitate their research efforts. At the same time, it is suitable for computer scientists who would like to survey state-of-the-art DL-based methodologies for fish habitat monitoring.
abstract_zh: 海洋生态系统及其鱼类栖息地在提供宝贵的食物来源和保护成果方面发挥着不可或缺的作用，因此变得越来越重要。由于海洋环境和鱼类栖息地偏远且难以接近自然，因此通常使用水下摄像机进行监控。这些相机生成大量数字数据，无法通过当前涉及人类观察者的手动处理方法进行有效分析。深度学习是一种尖端的人工智能技术，在分析视觉数据方面表现出了前所未有的性能。尽管其应用于无数领域，但其在水下鱼类栖息地监测中的应用仍在探索中。在本文中，我们提供了一个涵盖 DL 关键概念的教程，帮助读者对 DL 的工作原理有一个高层次的理解。本教程还分步介绍了如何为水下鱼类监测等具有挑战性的应用开发深度学习算法。此外，我们还对鱼类栖息地监测的关键深度学习技术进行了全面的调查，包括分类、计数、定位和分割。此外，我们调查了公开的水下鱼类数据集，并比较了水下鱼类监测领域的各种深度学习技术。我们还讨论了鱼类栖息地处理深度学习新兴领域的一些挑战和机遇。本文旨在为海洋科学家提供教程，帮助他们深入了解深度学习，按照我们的分步教程开发其应用程序，并了解它如何发展以促进他们的研究工作。同时，它也适合想要研究最先进的基于深度学习的鱼类栖息地监测方法的计算机科学家。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过教程和综述形式，系统介绍深度学习在鱼类栖息地监测中的应用方法与技术。
AI.motivation: 由于海洋环境的复杂性和数据量庞大，传统人工监测方法效率低下，而深度学习在视觉数据分析中表现优异，但其在水下鱼类栖息地监测中的应用仍缺乏系统研究。
AI.method: 通过分步教程讲解深度学习核心概念及算法开发流程，并综述分类、计数、定位等关键技术，比较公开数据集与现有深度学习方法的优劣。
AI.result: 梳理了深度学习在鱼类栖息地监测领域的技术框架，总结了主流算法性能差异，指出现有数据集的局限性及未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 本文为海洋学家和计算机科学家提供了深度学习应用的实践指南与研究参考，推动该领域技术发展与跨学科合作。

search_text: Applications of Deep Learning in Fish Habitat Monitoring: A Tutorial and Survey 深度学习在鱼类栖息地监测中的应用：教程和调查 Marine ecosystems and their fish habitats are becoming increasingly important due to their integral role in providing a valuable food source and conservation outcomes. Due to their remote and difficult to access nature, marine environments and fish habitats are often monitored using underwater cameras. These cameras generate a massive volume of digital data, which cannot be efficiently analysed by current manual processing methods, which involve a human observer. DL is a cutting-edge AI technology that has demonstrated unprecedented performance in analysing visual data. Despite its application to a myriad of domains, its use in underwater fish habitat monitoring remains under explored. In this paper, we provide a tutorial that covers the key concepts of DL, which help the reader grasp a high-level understanding of how DL works. The tutorial also explains a step-by-step procedure on how DL algorithms should be developed for challenging applications such as underwater fish monitoring. In addition, we provide a comprehensive survey of key deep learning techniques for fish habitat monitoring including classification, counting, localization, and segmentation. Furthermore, we survey publicly available underwater fish datasets, and compare various DL techniques in the underwater fish monitoring domains. We also discuss some challenges and opportunities in the emerging field of deep learning for fish habitat processing. This paper is written to serve as a tutorial for marine scientists who would like to grasp a high-level understanding of DL, develop it for their applications by following our step-by-step tutorial, and see how it is evolving to facilitate their research efforts. At the same time, it is suitable for computer scientists who would like to survey state-of-the-art DL-based methodologies for fish habitat monitoring. 海洋生态系统及其鱼类栖息地在提供宝贵的食物来源和保护成果方面发挥着不可或缺的作用，因此变得越来越重要。由于海洋环境和鱼类栖息地偏远且难以接近自然，因此通常使用水下摄像机进行监控。这些相机生成大量数字数据，无法通过当前涉及人类观察者的手动处理方法进行有效分析。深度学习是一种尖端的人工智能技术，在分析视觉数据方面表现出了前所未有的性能。尽管其应用于无数领域，但其在水下鱼类栖息地监测中的应用仍在探索中。在本文中，我们提供了一个涵盖 DL 关键概念的教程，帮助读者对 DL 的工作原理有一个高层次的理解。本教程还分步介绍了如何为水下鱼类监测等具有挑战性的应用开发深度学习算法。此外，我们还对鱼类栖息地监测的关键深度学习技术进行了全面的调查，包括分类、计数、定位和分割。此外，我们调查了公开的水下鱼类数据集，并比较了水下鱼类监测领域的各种深度学习技术。我们还讨论了鱼类栖息地处理深度学习新兴领域的一些挑战和机遇。本文旨在为海洋科学家提供教程，帮助他们深入了解深度学习，按照我们的分步教程开发其应用程序，并了解它如何发展以促进他们的研究工作。同时，它也适合想要研究最先进的基于深度学习的鱼类栖息地监测方法的计算机科学家。 本文旨在通过教程和综述形式，系统介绍深度学习在鱼类栖息地监测中的应用方法与技术。 Alzayat Saleh,Marcus Sheaves,Dean Jerry,Mostafa Rahimi Azghadi cs.CV

authors_text: Alzayat Saleh,Marcus Sheaves,Dean Jerry,Mostafa Rahimi Azghadi
title: Overcoming Annotation Bottlenecks in Underwater Fish Segmentation: A Robust Self-Supervised Learning Approach
title_zh: 克服水下鱼类分割中的注释瓶颈：一种鲁棒的自我监督学习方法
comment: 11 pages, 7 figures. Published at Signal, Image and Video Processing journal
comments: 11 pages, 7 figures. Published at Signal, Image and Video Processing journal
abstract: Accurate fish segmentation in underwater videos is challenging due to low visibility, variable lighting, and dynamic backgrounds, making fully-supervised methods that require manual annotation impractical for many applications. This paper introduces a novel self-supervised learning approach for fish segmentation using Deep Learning. Our model, trained without manual annotation, learns robust and generalizable representations by aligning features across augmented views and enforcing spatial-temporal consistency. We demonstrate its effectiveness on three challenging underwater video datasets: DeepFish, Seagrass, and YouTube-VOS, surpassing existing self-supervised methods and achieving segmentation accuracy comparable to fully-supervised methods without the need for costly annotations. Trained on DeepFish, our model exhibits strong generalization, achieving high segmentation accuracy on the unseen Seagrass and YouTube-VOS datasets. Furthermore, our model is computationally efficient due to its parallel processing and efficient anchor sampling technique, making it suitable for real-time applications and potential deployment on edge devices. We present quantitative results using Jaccard Index and Dice coefficient, as well as qualitative comparisons, showcasing the accuracy, robustness, and efficiency of our approach for advancing underwater video analysis
summary: Accurate fish segmentation in underwater videos is challenging due to low visibility, variable lighting, and dynamic backgrounds, making fully-supervised methods that require manual annotation impractical for many applications. This paper introduces a novel self-supervised learning approach for fish segmentation using Deep Learning. Our model, trained without manual annotation, learns robust and generalizable representations by aligning features across augmented views and enforcing spatial-temporal consistency. We demonstrate its effectiveness on three challenging underwater video datasets: DeepFish, Seagrass, and YouTube-VOS, surpassing existing self-supervised methods and achieving segmentation accuracy comparable to fully-supervised methods without the need for costly annotations. Trained on DeepFish, our model exhibits strong generalization, achieving high segmentation accuracy on the unseen Seagrass and YouTube-VOS datasets. Furthermore, our model is computationally efficient due to its parallel processing and efficient anchor sampling technique, making it suitable for real-time applications and potential deployment on edge devices. We present quantitative results using Jaccard Index and Dice coefficient, as well as qualitative comparisons, showcasing the accuracy, robustness, and efficiency of our approach for advancing underwater video analysis
abstract_zh: 由于能见度低、光照变化和动态背景，水下视频中的准确鱼类分割具有挑战性，这使得需要手动注释的完全监督方法对于许多应用来说不切实际。本文介绍了一种使用深度学习进行鱼类分割的新型自监督学习方法。我们的模型在没有手动注释的情况下进行训练，通过跨增强视图对齐特征并强制执行时空一致性来学习稳健且可概括的表示。我们在三个具有挑战性的水下视频数据集：DeepFish、Seagrass 和 YouTube-VOS 上展示了其有效性，超越了现有的自监督方法，并实现了与完全监督方法相当的分割精度，而无需昂贵的注释。在 DeepFish 上训练后，我们的模型表现出很强的泛化能力，在看不见的 Seagrass 和 YouTube-VOS 数据集上实现了高分割精度。此外，我们的模型由于其并行处理和高效的锚点采样技术而具有计算效率，使其适合实时应用程序和边缘设备上的潜在部署。我们使用 Jaccard 指数和 Dice 系数提供定量结果以及定性比较，展示我们推进水下视频分析的方法的准确性、稳健性和效率

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工标注的自监督学习方法，用于解决水下视频中鱼类分割的标注瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 水下视频因能见度低、光照变化和动态背景导致鱼类分割困难，传统全监督方法依赖昂贵的人工标注，难以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 通过特征对齐和时空一致性约束，利用自监督学习训练模型，结合并行处理与高效锚点采样技术提升计算效率。
AI.result: 在DeepFish、Seagrass和YouTube-VOS三个数据集上，模型性能超越现有自监督方法且接近全监督方法，具备强泛化能力和实时应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解水下视频标注难题，为实时边缘设备部署提供了高精度、高效的鱼类分割解决方案。

authors_text: Haeyong Kang,Thang Vu,Chang D. Yoo
title: Learning Imbalanced Datasets with Maximum Margin Loss
title_zh: 学习具有最大边际损失的不平衡数据集
abstract: A learning algorithm referred to as Maximum Margin (MM) is proposed for considering the class-imbalance data learning issue: the trained model tends to predict the majority of classes rather than the minority ones. That is, underfitting for minority classes seems to be one of the challenges of generalization. For a good generalization of the minority classes, we design a new Maximum Margin (MM) loss function, motivated by minimizing a margin-based generalization bound through the shifting decision bound. The theoretically-principled label-distribution-aware margin (LDAM) loss was successfully applied with prior strategies such as re-weighting or re-sampling along with the effective training schedule. However, they did not investigate the maximum margin loss function yet. In this study, we investigate the performances of two types of hard maximum margin-based decision boundary shift with LDAM's training schedule on artificially imbalanced CIFAR-10/100 for fair comparisons and effectiveness.
summary: A learning algorithm referred to as Maximum Margin (MM) is proposed for considering the class-imbalance data learning issue: the trained model tends to predict the majority of classes rather than the minority ones. That is, underfitting for minority classes seems to be one of the challenges of generalization. For a good generalization of the minority classes, we design a new Maximum Margin (MM) loss function, motivated by minimizing a margin-based generalization bound through the shifting decision bound. The theoretically-principled label-distribution-aware margin (LDAM) loss was successfully applied with prior strategies such as re-weighting or re-sampling along with the effective training schedule. However, they did not investigate the maximum margin loss function yet. In this study, we investigate the performances of two types of hard maximum margin-based decision boundary shift with LDAM's training schedule on artificially imbalanced CIFAR-10/100 for fair comparisons and effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种称为最大间隔（MM）的学习算法来考虑类不平衡数据学习问题：训练后的模型倾向于预测大多数类而不是少数类。也就是说，对少数群体的不适应似乎是泛化的挑战之一。为了对少数类别进行良好的泛化，我们设计了一个新的最大边际（MM）损失函数，其动机是通过移动决策界限来最小化基于边际的泛化界限。理论上原理的标签分布感知边际（LDAM）损失已成功应用于先前的策略，例如重新加权或重新采样以及有效的训练计划。然而，他们还没有研究最大保证金损失函数。在本研究中，我们利用 LDAM 的训练计划在人为不平衡的 CIFAR-10/100 上研究两种类型的基于硬最大裕度的决策边界转移的性能，以进行公平比较和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最大边缘损失的新方法，用于解决类别不平衡数据集的学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理类别不平衡数据时，模型易偏向多数类导致少数类欠拟合，需设计新损失函数提升少数类泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计理论驱动的标签分布感知最大边缘（MM）损失函数，结合LDAM训练策略，在人工不平衡CIFAR数据集上验证两种硬边缘决策边界调整方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在CIFAR-10/100人工不平衡数据集上有效提升了少数类识别性能，验证了最大边缘损失的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 最大边缘损失为解决类别不平衡问题提供了新思路，结合LDAM策略可有效优化模型对少数类的泛化能力。

search_text: Learning Imbalanced Datasets with Maximum Margin Loss 学习具有最大边际损失的不平衡数据集 A learning algorithm referred to as Maximum Margin (MM) is proposed for considering the class-imbalance data learning issue: the trained model tends to predict the majority of classes rather than the minority ones. That is, underfitting for minority classes seems to be one of the challenges of generalization. For a good generalization of the minority classes, we design a new Maximum Margin (MM) loss function, motivated by minimizing a margin-based generalization bound through the shifting decision bound. The theoretically-principled label-distribution-aware margin (LDAM) loss was successfully applied with prior strategies such as re-weighting or re-sampling along with the effective training schedule. However, they did not investigate the maximum margin loss function yet. In this study, we investigate the performances of two types of hard maximum margin-based decision boundary shift with LDAM's training schedule on artificially imbalanced CIFAR-10/100 for fair comparisons and effectiveness. 提出了一种称为最大间隔（MM）的学习算法来考虑类不平衡数据学习问题：训练后的模型倾向于预测大多数类而不是少数类。也就是说，对少数群体的不适应似乎是泛化的挑战之一。为了对少数类别进行良好的泛化，我们设计了一个新的最大边际（MM）损失函数，其动机是通过移动决策界限来最小化基于边际的泛化界限。理论上原理的标签分布感知边际（LDAM）损失已成功应用于先前的策略，例如重新加权或重新采样以及有效的训练计划。然而，他们还没有研究最大保证金损失函数。在本研究中，我们利用 LDAM 的训练计划在人为不平衡的 CIFAR-10/100 上研究两种类型的基于硬最大裕度的决策边界转移的性能，以进行公平比较和有效性。 本文提出一种基于最大边缘损失的新方法，用于解决类别不平衡数据集的学习问题。 Haeyong Kang,Thang Vu,Chang D. Yoo cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Aimen Zerroug,Mohit Vaishnav,Julien Colin,Sebastian Musslick,Thomas Serre
title: A Benchmark for Compositional Visual Reasoning
title_zh: 组合视觉推理的基准
abstract: A fundamental component of human vision is our ability to parse complex visual scenes and judge the relations between their constituent objects. AI benchmarks for visual reasoning have driven rapid progress in recent years with state-of-the-art systems now reaching human accuracy on some of these benchmarks. Yet, a major gap remains in terms of the sample efficiency with which humans and AI systems learn new visual reasoning tasks. Humans' remarkable efficiency at learning has been at least partially attributed to their ability to harness compositionality -- such that they can efficiently take advantage of previously gained knowledge when learning new tasks. Here, we introduce a novel visual reasoning benchmark, Compositional Visual Relations (CVR), to drive progress towards the development of more data-efficient learning algorithms. We take inspiration from fluidic intelligence and non-verbal reasoning tests and describe a novel method for creating compositions of abstract rules and associated image datasets at scale. Our proposed benchmark includes measures of sample efficiency, generalization and transfer across task rules, as well as the ability to leverage compositionality. We systematically evaluate modern neural architectures and find that, surprisingly, convolutional architectures surpass transformer-based architectures across all performance measures in most data regimes. However, all computational models are a lot less data efficient compared to humans even after learning informative visual representations using self-supervision. Overall, we hope that our challenge will spur interest in the development of neural architectures that can learn to harness compositionality toward more efficient learning.
summary: A fundamental component of human vision is our ability to parse complex visual scenes and judge the relations between their constituent objects. AI benchmarks for visual reasoning have driven rapid progress in recent years with state-of-the-art systems now reaching human accuracy on some of these benchmarks. Yet, a major gap remains in terms of the sample efficiency with which humans and AI systems learn new visual reasoning tasks. Humans' remarkable efficiency at learning has been at least partially attributed to their ability to harness compositionality -- such that they can efficiently take advantage of previously gained knowledge when learning new tasks. Here, we introduce a novel visual reasoning benchmark, Compositional Visual Relations (CVR), to drive progress towards the development of more data-efficient learning algorithms. We take inspiration from fluidic intelligence and non-verbal reasoning tests and describe a novel method for creating compositions of abstract rules and associated image datasets at scale. Our proposed benchmark includes measures of sample efficiency, generalization and transfer across task rules, as well as the ability to leverage compositionality. We systematically evaluate modern neural architectures and find that, surprisingly, convolutional architectures surpass transformer-based architectures across all performance measures in most data regimes. However, all computational models are a lot less data efficient compared to humans even after learning informative visual representations using self-supervision. Overall, we hope that our challenge will spur interest in the development of neural architectures that can learn to harness compositionality toward more efficient learning.
abstract_zh: 人类视觉的一个基本组成部分是我们解析复杂视觉场景并判断其组成对象之间关系的能力。近年来，视觉推理的人工智能基准推动了快速进步，最先进的系统现在在其中一些基准上达到了人类的准确性。然而，人类和人工智能系统学习新的视觉推理任务的样本效率仍然存在重大差距。人类卓越的学习效率至少部分归因于他们利用组合性的能力——这样他们就可以在学习新任务时有效地利用以前获得的知识。在这里，我们引入了一种新颖的视觉推理基准——组合视觉关系（CVR），以推动数据效率更高的学习算法的开发。我们从流体智力和非语言推理测试中汲取灵感，描述了一种大规模创建抽象规则和相关图像数据集组合的新颖方法。我们提出的基准包括样本效率、泛化和跨任务规则的转移的度量，以及利用组合性的能力。我们系统地评估了现代神经架构，并令人惊讶地发现，在大多数数据体系中，卷积架构在所有性能指标上都超越了基于 Transformer 的架构。然而，即使在使用自我监督学习信息丰富的视觉表示之后，与人类相比，所有计算模型的数据效率都要低得多。总的来说，我们希望我们的挑战能够激发人们对神经架构开发的兴趣，这些神经架构可以学习利用组合性来实现更高效的学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为CVR的新视觉推理基准测试，旨在推动开发更高效的数据学习算法，通过评估模型在组合性视觉推理任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI在视觉推理任务上已接近人类水平，但人类在学习新任务时的样本效率远高于AI。人类通过组合性（compositionality）利用已有知识，而现有基准缺乏对此能力的评估。
AI.method: 受流体智能和非语言推理测试启发，设计了一种生成抽象规则组合及对应图像数据集的规模化方法，并构建包含样本效率、泛化能力等指标的评估框架。
AI.result: 现代神经网络架构中，卷积网络在多数数据条件下优于Transformer，但所有模型在数据效率上仍远低于人类，即使使用自监督学习获得信息视觉表征。
AI.conclusion: 该基准测试旨在推动研究更擅长利用组合性以实现高效学习的神经架构，促进视觉推理领域向人类水平的样本效率迈进。

authors_text: Caleb Robinson,Anthony Ortiz,Hogeun Park,Nancy Lozano Gracia,Jon Kher Kaw,Tina Sederholm,Rahul Dodhia,Juan M. Lavista Ferres
title: Fast building segmentation from satellite imagery and few local labels
title_zh: 根据卫星图像和少量本地标签快速构建分割
comment: Accepted at EarthVision 2022
comments: Accepted at EarthVision 2022
abstract: Innovations in computer vision algorithms for satellite image analysis can enable us to explore global challenges such as urbanization and land use change at the planetary level. However, domain shift problems are a common occurrence when trying to replicate models that drive these analyses to new areas, particularly in the developing world. If a model is trained with imagery and labels from one location, then it usually will not generalize well to new locations where the content of the imagery and data distributions are different. In this work, we consider the setting in which we have a single large satellite imagery scene over which we want to solve an applied problem -- building footprint segmentation. Here, we do not necessarily need to worry about creating a model that generalizes past the borders of our scene but can instead train a local model. We show that surprisingly few labels are needed to solve the building segmentation problem with very high-resolution (0.5m/px) satellite imagery with this setting in mind. Our best model trained with just 527 sparse polygon annotations (an equivalent of 1500 x 1500 densely labeled pixels) has a recall of 0.87 over held out footprints and a R2 of 0.93 on the task of counting the number of buildings in 200 x 200-meter windows. We apply our models over high-resolution imagery in Amman, Jordan in a case study on urban change detection.
summary: Innovations in computer vision algorithms for satellite image analysis can enable us to explore global challenges such as urbanization and land use change at the planetary level. However, domain shift problems are a common occurrence when trying to replicate models that drive these analyses to new areas, particularly in the developing world. If a model is trained with imagery and labels from one location, then it usually will not generalize well to new locations where the content of the imagery and data distributions are different. In this work, we consider the setting in which we have a single large satellite imagery scene over which we want to solve an applied problem -- building footprint segmentation. Here, we do not necessarily need to worry about creating a model that generalizes past the borders of our scene but can instead train a local model. We show that surprisingly few labels are needed to solve the building segmentation problem with very high-resolution (0.5m/px) satellite imagery with this setting in mind. Our best model trained with just 527 sparse polygon annotations (an equivalent of 1500 x 1500 densely labeled pixels) has a recall of 0.87 over held out footprints and a R2 of 0.93 on the task of counting the number of buildings in 200 x 200-meter windows. We apply our models over high-resolution imagery in Amman, Jordan in a case study on urban change detection.
abstract_zh: 用于卫星图像分析的计算机视觉算法的创新可以使我们能够探索全球挑战，例如全球范围内的城市化和土地利用变化。然而，当试图复制将这些分析驱动到新领域的模型时，领域转移问题是很常见的，特别是在发展中国家。如果模型是使用一个位置的图像和标签进行训练的，那么它通常无法很好地推广到图像内容和数据分布不同的新位置。在这项工作中，我们考虑的设置是，我们有一个大型卫星图像场景，我们希望在该场景上解决一个应用问题——建筑足迹分割。在这里，我们不一定需要担心创建一个泛化到场景边界之外的模型，而是可以训练本地模型。我们发现，考虑到这种设置，使用非常高分辨率（0.5m/px）的卫星图像来解决建筑分割问题所需的标签数量令人惊讶。我们最好的模型仅使用 527 个稀疏多边形注释（相当于 1500 x 1500 个密集标记的像素）进行训练，在计算 200 x 200 米窗户中的建筑物数量的任务中，超额足迹的召回率为 0.87，R2 为 0.93。我们将我们的模型应用于约旦安曼的高分辨率图像，进行城市变化检测的案例研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用高分辨率卫星图像和少量本地标签快速实现建筑足迹分割的方法，解决领域迁移问题。
AI.motivation: 卫星图像分析模型在跨区域应用时面临领域迁移挑战，尤其在数据分布差异大的发展中国家，传统方法依赖大量标注数据。
AI.method: 基于单场景训练本地模型，仅使用527个稀疏多边形标注（等效1500x1500密集标注），结合高分辨率卫星图像进行建筑分割。
AI.result: 模型在测试集上达到0.87召回率和0.93的R2值，成功应用于约旦安曼的城市变化检测案例。
AI.conclusion: 少量高质量本地标注即可实现高精度建筑分割，为资源受限地区的城市分析提供可行方案。

search_text: Fast building segmentation from satellite imagery and few local labels 根据卫星图像和少量本地标签快速构建分割 Innovations in computer vision algorithms for satellite image analysis can enable us to explore global challenges such as urbanization and land use change at the planetary level. However, domain shift problems are a common occurrence when trying to replicate models that drive these analyses to new areas, particularly in the developing world. If a model is trained with imagery and labels from one location, then it usually will not generalize well to new locations where the content of the imagery and data distributions are different. In this work, we consider the setting in which we have a single large satellite imagery scene over which we want to solve an applied problem -- building footprint segmentation. Here, we do not necessarily need to worry about creating a model that generalizes past the borders of our scene but can instead train a local model. We show that surprisingly few labels are needed to solve the building segmentation problem with very high-resolution (0.5m/px) satellite imagery with this setting in mind. Our best model trained with just 527 sparse polygon annotations (an equivalent of 1500 x 1500 densely labeled pixels) has a recall of 0.87 over held out footprints and a R2 of 0.93 on the task of counting the number of buildings in 200 x 200-meter windows. We apply our models over high-resolution imagery in Amman, Jordan in a case study on urban change detection. 用于卫星图像分析的计算机视觉算法的创新可以使我们能够探索全球挑战，例如全球范围内的城市化和土地利用变化。然而，当试图复制将这些分析驱动到新领域的模型时，领域转移问题是很常见的，特别是在发展中国家。如果模型是使用一个位置的图像和标签进行训练的，那么它通常无法很好地推广到图像内容和数据分布不同的新位置。在这项工作中，我们考虑的设置是，我们有一个大型卫星图像场景，我们希望在该场景上解决一个应用问题——建筑足迹分割。在这里，我们不一定需要担心创建一个泛化到场景边界之外的模型，而是可以训练本地模型。我们发现，考虑到这种设置，使用非常高分辨率（0.5m/px）的卫星图像来解决建筑分割问题所需的标签数量令人惊讶。我们最好的模型仅使用 527 个稀疏多边形注释（相当于 1500 x 1500 个密集标记的像素）进行训练，在计算 200 x 200 米窗户中的建筑物数量的任务中，超额足迹的召回率为 0.87，R2 为 0.93。我们将我们的模型应用于约旦安曼的高分辨率图像，进行城市变化检测的案例研究。 本文提出一种利用高分辨率卫星图像和少量本地标签快速实现建筑足迹分割的方法，解决领域迁移问题。 Caleb Robinson,Anthony Ortiz,Hogeun Park,Nancy Lozano Gracia,Jon Kher Kaw,Tina Sederholm,Rahul Dodhia,Juan M. Lavista Ferres cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Dan Wang,Xinrui Cui,Septimiu Salcudean,Z. Jane Wang
title: Generalizable Neural Radiance Fields for Novel View Synthesis with Transformer
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 进行新颖视图合成的可推广神经辐射场
abstract: We propose a Transformer-based NeRF (TransNeRF) to learn a generic neural radiance field conditioned on observed-view images for the novel view synthesis task. By contrast, existing MLP-based NeRFs are not able to directly receive observed views with an arbitrary number and require an auxiliary pooling-based operation to fuse source-view information, resulting in the missing of complicated relationships between source views and the target rendering view. Furthermore, current approaches process each 3D point individually and ignore the local consistency of a radiance field scene representation. These limitations potentially can reduce their performance in challenging real-world applications where large differences between source views and a novel rendering view may exist. To address these challenges, our TransNeRF utilizes the attention mechanism to naturally decode deep associations of an arbitrary number of source views into a coordinate-based scene representation. Local consistency of shape and appearance are considered in the ray-cast space and the surrounding-view space within a unified Transformer network. Experiments demonstrate that our TransNeRF, trained on a wide variety of scenes, can achieve better performance in comparison to state-of-the-art image-based neural rendering methods in both scene-agnostic and per-scene finetuning scenarios especially when there is a considerable gap between source views and a rendering view.
summary: We propose a Transformer-based NeRF (TransNeRF) to learn a generic neural radiance field conditioned on observed-view images for the novel view synthesis task. By contrast, existing MLP-based NeRFs are not able to directly receive observed views with an arbitrary number and require an auxiliary pooling-based operation to fuse source-view information, resulting in the missing of complicated relationships between source views and the target rendering view. Furthermore, current approaches process each 3D point individually and ignore the local consistency of a radiance field scene representation. These limitations potentially can reduce their performance in challenging real-world applications where large differences between source views and a novel rendering view may exist. To address these challenges, our TransNeRF utilizes the attention mechanism to naturally decode deep associations of an arbitrary number of source views into a coordinate-based scene representation. Local consistency of shape and appearance are considered in the ray-cast space and the surrounding-view space within a unified Transformer network. Experiments demonstrate that our TransNeRF, trained on a wide variety of scenes, can achieve better performance in comparison to state-of-the-art image-based neural rendering methods in both scene-agnostic and per-scene finetuning scenarios especially when there is a considerable gap between source views and a rendering view.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的 NeRF (TransNeRF) 来学习以观察视图图像为条件的通用神经辐射场，以完成新颖的视图合成任务。相比之下，现有的基于 MLP 的 NeRF 无法直接接收任意数量的观察视图，并且需要基于辅助池化的操作来融合源视图信息，导致源视图和目标渲染视图之间复杂关系的丢失。此外，当前的方法单独处理每个 3D 点并忽略辐射场场景表示的局部一致性。这些限制可能会降低其在具有挑战性的现实世界应用程序中的性能，其中源视图和新颖的渲染视图之间可能存在巨大差异。为了解决这些挑战，我们的 TransNeRF 利用注意力机制将任意数量的源视图的深度关联自然地解码为基于坐标的场景表示。在统一 Transformer 网络内的光线投射空间和周围视图空间中考虑形状和外观的局部一致性。实验表明，与最先进的基于图像的神经渲染方法相比，我们的 TransNeRF 在各种场景上进行了训练，在场景无关和每个场景的微调场景中都可以实现更好的性能，特别是当源视图和渲染视图之间存在相当大的差距时。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的神经辐射场（TransNeRF），用于从观测视图图像中学习通用神经辐射场，以实现新视角合成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有MLP-based NeRF无法直接处理任意数量的观测视图，且通过辅助池化操作融合源视图信息时会丢失源视图与目标渲染视图间的复杂关系，同时忽略辐射场表示的局部一致性。
AI.method: 利用Transformer的注意力机制，将任意数量源视图的深度关联解码到坐标基于的场景表示中，并在统一的Transformer网络内同时考虑射线空间和周围视图空间的形状与外观局部一致性。
AI.result: TransNeRF在多种场景下均优于现有图像神经渲染方法，尤其在源视图与渲染视图存在显著差异时表现更优，且在无场景特定微调和场景特定微调两种情况下均取得更好效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入Transformer机制，TransNeRF有效解决了传统NeRF在多源视图关联建模和局部一致性建模上的不足，为复杂真实场景的新视角合成提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Robert K. Helmeczi,Can Kavaklioglu,Mucahit Cevik,Davood Pirayesh Neghab
title: A multi-objective constrained POMDP model for breast cancer screening
title_zh: 用于乳腺癌筛查的多目标约束 POMDP 模型
comment: 37 pages, 5 figures
comments: 37 pages, 5 figures
abstract: Breast cancer is a common and deadly disease, but it is often curable when diagnosed early. While most countries have large-scale screening programs, there is no consensus on a single globally accepted guideline for breast cancer screening. The complex nature of the disease; the limited availability of screening methods such as mammography, magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), and ultrasound; and public health policies all factor into the development of screening policies. Resource availability concerns necessitate the design of policies which conform to a budget, a problem which can be modelled as a constrained partially observable Markov decision process (CPOMDP). In this study, we propose a multi-objective CPOMDP model for breast cancer screening which allows for supplemental screening methods to accompany mammography. The model has two objectives: maximize the quality-adjusted life years (QALYs) and minimize lifetime breast cancer mortality risk (LBCMR). We identify the Pareto frontier of optimal solutions for average and high-risk patients at different budget levels, which can be used by decision-makers to set policies in practice. We find that the policies obtained by using a weighted objective are able to generate well-balanced QALYs and LBCMR values. In contrast, the single-objective models generally sacrifice a substantial amount in terms of QALYs/LBCMR for a minimal gain in LBCMR/QALYs. Additionally, our results show that, with the baseline cost values for supplemental screenings as well as the additional disutility that they incur, they are rarely recommended in CPOMDP policies, especially in a budget-constrained setting. A sensitivity analysis reveals the thresholds on cost and disutility values at which supplemental screenings become advantageous to prescribe.
summary: Breast cancer is a common and deadly disease, but it is often curable when diagnosed early. While most countries have large-scale screening programs, there is no consensus on a single globally accepted guideline for breast cancer screening. The complex nature of the disease; the limited availability of screening methods such as mammography, magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), and ultrasound; and public health policies all factor into the development of screening policies. Resource availability concerns necessitate the design of policies which conform to a budget, a problem which can be modelled as a constrained partially observable Markov decision process (CPOMDP). In this study, we propose a multi-objective CPOMDP model for breast cancer screening which allows for supplemental screening methods to accompany mammography. The model has two objectives: maximize the quality-adjusted life years (QALYs) and minimize lifetime breast cancer mortality risk (LBCMR). We identify the Pareto frontier of optimal solutions for average and high-risk patients at different budget levels, which can be used by decision-makers to set policies in practice. We find that the policies obtained by using a weighted objective are able to generate well-balanced QALYs and LBCMR values. In contrast, the single-objective models generally sacrifice a substantial amount in terms of QALYs/LBCMR for a minimal gain in LBCMR/QALYs. Additionally, our results show that, with the baseline cost values for supplemental screenings as well as the additional disutility that they incur, they are rarely recommended in CPOMDP policies, especially in a budget-constrained setting. A sensitivity analysis reveals the thresholds on cost and disutility values at which supplemental screenings become advantageous to prescribe.
abstract_zh: 乳腺癌是一种常见且致命的疾病，但早期诊断时通常是可以治愈的。虽然大多数国家都有大规模的筛查计划，但对于全球公认的乳腺癌筛查单一指南尚未达成共识。该疾病的复杂性；乳房 X 光检查、磁共振成像 (MRI) 和超声波等筛查方法的可用性有限；和公共卫生政策都是筛查政策制定的因素。资源可用性问题需要设计符合预算的政策，这个问题可以建模为受限部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（CPOMDP）。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种用于乳腺癌筛查的多目标 CPOMDP 模型，该模型允许在乳房 X 线摄影的同时使用补充筛查方法。该模型有两个目标：最大化质量调整生命年 (QALY) 和最小化终生乳腺癌死亡风险 (LBCMR)。我们确定了不同预算水平下普通和高风险患者最佳解决方案的帕累托前沿，决策者可以使用它来制定实践政策。我们发现通过使用加权目标获得的策略能够生成均衡的 QALY 和 LBCMR 值。相比之下，单目标模型通常会牺牲大量的 QALY/LBCMR 以获得最小的 LBCMR/QALY 增益。此外，我们的结果表明，由于补充筛查的基线成本值以及它们产生的额外负面效用，CPOMDP 政策中很少推荐它们，特别是在预算有限的环境中。敏感性分析揭示了成本和负效用值的阈值，在该阈值下，补充筛查变得有利于处方。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多目标约束部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（CPOMDP）模型，用于优化乳腺癌筛查政策，平衡质量调整生命年（QALYs）和终身乳腺癌死亡风险（LBCMR），同时考虑预算限制。
AI.motivation: 乳腺癌筛查缺乏全球统一指南，因疾病复杂性、筛查资源有限及公共卫生政策差异，需在预算约束下设计兼顾QALYs和LBCMR的筛查策略。
AI.method: 构建多目标CPOMDP模型，引入补充筛查方法，通过帕累托前沿分析不同预算下的最优解，并对比加权目标与单目标模型的效果。
AI.result: 加权目标模型能较好平衡QALYs与LBCMR，而单目标模型牺牲较大；补充筛查因成本和额外负担在预算受限时极少被推荐。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为决策者提供预算约束下的筛查策略参考，表明补充筛查需在成本与效益阈值下才具优势。
