search_text: A multi-objective constrained POMDP model for breast cancer screening 用于乳腺癌筛查的多目标约束 POMDP 模型 Breast cancer is a common and deadly disease, but it is often curable when diagnosed early. While most countries have large-scale screening programs, there is no consensus on a single globally accepted guideline for breast cancer screening. The complex nature of the disease; the limited availability of screening methods such as mammography, magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), and ultrasound; and public health policies all factor into the development of screening policies. Resource availability concerns necessitate the design of policies which conform to a budget, a problem which can be modelled as a constrained partially observable Markov decision process (CPOMDP). In this study, we propose a multi-objective CPOMDP model for breast cancer screening which allows for supplemental screening methods to accompany mammography. The model has two objectives: maximize the quality-adjusted life years (QALYs) and minimize lifetime breast cancer mortality risk (LBCMR). We identify the Pareto frontier of optimal solutions for average and high-risk patients at different budget levels, which can be used by decision-makers to set policies in practice. We find that the policies obtained by using a weighted objective are able to generate well-balanced QALYs and LBCMR values. In contrast, the single-objective models generally sacrifice a substantial amount in terms of QALYs/LBCMR for a minimal gain in LBCMR/QALYs. Additionally, our results show that, with the baseline cost values for supplemental screenings as well as the additional disutility that they incur, they are rarely recommended in CPOMDP policies, especially in a budget-constrained setting. A sensitivity analysis reveals the thresholds on cost and disutility values at which supplemental screenings become advantageous to prescribe. 乳腺癌是一种常见且致命的疾病，但早期诊断时通常是可以治愈的。虽然大多数国家都有大规模的筛查计划，但对于全球公认的乳腺癌筛查单一指南尚未达成共识。该疾病的复杂性；乳房 X 光检查、磁共振成像 (MRI) 和超声波等筛查方法的可用性有限；和公共卫生政策都是筛查政策制定的因素。资源可用性问题需要设计符合预算的政策，这个问题可以建模为受限部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（CPOMDP）。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种用于乳腺癌筛查的多目标 CPOMDP 模型，该模型允许在乳房 X 线摄影的同时使用补充筛查方法。该模型有两个目标：最大化质量调整生命年 (QALY) 和最小化终生乳腺癌死亡风险 (LBCMR)。我们确定了不同预算水平下普通和高风险患者最佳解决方案的帕累托前沿，决策者可以使用它来制定实践政策。我们发现通过使用加权目标获得的策略能够生成均衡的 QALY 和 LBCMR 值。相比之下，单目标模型通常会牺牲大量的 QALY/LBCMR 以获得最小的 LBCMR/QALY 增益。此外，我们的结果表明，由于补充筛查的基线成本值以及它们产生的额外负面效用，CPOMDP 政策中很少推荐它们，特别是在预算有限的环境中。敏感性分析揭示了成本和负效用值的阈值，在该阈值下，补充筛查变得有利于处方。 本文提出一种多目标约束部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（CPOMDP）模型，用于优化乳腺癌筛查政策，平衡质量调整生命年（QALYs）和终身乳腺癌死亡风险（LBCMR），同时考虑预算限制。 Robert K. Helmeczi,Can Kavaklioglu,Mucahit Cevik,Davood Pirayesh Neghab cs.AI

authors_text: Faris B. Rustom,Haluk Öğmen,Arash Yazdanbakhsh
title: Object Detection, Recognition, Deep Learning, and the Universal Law of Generalization
title_zh: 物体检测、识别、深度学习和泛化的普遍法则
abstract: Object detection and recognition are fundamental functions underlying the success of species. Because the appearance of an object exhibits a large variability, the brain has to group these different stimuli under the same object identity, a process of generalization. Does the process of generalization follow some general principles or is it an ad-hoc "bag-of-tricks"? The Universal Law of Generalization provided evidence that generalization follows similar properties across a variety of species and tasks. Here we test the hypothesis that the internal representations underlying generalization reflect the natural properties of object detection and recognition in our environment rather than the specifics of the system solving these problems. By training a deep-neural-network with images of "clear" and "camouflaged" animals, we found that with a proper choice of category prototypes, the generalization functions are monotone decreasing, similar to the generalization functions of biological systems. Our findings support the hypothesis of the study.
summary: Object detection and recognition are fundamental functions underlying the success of species. Because the appearance of an object exhibits a large variability, the brain has to group these different stimuli under the same object identity, a process of generalization. Does the process of generalization follow some general principles or is it an ad-hoc "bag-of-tricks"? The Universal Law of Generalization provided evidence that generalization follows similar properties across a variety of species and tasks. Here we test the hypothesis that the internal representations underlying generalization reflect the natural properties of object detection and recognition in our environment rather than the specifics of the system solving these problems. By training a deep-neural-network with images of "clear" and "camouflaged" animals, we found that with a proper choice of category prototypes, the generalization functions are monotone decreasing, similar to the generalization functions of biological systems. Our findings support the hypothesis of the study.
abstract_zh: 物体检测和识别是物种成功的基本功能。由于物体的外观表现出很大的可变性，大脑必须将这些不同的刺激归入同一物体的身份下，这是一个概括的过程。泛化过程是否遵循一些一般原则，还是一个临时的“技巧包”？普遍化法则提供的证据表明，不同物种和任务的普遍化遵循相似的属性。在这里，我们测试了这样一个假设：泛化背后的内部表示反映了我们环境中对象检测和识别的自然属性，而不是解决这些问题的系统的细节。通过使用“清晰”和“伪装”动物的图像训练深度神经网络，我们发现，通过正确选择类别原型，泛化函数是单调递减的，类似于生物系统的泛化函数。我们的研究结果支持了该研究的假设。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了泛化是否遵循普遍规律，并通过深度学习模型验证了自然属性在泛化中的作用。
AI.motivation: 验证泛化过程是否基于环境自然属性而非系统特定因素，探索其跨物种和任务的普遍性。
AI.method: 通过训练深度神经网络，使用清晰与伪装动物图像，并选择适当的类别原型来测试泛化函数。
AI.result: 发现选择适当原型后，泛化函数呈单调递减，与生物系统类似。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果支持了泛化过程反映环境自然属性而非系统特定因素的假设。

authors_text: Thierry GÉraud,Nicolas Boutry,Sébastien Crozet,Edwin Carlinet,Laurent Najman
title: A Proof of the Tree of Shapes in n-D
title_zh: n 维形状树的证明
abstract: In this paper, we prove that the self-dual morphological hierarchical structure computed on a n-D gray-level wellcomposed image u by the algorithm of G{é}raud et al. [1] is exactly the mathematical structure defined to be the tree of shape of u in Najman et al [2]. We recall that this algorithm is in quasi-linear time and thus considered to be optimal. The tree of shapes leads to many applications in mathematical morphology and in image processing like grain filtering, shapings, image segmentation, and so on.
summary: In this paper, we prove that the self-dual morphological hierarchical structure computed on a n-D gray-level wellcomposed image u by the algorithm of G{é}raud et al. [1] is exactly the mathematical structure defined to be the tree of shape of u in Najman et al [2]. We recall that this algorithm is in quasi-linear time and thus considered to be optimal. The tree of shapes leads to many applications in mathematical morphology and in image processing like grain filtering, shapings, image segmentation, and so on.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们证明了通过 G{é}raud 等人的算法在 n 维灰度良好合成图像 u 上计算的自对偶形态层次结构。 [1]正是Najman等人[2]中定义为u形状树的数学结构。我们记得该算法是准线性时间的，因此被认为是最优的。形状树在数学形态学和图像处理中产生了许多应用，如颗粒过滤、整形、图像分割等。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了Géraud等人提出的n维灰度图像形态学分层结构算法与Najman等人定义的形状树数学结构的一致性。
AI.motivation: 建立形态学分层结构算法的理论基础，确保其在图像处理中的高效性与准确性，以支持如图像分割等应用。
AI.method: 通过数学证明，验证Géraud算法生成的自对偶形态学分层结构与Najman定义的形状树在n维空间中的等价性。
AI.result: 证明该算法在准线性时间内正确计算形状树，确认其作为最优算法的理论依据。
AI.conclusion: 该证明为形态学分层结构的理论优化及图像处理应用提供了可靠基础。

authors_text: Hongzhi Hua,Kaigui Wu,Guixuan Wen
title: Deep Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning with Hybrid Action Spaces based on Maximum Entropy
title_zh: 基于最大熵的混合动作空间的深度多智能体强化学习
abstract: Multi-agent deep reinforcement learning has been applied to address a variety of complex problems with either discrete or continuous action spaces and achieved great success. However, most real-world environments cannot be described by only discrete action spaces or only continuous action spaces. And there are few works having ever utilized deep reinforcement learning (drl) to multi-agent problems with hybrid action spaces. Therefore, we propose a novel algorithm: Deep Multi-Agent Hybrid Soft Actor-Critic (MAHSAC) to fill this gap. This algorithm follows the centralized training but decentralized execution (CTDE) paradigm, and extend the Soft Actor-Critic algorithm (SAC) to handle hybrid action space problems in Multi-Agent environments based on maximum entropy. Our experiences are running on an easy multi-agent particle world with a continuous observation and discrete action space, along with some basic simulated physics. The experimental results show that MAHSAC has good performance in training speed, stability, and anti-interference ability. At the same time, it outperforms existing independent deep hybrid learning method in cooperative scenarios and competitive scenarios.
summary: Multi-agent deep reinforcement learning has been applied to address a variety of complex problems with either discrete or continuous action spaces and achieved great success. However, most real-world environments cannot be described by only discrete action spaces or only continuous action spaces. And there are few works having ever utilized deep reinforcement learning (drl) to multi-agent problems with hybrid action spaces. Therefore, we propose a novel algorithm: Deep Multi-Agent Hybrid Soft Actor-Critic (MAHSAC) to fill this gap. This algorithm follows the centralized training but decentralized execution (CTDE) paradigm, and extend the Soft Actor-Critic algorithm (SAC) to handle hybrid action space problems in Multi-Agent environments based on maximum entropy. Our experiences are running on an easy multi-agent particle world with a continuous observation and discrete action space, along with some basic simulated physics. The experimental results show that MAHSAC has good performance in training speed, stability, and anti-interference ability. At the same time, it outperforms existing independent deep hybrid learning method in cooperative scenarios and competitive scenarios.
abstract_zh: 多智能体深度强化学习已被应用于解决具有离散或连续动作空间的各种复杂问题，并取得了巨大成功。然而，大多数现实世界的环境不能仅用离散的动作空间或连续的动作空间来描述。而且很少有作品利用深度强化学习（drl）来解决混合动作空间的多智能体问题。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的算法：深度多智能体混合软演员评论家（MAHSAC）来填补这一空白。该算法遵循集中训练分散执行（CTDE）范式，并扩展了Soft Actor-Critic算法（SAC），以处理基于最大熵的多Agent环境中的混合动作空间问题。我们的体验运行在一个简单的多智能体粒子世界上，具有连续观察和离散动作空间，以及一些基本的模拟物理。实验结果表明MAHSAC在训练速度、稳定性、抗干扰能力等方面均具有良好的表现。同时在合作场景和竞争场景上均优于现有的独立深度混合学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于最大熵的深度多智能体强化学习算法MAHSAC，用于解决混合动作空间（离散和连续动作结合）的多智能体问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多针对单一类型动作空间（离散或连续），但实际场景常需混合动作空间，缺乏有效算法来处理这种复杂性。
AI.method: 基于CTDE框架扩展Soft Actor-Critic算法，通过最大熵原则处理混合动作空间，并在包含连续观测和离散动作的粒子世界环境中进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明MAHSAC在训练速度、稳定性及抗干扰能力上表现优异，且在协作与竞争场景中均优于现有独立深度混合学习方法。
AI.conclusion: MAHSAC有效解决了多智能体混合动作空间问题，验证了其在复杂环境中的适用性和优越性。

authors_text: Saurabh Farkya,Zachary Daniels,Aswin Nadamuni Raghavan,David Zhang,Michael Piacentino
title: Saccade Mechanisms for Image Classification, Object Detection and Tracking
title_zh: 用于图像分类、目标检测和跟踪的扫视机制
comment: 4 Pages, 6 figures, will be presented at CVPR2022-NeuroVision workshop as a Lightning talk
comments: 4 Pages, 6 figures, will be presented at CVPR2022-NeuroVision workshop as a Lightning talk
abstract: We examine how the saccade mechanism from biological vision can be used to make deep neural networks more efficient for classification and object detection problems. Our proposed approach is based on the ideas of attention-driven visual processing and saccades, miniature eye movements influenced by attention. We conduct experiments by analyzing: i) the robustness of different deep neural network (DNN) feature extractors to partially-sensed images for image classification and object detection, and ii) the utility of saccades in masking image patches for image classification and object tracking. Experiments with convolutional nets (ResNet-18) and transformer-based models (ViT, DETR, TransTrack) are conducted on several datasets (CIFAR-10, DAVSOD, MSCOCO, and MOT17). Our experiments show intelligent data reduction via learning to mimic human saccades when used in conjunction with state-of-the-art DNNs for classification, detection, and tracking tasks. We observed minimal drop in performance for the classification and detection tasks while only using about 30\% of the original sensor data. We discuss how the saccade mechanism can inform hardware design via ``in-pixel'' processing.
summary: We examine how the saccade mechanism from biological vision can be used to make deep neural networks more efficient for classification and object detection problems. Our proposed approach is based on the ideas of attention-driven visual processing and saccades, miniature eye movements influenced by attention. We conduct experiments by analyzing: i) the robustness of different deep neural network (DNN) feature extractors to partially-sensed images for image classification and object detection, and ii) the utility of saccades in masking image patches for image classification and object tracking. Experiments with convolutional nets (ResNet-18) and transformer-based models (ViT, DETR, TransTrack) are conducted on several datasets (CIFAR-10, DAVSOD, MSCOCO, and MOT17). Our experiments show intelligent data reduction via learning to mimic human saccades when used in conjunction with state-of-the-art DNNs for classification, detection, and tracking tasks. We observed minimal drop in performance for the classification and detection tasks while only using about 30\% of the original sensor data. We discuss how the saccade mechanism can inform hardware design via ``in-pixel'' processing.
abstract_zh: 我们研究如何使用生物视觉的眼跳机制使深度神经网络更有效地解决分类和目标检测问题。我们提出的方法基于注意力驱动的视觉处理和眼跳的思想，即受注意力影响的微型眼球运动。我们通过分析以下内容进行实验：i）不同深度神经网络（DNN）特征提取器对用于图像分类和对象检测的部分感知图像的鲁棒性，以及ii）眼跳在掩蔽图像块以进行图像分类和对象跟踪中的效用。在多个数据集（CIFAR-10、DAVSOD、MSCOCO 和 MOT17）上进行了卷积网络 (ResNet-18) 和基于 Transformer 的模型（ViT、DETR、TransTrack）的实验。我们的实验表明，与最先进的 DNN 结合使用来执行分类、检测和跟踪任务时，可以通过学习模仿人类眼跳来实现智能数据缩减。我们观察到分类和检测任务的性能下降最小，而仅使用约 30% 的原始传感器数据。我们讨论扫视机制如何通过“像素内”处理为硬件设计提供信息。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何将生物视觉中的扫视机制应用于深度神经网络，以提升图像分类、目标检测和跟踪任务的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有深度神经网络在处理视觉任务时计算量大且效率低，而生物视觉中的扫视机制能通过注意力驱动的视觉处理实现高效信息筛选。
AI.method: 基于注意力驱动的视觉处理和扫视机制，通过实验分析不同深度网络（如ResNet-18、ViT等）在部分感知图像下的鲁棒性，并利用扫视机制遮蔽图像块以减少数据量。
AI.result: 实验表明，在仅使用约30%原始传感器数据的情况下，分类和检测任务性能下降极小，验证了扫视机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 扫视机制可为硬件设计提供灵感，通过像素级处理实现更高效的数据采集与处理。

authors_text: Zhangyang Gao,Cheng Tan,Lirong Wu,Stan Z. Li
title: SimVP: Simpler yet Better Video Prediction
title_zh: SimVP：更简单但更好的视频预测
abstract: From CNN, RNN, to ViT, we have witnessed remarkable advancements in video prediction, incorporating auxiliary inputs, elaborate neural architectures, and sophisticated training strategies. We admire these progresses but are confused about the necessity: is there a simple method that can perform comparably well? This paper proposes SimVP, a simple video prediction model that is completely built upon CNN and trained by MSE loss in an end-to-end fashion. Without introducing any additional tricks and complicated strategies, we can achieve state-of-the-art performance on five benchmark datasets. Through extended experiments, we demonstrate that SimVP has strong generalization and extensibility on real-world datasets. The significant reduction of training cost makes it easier to scale to complex scenarios. We believe SimVP can serve as a solid baseline to stimulate the further development of video prediction. The code is available at \href{https://github.com/gaozhangyang/SimVP-Simpler-yet-Better-Video-Prediction}{Github}.
summary: From CNN, RNN, to ViT, we have witnessed remarkable advancements in video prediction, incorporating auxiliary inputs, elaborate neural architectures, and sophisticated training strategies. We admire these progresses but are confused about the necessity: is there a simple method that can perform comparably well? This paper proposes SimVP, a simple video prediction model that is completely built upon CNN and trained by MSE loss in an end-to-end fashion. Without introducing any additional tricks and complicated strategies, we can achieve state-of-the-art performance on five benchmark datasets. Through extended experiments, we demonstrate that SimVP has strong generalization and extensibility on real-world datasets. The significant reduction of training cost makes it easier to scale to complex scenarios. We believe SimVP can serve as a solid baseline to stimulate the further development of video prediction. The code is available at \href{https://github.com/gaozhangyang/SimVP-Simpler-yet-Better-Video-Prediction}{Github}.
abstract_zh: 从 CNN、RNN 到 ViT，我们见证了视频预测方面的显着进步，结合了辅助输入、复杂的神经架构和复杂的训练策略。我们钦佩这些进步，但对其必要性感到困惑：是否有一种简单的方法可以表现得相当好？本文提出了 SimVP，一种简单的视频预测模型，完全基于 CNN 构建，并通过 MSE 损失以端到端的方式进行训练。无需引入任何额外的技巧和复杂的策略，我们就可以在五个基准数据集上实现最先进的性能。通过扩展实验，我们证明 SimVP 在现实数据集上具有很强的泛化性和可扩展性。训练成本的显着降低使得更容易扩展到复杂的场景。我们相信 SimVP 可以作为刺激视频预测进一步发展的坚实基础。该代码可在 \href{https://github.com/gaozhangyang/SimVP-Simpler-yet-Better-Video-Prediction}{Github} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SimVP，一种基于CNN的简单视频预测模型，通过端到端MSE训练实现与复杂方法相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管视频预测领域引入了复杂架构和训练策略，但作者质疑是否需要如此复杂，试图验证简单方法是否能达到同等效果。
AI.method: 完全基于CNN构建模型，采用端到端MSE损失训练，不依赖额外技巧或复杂策略。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，展示强泛化能力与扩展性，显著降低训练成本。
AI.conclusion: SimVP作为简洁高效的基线模型，可推动视频预测领域进一步发展。

search_text: SimVP: Simpler yet Better Video Prediction SimVP：更简单但更好的视频预测 From CNN, RNN, to ViT, we have witnessed remarkable advancements in video prediction, incorporating auxiliary inputs, elaborate neural architectures, and sophisticated training strategies. We admire these progresses but are confused about the necessity: is there a simple method that can perform comparably well? This paper proposes SimVP, a simple video prediction model that is completely built upon CNN and trained by MSE loss in an end-to-end fashion. Without introducing any additional tricks and complicated strategies, we can achieve state-of-the-art performance on five benchmark datasets. Through extended experiments, we demonstrate that SimVP has strong generalization and extensibility on real-world datasets. The significant reduction of training cost makes it easier to scale to complex scenarios. We believe SimVP can serve as a solid baseline to stimulate the further development of video prediction. The code is available at \href{https://github.com/gaozhangyang/SimVP-Simpler-yet-Better-Video-Prediction}{Github}. 从 CNN、RNN 到 ViT，我们见证了视频预测方面的显着进步，结合了辅助输入、复杂的神经架构和复杂的训练策略。我们钦佩这些进步，但对其必要性感到困惑：是否有一种简单的方法可以表现得相当好？本文提出了 SimVP，一种简单的视频预测模型，完全基于 CNN 构建，并通过 MSE 损失以端到端的方式进行训练。无需引入任何额外的技巧和复杂的策略，我们就可以在五个基准数据集上实现最先进的性能。通过扩展实验，我们证明 SimVP 在现实数据集上具有很强的泛化性和可扩展性。训练成本的显着降低使得更容易扩展到复杂的场景。我们相信 SimVP 可以作为刺激视频预测进一步发展的坚实基础。该代码可在 \href{https://github.com/gaozhangyang/SimVP-Simpler-yet-Better-Video-Prediction}{Github} 获取。 本文提出SimVP，一种基于CNN的简单视频预测模型，通过端到端MSE训练实现与复杂方法相当的性能。 Zhangyang Gao,Cheng Tan,Lirong Wu,Stan Z. Li cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Jason Xinyu Liu,Ankit Shah,Eric Rosen,Mingxi Jia,George Konidaris,Stefanie Tellex
title: LTL-Transfer: Skill Transfer for Temporal Task Specification
title_zh: LTL-Transfer：临时任务规范的技能转移
comment: ICRA 2024
comments: ICRA 2024
abstract: Deploying robots in real-world environments, such as households and manufacturing lines, requires generalization across novel task specifications without violating safety constraints. Linear temporal logic (LTL) is a widely used task specification language with a compositional grammar that naturally induces commonalities among tasks while preserving safety guarantees. However, most prior work on reinforcement learning with LTL specifications treats every new task independently, thus requiring large amounts of training data to generalize. We propose LTL-Transfer, a zero-shot transfer algorithm that composes task-agnostic skills learned during training to safely satisfy a wide variety of novel LTL task specifications. Experiments in Minecraft-inspired domains show that after training on only 50 tasks, LTL-Transfer can solve over 90% of 100 challenging unseen tasks and 100% of 300 commonly used novel tasks without violating any safety constraints. We deployed LTL-Transfer at the task-planning level of a quadruped mobile manipulator to demonstrate its zero-shot transfer ability for fetch-and-deliver and navigation tasks.
summary: Deploying robots in real-world environments, such as households and manufacturing lines, requires generalization across novel task specifications without violating safety constraints. Linear temporal logic (LTL) is a widely used task specification language with a compositional grammar that naturally induces commonalities among tasks while preserving safety guarantees. However, most prior work on reinforcement learning with LTL specifications treats every new task independently, thus requiring large amounts of training data to generalize. We propose LTL-Transfer, a zero-shot transfer algorithm that composes task-agnostic skills learned during training to safely satisfy a wide variety of novel LTL task specifications. Experiments in Minecraft-inspired domains show that after training on only 50 tasks, LTL-Transfer can solve over 90% of 100 challenging unseen tasks and 100% of 300 commonly used novel tasks without violating any safety constraints. We deployed LTL-Transfer at the task-planning level of a quadruped mobile manipulator to demonstrate its zero-shot transfer ability for fetch-and-deliver and navigation tasks.
abstract_zh: 在现实环境（例如家庭和生产线）中部署机器人需要在不违反安全限制的情况下概括新的任务规范。线性时序逻辑（LTL）是一种广泛使用的任务规范语言，其组合语法可以自然地诱导任务之间的共性，同时保留安全保证。然而，大多数先前关于使用 LTL 规范的强化学习的工作都是独立处理每个新任务，因此需要大量的训练数据来进行泛化。我们提出了 LTL-Transfer，这是一种零样本传输算法，它组合了在训练过程中学到的与任务无关的技能，以安全地满足各种新颖的 LTL 任务规范。在受 Minecraft 启发的领域中进行的实验表明，在仅对 50 个任务进行训练后，LTL-Transfer 可以在不违反任何安全约束的情况下解决 100 个具有挑战性的未见过的任务中的 90% 以上以及 300 个常用的新颖任务中的 100%。我们在四足移动机械手的任务规划级别部署了 LTL-Transfer，以展示其用于抓取和交付以及导航任务的零次传输能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LTL-Transfer算法，通过零样本迁移学习实现机器人对新型线性时序逻辑（LTL）任务规范的安全满足。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习方法需独立训练每个LTL任务，消耗大量数据且难以泛化。现实场景需要机器人能安全执行新型任务规范，需减少训练数据依赖。
AI.method: 设计零样本迁移算法LTL-Transfer，利用训练阶段习得的通用技能组合，动态生成满足新型LTL规范的策略，确保安全约束不被违反。
AI.result: 在Minecraft模拟环境中，仅训练50个任务后，算法可解决90%的100个新任务和全部300个常用任务；成功部署于四足移动机械臂，完成取送与导航任务。
AI.conclusion: LTL-Transfer通过技能迁移显著降低数据需求，验证了其在复杂现实场景中安全执行多样化LTL任务的可行性，推动机器人通用性提升。

authors_text: Runxuan Miao,Erdem Koyuncu
title: Federated Momentum Contrastive Clustering
title_zh: 联合动量对比聚类
comment: Originally submitted March 2022
comments: Originally submitted March 2022
abstract: We present federated momentum contrastive clustering (FedMCC), a learning framework that can not only extract discriminative representations over distributed local data but also perform data clustering. In FedMCC, a transformed data pair passes through both the online and target networks, resulting in four representations over which the losses are determined. The resulting high-quality representations generated by FedMCC can outperform several existing self-supervised learning methods for linear evaluation and semi-supervised learning tasks. FedMCC can easily be adapted to ordinary centralized clustering through what we call momentum contrastive clustering (MCC). We show that MCC achieves state-of-the-art clustering accuracy results in certain datasets such as STL-10 and ImageNet-10. We also present a method to reduce the memory footprint of our clustering schemes.
summary: We present federated momentum contrastive clustering (FedMCC), a learning framework that can not only extract discriminative representations over distributed local data but also perform data clustering. In FedMCC, a transformed data pair passes through both the online and target networks, resulting in four representations over which the losses are determined. The resulting high-quality representations generated by FedMCC can outperform several existing self-supervised learning methods for linear evaluation and semi-supervised learning tasks. FedMCC can easily be adapted to ordinary centralized clustering through what we call momentum contrastive clustering (MCC). We show that MCC achieves state-of-the-art clustering accuracy results in certain datasets such as STL-10 and ImageNet-10. We also present a method to reduce the memory footprint of our clustering schemes.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了联合动量对比聚类（FedMCC），这是一种学习框架，不仅可以提取分布式本地数据的判别表示，还可以执行数据聚类。在 FedMCC 中，转换后的数据对同时通过在线网络和目标网络，产生四种表示形式，根据这些表示形式确定损失。 FedMCC 生成的高质量表示可以优于用于线性评估和半监督学习任务的几种现有自监督学习方法。 FedMCC 可以通过我们所说的动量对比集群 (MCC) 轻松适应普通的集中式集群。我们证明 MCC 在某些数据集（例如 STL-10 和 ImageNet-10）中实现了最先进的聚类精度结果。我们还提出了一种减少聚类方案内存占用的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出联邦动量对比聚类（FedMCC）框架，在分布式数据环境下实现判别性表示学习与数据聚类。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在分布式数据聚类中存在表示学习与聚类性能不足、内存效率低等问题，需结合联邦学习与对比学习优势。
AI.method: 通过在线网络与目标网络处理转换数据对生成四重表示，利用对比损失优化表示；提出MCC方法适配集中式聚类，并设计内存优化策略。
AI.result: FedMCC在STL-10和ImageNet-10等数据集上达到聚类准确率SOTA，且内存占用显著降低。
AI.conclusion: FedMCC有效结合联邦学习与对比学习，实现高效分布式聚类，同时具备良好的扩展性与内存优化能力。

authors_text: Junde Wu,Huihui Fang,Fangxin Shang,Zhaowei Wang,Dalu Yang,Wenshuo Zhou,Yehui Yang,Yanwu Xu
title: Learning self-calibrated optic disc and cup segmentation from multi-rater annotations
title_zh: 从多评估者注释中学习自校准视盘和视杯分割
abstract: The segmentation of optic disc(OD) and optic cup(OC) from fundus images is an important fundamental task for glaucoma diagnosis. In the clinical practice, it is often necessary to collect opinions from multiple experts to obtain the final OD/OC annotation. This clinical routine helps to mitigate the individual bias. But when data is multiply annotated, standard deep learning models will be inapplicable. In this paper, we propose a novel neural network framework to learn OD/OC segmentation from multi-rater annotations. The segmentation results are self-calibrated through the iterative optimization of multi-rater expertness estimation and calibrated OD/OC segmentation. In this way, the proposed method can realize a mutual improvement of both tasks and finally obtain a refined segmentation result. Specifically, we propose Diverging Model(DivM) and Converging Model(ConM) to process the two tasks respectively. ConM segments the raw image based on the multi-rater expertness map provided by DivM. DivM generates multi-rater expertness map from the segmentation mask provided by ConM. The experiment results show that by recurrently running ConM and DivM, the results can be self-calibrated so as to outperform a range of state-of-the-art(SOTA) multi-rater segmentation methods.
summary: The segmentation of optic disc(OD) and optic cup(OC) from fundus images is an important fundamental task for glaucoma diagnosis. In the clinical practice, it is often necessary to collect opinions from multiple experts to obtain the final OD/OC annotation. This clinical routine helps to mitigate the individual bias. But when data is multiply annotated, standard deep learning models will be inapplicable. In this paper, we propose a novel neural network framework to learn OD/OC segmentation from multi-rater annotations. The segmentation results are self-calibrated through the iterative optimization of multi-rater expertness estimation and calibrated OD/OC segmentation. In this way, the proposed method can realize a mutual improvement of both tasks and finally obtain a refined segmentation result. Specifically, we propose Diverging Model(DivM) and Converging Model(ConM) to process the two tasks respectively. ConM segments the raw image based on the multi-rater expertness map provided by DivM. DivM generates multi-rater expertness map from the segmentation mask provided by ConM. The experiment results show that by recurrently running ConM and DivM, the results can be self-calibrated so as to outperform a range of state-of-the-art(SOTA) multi-rater segmentation methods.
abstract_zh: 从眼底图像中分割视盘（OD）和视杯（OC）是青光眼诊断的一项重要基础任务。在临床实践中，常常需要收集多位专家的意见才能得到最终的OD/OC注释。这种临床常规有助于减轻个体偏见。但当数据被多重注释时，标准的深度学习模型将不再适用。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的神经网络框架，用于从多评估者注释中学习 OD/OC 分割。通过多评估者专业评估和校准 OD/OC 分割的迭代优化，对分割结果进行自校准。这样，所提出的方法可以实现两个任务的相互改进，最终获得精细的分割结果。具体来说，我们提出发散模型（DivM）和收敛模型（ConM）分别处理这两个任务。 ConM 根据 DivM 提供的多评估者专业知识图对原始图像进行分割。 DivM 根据 ConM 提供的分割掩码生成多评估者专业知识图。实验结果表明，通过循环运行 ConM 和 DivM，结果可以进行自校准，从而优于一系列最先进的 (SOTA) 多评分者分割方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从多标注者注释中学习自校准视盘和视杯分割的神经网络框架。
AI.motivation: 临床实践中多专家注释可减少个体偏差，但标准深度学习模型无法处理多标注数据，导致分割精度不足。
AI.method: 设计了发散模型（DivM）和收敛模型（ConM），通过迭代优化多标注者专家性估计与分割结果的相互校准实现任务协同提升。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法通过反复运行ConM和DivM实现自校准，在多个指标上优于现有最先进的多标注分割方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架通过多标注者注释的相互校准机制，有效提升了视盘视杯分割的精度与鲁棒性。

search_text: Learning self-calibrated optic disc and cup segmentation from multi-rater annotations 从多评估者注释中学习自校准视盘和视杯分割 The segmentation of optic disc(OD) and optic cup(OC) from fundus images is an important fundamental task for glaucoma diagnosis. In the clinical practice, it is often necessary to collect opinions from multiple experts to obtain the final OD/OC annotation. This clinical routine helps to mitigate the individual bias. But when data is multiply annotated, standard deep learning models will be inapplicable. In this paper, we propose a novel neural network framework to learn OD/OC segmentation from multi-rater annotations. The segmentation results are self-calibrated through the iterative optimization of multi-rater expertness estimation and calibrated OD/OC segmentation. In this way, the proposed method can realize a mutual improvement of both tasks and finally obtain a refined segmentation result. Specifically, we propose Diverging Model(DivM) and Converging Model(ConM) to process the two tasks respectively. ConM segments the raw image based on the multi-rater expertness map provided by DivM. DivM generates multi-rater expertness map from the segmentation mask provided by ConM. The experiment results show that by recurrently running ConM and DivM, the results can be self-calibrated so as to outperform a range of state-of-the-art(SOTA) multi-rater segmentation methods. 从眼底图像中分割视盘（OD）和视杯（OC）是青光眼诊断的一项重要基础任务。在临床实践中，常常需要收集多位专家的意见才能得到最终的OD/OC注释。这种临床常规有助于减轻个体偏见。但当数据被多重注释时，标准的深度学习模型将不再适用。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的神经网络框架，用于从多评估者注释中学习 OD/OC 分割。通过多评估者专业评估和校准 OD/OC 分割的迭代优化，对分割结果进行自校准。这样，所提出的方法可以实现两个任务的相互改进，最终获得精细的分割结果。具体来说，我们提出发散模型（DivM）和收敛模型（ConM）分别处理这两个任务。 ConM 根据 DivM 提供的多评估者专业知识图对原始图像进行分割。 DivM 根据 ConM 提供的分割掩码生成多评估者专业知识图。实验结果表明，通过循环运行 ConM 和 DivM，结果可以进行自校准，从而优于一系列最先进的 (SOTA) 多评分者分割方法。 本文提出了一种从多标注者注释中学习自校准视盘和视杯分割的神经网络框架。 Junde Wu,Huihui Fang,Fangxin Shang,Zhaowei Wang,Dalu Yang,Wenshuo Zhou,Yehui Yang,Yanwu Xu eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Timothy D Barfoot,Connor Holmes,Frederike Dumbgen
title: A Fine Line: Total Least-Squares Line Fitting as QCQP Optimization
title_zh: 细线：作为 QCQP 优化的总最小二乘线拟合
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures
comments: 11 pages, 5 figures
abstract: This note uses the Total Least-Squares (TLS) line-fitting problem as a canvas to explore some modern optimization tools. The contribution is meant to be tutorial in nature. The TLS problem has a lot of mathematical similarities to important problems in robotics and computer vision but is easier to visualize and understand. We demonstrate how to turn this problem into a Quadratically Constrained Quadratic Program (QCQP) so that it can be cast either as an eigenproblem or a Semi-Definite Program (SDP). We then turn to the more challenging situation where a Geman-McClure cost function and M-estimation are used to reject outlier datapoints. Using Black-Rangarajan duality, we show this can also be cast as a QCQP and solved as an SDP; however, with a lot of data the SDP can be slow and as such we show how we can construct a certificate of optimality for a faster method such as Iteratively Reweighted Least-Squares (IRLS).
summary: This note uses the Total Least-Squares (TLS) line-fitting problem as a canvas to explore some modern optimization tools. The contribution is meant to be tutorial in nature. The TLS problem has a lot of mathematical similarities to important problems in robotics and computer vision but is easier to visualize and understand. We demonstrate how to turn this problem into a Quadratically Constrained Quadratic Program (QCQP) so that it can be cast either as an eigenproblem or a Semi-Definite Program (SDP). We then turn to the more challenging situation where a Geman-McClure cost function and M-estimation are used to reject outlier datapoints. Using Black-Rangarajan duality, we show this can also be cast as a QCQP and solved as an SDP; however, with a lot of data the SDP can be slow and as such we show how we can construct a certificate of optimality for a faster method such as Iteratively Reweighted Least-Squares (IRLS).
abstract_zh: 本文使用总最小二乘 (TLS) 线拟合问题作为画布来探索一些现代优化工具。该贡献本质上是教程。 TLS 问题与机器人和计算机视觉中的重要问题有很多数学相似之处，但更容易可视化和理解。我们演示了如何将此问题转化为二次约束二次规划 (QCQP)，以便可以将其转换为特征问题或半定规划 (SDP)。然后我们转向更具挑战性的情况，其中使用 Geman-McClure 成本函数和 M 估计来拒绝异常数据点。使用 Black-Rangarajan 对偶性，我们证明这也可以转换为 QCQP 并作为 SDP 求解；然而，对于大量数据，SDP 可能会很慢，因此我们展示了如何为更快的方法（例如迭代重新加权最小二乘法 (IRLS)）构建最优性证书。

AI.tldr: 本文将总最小二乘（TLS）线拟合问题转化为二次约束二次规划（QCQP）优化问题，并探讨其在异常值处理中的应用。
AI.motivation: TLS问题在机器人和计算机视觉中具有重要地位，但其优化方法较难直观理解。通过教程式分析，本文旨在简化复杂问题并提供实用优化工具。
AI.method: 将TLS问题转化为QCQP形式，通过特征问题或半定规划（SDP）求解；针对异常值，采用Geman-McClure成本函数与M-估计，并利用Black-Rangarajan对偶性构建QCQP，同时提出最优性证书以加速IRLS方法。
AI.result: 成功将TLS问题与异常值处理转化为QCQP/SDP框架，并为大规模数据提供了IRLS的优化性验证方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过教程式分析展示了现代优化工具在TLS问题中的应用，为处理异常值和提升计算效率提供了理论支持与实践方案。

authors_text: Suhan Shetty,Teguh Lembono,Tobias Loew,Sylvain Calinon
title: Tensor Train for Global Optimization Problems in Robotics
title_zh: 用于机器人全局优化问题的张量训练
comment: 25 pages, 21 figures
comments: 25 pages, 21 figures
abstract: The convergence of many numerical optimization techniques is highly dependent on the initial guess given to the solver. To address this issue, we propose a novel approach that utilizes tensor methods to initialize existing optimization solvers near global optima. Our method does not require access to a database of good solutions. We first transform the cost function, which depends on both task parameters and optimization variables, into a probability density function. Unlike existing approaches, the joint probability distribution of the task parameters and optimization variables is approximated using the Tensor Train model, which enables efficient conditioning and sampling. We treat the task parameters as random variables, and for a given task, we generate samples for decision variables from the conditional distribution to initialize the optimization solver. Our method can produce multiple solutions (when they exist) faster than existing methods. We first evaluate the approach on benchmark functions for numerical optimization that are hard to solve using gradient-based optimization solvers with a naive initialization. The results show that the proposed method can generate samples close to global optima and from multiple modes. We then demonstrate the generality and relevance of our framework to robotics by applying it to inverse kinematics with obstacles and motion planning problems with a 7-DoF manipulator.
summary: The convergence of many numerical optimization techniques is highly dependent on the initial guess given to the solver. To address this issue, we propose a novel approach that utilizes tensor methods to initialize existing optimization solvers near global optima. Our method does not require access to a database of good solutions. We first transform the cost function, which depends on both task parameters and optimization variables, into a probability density function. Unlike existing approaches, the joint probability distribution of the task parameters and optimization variables is approximated using the Tensor Train model, which enables efficient conditioning and sampling. We treat the task parameters as random variables, and for a given task, we generate samples for decision variables from the conditional distribution to initialize the optimization solver. Our method can produce multiple solutions (when they exist) faster than existing methods. We first evaluate the approach on benchmark functions for numerical optimization that are hard to solve using gradient-based optimization solvers with a naive initialization. The results show that the proposed method can generate samples close to global optima and from multiple modes. We then demonstrate the generality and relevance of our framework to robotics by applying it to inverse kinematics with obstacles and motion planning problems with a 7-DoF manipulator.
abstract_zh: 许多数值优化技术的收敛高度依赖于给予求解器的初始猜测。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新方法，利用张量方法来初始化接近全局最优的现有优化求解器。我们的方法不需要访问良好解决方案的数据库。我们首先将取决于任务参数和优化变量的成本函数转换为概率密度函数。与现有方法不同，任务参数和优化变量的联合概率分布使用张量训练模型进行近似，从而实现高效的调节和采样。我们将任务参数视为随机变量，对于给定的任务，我们从条件分布中生成决策变量样本以初始化优化求解器。我们的方法可以比现有方法更快地生成多个解决方案（如果存在）。我们首先评估用于数值优化的基准函数的方法，这些函数很难使用基于梯度的优化求解器和简单的初始化来解决。结果表明，所提出的方法可以从多种模式生成接近全局最优的样本。然后，我们通过将其应用于具有障碍物的逆运动学和 7-DoF 机械臂的运动规划问题，展示了我们的框架与机器人技术的通用性和相关性。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出利用张量展开方法改进机器人领域全局优化问题的求解，通过概率密度函数建模和条件采样技术提升优化器初始化效果。
AI.motivation: 传统数值优化方法的收敛性高度依赖初始猜测，易陷入局部最优解，且需依赖历史解决方案数据库，限制了其在复杂机器人问题中的应用。
AI.method: 将任务参数与优化变量的联合概率分布用张量展开模型近似，通过概率密度函数变换实现高效条件采样，生成决策变量初始值以初始化优化求解器。
AI.result: 在基准测试函数和7自由度机械臂逆运动学/避障运动规划任务中验证，方法能快速生成接近全局最优解的多模态解，优于传统梯度下降初始化方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的张量展开框架为机器人优化问题提供了无需先验解的高效初始化方案，证明了其在复杂非凸优化场景中的通用性和有效性。

search_text: Tensor Train for Global Optimization Problems in Robotics 用于机器人全局优化问题的张量训练 The convergence of many numerical optimization techniques is highly dependent on the initial guess given to the solver. To address this issue, we propose a novel approach that utilizes tensor methods to initialize existing optimization solvers near global optima. Our method does not require access to a database of good solutions. We first transform the cost function, which depends on both task parameters and optimization variables, into a probability density function. Unlike existing approaches, the joint probability distribution of the task parameters and optimization variables is approximated using the Tensor Train model, which enables efficient conditioning and sampling. We treat the task parameters as random variables, and for a given task, we generate samples for decision variables from the conditional distribution to initialize the optimization solver. Our method can produce multiple solutions (when they exist) faster than existing methods. We first evaluate the approach on benchmark functions for numerical optimization that are hard to solve using gradient-based optimization solvers with a naive initialization. The results show that the proposed method can generate samples close to global optima and from multiple modes. We then demonstrate the generality and relevance of our framework to robotics by applying it to inverse kinematics with obstacles and motion planning problems with a 7-DoF manipulator. 许多数值优化技术的收敛高度依赖于给予求解器的初始猜测。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新方法，利用张量方法来初始化接近全局最优的现有优化求解器。我们的方法不需要访问良好解决方案的数据库。我们首先将取决于任务参数和优化变量的成本函数转换为概率密度函数。与现有方法不同，任务参数和优化变量的联合概率分布使用张量训练模型进行近似，从而实现高效的调节和采样。我们将任务参数视为随机变量，对于给定的任务，我们从条件分布中生成决策变量样本以初始化优化求解器。我们的方法可以比现有方法更快地生成多个解决方案（如果存在）。我们首先评估用于数值优化的基准函数的方法，这些函数很难使用基于梯度的优化求解器和简单的初始化来解决。结果表明，所提出的方法可以从多种模式生成接近全局最优的样本。然后，我们通过将其应用于具有障碍物的逆运动学和 7-DoF 机械臂的运动规划问题，展示了我们的框架与机器人技术的通用性和相关性。 该论文提出利用张量展开方法改进机器人领域全局优化问题的求解，通过概率密度函数建模和条件采样技术提升优化器初始化效果。 Suhan Shetty,Teguh Lembono,Tobias Loew,Sylvain Calinon cs.RO,cs.LG,eess.SP,eess.SY,math.OC

authors_text: Ann-Kathrin Dombrowski,Jan E. Gerken,Klaus-Robert Müller,Pan Kessel
title: Diffeomorphic Counterfactuals with Generative Models
title_zh: 生成模型的微分同构反事实
abstract: Counterfactuals can explain classification decisions of neural networks in a human interpretable way. We propose a simple but effective method to generate such counterfactuals. More specifically, we perform a suitable diffeomorphic coordinate transformation and then perform gradient ascent in these coordinates to find counterfactuals which are classified with great confidence as a specified target class. We propose two methods to leverage generative models to construct such suitable coordinate systems that are either exactly or approximately diffeomorphic. We analyze the generation process theoretically using Riemannian differential geometry and validate the quality of the generated counterfactuals using various qualitative and quantitative measures.
summary: Counterfactuals can explain classification decisions of neural networks in a human interpretable way. We propose a simple but effective method to generate such counterfactuals. More specifically, we perform a suitable diffeomorphic coordinate transformation and then perform gradient ascent in these coordinates to find counterfactuals which are classified with great confidence as a specified target class. We propose two methods to leverage generative models to construct such suitable coordinate systems that are either exactly or approximately diffeomorphic. We analyze the generation process theoretically using Riemannian differential geometry and validate the quality of the generated counterfactuals using various qualitative and quantitative measures.
abstract_zh: 反事实可以以人类可解释的方式解释神经网络的分类决策。我们提出了一种简单但有效的方法来生成此类反事实。更具体地说，我们执行合适的微分同胚坐标变换，然后在这些坐标中执行梯度上升以找到反事实，这些反事实被非常有信心地分类为指定的目标类别。我们提出了两种方法来利用生成模型来构建精确或近似微分同胚的合适坐标系。我们使用黎曼微分几何从理论上分析生成过程，并使用各种定性和定量措施验证生成的反事实的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成模型和微分同胚变换的反事实生成方法，用于可解释性人工智能。
AI.motivation: 现有反事实生成方法存在可解释性不足或生成质量不高的问题，需更有效的方法辅助神经网络决策解释。
AI.method: 通过生成模型构建微分同胚坐标系，结合梯度上升算法生成目标类反事实，并利用黎曼几何进行理论分析。
AI.result: 生成的反事实通过定性和定量指标验证，表现出较高的分类置信度和几何保真度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为生成高质量反事实提供了新思路，结合生成模型与微分几何理论有效提升了模型可解释性。

authors_text: Javier Cremona,Román Comelli,Taihú Pire
title: Experimental Evaluation of Visual-Inertial Odometry Systems for Arable Farming
title_zh: 耕作视觉惯性里程计系统的实验评估
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication in Journal of Field Robotics
comments: This paper has been accepted for publication in Journal of Field Robotics
abstract: The farming industry constantly seeks the automation of different processes involved in agricultural production, such as sowing, harvesting and weed control. The use of mobile autonomous robots to perform those tasks is of great interest. Arable lands present hard challenges for Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) systems, key for mobile robotics, given the visual difficulty due to the highly repetitive scene and the crop leaves movement caused by the wind. In recent years, several Visual-Inertial Odometry (VIO) and SLAM systems have been developed. They have proved to be robust and capable of achieving high accuracy in indoor and outdoor urban environments. However, they were not properly assessed in agricultural fields. In this work we assess the most relevant state-of-the-art VIO systems in terms of accuracy and processing time on arable lands in order to better understand how they behave on these environments. In particular, the evaluation is carried out on a collection of sensor data recorded by our wheeled robot in a soybean field, which was publicly released as the Rosario Dataset. The evaluation shows that the highly repetitive appearance of the environment, the strong vibration produced by the rough terrain and the movement of the leaves caused by the wind, expose the limitations of the current state-of-the-art VIO and SLAM systems. We analyze the systems failures and highlight the observed drawbacks, including initialization failures, tracking loss and sensitivity to IMU saturation. Finally, we conclude that even though certain systems like ORB-SLAM3 and S-MSCKF show good results with respect to others, more improvements should be done to make them reliable in agricultural fields for certain applications such as soil tillage of crop rows and pesticide spraying.

The use of mobile autonomous robots to perform those tasks is of great interest. Arable lands present hard challenges for Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) systems, key for mobile robotics, given the visual difficulty due to the highly repetitive scene and the crop leaves movement caused by the wind. In recent years, several Visual-Inertial Odometry (VIO) and SLAM systems have been developed. They have proved to be robust and capable of achieving high accuracy in indoor and outdoor urban environments. However, they were not properly assessed in agricultural fields. In this work we assess the most relevant state-of-the-art VIO systems in terms of accuracy and processing time on arable lands in order to better understand how they behave on these environments. In particular, the evaluation is carried out on a collection of sensor data recorded by our wheeled robot in a soybean field, which was publicly released as the Rosario Dataset. The evaluation shows that the highly repetitive appearance of the environment, the strong vibration produced by the rough terrain and the movement of the leaves caused by the wind, expose the limitations of the current state-of-the-art VIO and SLAM systems. We analyze the systems failures and highlight the observed drawbacks, including initialization failures, tracking loss and sensitivity to IMU saturation. Finally, we conclude that even though certain systems like ORB-SLAM3 and S-MSCKF show good results with respect to others, more improvements should be done to make them reliable in agricultural fields for certain applications such as soil tillage of crop rows and pesticide spraying.
abstract_zh: 农业不断寻求农业生产中不同流程的自动化，例如播种、收割和杂草控制。使用移动自主机器人来执行这些任务引起了人们的极大兴趣。由于高度重复的场景和风引起的农作物叶子移动造成视觉困难，耕地对移动机器人技术的关键——同步定位和建图（SLAM）系统提出了严峻的挑战。近年来，已经开发了几种视觉惯性里程计（VIO）和SLAM系统。事实证明，它们非常坚固，能够在室内和室外城市环境中实现高精度。然而，它们在农业领域没有得到适当的评估。在这项工作中，我们评估了最相关的最先进的 VIO 系统在耕地上的准确性和处理时间，以便更好地了解它们在这些环境中的行为。特别是，评估是对我们的轮式机器人在大豆田中记录的传感器数据集进行的，该数据集作为罗萨里奥数据集公开发布。评估表明，高度重复的环境外观、崎岖地形产生的强烈振动以及风引起的树叶移动，暴露了当前最先进的 VIO 和 SLAM 系统的局限性。我们分析系统故障并强调观察到的缺陷，包括初始化故障、跟踪丢失和对 IMU 饱和的敏感性。最后，我们得出的结论是，尽管 ORB-SLAM3 和 S-MSCKF 等某些系统相对于其他系统显示出了良好的结果，但仍需要进行更多改进，以使其在农业领域的某些应用（例如农作物行的土壤耕作和农药喷洒）中可靠。

AI.tldr: 本文对视觉惯性里程计（VIO）系统在耕作农田中的性能进行了实验评估，以分析其在农业环境中的准确性和处理时间。
AI.motivation: 农业自动化需求推动了移动机器人技术的发展，但农田环境中的重复场景、作物叶片运动和地形振动对SLAM系统构成挑战，现有VIO系统尚未在农业领域充分验证。
AI.method: 基于自主轮式机器人采集的公开大豆田数据集（Rosario Dataset），对主流VIO系统进行准确性与处理时间的对比测试，分析其在农业场景中的失效原因。
AI.result: 实验表明，环境重复性、地形振动和叶片运动导致现有VIO系统存在初始化失败、跟踪丢失及IMU饱和敏感性等问题，其中ORB-SLAM3和S-MSCKF表现相对较好。
AI.conclusion: 尽管部分系统在农业场景中表现优异，但仍需改进以满足精准农业需求，如作物行耕作和农药喷洒等应用的可靠性要求。

Finally, we conclude that even though certain systems like ORB-SLAM3 and S-MSCKF show good results with respect to others, more improvements should be done to make them reliable in agricultural fields for certain applications such as soil tillage of crop rows and pesticide spraying. 农业不断寻求农业生产中不同流程的自动化，例如播种、收割和杂草控制。使用移动自主机器人来执行这些任务引起了人们的极大兴趣。由于高度重复的场景和风引起的农作物叶子移动造成视觉困难，耕地对移动机器人技术的关键——同步定位和建图（SLAM）系统提出了严峻的挑战。近年来，已经开发了几种视觉惯性里程计（VIO）和SLAM系统。事实证明，它们非常坚固，能够在室内和室外城市环境中实现高精度。然而，它们在农业领域没有得到适当的评估。在这项工作中，我们评估了最相关的最先进的 VIO 系统在耕地上的准确性和处理时间，以便更好地了解它们在这些环境中的行为。特别是，评估是对我们的轮式机器人在大豆田中记录的传感器数据集进行的，该数据集作为罗萨里奥数据集公开发布。评估表明，高度重复的环境外观、崎岖地形产生的强烈振动以及风引起的树叶移动，暴露了当前最先进的 VIO 和 SLAM 系统的局限性。我们分析系统故障并强调观察到的缺陷，包括初始化故障、跟踪丢失和对 IMU 饱和的敏感性。最后，我们得出的结论是，尽管 ORB-SLAM3 和 S-MSCKF 等某些系统相对于其他系统显示出了良好的结果，但仍需要进行更多改进，以使其在农业领域的某些应用（例如农作物行的土壤耕作和农药喷洒）中可靠。 本文对视觉惯性里程计（VIO）系统在耕作农田中的性能进行了实验评估，以分析其在农业环境中的准确性和处理时间。 Javier Cremona,Román Comelli,Taihú Pire cs.RO

authors_text: Dmitri Presnov,Andreas Kolb
title: Glyph from Icon -- Automated Generation of Metaphoric Glyphs
title_zh: 来自图标的字形——隐喻字形的自动生成
abstract: Metaphoric glyphs enhance the readability and learnability of abstract glyphs used for the visualization of quantitative multidimensional data by building upon graphical entities that are intuitively related to the underlying problem domain. Their construction is, however, a predominantly manual process. In this paper, we introduce the Glyph-from-Icon (GfI) approach that allows the automated generation of metaphoric glyphs from user specified icons. Our approach modifies the icon's visual appearance using up to seven quantifiable visual variables, three of which manipulate its geometry while four affect its color. Depending on the visualization goal, specific combinations of these visual variables define the glyphs's variables used for data encoding. Technically, we propose a diffusion-curve based parametric icon representation, which comprises the degrees-of-freedom related to the geometric and color-based visual variables. Moreover, we extend our GfI approach to achieve scalability of the generated glyphs. Based on a user study we evaluate the perception of the glyph's main variables, i.e., amplitude and frequency of geometric and color modulation, as function of the stimuli and deduce functional relations as well as quantization levels to achieve perceptual monotonicity and readability. Finally, we propose a robustly perceivable combination of visual variables, which we apply to the visualization of COVID-19 data.
summary: Metaphoric glyphs enhance the readability and learnability of abstract glyphs used for the visualization of quantitative multidimensional data by building upon graphical entities that are intuitively related to the underlying problem domain. Their construction is, however, a predominantly manual process. In this paper, we introduce the Glyph-from-Icon (GfI) approach that allows the automated generation of metaphoric glyphs from user specified icons. Our approach modifies the icon's visual appearance using up to seven quantifiable visual variables, three of which manipulate its geometry while four affect its color. Depending on the visualization goal, specific combinations of these visual variables define the glyphs's variables used for data encoding. Technically, we propose a diffusion-curve based parametric icon representation, which comprises the degrees-of-freedom related to the geometric and color-based visual variables. Moreover, we extend our GfI approach to achieve scalability of the generated glyphs. Based on a user study we evaluate the perception of the glyph's main variables, i.e., amplitude and frequency of geometric and color modulation, as function of the stimuli and deduce functional relations as well as quantization levels to achieve perceptual monotonicity and readability. Finally, we propose a robustly perceivable combination of visual variables, which we apply to the visualization of COVID-19 data.
abstract_zh: 隐喻字形通过构建与底层问题域直观相关的图形实体，增强了用于定量多维数据可视化的抽象字形的可读性和可学习性。然而，它们的建造主要是手动过程。在本文中，我们介绍了 Glyph-from-Icon (GfI) 方法，该方法允许从用户指定的图标自动生成隐喻字形。我们的方法使用多达七个可量化的视觉变量来修改图标的视觉外观，其中三个操纵其几何形状，而四个影响其颜色。根据可视化目标，这些视觉变量的特定组合定义了用于数据编码的字形变量。从技术上讲，我们提出了一种基于扩散曲线的参数化图标表示，其中包括与几何和基于颜色的视觉变量相关的自由度。此外，我们扩展了 GfI 方法来实现生成的字形的可扩展性。基于用户研究，我们评估字形主要变量的感知，即几何和颜色调制的幅度和频率，作为刺激的函数，并推断出函数关系以及量化水平，以实现感知单调性和可读性。最后，我们提出了一种鲁棒可感知的视觉变量组合，并将其应用于 COVID-19 数据的可视化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Glyph-from-Icon（GfI）的方法，通过用户指定的图标自动生成隐喻性图符，以提升多维数据可视化的可读性和可学习性。
AI.motivation: 传统隐喻图符的构建依赖人工设计，效率低且难以扩展。本文旨在通过自动化方法解决这一问题，提高数据可视化效率与可扩展性。
AI.method: 基于扩散曲线的参数化图标表示，利用最多七个可量化视觉变量（3个几何变量、4个颜色变量）修改图标外观，并通过用户研究确定感知单调性与可读性的量化关系。
AI.result: 验证了几何与颜色调制幅度和频率的感知关系，提出了可扩展的视觉变量组合，并成功应用于新冠数据可视化案例。
AI.conclusion: GfI方法通过自动化生成与感知优化相结合，为多维数据可视化提供了高效、可扩展的隐喻图符生成方案。

authors_text: Eleni Nisioti,Mateo Mahaut,Pierre-Yves Oudeyer,Ida Momennejad,Clément Moulin-Frier
title: Social Network Structure Shapes Innovation: Experience-sharing in RL with SAPIENS
title_zh: 社交网络结构塑造创新：与 SAPIENS 分享强化学习经验
abstract: Human culture relies on innovation: our ability to continuously explore how existing elements can be combined to create new ones. Innovation is not solitary, it relies on collective search and accumulation. Reinforcement learning (RL) approaches commonly assume that fully-connected groups are best suited for innovation. However, human laboratory and field studies have shown that hierarchical innovation is more robustly achieved by dynamic social network structures. In dynamic settings, humans oscillate between innovating individually or in small clusters, and then sharing outcomes with others. To our knowledge, the role of social network structure on innovation has not been systematically studied in RL. Here, we use a multi-level problem setting (WordCraft), with three different innovation tasks to test the hypothesis that the social network structure affects the performance of distributed RL algorithms. We systematically design networks of DQNs sharing experiences from their replay buffers in varying structures (fully-connected, small world, dynamic, ring) and introduce a set of behavioral and mnemonic metrics that extend the classical reward-focused evaluation framework of RL. Comparing the level of innovation achieved by different social network structures across different tasks shows that, first, consistent with human findings, experience sharing within a dynamic structure achieves the highest level of innovation in tasks with a deceptive nature and large search spaces. Second, experience sharing is not as helpful when there is a single clear path to innovation. Third, the metrics we propose, can help understand the success of different social network structures on different tasks, with the diversity of experiences on an individual and group level lending crucial insights.
summary: Human culture relies on innovation: our ability to continuously explore how existing elements can be combined to create new ones. Innovation is not solitary, it relies on collective search and accumulation. Reinforcement learning (RL) approaches commonly assume that fully-connected groups are best suited for innovation. However, human laboratory and field studies have shown that hierarchical innovation is more robustly achieved by dynamic social network structures. In dynamic settings, humans oscillate between innovating individually or in small clusters, and then sharing outcomes with others. To our knowledge, the role of social network structure on innovation has not been systematically studied in RL. Here, we use a multi-level problem setting (WordCraft), with three different innovation tasks to test the hypothesis that the social network structure affects the performance of distributed RL algorithms. We systematically design networks of DQNs sharing experiences from their replay buffers in varying structures (fully-connected, small world, dynamic, ring) and introduce a set of behavioral and mnemonic metrics that extend the classical reward-focused evaluation framework of RL. Comparing the level of innovation achieved by different social network structures across different tasks shows that, first, consistent with human findings, experience sharing within a dynamic structure achieves the highest level of innovation in tasks with a deceptive nature and large search spaces. Second, experience sharing is not as helpful when there is a single clear path to innovation. Third, the metrics we propose, can help understand the success of different social network structures on different tasks, with the diversity of experiences on an individual and group level lending crucial insights.
abstract_zh: 人类文化依赖于创新：我们不断探索如何组合现有元素以创造新元素的能力。创新不是孤军奋战，而是依靠集体的探索和积累。强化学习（RL）方法通常假设完全连接的群体最适合创​​新。然而，人类实验室和实地研究表明，动态社交网络结构可以更有效地实现层次创新。在动态环境中，人类在单独创新或小规模创新之间摇摆，然后与他人分享成果。据我们所知，社交网络结构对创新的作用尚未在强化学习中得到系统研究。在这里，我们使用多级问题设置（WordCraft），通过三个不同的创新任务来测试社交网络结构影响分布式强化学习算法性能的假设。我们系统地设计了 DQN 网络，在不同结构（全连接、小世界、动态、环形）中共享重播缓冲区的经验，并引入了一组行为和助记指标，扩展了经典的以奖励为中心的 RL 评估框架。比较不同任务中不同社交网络结构所实现的创新水平表明，首先，与人类的发现一致，动态结构内的经验共享在具有欺骗性和大搜索空间的任务中实现了最高水平的创新。其次，当只有一条明确的创新路径时，经验分享就没那么有用了。第三，我们提出的指标可以帮助了解不同社交网络结构在不同任务上的成功，个人和团体层面的经验多样性提供了重要的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究社交网络结构对强化学习（RL）创新性能的影响，通过WordCraft多级问题设置和不同网络结构（如动态结构）进行实验验证。
AI.motivation: 传统RL假设全连接群体最利于创新，但人类研究显示动态社交网络更高效。需系统研究社交网络结构对RL创新的影响。
AI.method: 设计WordCraft环境，构建三种创新任务，对比全连接、小世界、动态、环形等网络结构下DQNs的经验共享效果，并引入行为与记忆度量指标。
AI.result: 动态结构在欺骗性任务和大搜索空间中创新表现最佳；单一路径任务中经验共享效果有限；新指标揭示了个体与群体经验多样性对成功的影响。
AI.conclusion: 社交网络结构显著影响RL创新性能，动态结构适用于复杂任务，提出的度量指标可有效评估不同结构的创新效果，与人类研究结果一致。

Comparing the level of innovation achieved by different social network structures across different tasks shows that, first, consistent with human findings, experience sharing within a dynamic structure achieves the highest level of innovation in tasks with a deceptive nature and large search spaces. Second, experience sharing is not as helpful when there is a single clear path to innovation. Third, the metrics we propose, can help understand the success of different social network structures on different tasks, with the diversity of experiences on an individual and group level lending crucial insights. 人类文化依赖于创新：我们不断探索如何组合现有元素以创造新元素的能力。创新不是孤军奋战，而是依靠集体的探索和积累。强化学习（RL）方法通常假设完全连接的群体最适合创​​新。然而，人类实验室和实地研究表明，动态社交网络结构可以更有效地实现层次创新。在动态环境中，人类在单独创新或小规模创新之间摇摆，然后与他人分享成果。据我们所知，社交网络结构对创新的作用尚未在强化学习中得到系统研究。在这里，我们使用多级问题设置（WordCraft），通过三个不同的创新任务来测试社交网络结构影响分布式强化学习算法性能的假设。我们系统地设计了 DQN 网络，在不同结构（全连接、小世界、动态、环形）中共享重播缓冲区的经验，并引入了一组行为和助记指标，扩展了经典的以奖励为中心的 RL 评估框架。比较不同任务中不同社交网络结构所实现的创新水平表明，首先，与人类的发现一致，动态结构内的经验共享在具有欺骗性和大搜索空间的任务中实现了最高水平的创新。其次，当只有一条明确的创新路径时，经验分享就没那么有用了。第三，我们提出的指标可以帮助了解不同社交网络结构在不同任务上的成功，个人和团体层面的经验多样性提供了重要的见解。 本文研究社交网络结构对强化学习（RL）创新性能的影响，通过WordCraft多级问题设置和不同网络结构（如动态结构）进行实验验证。 Eleni Nisioti,Mateo Mahaut,Pierre-Yves Oudeyer,Ida Momennejad,Clément Moulin-Frier cs.AI,cs.MA,cs.SI

authors_text: Giancarlo Kerg,Sarthak Mittal,David Rolnick,Yoshua Bengio,Blake Richards,Guillaume Lajoie
title: On Neural Architecture Inductive Biases for Relational Tasks
title_zh: 关于关系任务的神经架构归纳偏差
abstract: Current deep learning approaches have shown good in-distribution generalization performance, but struggle with out-of-distribution generalization. This is especially true in the case of tasks involving abstract relations like recognizing rules in sequences, as we find in many intelligence tests. Recent work has explored how forcing relational representations to remain distinct from sensory representations, as it seems to be the case in the brain, can help artificial systems. Building on this work, we further explore and formalize the advantages afforded by 'partitioned' representations of relations and sensory details, and how this inductive bias can help recompose learned relational structure in newly encountered settings. We introduce a simple architecture based on similarity scores which we name Compositional Relational Network (CoRelNet). Using this model, we investigate a series of inductive biases that ensure abstract relations are learned and represented distinctly from sensory data, and explore their effects on out-of-distribution generalization for a series of relational psychophysics tasks. We find that simple architectural choices can outperform existing models in out-of-distribution generalization. Together, these results show that partitioning relational representations from other information streams may be a simple way to augment existing network architectures' robustness when performing out-of-distribution relational computations.
summary: Current deep learning approaches have shown good in-distribution generalization performance, but struggle with out-of-distribution generalization. This is especially true in the case of tasks involving abstract relations like recognizing rules in sequences, as we find in many intelligence tests. Recent work has explored how forcing relational representations to remain distinct from sensory representations, as it seems to be the case in the brain, can help artificial systems. Building on this work, we further explore and formalize the advantages afforded by 'partitioned' representations of relations and sensory details, and how this inductive bias can help recompose learned relational structure in newly encountered settings. We introduce a simple architecture based on similarity scores which we name Compositional Relational Network (CoRelNet). Using this model, we investigate a series of inductive biases that ensure abstract relations are learned and represented distinctly from sensory data, and explore their effects on out-of-distribution generalization for a series of relational psychophysics tasks. We find that simple architectural choices can outperform existing models in out-of-distribution generalization. Together, these results show that partitioning relational representations from other information streams may be a simple way to augment existing network architectures' robustness when performing out-of-distribution relational computations.
abstract_zh: 当前的深度学习方法已经表现出良好的分布内泛化性能，但在分布外泛化方面却表现不佳。正如我们在许多智力测试中发现的那样，在涉及抽象关系的任务中尤其如此，例如识别序列中的规则。最近的工作探索了如何迫使关系表征与感觉表征保持不同（就像大脑中的情况一样）可以帮助人工系统。在这项工作的基础上，我们进一步探索并形式化了关系和感官细节的“分区”表示所提供的优势，以及这种归纳偏差如何帮助在新遇到的环境中重构学到的关系结构。我们引入了一种基于相似性分数的简单架构，我们将其命名为组合关系网络（CoRelNet）。使用这个模型，我们研究了一系列归纳偏差，确保抽象关系被学习并与感觉数据清楚地表示，并探索它们对一系列关系心理物理学任务的分布外泛化的影响。我们发现简单的架构选择在分布外泛化方面可以优于现有模型。总之，这些结果表明，在执行分布外关系计算时，将关系表示与其他信息流分开可能是增强现有网络架构鲁棒性的简单方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CoRelNet的神经网络架构，通过分离关系表示与感官表示来增强模型在分布外数据上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在分布内任务表现良好，但在涉及抽象关系的分布外任务（如序列规则识别）中泛化能力不足，需探索新的归纳偏置以改进这一问题。
AI.method: 设计了基于相似度评分的CoRelNet架构，强制分离关系表示与感官数据表示，并通过一系列心理物理学任务验证其效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，CoRelNet在分布外关系任务中优于现有模型，简单的架构选择能显著提升泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 将关系表示与其他信息流分离的归纳偏置，可作为增强神经网络在分布外关系计算鲁棒性的有效方法。

authors_text: Yu Fan,Zicheng Zhang,Wei Sun,Xiongkuo Min,Wei Lu,Tao Wang,Ning Liu,Guangtao Zhai
title: A No-reference Quality Assessment Metric for Point Cloud Based on Captured Video Sequences
title_zh: 基于捕获视频序列的点云无参考质量评估指标
comment: Accepted to IEEE 24th International Workshop on Multimedia Signal Processing, 2022
comments: Accepted to IEEE 24th International Workshop on Multimedia Signal Processing, 2022
abstract: Point cloud is one of the most widely used digital formats of 3D models, the visual quality of which is quite sensitive to distortions such as downsampling, noise, and compression. To tackle the challenge of point cloud quality assessment (PCQA) in scenarios where reference is not available, we propose a no-reference quality assessment metric for colored point cloud based on captured video sequences. Specifically, three video sequences are obtained by rotating the camera around the point cloud through three specific orbits. The video sequences not only contain the static views but also include the multi-frame temporal information, which greatly helps understand the human perception of the point clouds. Then we modify the ResNet3D as the feature extraction model to learn the correlation between the capture videos and corresponding subjective quality scores. The experimental results show that our method outperforms most of the state-of-the-art full-reference and no-reference PCQA metrics, which validates the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: Point cloud is one of the most widely used digital formats of 3D models, the visual quality of which is quite sensitive to distortions such as downsampling, noise, and compression. To tackle the challenge of point cloud quality assessment (PCQA) in scenarios where reference is not available, we propose a no-reference quality assessment metric for colored point cloud based on captured video sequences. Specifically, three video sequences are obtained by rotating the camera around the point cloud through three specific orbits. The video sequences not only contain the static views but also include the multi-frame temporal information, which greatly helps understand the human perception of the point clouds. Then we modify the ResNet3D as the feature extraction model to learn the correlation between the capture videos and corresponding subjective quality scores. The experimental results show that our method outperforms most of the state-of-the-art full-reference and no-reference PCQA metrics, which validates the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 点云是最广泛使用的 3D 模型数字格式之一，其视觉质量对下采样、噪声和压缩等失真非常敏感。为了解决在参考不可用的情况下点云质量评估（PCQA）的挑战，我们提出了一种基于捕获的视频序列的彩色点云的无参考质量评估指标。具体来说，通过三个特定轨道围绕点云旋转相机获得三个视频序列。视频序列不仅包含静态视图，还包含多帧时间信息，这极大地有助于理解人类对点云的感知。然后我们修改 ResNet3D 作为特征提取模型，以学习捕获视频与相应主观质量分数之间的相关性。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于大多数最先进的全参考和无参考 PCQA 指标，这验证了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于捕获视频序列的无参考点云质量评估方法。
AI.motivation: 现有PCQA方法在无参考场景下效果有限，需更有效的评估指标。
AI.method: 通过三轨道旋转相机获取视频序列，利用改进的ResNet3D模型提取特征，建立视频与主观评分的关联。
AI.result: 实验显示该方法优于多数现有全参考和无参考PCQA指标，证明其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 无参考点云质量评估方法有效，适用于实际应用场景。

authors_text: Debarpan Bhattacharya,Debottam Dutta,Neeraj Kumar Sharma,Srikanth Raj Chetupalli,Pravin Mote,Sriram Ganapathy,Chandrakiran C,Sahiti Nori,Suhail K K,Sadhana Gonuguntla,Murali Alagesan
title: Coswara: A website application enabling COVID-19 screening by analysing respiratory sound samples and health symptoms
title_zh: Coswara：一款网站应用程序，可通过分析呼吸声音样本和健康症状来进行 COVID-19 筛查
comment: ef:Interspeech, 2022
comments: ef:Interspeech, 2022
abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has accelerated research on design of alternative, quick and effective COVID-19 diagnosis approaches. In this paper, we describe the Coswara tool, a website application designed to enable COVID-19 detection by analysing respiratory sound samples and health symptoms. A user using this service can log into a website using any device connected to the internet, provide there current health symptom information and record few sound sampled corresponding to breathing, cough, and speech. Within a minute of analysis of this information on a cloud server the website tool will output a COVID-19 probability score to the user. As the COVID-19 pandemic continues to demand massive and scalable population level testing, we hypothesize that the proposed tool provides a potential solution towards this.
summary: The COVID-19 pandemic has accelerated research on design of alternative, quick and effective COVID-19 diagnosis approaches. In this paper, we describe the Coswara tool, a website application designed to enable COVID-19 detection by analysing respiratory sound samples and health symptoms. A user using this service can log into a website using any device connected to the internet, provide there current health symptom information and record few sound sampled corresponding to breathing, cough, and speech. Within a minute of analysis of this information on a cloud server the website tool will output a COVID-19 probability score to the user. As the COVID-19 pandemic continues to demand massive and scalable population level testing, we hypothesize that the proposed tool provides a potential solution towards this.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 大流行加速了对替代、快速且有效的 COVID-19 诊断方法设计的研究。在本文中，我们描述了 Coswara 工具，这是一个网站应用程序，旨在通过分析呼吸声音样本和健康症状来检测 COVID-19。使用该服务的用户可以使用任何连接到互联网的设备登录网站，提供当前的健康症状信息并记录与呼吸、咳嗽和言语相对应的一些声音采样。在云服务器上分析此信息后一分​​钟内，网站工具将向用户输出 COVID-19 概率得分。由于 COVID-19 大流行继续需要大规模和可扩展的人口水平测试，我们假设所提出的工具为此提供了一个潜在的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为Coswara的网络应用工具，通过分析呼吸声音样本和健康症状来实现COVID-19的筛查。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情需要快速、可扩展的大规模检测方法，传统检测手段存在局限性。
AI.method: 用户通过互联网设备登录网站，提交健康症状信息并录制呼吸、咳嗽和语音样本，云端服务器分析后生成感染概率评分。
AI.result: 系统可在一分钟内完成数据分析并输出COVID-19概率评分，为大规模筛查提供潜在解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 该工具通过结合呼吸声分析和症状评估，为疫情时期的快速检测需求提供了创新的技术路径。

ai_content.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为Coswara的网络应用工具，通过分析呼吸声音样本和健康症状来实现COVID-19的筛查。
ai_content.motivation: 新冠疫情需要快速、可扩展的大规模检测方法，传统检测手段存在局限性。
ai_content.method: 用户通过互联网设备登录网站，提交健康症状信息并录制呼吸、咳嗽和语音样本，云端服务器分析后生成感染概率评分。
ai_content.result: 系统可在一分钟内完成数据分析并输出COVID-19概率评分，为大规模筛查提供潜在解决方案。
ai_content.conclusion: 该工具通过结合呼吸声分析和症状评估，为疫情时期的快速检测需求提供了创新的技术路径。

search_text: Coswara: A website application enabling COVID-19 screening by analysing respiratory sound samples and health symptoms Coswara：一款网站应用程序，可通过分析呼吸声音样本和健康症状来进行 COVID-19 筛查 The COVID-19 pandemic has accelerated research on design of alternative, quick and effective COVID-19 diagnosis approaches. In this paper, we describe the Coswara tool, a website application designed to enable COVID-19 detection by analysing respiratory sound samples and health symptoms. A user using this service can log into a website using any device connected to the internet, provide there current health symptom information and record few sound sampled corresponding to breathing, cough, and speech. Within a minute of analysis of this information on a cloud server the website tool will output a COVID-19 probability score to the user. As the COVID-19 pandemic continues to demand massive and scalable population level testing, we hypothesize that the proposed tool provides a potential solution towards this. COVID-19 大流行加速了对替代、快速且有效的 COVID-19 诊断方法设计的研究。在本文中，我们描述了 Coswara 工具，这是一个网站应用程序，旨在通过分析呼吸声音样本和健康症状来检测 COVID-19。使用该服务的用户可以使用任何连接到互联网的设备登录网站，提供当前的健康症状信息并记录与呼吸、咳嗽和言语相对应的一些声音采样。在云服务器上分析此信息后一分​​钟内，网站工具将向用户输出 COVID-19 概率得分。由于 COVID-19 大流行继续需要大规模和可扩展的人口水平测试，我们假设所提出的工具为此提供了一个潜在的解决方案。 本文介绍了一种名为Coswara的网络应用工具，通过分析呼吸声音样本和健康症状来实现COVID-19的筛查。 Debarpan Bhattacharya,Debottam Dutta,Neeraj Kumar Sharma,Srikanth Raj Chetupalli,Pravin Mote,Sriram Ganapathy,Chandrakiran C,Sahiti Nori,Suhail K K,Sadhana Gonuguntla,Murali Alagesan cs.HC,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS,eess.SP

authors_text: Ruimin Ma,Yanlin Wang,Yanjie Wei,Yi Pan
title: Meta-data Study in Autism Spectrum Disorder Classification Based on Structural MRI
title_zh: 基于结构MRI的自闭症谱系障碍分类元数据研究
abstract: Accurate diagnosis of autism spectrum disorder (ASD) based on neuroimaging data has significant implications, as extracting useful information from neuroimaging data for ASD detection is challenging. Even though machine learning techniques have been leveraged to improve the information extraction from neuroimaging data, the varying data quality caused by different meta-data conditions (i.e., data collection strategies) limits the effective information that can be extracted, thus leading to data-dependent predictive accuracies in ASD detection, which can be worse than random guess in some cases. In this work, we systematically investigate the impact of three kinds of meta-data on the predictive accuracy of classifying ASD based on structural MRI collected from 20 different sites, where meta-data conditions vary.
summary: Accurate diagnosis of autism spectrum disorder (ASD) based on neuroimaging data has significant implications, as extracting useful information from neuroimaging data for ASD detection is challenging. Even though machine learning techniques have been leveraged to improve the information extraction from neuroimaging data, the varying data quality caused by different meta-data conditions (i.e., data collection strategies) limits the effective information that can be extracted, thus leading to data-dependent predictive accuracies in ASD detection, which can be worse than random guess in some cases. In this work, we systematically investigate the impact of three kinds of meta-data on the predictive accuracy of classifying ASD based on structural MRI collected from 20 different sites, where meta-data conditions vary.
abstract_zh: 基于神经影像数据的自闭症谱系障碍 (ASD) 准确诊断具有重要意义，因为从神经影像数据中提取有用的信息用于 ASD 检测具有挑战性。尽管机器学习技术已被用来改进神经影像数据的信息提取，但不同的元数据条件（即数据收集策略）引起的数据质量变化限制了可以提取的有效信息，从而导致 ASD 检测中依赖于数据的预测精度，在某些情况下可能比随机猜测更差。在这项工作中，我们系统地研究了三种元数据对基于从 20 个不同地点收集的结构 MRI 进行 ASD 分类的预测准确性的影响，这些地点的元数据条件各不相同。

AI.tldr: 研究不同元数据条件对基于结构MRI的自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）分类预测准确性的影响。
AI.motivation: 神经影像数据质量受元数据条件（如数据收集策略）影响，导致ASD检测模型预测准确性不稳定，甚至低于随机水平，需系统分析元数据的作用。
AI.method: 基于20个不同站点的结构MRI数据，系统分析三种元数据条件对ASD分类模型预测准确性的影响。
AI.result: 元数据条件显著影响分类准确性，部分条件下模型表现劣于随机猜测，揭示数据质量与模型性能的强关联。
AI.conclusion: 元数据条件是影响ASD分类模型性能的关键因素，需在数据采集和预处理阶段优化元数据管理以提高诊断可靠性。

authors_text: Yuan Yang,Siheng Xiong,Ali Payani,James C Kerce,Faramarz Fekri
title: Temporal Inductive Logic Reasoning over Hypergraphs
title_zh: 超图的时间归纳逻辑推理
abstract: Inductive logic reasoning is a fundamental task in graph analysis, which aims to generalize patterns from data. This task has been extensively studied for traditional graph representations, such as knowledge graphs (KGs), using techniques like inductive logic programming (ILP). Existing ILP methods assume learning from KGs with static facts and binary relations. Beyond KGs, graph structures are widely present in other applications such as procedural instructions, scene graphs, and program executions. While ILP is beneficial for these applications, applying it to those graphs is nontrivial: they are more complex than KGs, which usually involve timestamps and n-ary relations, effectively a type of hypergraph with temporal events. In this work, we propose temporal inductive logic reasoning (TILR), an ILP method that reasons on temporal hypergraphs. To enable hypergraph reasoning, we introduce the multi-start random B-walk, a novel graph traversal method for hypergraphs. By combining it with a path-consistency algorithm, TILR learns logic rules by generalizing from both temporal and relational data. To address the lack of hypergraph benchmarks, we create and release two temporal hypergraph datasets: YouCook2-HG and nuScenes-HG. Experiments on these benchmarks demonstrate that TILR achieves superior reasoning capability over various strong baselines.
summary: Inductive logic reasoning is a fundamental task in graph analysis, which aims to generalize patterns from data. This task has been extensively studied for traditional graph representations, such as knowledge graphs (KGs), using techniques like inductive logic programming (ILP). Existing ILP methods assume learning from KGs with static facts and binary relations. Beyond KGs, graph structures are widely present in other applications such as procedural instructions, scene graphs, and program executions. While ILP is beneficial for these applications, applying it to those graphs is nontrivial: they are more complex than KGs, which usually involve timestamps and n-ary relations, effectively a type of hypergraph with temporal events. In this work, we propose temporal inductive logic reasoning (TILR), an ILP method that reasons on temporal hypergraphs. To enable hypergraph reasoning, we introduce the multi-start random B-walk, a novel graph traversal method for hypergraphs. By combining it with a path-consistency algorithm, TILR learns logic rules by generalizing from both temporal and relational data. To address the lack of hypergraph benchmarks, we create and release two temporal hypergraph datasets: YouCook2-HG and nuScenes-HG. Experiments on these benchmarks demonstrate that TILR achieves superior reasoning capability over various strong baselines.
abstract_zh: 归纳逻辑推理是图分析中的一项基本任务，旨在概括数据中的模式。该任务已使用归纳逻辑编程（ILP）等技术针对传统图表示（例如知识图（KG））进行了广泛研究。现有的 ILP 方法假设从具有静态事实和二元关系的 KG 中学习。除了 KG 之外，图结构还广泛存在于其他应用中，例如过程指令、场景图和程序执行。虽然 ILP 对这些应用程序有益，但将其应用于这些图并非易事：它们比知识图谱更复杂，知识图谱通常涉及时间戳和 n 元关系，实际上是一种具有时间事件的超图。在这项工作中，我们提出了时间归纳逻辑推理（TILR），这是一种在时间超图上进行推理的 ILP 方法。为了实现超图推理，我们引入了多起点随机 B-walk，这是一种新颖的超图遍历方法。通过将其与路径一致性算法相结合，TILR 通过从时间数据和关系数据中归纳来学习逻辑规则。为了解决超图基准的缺乏，我们创建并发布了两个时间超图数据集：YouCook2-HG 和 nuScenes-HG。这些基准的实验表明，TILR 在各种强基准上实现了卓越的推理能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对时态超图的归纳逻辑推理方法TILR，用于处理包含时间戳和多元关系的复杂图结构。
AI.motivation: 现有归纳逻辑编程（ILP）方法主要针对静态知识图谱（KGs）的二元关系，难以处理包含时间信息和多元关系的复杂超图结构，如程序执行轨迹和场景图。
AI.method: 提出多起点随机B-遍历算法实现超图结构遍历，并结合路径一致性算法从时态和关系数据中学习逻辑规则；构建两个时态超图数据集YouCook2-HG和nuScenes-HG。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上实验表明，TILR在推理能力上优于多种强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: TILR有效解决了时态超图的归纳逻辑推理问题，所构建的数据集为相关研究提供了重要资源。

authors_text: Sara Ahmadian,Maryam Negahbani
title: Improved Approximation for Fair Correlation Clustering
title_zh: 公平相关聚类的改进近似
abstract: Correlation clustering is a ubiquitous paradigm in unsupervised machine learning where addressing unfairness is a major challenge. Motivated by this, we study Fair Correlation Clustering where the data points may belong to different protected groups and the goal is to ensure fair representation of all groups across clusters. Our paper significantly generalizes and improves on the quality guarantees of previous work of Ahmadi et al. and Ahmadian et al. as follows. - We allow the user to specify an arbitrary upper bound on the representation of each group in a cluster. - Our algorithm allows individuals to have multiple protected features and ensure fairness simultaneously across them all. - We prove guarantees for clustering quality and fairness in this general setting. Furthermore, this improves on the results for the special cases studied in previous work. Our experiments on real-world data demonstrate that our clustering quality compared to the optimal solution is much better than what our theoretical result suggests.
summary: Correlation clustering is a ubiquitous paradigm in unsupervised machine learning where addressing unfairness is a major challenge. Motivated by this, we study Fair Correlation Clustering where the data points may belong to different protected groups and the goal is to ensure fair representation of all groups across clusters. Our paper significantly generalizes and improves on the quality guarantees of previous work of Ahmadi et al. and Ahmadian et al. as follows. - We allow the user to specify an arbitrary upper bound on the representation of each group in a cluster. - Our algorithm allows individuals to have multiple protected features and ensure fairness simultaneously across them all. - We prove guarantees for clustering quality and fairness in this general setting. Furthermore, this improves on the results for the special cases studied in previous work. Our experiments on real-world data demonstrate that our clustering quality compared to the optimal solution is much better than what our theoretical result suggests.
abstract_zh: 相关聚类是无监督机器学习中普遍存在的范例，其中解决不公平问题是一个重大挑战。受此启发，我们研究公平相关聚类，其中数据点可能属于不同的受保护组，目标是确保跨聚类的所有组的公平表示。我们的论文显着概括并改进了 Ahmadi 等人之前工作的质量保证。和艾哈迈迪安等人。如下。 - 我们允许用户指定集群中每个组的表示的任意上限。 - 我们的算法允许个人拥有多个受保护的功能，并同时确保所有功能的公平性。 - 我们证明了在这种一般环境下聚类质量和公平性的保证。此外，这改进了之前工作中研究的特殊情况的结果。我们对真实世界数据的实验表明，与最佳解决方案相比，我们的聚类质量比我们的理论结果表明的要好得多。

AI.tldr: 本文研究公平关联聚类问题，旨在通过设定群体表示上限和处理多属性特征，提升聚类质量与公平性保证。
AI.motivation: 关联聚类在无监督学习中普遍存在，但如何确保不同保护群体在聚类中的公平表示是重大挑战。
AI.method: 允许用户设定每个群体在聚类中的上限，支持多属性特征同时保证公平性，并证明了聚类质量与公平性的理论保证。
AI.result: 实验表明，实际聚类质量优于理论结果，且在特殊情况下优于先前工作。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在理论上扩展了公平聚类的适用范围，并通过实验验证了其有效性。

authors_text: Saurav K. Shastri,Rizwan Ahmad,Christopher A. Metzler,Philip Schniter
title: Denoising Generalized Expectation-Consistent Approximation for MR Image Recovery
title_zh: MR 图像恢复的去噪广义期望一致近似
abstract: To solve inverse problems, plug-and-play (PnP) methods replace the proximal step in a convex optimization algorithm with a call to an application-specific denoiser, often implemented using a deep neural network (DNN). Although such methods yield accurate solutions, they can be improved. For example, denoisers are usually designed/trained to remove white Gaussian noise, but the denoiser input error in PnP algorithms is usually far from white or Gaussian. Approximate message passing (AMP) methods provide white and Gaussian denoiser input error, but only when the forward operator is sufficiently random. In this work, for Fourier-based forward operators, we propose a PnP algorithm based on generalized expectation-consistent (GEC) approximation -- a close cousin of AMP -- that offers predictable error statistics at each iteration, as well as a new DNN denoiser that leverages those statistics. We apply our approach to magnetic resonance (MR) image recovery and demonstrate its advantages over existing PnP and AMP methods.
summary: To solve inverse problems, plug-and-play (PnP) methods replace the proximal step in a convex optimization algorithm with a call to an application-specific denoiser, often implemented using a deep neural network (DNN). Although such methods yield accurate solutions, they can be improved. For example, denoisers are usually designed/trained to remove white Gaussian noise, but the denoiser input error in PnP algorithms is usually far from white or Gaussian. Approximate message passing (AMP) methods provide white and Gaussian denoiser input error, but only when the forward operator is sufficiently random. In this work, for Fourier-based forward operators, we propose a PnP algorithm based on generalized expectation-consistent (GEC) approximation -- a close cousin of AMP -- that offers predictable error statistics at each iteration, as well as a new DNN denoiser that leverages those statistics. We apply our approach to magnetic resonance (MR) image recovery and demonstrate its advantages over existing PnP and AMP methods.
abstract_zh: 为了解决逆问题，即插即用 (PnP) 方法通过调用特定于应用程序的降噪器（通常使用深度神经网络 (DNN) 实现）来取代凸优化算法中的邻近步骤。尽管这些方法可以产生准确的解决方案，但它们还可以改进。例如，降噪器通常被设计/训练为消除高斯白噪声，但 PnP 算法中的降噪器输入误差通常远离白噪声或高斯噪声。近似消息传递 (AMP) 方法提供白噪声和高斯噪声器输入误差，但前提是前向算子足够随机。在这项工作中，对于基于傅立叶的前向算子，我们提出了一种基于广义期望一致 (GEC) 近似的 PnP 算法（AMP 的近亲），该算法在每次迭代时提供可预测的误差统计数据，以及利用这些统计数据的新 DNN 降噪器。我们将我们的方法应用于磁共振 (MR) 图像恢复，并展示了其相对于现有 PnP 和 AMP 方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合广义期望一致近似（GEC）和深度去噪网络的PnP算法，用于改进磁共振图像恢复中的去噪效果。
AI.motivation: 传统PnP方法依赖的去噪器难以处理非高斯白噪声，而AMP方法需随机前向算子限制，难以适应傅里叶变换等实际MR成像场景。
AI.method: 基于GEC近似设计迭代算法，为傅里叶前向算子提供可预测的误差统计特性，并开发利用这些统计信息的深度神经网络去噪器。
AI.result: 在MR图像恢复实验中，新方法较现有PnP和AMP方法在重建质量与稳定性方面表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过理论可解释的误差统计建模与深度学习结合，在非理想噪声条件下实现了更鲁棒的MR图像恢复。
