Although such methods yield accurate solutions, they can be improved. For example, denoisers are usually designed/trained to remove white Gaussian noise, but the denoiser input error in PnP algorithms is usually far from white or Gaussian. In this work, for Fourier-based forward operators, we propose a PnP algorithm based on generalized expectation-consistent (GEC) approximation -- a close cousin of AMP -- that offers predictable error statistics at each iteration, as well as a new DNN denoiser that leverages those statistics. We apply our approach to magnetic resonance (MR) image recovery and demonstrate its advantages over existing PnP and AMP methods. 为了解决逆问题，即插即用 (PnP) 方法通过调用特定于应用程序的降噪器（通常使用深度神经网络 (DNN) 实现）来取代凸优化算法中的邻近步骤。尽管这些方法可以产生准确的解决方案，但它们还可以改进。例如，降噪器通常被设计/训练为消除高斯白噪声，但 PnP 算法中的降噪器输入误差通常远离白噪声或高斯噪声。近似消息传递 (AMP) 方法提供白噪声和高斯噪声器输入误差，但前提是前向算子足够随机。在这项工作中，对于基于傅立叶的前向算子，我们提出了一种基于广义期望一致 (GEC) 近似的 PnP 算法（AMP 的近亲），该算法在每次迭代时提供可预测的误差统计数据，以及利用这些统计数据的新 DNN 降噪器。我们将我们的方法应用于磁共振 (MR) 图像恢复，并展示了其相对于现有 PnP 和 AMP 方法的优势。 本文提出一种结合广义期望一致近似（GEC）和深度去噪网络的PnP算法，用于改进磁共振图像恢复中的去噪效果。 Saurav K. Shastri,Rizwan Ahmad,Christopher A. Metzler,Philip Schniter eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.IT

authors_text: Trung-Hieu Tran,Kaicong Sun,Sven Simon
title: A GPU-Accelerated Light-field Super-resolution Framework Based on Mixed Noise Model and Weighted Regularization
title_zh: 基于混合噪声模型和加权正则化的GPU加速光场超分辨率框架
abstract: This paper presents a GPU-accelerated computational framework for reconstructing high resolution (HR) LF images under a mixed Gaussian-Impulse noise condition. The main focus is on developing a high-performance approach considering processing speed and reconstruction quality. From a statistical perspective, we derive a joint $\ell^1$-$\ell^2$ data fidelity term for penalizing the HR reconstruction error taking into account the mixed noise situation. For regularization, we employ the weighted non-local total variation approach, which allows us to effectively realize LF image prior through a proper weighting scheme. We show that the alternating direction method of multipliers algorithm (ADMM) can be used to simplify the computation complexity and results in a high-performance parallel computation on the GPU Platform. An extensive experiment is conducted on both synthetic 4D LF dataset and natural image dataset to validate the proposed SR model's robustness and evaluate the accelerated optimizer's performance. The experimental results show that our approach achieves better reconstruction quality under severe mixed-noise conditions as compared to the state-of-the-art approaches. In addition, the proposed approach overcomes the limitation of the previous work in handling large-scale SR tasks. While fitting within a single off-the-shelf GPU, the proposed accelerator provides an average speedup of 2.46$\times$ and 1.57$\times$ for $\times 2$ and $\times 3$ SR tasks, respectively. In addition, a speedup of $77\times$ is achieved as compared to CPU execution.
summary: This paper presents a GPU-accelerated computational framework for reconstructing high resolution (HR) LF images under a mixed Gaussian-Impulse noise condition. The main focus is on developing a high-performance approach considering processing speed and reconstruction quality. From a statistical perspective, we derive a joint $\ell^1$-$\ell^2$ data fidelity term for penalizing the HR reconstruction error taking into account the mixed noise situation. For regularization, we employ the weighted non-local total variation approach, which allows us to effectively realize LF image prior through a proper weighting scheme. We show that the alternating direction method of multipliers algorithm (ADMM) can be used to simplify the computation complexity and results in a high-performance parallel computation on the GPU Platform. An extensive experiment is conducted on both synthetic 4D LF dataset and natural image dataset to validate the proposed SR model's robustness and evaluate the accelerated optimizer's performance. The experimental results show that our approach achieves better reconstruction quality under severe mixed-noise conditions as compared to the state-of-the-art approaches. In addition, the proposed approach overcomes the limitation of the previous work in handling large-scale SR tasks. While fitting within a single off-the-shelf GPU, the proposed accelerator provides an average speedup of 2.46$\times$ and 1.57$\times$ for $\times 2$ and $\times 3$ SR tasks, respectively. In addition, a speedup of $77\times$ is achieved as compared to CPU execution.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种 GPU 加速的计算框架，用于在混合高斯脉冲噪声条件下重建高分辨率 (HR) LF 图像。主要重点是开发一种考虑处理速度和重建质量的高性能方法。从统计角度来看，考虑到混合噪声情况，我们推导出联合 $\ell^1$-$\ell^2$ 数据保真度项来惩罚 HR 重建误差。对于正则化，我们采用加权非局部全变分方法，这使得我们能够通过适当的加权方案有效地实现 LF 图像先验。我们证明了乘法器算法的交替方向法（ADMM）可用于简化计算复杂性，并在 GPU 平台上实现高性能并行计算。在合成 4D LF 数据集和自然图像数据集上进行了广泛的实验，以验证所提出的 SR 模型的鲁棒性并评估加速优化器的性能。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在严重的混合噪声条件下实现了更好的重建质量。此外，所提出的方法克服了先前工作在处理大规模SR任务方面的局限性。在安装在单个现成 GPU 中时，所提出的加速器可为 $\times 2$ 和 $\times 3$ SR 任务分别提供 2.46$\times$ 和 1.57$\times$ 的平均加速。此外，与 CPU 执行相比，还实现了 $77\times$ 的加速。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于混合噪声模型和加权正则化的GPU加速光场超分辨率框架，旨在提升处理速度和重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理混合高斯-脉冲噪声下的光场超分辨率任务时，存在重建质量不足和计算效率低的问题，尤其在大规模数据处理上表现受限。
AI.method: 通过统计推导联合ℓ¹-ℓ²数据保真项以应对混合噪声，采用加权非局部总变分正则化并结合ADMM算法，实现GPU并行加速的高效计算。
AI.result: 在合成与自然图像数据集上，该方法在严重混合噪声下重建质量优于现有方法，GPU加速分别达到2.46倍（×2）和1.57倍（×3），较CPU快77倍。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架在混合噪声光场超分辨率任务中兼顾高质量重建与计算效率，显著提升了大规模任务的处理能力。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于混合噪声模型和加权正则化的GPU加速光场超分辨率框架，旨在提升处理速度和重建质量。
motivation: 现有方法在处理混合高斯-脉冲噪声下的光场超分辨率任务时，存在重建质量不足和计算效率低的问题，尤其在大规模数据处理上表现受限。
method: 通过统计推导联合ℓ¹-ℓ²数据保真项以应对混合噪声，采用加权非局部总变分正则化并结合ADMM算法，实现GPU并行加速的高效计算。
result: 在合成与自然图像数据集上，该方法在严重混合噪声下重建质量优于现有方法，GPU加速分别达到2.46倍（×2）和1.57倍（×3），较CPU快77倍。
conclusion: 所提框架在混合噪声光场超分辨率任务中兼顾高质量重建与计算效率，显著提升了大规模任务的处理能力。
search_text: A GPU-Accelerated Light-field Super-resolution Framework Based on Mixed Noise Model and Weighted Regularization 基于混合噪声模型和加权正则化的GPU加速光场超分辨率框架 This paper presents a GPU-accelerated computational framework for reconstructing high resolution (HR) LF images under a mixed Gaussian-Impulse noise condition. The main focus is on developing a high-performance approach considering processing speed and reconstruction quality. From a statistical perspective, we derive a joint $\ell^1$-$\ell^2$ data fidelity term for penalizing the HR reconstruction error taking into account the mixed noise situation. For regularization, we employ the weighted non-local total variation approach, which allows us to effectively realize LF image prior through a proper weighting scheme. We show that the alternating direction method of multipliers algorithm (ADMM) can be used to simplify the computation complexity and results in a high-performance parallel computation on the GPU Platform. An extensive experiment is conducted on both synthetic 4D LF dataset and natural image dataset to validate the proposed SR model's robustness and evaluate the accelerated optimizer's performance. The experimental results show that our approach achieves better reconstruction quality under severe mixed-noise conditions as compared to the state-of-the-art approaches. In addition, the proposed approach overcomes the limitation of the previous work in handling large-scale SR tasks. While fitting within a single off-the-shelf GPU, the proposed accelerator provides an average speedup of 2.46$\times$ and 1.57$\times$ for $\times 2$ and $\times 3$ SR tasks, respectively. In addition, a speedup of $77\times$ is achieved as compared to CPU execution. 本文提出了一种 GPU 加速的计算框架，用于在混合高斯脉冲噪声条件下重建高分辨率 (HR) LF 图像。主要重点是开发一种考虑处理速度和重建质量的高性能方法。从统计角度来看，考虑到混合噪声情况，我们推导出联合 $\ell^1$-$\ell^2$ 数据保真度项来惩罚 HR 重建误差。对于正则化，我们采用加权非局部全变分方法，这使得我们能够通过适当的加权方案有效地实现 LF 图像先验。我们证明了乘法器算法的交替方向法（ADMM）可用于简化计算复杂性，并在 GPU 平台上实现高性能并行计算。在合成 4D LF 数据集和自然图像数据集上进行了广泛的实验，以验证所提出的 SR 模型的鲁棒性并评估加速优化器的性能。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在严重的混合噪声条件下实现了更好的重建质量。此外，所提出的方法克服了先前工作在处理大规模SR任务方面的局限性。在安装在单个现成 GPU 中时，所提出的加速器可为 $\times 2$ 和 $\times 3$ SR 任务分别提供 2.46$\times$ 和 1.57$\times$ 的平均加速。此外，与 CPU 执行相比，还实现了 $77\times$ 的加速。 本文提出了一种基于混合噪声模型和加权正则化的GPU加速光场超分辨率框架，旨在提升处理速度和重建质量。 Trung-Hieu Tran,Kaicong Sun,Sven Simon eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.PF

authors_text: Nithin Gopalakrishnan Nair,Wele Gedara Chaminda Bandara,Vishal M Patel
title: Image Generation with Multimodal Priors using Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models
title_zh: 使用去噪扩散概率模型通过多模态先验生成图像
abstract: Image synthesis under multi-modal priors is a useful and challenging task that has received increasing attention in recent years. A major challenge in using generative models to accomplish this task is the lack of paired data containing all modalities (i.e. priors) and corresponding outputs. In recent work, a variational auto-encoder (VAE) model was trained in a weakly supervised manner to address this challenge. Since the generative power of VAEs is usually limited, it is difficult for this method to synthesize images belonging to complex distributions. To this end, we propose a solution based on a denoising diffusion probabilistic models to synthesise images under multi-model priors. Based on the fact that the distribution over each time step in the diffusion model is Gaussian, in this work we show that there exists a closed-form expression to the generate the image corresponds to the given modalities. The proposed solution does not require explicit retraining for all modalities and can leverage the outputs of individual modalities to generate realistic images according to different constraints. We conduct studies on two real-world datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach
summary: Image synthesis under multi-modal priors is a useful and challenging task that has received increasing attention in recent years. A major challenge in using generative models to accomplish this task is the lack of paired data containing all modalities (i.e. priors) and corresponding outputs. In recent work, a variational auto-encoder (VAE) model was trained in a weakly supervised manner to address this challenge. Since the generative power of VAEs is usually limited, it is difficult for this method to synthesize images belonging to complex distributions. To this end, we propose a solution based on a denoising diffusion probabilistic models to synthesise images under multi-model priors. Based on the fact that the distribution over each time step in the diffusion model is Gaussian, in this work we show that there exists a closed-form expression to the generate the image corresponds to the given modalities. The proposed solution does not require explicit retraining for all modalities and can leverage the outputs of individual modalities to generate realistic images according to different constraints. We conduct studies on two real-world datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach
abstract_zh: 多模态先验下的图像合成是一项有用且具有挑战性的任务，近年来受到越来越多的关注。使用生成模型完成此任务的一个主要挑战是缺乏包含所有模式（即先验）和相应输出的配对数据。在最近的工作中，以弱监督方式训练变分自动编码器（VAE）模型来应对这一挑战。由于VAE的生成能力通常有限，因此该方法很难合成属于复杂分布的图像。为此，我们提出了一种基于去噪扩散概率模型的解决方案，以在多模型先验下合成图像。基于扩散模型中每个时间步长的分布是高斯分布的事实，在这项工作中，我们证明存在一个封闭形式的表达式来生成与给定模态相对应的图像。所提出的解决方案不需要对所有模态进行显式再训练，并且可以利用各个模态的输出根据不同的约束生成逼真的图像。我们对两个真实世界的数据集进行研究，以证明我们方法的有效性

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）的方法，解决多模态先验下的图像生成问题，无需配对数据即可生成符合不同模态约束的逼真图像。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型（如VAE）在处理复杂多模态先验时存在生成能力不足的问题，且缺乏配对数据限制了模型训练与应用。
AI.method: 利用扩散模型中各时间步的高斯分布特性，推导出多模态先验对应的闭合表达式，无需针对所有模态重新训练，可独立利用单模态输出生成图像。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集上的实验验证了方法有效性，能够根据不同模态约束生成高质量图像。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多模态先验下的图像生成提供了无需配对数据和重新训练的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Ashok Goel,Harshvardhan Sikka,Vrinda Nandan,Jeonghyun Lee,Matt Lisle,Spencer Rugaber
title: Explanation as Question Answering based on a Task Model of the Agent's Design
title_zh: 基于代理设计任务模型的问答解释
comment: 7 Pages, 10 Figures, IJCAI Explainable AI Workshop
comments: 7 Pages, 10 Figures, IJCAI Explainable AI Workshop
abstract: We describe a stance towards the generation of explanations in AI agents that is both human-centered and design-based. We collect questions about the working of an AI agent through participatory design by focus groups. We capture an agent's design through a Task-Method-Knowledge model that explicitly specifies the agent's tasks and goals, as well as the mechanisms, knowledge and vocabulary it uses for accomplishing the tasks. We illustrate our approach through the generation of explanations in Skillsync, an AI agent that links companies and colleges for worker upskilling and reskilling. In particular, we embed a question-answering agent called AskJill in Skillsync, where AskJill contains a TMK model of Skillsync's design. AskJill presently answers human-generated questions about Skillsync's tasks and vocabulary, and thereby helps explain how it produces its recommendations.
summary: We describe a stance towards the generation of explanations in AI agents that is both human-centered and design-based. We collect questions about the working of an AI agent through participatory design by focus groups. We capture an agent's design through a Task-Method-Knowledge model that explicitly specifies the agent's tasks and goals, as well as the mechanisms, knowledge and vocabulary it uses for accomplishing the tasks. We illustrate our approach through the generation of explanations in Skillsync, an AI agent that links companies and colleges for worker upskilling and reskilling. In particular, we embed a question-answering agent called AskJill in Skillsync, where AskJill contains a TMK model of Skillsync's design. AskJill presently answers human-generated questions about Skillsync's tasks and vocabulary, and thereby helps explain how it produces its recommendations.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了一种以人为中心和基于设计的人工智能代理生成解释的立场。我们通过焦点小组的参与式设计收集有关人工智能代理工作的问题。我们通过任务-方法-知识模型来捕获代理的设计，该模型明确指定代理的任务和目标，以及它用于完成任务的机制、知识和词汇。我们通过在 Skillsync 中生成解释来说明我们的方法，Skillsync 是一种将公司和大学联系起来以提高工人技能和再培训的人工智能代理。特别是，我们在 Skillsync 中嵌入了一个名为 AskJill 的问答代理，其中 AskJill 包含 Skillsync 设计的 TMK 模型。 AskJill 目前回答了人类提出的有关 Skillsync 任务和词汇的问题，从而帮助解释它如何产生建议。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于任务模型的AI代理解释方法，通过问答形式增强系统透明度。
AI.motivation: 现有AI系统缺乏用户友好的解释机制，导致信任度和参与度不足，需结合设计思维改进解释方式。
AI.method: 采用参与式设计收集用户问题，构建任务-方法-知识（TMK）模型描述代理设计，并嵌入问答系统AskJill实现动态解释。
AI.result: 在Skillsync平台成功生成针对任务和术语的解释，有效说明推荐机制的运作逻辑。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过设计驱动的问答解释提升了AI系统的可理解性，为智能代理的透明化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Mehdi Seyfi,Amin Banitalebi-Dehkordi,Yong Zhang
title: Spatial Cross-Attention Improves Self-Supervised Visual Representation Learning
title_zh: 空间交叉注意力改善自我监督的视觉表示学习
abstract: Unsupervised representation learning methods like SwAV are proved to be effective in learning visual semantics of a target dataset. The main idea behind these methods is that different views of a same image represent the same semantics. In this paper, we further introduce an add-on module to facilitate the injection of the knowledge accounting for spatial cross correlations among the samples. This in turn results in distilling intra-class information including feature level locations and cross similarities between same-class instances. The proposed add-on can be added to existing methods such as the SwAV. We can later remove the add-on module for inference without any modification of the learned weights. Through an extensive set of empirical evaluations, we verify that our method yields an improved performance in detecting the class activation maps, top-1 classification accuracy, and down-stream tasks such as object detection, with different configuration settings.
summary: Unsupervised representation learning methods like SwAV are proved to be effective in learning visual semantics of a target dataset. The main idea behind these methods is that different views of a same image represent the same semantics. In this paper, we further introduce an add-on module to facilitate the injection of the knowledge accounting for spatial cross correlations among the samples. This in turn results in distilling intra-class information including feature level locations and cross similarities between same-class instances. The proposed add-on can be added to existing methods such as the SwAV. We can later remove the add-on module for inference without any modification of the learned weights. Through an extensive set of empirical evaluations, we verify that our method yields an improved performance in detecting the class activation maps, top-1 classification accuracy, and down-stream tasks such as object detection, with different configuration settings.
abstract_zh: 像 SwAV 这样的无监督表示学习方法被证明在学习目标数据集的视觉语义方面是有效的。这些方法背后的主要思想是同一图像的不同视图代表相同的语义。在本文中，我们进一步引入了一个附加模块，以方便注入样本之间空间互相关性的知识。这反过来又导致提取类内信息，包括特征级别位置和同类实例之间的交叉相似性。所提出的附加组件可以添加到 SwAV 等现有方法中。我们稍后可以删除用于推理的附加模块，而无需对学习的权重进行任何修改。通过大量的实证评估，我们验证了我们的方法在检测类激活图、top-1 分类准确性和下游任务（例如对象检测）方面具有不同配置设置的改进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种空间交叉注意力模块，用于改进自监督视觉表示学习方法，以提升图像分类和下游任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督方法（如SwAV）依赖不同视角的图像语义一致性，但未充分考虑样本间的空间相关性，限制了类内信息的挖掘。
AI.method: 设计一个可附加到现有方法（如SwAV）的模块，通过注入样本间空间交叉相关性知识，学习类内特征位置和实例间相似性，推理时可移除该模块且无需调整权重。
AI.result: 在分类准确率、类激活图检测及目标检测等下游任务中，该方法在多种配置下均取得性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 空间交叉注意力机制有效增强了视觉表示学习，通过挖掘类内结构信息提升了模型性能，且保持了推理阶段的简洁性。

search_text: Spatial Cross-Attention Improves Self-Supervised Visual Representation Learning 空间交叉注意力改善自我监督的视觉表示学习 Unsupervised representation learning methods like SwAV are proved to be effective in learning visual semantics of a target dataset. The main idea behind these methods is that different views of a same image represent the same semantics. In this paper, we further introduce an add-on module to facilitate the injection of the knowledge accounting for spatial cross correlations among the samples. This in turn results in distilling intra-class information including feature level locations and cross similarities between same-class instances. The proposed add-on can be added to existing methods such as the SwAV. We can later remove the add-on module for inference without any modification of the learned weights. Through an extensive set of empirical evaluations, we verify that our method yields an improved performance in detecting the class activation maps, top-1 classification accuracy, and down-stream tasks such as object detection, with different configuration settings. 像 SwAV 这样的无监督表示学习方法被证明在学习目标数据集的视觉语义方面是有效的。这些方法背后的主要思想是同一图像的不同视图代表相同的语义。在本文中，我们进一步引入了一个附加模块，以方便注入样本之间空间互相关性的知识。这反过来又导致提取类内信息，包括特征级别位置和同类实例之间的交叉相似性。所提出的附加组件可以添加到 SwAV 等现有方法中。我们稍后可以删除用于推理的附加模块，而无需对学习的权重进行任何修改。通过大量的实证评估，我们验证了我们的方法在检测类激活图、top-1 分类准确性和下游任务（例如对象检测）方面具有不同配置设置的改进性能。 本文提出一种空间交叉注意力模块，用于改进自监督视觉表示学习方法，以提升图像分类和下游任务的性能。 Mehdi Seyfi,Amin Banitalebi-Dehkordi,Yong Zhang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Franziska Braun,Andreas Erzigkeit,Hartmut Lehfeld,Thomas Hillemacher,Korbinian Riedhammer,Sebastian P. Bayerl
title: Going Beyond the Cookie Theft Picture Test: Detecting Cognitive Impairments using Acoustic Features
title_zh: 超越饼干盗窃图片测试：利用声学特征检测认知障碍
comment: Accepted at the 25th International Conference on Text, Speech and Dialogue (TSD 2022)
comments: Accepted at the 25th International Conference on Text, Speech and Dialogue (TSD 2022)
abstract: Standardized tests play a crucial role in the detection of cognitive impairment. Previous work demonstrated that automatic detection of cognitive impairment is possible using audio data from a standardized picture description task. The presented study goes beyond that, evaluating our methods on data taken from two standardized neuropsychological tests, namely the German SKT and a German version of the CERAD-NB, and a semi-structured clinical interview between a patient and a psychologist. For the tests, we focus on speech recordings of three sub-tests: reading numbers (SKT 3), interference (SKT 7), and verbal fluency (CERAD-NB 1). We show that acoustic features from standardized tests can be used to reliably discriminate cognitively impaired individuals from non-impaired ones. Furthermore, we provide evidence that even features extracted from random speech samples of the interview can be a discriminator of cognitive impairment. In our baseline experiments, we use OpenSMILE features and Support Vector Machine classifiers. In an improved setup, we show that using wav2vec 2.0 features instead, we can achieve an accuracy of up to 85%.
summary: Standardized tests play a crucial role in the detection of cognitive impairment. Previous work demonstrated that automatic detection of cognitive impairment is possible using audio data from a standardized picture description task. The presented study goes beyond that, evaluating our methods on data taken from two standardized neuropsychological tests, namely the German SKT and a German version of the CERAD-NB, and a semi-structured clinical interview between a patient and a psychologist. For the tests, we focus on speech recordings of three sub-tests: reading numbers (SKT 3), interference (SKT 7), and verbal fluency (CERAD-NB 1). We show that acoustic features from standardized tests can be used to reliably discriminate cognitively impaired individuals from non-impaired ones. Furthermore, we provide evidence that even features extracted from random speech samples of the interview can be a discriminator of cognitive impairment. In our baseline experiments, we use OpenSMILE features and Support Vector Machine classifiers. In an improved setup, we show that using wav2vec 2.0 features instead, we can achieve an accuracy of up to 85%.
abstract_zh: 标准化测试在认知障碍的检测中发挥着至关重要的作用。先前的工作证明，使用标准化图片描述任务中的音频数据可以自动检测认知障碍。本研究不仅限于此，还根据两项标准化神经心理学测试（即德国 SKT 和德国版本的 CERAD-NB）以及患者和心理学家之间的半结构化临床访谈获取的数据评估了我们的方法。在测试中，我们重点关注三个子测试的语音录音：阅读数字（SKT 3）、干扰（SKT 7）和言语流畅性（CERAD-NB 1）。我们证明，标准化测试中的声学特征可以用来可靠地区分认知受损的个体与未受损的个体。此外，我们提供的证据表明，即使是从采访的随机语音样本中提取的特征也可以作为认知障碍的鉴别器。在我们的基线实验中，我们使用 OpenSMILE 功能和支持向量机分类器。在改进的设置中，我们表明使用 wav2vec 2.0 功能代替，我们可以实现高达 85% 的准确度。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析标准化神经心理学测试和临床访谈中的语音数据，利用声学特征检测认知障碍。
AI.motivation: 传统标准化测试在认知障碍检测中至关重要，但现有研究仅基于单一任务数据。本文旨在通过多源语音数据（包括测试和访谈）提升检测可靠性。
AI.method: 提取标准化测试（SKT 3、SKT 7、CERAD-NB 1）和临床访谈的语音特征，使用OpenSMILE特征与支持向量机（SVM）分类器，并改进为基于wav2vec 2.0特征的模型。
AI.result: 基线模型准确率达85%，访谈随机语音样本的声学特征也具备判别能力，验证了多源数据的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 声学特征可有效区分认知障碍患者，结合先进模型（如wav2vec 2.0）能显著提升检测准确率，为无创认知评估提供新方法。

authors_text: Aravind Sesagiri Raamkumar,Yinping Yang
title: Empathetic Conversational Systems: A Review of Current Advances, Gaps, and Opportunities
title_zh: 同理心对话系统：当前进展、差距和机遇回顾
comment: 20 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables
comments: 20 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables
abstract: Empathy is a vital factor that contributes to mutual understanding, and joint problem-solving. In recent years, a growing number of studies have recognized the benefits of empathy and started to incorporate empathy in conversational systems. We refer to this topic as empathetic conversational systems. To identify the critical gaps and future opportunities in this topic, this paper examines this rapidly growing field using five review dimensions: (i) conceptual empathy models and frameworks, (ii) adopted empathy-related concepts, (iii) datasets and algorithmic techniques developed, (iv) evaluation strategies, and (v) state-of-the-art approaches. The findings show that most studies have centered on the use of the EMPATHETICDIALOGUES dataset, and the text-based modality dominates research in this field. Studies mainly focused on extracting features from the messages of the users and the conversational systems, with minimal emphasis on user modeling and profiling. Notably, studies that have incorporated emotion causes, external knowledge, and affect matching in the response generation models, have obtained significantly better results. For implementation in diverse real-world settings, we recommend that future studies should address key gaps in areas of detecting and authenticating emotions at the entity level, handling multimodal inputs, displaying more nuanced empathetic behaviors, and encompassing additional dialogue system features.
summary: Empathy is a vital factor that contributes to mutual understanding, and joint problem-solving. In recent years, a growing number of studies have recognized the benefits of empathy and started to incorporate empathy in conversational systems. We refer to this topic as empathetic conversational systems. To identify the critical gaps and future opportunities in this topic, this paper examines this rapidly growing field using five review dimensions: (i) conceptual empathy models and frameworks, (ii) adopted empathy-related concepts, (iii) datasets and algorithmic techniques developed, (iv) evaluation strategies, and (v) state-of-the-art approaches. The findings show that most studies have centered on the use of the EMPATHETICDIALOGUES dataset, and the text-based modality dominates research in this field. Studies mainly focused on extracting features from the messages of the users and the conversational systems, with minimal emphasis on user modeling and profiling. Notably, studies that have incorporated emotion causes, external knowledge, and affect matching in the response generation models, have obtained significantly better results. For implementation in diverse real-world settings, we recommend that future studies should address key gaps in areas of detecting and authenticating emotions at the entity level, handling multimodal inputs, displaying more nuanced empathetic behaviors, and encompassing additional dialogue system features.
abstract_zh: 同理心是有助于相互理解和共同解决问题的重要因素。近年来，越来越多的研究认识到同理心的好处，并开始将同理心纳入对话系统中。我们将此主题称为移情对话系统。为了确定该主题的关键差距和未来机会，本文使用五个审查维度来研究这个快速发展的领域：（i）概念同理心模型和框架，（ii）采用的同理心相关概念，（iii）开发的数据集和算法技术，（iv）评估策略，以及（v）最先进的方法。研究结果表明，大多数研究都集中在 EMPATHETICDIALOGUES 数据集的使用上，并且基于文本的模式主导了该领域的研究。研究主要集中在从用户消息和会话系统中提取特征，很少强调用户建模和分析。值得注意的是，将情绪原因、外部知识和情感匹配纳入响应生成模型的研究取得了明显更好的结果。为了在不同的现实环境中实施，我们建议未来的研究应解决在实体层面检测和验证情感、处理多模式输入、显示更细致的移情行为以及包含其他对话系统功能等领域的关键差距。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了共情对话系统的最新进展、存在的差距及未来机遇，通过五个维度分析该领域研究现状。
AI.motivation: 同理心对促进对话理解与协作至关重要，但现有对话系统在情感识别与生成方面仍存在显著不足，需系统性梳理研究进展与挑战。
AI.method: 基于五个维度（概念模型、相关概念、数据集与算法、评估策略、前沿方法）对现有文献进行系统性回顾与分析。
AI.result: 研究发现多数工作依赖EMPATHETICDIALOGUES数据集，文本模态占主导，用户建模不足，而融合情绪原因、外部知识和情感匹配的模型效果更优。
AI.conclusion: 未来需加强实体级情感检测、多模态处理、细腻共情行为生成及对话系统功能扩展，以推动技术落地应用。

search_text: Empathetic Conversational Systems: A Review of Current Advances, Gaps, and Opportunities 同理心对话系统：当前进展、差距和机遇回顾 Empathy is a vital factor that contributes to mutual understanding, and joint problem-solving. In recent years, a growing number of studies have recognized the benefits of empathy and started to incorporate empathy in conversational systems. We refer to this topic as empathetic conversational systems. To identify the critical gaps and future opportunities in this topic, this paper examines this rapidly growing field using five review dimensions: (i) conceptual empathy models and frameworks, (ii) adopted empathy-related concepts, (iii) datasets and algorithmic techniques developed, (iv) evaluation strategies, and (v) state-of-the-art approaches. The findings show that most studies have centered on the use of the EMPATHETICDIALOGUES dataset, and the text-based modality dominates research in this field. Studies mainly focused on extracting features from the messages of the users and the conversational systems, with minimal emphasis on user modeling and profiling. Notably, studies that have incorporated emotion causes, external knowledge, and affect matching in the response generation models, have obtained significantly better results. For implementation in diverse real-world settings, we recommend that future studies should address key gaps in areas of detecting and authenticating emotions at the entity level, handling multimodal inputs, displaying more nuanced empathetic behaviors, and encompassing additional dialogue system features. 同理心是有助于相互理解和共同解决问题的重要因素。近年来，越来越多的研究认识到同理心的好处，并开始将同理心纳入对话系统中。我们将此主题称为移情对话系统。为了确定该主题的关键差距和未来机会，本文使用五个审查维度来研究这个快速发展的领域：（i）概念同理心模型和框架，（ii）采用的同理心相关概念，（iii）开发的数据集和算法技术，（iv）评估策略，以及（v）最先进的方法。研究结果表明，大多数研究都集中在 EMPATHETICDIALOGUES 数据集的使用上，并且基于文本的模式主导了该领域的研究。研究主要集中在从用户消息和会话系统中提取特征，很少强调用户建模和分析。值得注意的是，将情绪原因、外部知识和情感匹配纳入响应生成模型的研究取得了明显更好的结果。为了在不同的现实环境中实施，我们建议未来的研究应解决在实体层面检测和验证情感、处理多模式输入、显示更细致的移情行为以及包含其他对话系统功能等领域的关键差距。 本文综述了共情对话系统的最新进展、存在的差距及未来机遇，通过五个维度分析该领域研究现状。 Aravind Sesagiri Raamkumar,Yinping Yang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Tianle Li,Yi Yang
title: A Simple Yet Efficient Method for Adversarial Word-Substitute Attack
title_zh: 一种简单而有效的对抗性单词替换攻击方法
abstract: NLP researchers propose different word-substitute black-box attacks that can fool text classification models. In such attack, an adversary keeps sending crafted adversarial queries to the target model until it can successfully achieve the intended outcome. State-of-the-art attack methods usually require hundreds or thousands of queries to find one adversarial example. In this paper, we study whether a sophisticated adversary can attack the system with much less queries. We propose a simple yet efficient method that can reduce the average number of adversarial queries by 3-30 times and maintain the attack effectiveness. This research highlights that an adversary can fool a deep NLP model with much less cost.
summary: NLP researchers propose different word-substitute black-box attacks that can fool text classification models. In such attack, an adversary keeps sending crafted adversarial queries to the target model until it can successfully achieve the intended outcome. State-of-the-art attack methods usually require hundreds or thousands of queries to find one adversarial example. In this paper, we study whether a sophisticated adversary can attack the system with much less queries. We propose a simple yet efficient method that can reduce the average number of adversarial queries by 3-30 times and maintain the attack effectiveness. This research highlights that an adversary can fool a deep NLP model with much less cost.
abstract_zh: NLP 研究人员提出了不同的单词替换黑盒攻击，可以欺骗文本分类模型。在此类攻击中，对手不断向目标模型发送精心设计的对抗性查询，直到成功实现预期结果。最先进的攻击方法通常需要数百或数千次查询才能找到一个对抗性示例。在本文中，我们研究了复杂的对手是否可以用更少的查询来攻击系统。我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，可以将对抗性查询的平均数量减少 3-30 倍，并保持攻击有效性。这项研究强调，对手可以用更少的成本欺骗深度 NLP 模型。

AI.tldr: 提出一种简单高效的对抗性词替换攻击方法，减少对抗样本查询次数
AI.motivation: 现有攻击方法需要大量查询，成本高，研究如何以更少查询实现有效攻击
AI.method: 通过优化词替换策略，减少每次攻击所需的查询次数
AI.result: 平均减少3-30倍对抗查询次数，同时保持攻击有效性
AI.conclusion: 证明对抗攻击可大幅降低查询成本，威胁模型安全性

authors_text: Edgar Galván,Leonardo Trujillo,Fergal Stapleton
title: Highlights of Semantics in Multi-objective Genetic Programming
title_zh: 多目标遗传规划中的语义亮点
comment: Accepted in GECCO '22 Companion, July 9--13, 2022, Boston, MA, USA, 2 pages, 1 figure. This Hot-off-the-Press paper summarises "Semantics in Multi-objective Genetic Programming" by Edgar Galván, Leonardo Trujillo and Fergal Stapleton, published in the journal of Applied Soft Computing 2022, https://doi.org/10.1016/j.asoc.2021.108143 [arXiv:2105.02944]
comments: Accepted in GECCO '22 Companion, July 9--13, 2022, Boston, MA, USA, 2 pages, 1 figure. This Hot-off-the-Press paper summarises "Semantics in Multi-objective Genetic Programming" by Edgar Galván, Leonardo Trujillo and Fergal Stapleton, published in the journal of Applied Soft Computing 2022, https://doi.org/10.1016/j.asoc.2021.108143 [arXiv:2105.02944]
abstract: Semantics is a growing area of research in Genetic programming (GP) and refers to the behavioural output of a Genetic Programming individual when executed. This research expands upon the current understanding of semantics by proposing a new approach: Semantic-based Distance as an additional criteriOn (SDO), in the thus far, somewhat limited researched area of semantics in Multi-objective GP (MOGP). Our work included an expansive analysis of the GP in terms of performance and diversity metrics, using two additional semantic-based approaches, namely Semantic Similarity-based Crossover (SCC) and Semantic-based Crowding Distance (SCD). Each approach is integrated into two evolutionary multi-objective (EMO) frameworks: Non-dominated Sorting Genetic Algorithm II (NSGA-II) and the Strength Pareto Evolutionary Algorithm 2 (SPEA2), and along with the three semantic approaches, the canonical form of NSGA-II and SPEA2 are rigorously compared. Using highly-unbalanced binary classification datasets, we demonstrated that the newly proposed approach of SDO consistently generated more non-dominated solutions, with better diversity and improved hypervolume results.
summary: Semantics is a growing area of research in Genetic programming (GP) and refers to the behavioural output of a Genetic Programming individual when executed. This research expands upon the current understanding of semantics by proposing a new approach: Semantic-based Distance as an additional criteriOn (SDO), in the thus far, somewhat limited researched area of semantics in Multi-objective GP (MOGP). Our work included an expansive analysis of the GP in terms of performance and diversity metrics, using two additional semantic-based approaches, namely Semantic Similarity-based Crossover (SCC) and Semantic-based Crowding Distance (SCD). Each approach is integrated into two evolutionary multi-objective (EMO) frameworks: Non-dominated Sorting Genetic Algorithm II (NSGA-II) and the Strength Pareto Evolutionary Algorithm 2 (SPEA2), and along with the three semantic approaches, the canonical form of NSGA-II and SPEA2 are rigorously compared. Using highly-unbalanced binary classification datasets, we demonstrated that the newly proposed approach of SDO consistently generated more non-dominated solutions, with better diversity and improved hypervolume results.
abstract_zh: 语义学是遗传编程 (GP) 中一个不断发展的研究领域，指的是遗传编程个体在执行时的行为输出。这项研究通过提出一种新方法扩展了当前对语义的理解：基于语义的距离作为附加标准（SDO），这是迄今为止在多目标 GP（MOGP）中语义研究有限的领域。我们的工作包括使用两种额外的基于语义的方法，即基于语义相似性的交叉（SCC）和基于语义的拥挤距离（SCD），对 GP 的性能和多样性指标进行广泛分析。每种方法都集成到两个进化多目标 (EMO) 框架中：非支配排序遗传算法 II (NSGA-II) 和强度帕累托进化算法 2 (SPEA2)，并且与三种语义方法一起，严格比较 NSGA-II 和 SPEA2 的规范形式。使用高度不平衡的二元分类数据集，我们证明了新提出的 SDO 方法能够一致地生成更多非支配解决方案，具有更好的多样性和改进的超体积结果。

AI.tldr: 本文在多目标遗传编程中引入基于语义的改进方法，通过提出语义距离标准（SDO）及两种语义交叉与拥挤距离方法，提升算法性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对多目标遗传编程中语义的应用探索不足，需扩展语义理论以优化算法性能与多样性。
AI.method: 提出SDO、SCC、SCD三种语义方法，集成于NSGA-II与SPEA2框架，通过不平衡二元分类数据集对比实验验证效果。
AI.result: SDO方法显著提升非支配解数量、多样性及超体积指标，优于传统NSGA-II/SPEA2与其它语义方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于语义的改进有效提升多目标遗传编程性能，SDO表现最优，未来可探索更复杂的语义应用。

authors_text: Tao Wang,Zicheng Zhang,Wei Sun,Xiongkuo Min,Wei Lu,Guangtao Zhai
title: Subjective Quality Assessment for Images Generated by Computer Graphics
title_zh: 计算机图形学生成的图像的主观质量评估
abstract: With the development of rendering techniques, computer graphics generated images (CGIs) have been widely used in practical application scenarios such as architecture design, video games, simulators, movies, etc. Different from natural scene images (NSIs), the distortions of CGIs are usually caused by poor rending settings and limited computation resources. What's more, some CGIs may also suffer from compression distortions in transmission systems like cloud gaming and stream media. However, limited work has been put forward to tackle the problem of computer graphics generated images' quality assessment (CG-IQA). Therefore, in this paper, we establish a large-scale subjective CG-IQA database to deal with the challenge of CG-IQA tasks. We collect 25,454 in-the-wild CGIs through previous databases and personal collection. After data cleaning, we carefully select 1,200 CGIs to conduct the subjective experiment. Several popular no-reference image quality assessment (NR-IQA) methods are tested on our database. The experimental results show that the handcrafted-based methods achieve low correlation with subjective judgment and deep learning based methods obtain relatively better performance, which demonstrates that the current NR-IQA models are not suitable for CG-IQA tasks and more effective models are urgently needed.
summary: With the development of rendering techniques, computer graphics generated images (CGIs) have been widely used in practical application scenarios such as architecture design, video games, simulators, movies, etc. Different from natural scene images (NSIs), the distortions of CGIs are usually caused by poor rending settings and limited computation resources. What's more, some CGIs may also suffer from compression distortions in transmission systems like cloud gaming and stream media. However, limited work has been put forward to tackle the problem of computer graphics generated images' quality assessment (CG-IQA). Therefore, in this paper, we establish a large-scale subjective CG-IQA database to deal with the challenge of CG-IQA tasks. We collect 25,454 in-the-wild CGIs through previous databases and personal collection. After data cleaning, we carefully select 1,200 CGIs to conduct the subjective experiment. Several popular no-reference image quality assessment (NR-IQA) methods are tested on our database. The experimental results show that the handcrafted-based methods achieve low correlation with subjective judgment and deep learning based methods obtain relatively better performance, which demonstrates that the current NR-IQA models are not suitable for CG-IQA tasks and more effective models are urgently needed.
abstract_zh: 随着渲染技术的发展，计算机图形生成图像（CGI）已广泛应用于建筑设计、视频游戏、模拟器、电影等实际应用场景中。与自然场景图像（NSI）不同，CGI 的失真通常是由于不良的渲染设置和有限的计算资源造成的。此外，某些 CGI 还可能在云游戏和流媒体等传输系统中遭受压缩失真。然而，解决计算机图形生成图像质量评估（CG-IQA）问题的工作有限。因此，在本文中，我们建立了一个大规模主观CG-IQA数据库来应对CG-IQA任务的挑战。我们通过之前的数据库和个人收藏收集了 25,454 个野外 CGI。经过数据清洗后，我们精心挑选了1200个CGI进行主观实验。我们的数据库测试了几种流行的无参考图像质量评估 (NR-IQA) 方法。实验结果表明，基于手工制作的方法与主观判断的相关性较低，而基于深度学习的方法获得了相对较好的性能，这表明当前的NR-IQA模型不适合CG-IQA任务，迫切需要更有效的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文建立大规模主观CG-IQA数据库，评估现有无参考图像质量评估方法在计算机生成图像质量评估中的适用性。
AI.motivation: 计算机生成图像（CGI）因渲染设置和传输压缩等问题存在质量评估难题，现有研究缺乏针对性数据库和有效评估方法。
AI.method: 收集25,454张真实场景CGI，筛选1,200张进行主观实验，并测试多款无参考图像质量评估方法。
AI.result: 传统手工特征方法与主观评分相关性低，深度学习方法表现更优，但现有模型仍无法满足CG-IQA需求。
AI.conclusion: 当前NR-IQA模型不适用于CG-IQA任务，亟需开发更有效的评估模型以解决该领域质量评估问题。

search_text: Subjective Quality Assessment for Images Generated by Computer Graphics 计算机图形学生成的图像的主观质量评估 With the development of rendering techniques, computer graphics generated images (CGIs) have been widely used in practical application scenarios such as architecture design, video games, simulators, movies, etc. Different from natural scene images (NSIs), the distortions of CGIs are usually caused by poor rending settings and limited computation resources. What's more, some CGIs may also suffer from compression distortions in transmission systems like cloud gaming and stream media. However, limited work has been put forward to tackle the problem of computer graphics generated images' quality assessment (CG-IQA). Therefore, in this paper, we establish a large-scale subjective CG-IQA database to deal with the challenge of CG-IQA tasks. We collect 25,454 in-the-wild CGIs through previous databases and personal collection. After data cleaning, we carefully select 1,200 CGIs to conduct the subjective experiment. Several popular no-reference image quality assessment (NR-IQA) methods are tested on our database. The experimental results show that the handcrafted-based methods achieve low correlation with subjective judgment and deep learning based methods obtain relatively better performance, which demonstrates that the current NR-IQA models are not suitable for CG-IQA tasks and more effective models are urgently needed. 随着渲染技术的发展，计算机图形生成图像（CGI）已广泛应用于建筑设计、视频游戏、模拟器、电影等实际应用场景中。与自然场景图像（NSI）不同，CGI 的失真通常是由于不良的渲染设置和有限的计算资源造成的。此外，某些 CGI 还可能在云游戏和流媒体等传输系统中遭受压缩失真。然而，解决计算机图形生成图像质量评估（CG-IQA）问题的工作有限。因此，在本文中，我们建立了一个大规模主观CG-IQA数据库来应对CG-IQA任务的挑战。我们通过之前的数据库和个人收藏收集了 25,454 个野外 CGI。经过数据清洗后，我们精心挑选了1200个CGI进行主观实验。我们的数据库测试了几种流行的无参考图像质量评估 (NR-IQA) 方法。实验结果表明，基于手工制作的方法与主观判断的相关性较低，而基于深度学习的方法获得了相对较好的性能，这表明当前的NR-IQA模型不适合CG-IQA任务，迫切需要更有效的模型。 本文建立大规模主观CG-IQA数据库，评估现有无参考图像质量评估方法在计算机生成图像质量评估中的适用性。 Tao Wang,Zicheng Zhang,Wei Sun,Xiongkuo Min,Wei Lu,Guangtao Zhai cs.GR,cs.CV

authors_text: Ian Gemp,Charlie Chen,Brian McWilliams
title: The Symmetric Generalized Eigenvalue Problem as a Nash Equilibrium
title_zh: 作为纳什均衡的对称广义特征值问题
comment: Published in ICLR 2023 (JAX code available as part of github.com/deepmind/eigengame)
comments: Published in ICLR 2023 (JAX code available as part of github.com/deepmind/eigengame)
abstract: The symmetric generalized eigenvalue problem (SGEP) is a fundamental concept in numerical linear algebra. It captures the solution of many classical machine learning problems such as canonical correlation analysis, independent components analysis, partial least squares, linear discriminant analysis, principal components and others. Despite this, most general solvers are prohibitively expensive when dealing with streaming data sets (i.e., minibatches) and research has instead concentrated on finding efficient solutions to specific problem instances. In this work, we develop a game-theoretic formulation of the top-$k$ SGEP whose Nash equilibrium is the set of generalized eigenvectors. We also present a parallelizable algorithm with guaranteed asymptotic convergence to the Nash. Current state-of-the-art methods require $O(d^2k)$ runtime complexity per iteration which is prohibitively expensive when the number of dimensions ($d$) is large. We show how to modify this parallel approach to achieve $O(dk)$ runtime complexity. Empirically we demonstrate that this resulting algorithm is able to solve a variety of SGEP problem instances including a large-scale analysis of neural network activations.
summary: The symmetric generalized eigenvalue problem (SGEP) is a fundamental concept in numerical linear algebra. It captures the solution of many classical machine learning problems such as canonical correlation analysis, independent components analysis, partial least squares, linear discriminant analysis, principal components and others. Despite this, most general solvers are prohibitively expensive when dealing with streaming data sets (i.e., minibatches) and research has instead concentrated on finding efficient solutions to specific problem instances. In this work, we develop a game-theoretic formulation of the top-$k$ SGEP whose Nash equilibrium is the set of generalized eigenvectors. We also present a parallelizable algorithm with guaranteed asymptotic convergence to the Nash. Current state-of-the-art methods require $O(d^2k)$ runtime complexity per iteration which is prohibitively expensive when the number of dimensions ($d$) is large. We show how to modify this parallel approach to achieve $O(dk)$ runtime complexity. Empirically we demonstrate that this resulting algorithm is able to solve a variety of SGEP problem instances including a large-scale analysis of neural network activations.
abstract_zh: 对称广义特征值问题（SGEP）是数值线性代数中的基本概念。它捕获了许多经典机器学习问题的解决方案，例如典型相关分析、独立成分分析、偏最小二乘、线性判别分析、主成分分析等。尽管如此，大多数通用求解器在处理流数据集（即小批量）时都非常昂贵，并且研究主要集中在寻找特定问题实例的有效解决方案。在这项工作中，我们开发了 top-$k$ SGEP 的博弈论公式，其纳什均衡是广义特征向量集。我们还提出了一种可并行的算法，保证渐近收敛于纳什。当前最先进的方法每次迭代需要 $O(d^2k)$ 运行时复杂度，当维度数 ($d$) 很大时，这是非常昂贵的。我们展示了如何修改这种并行方法以实现 $O(dk)$ 运行时复杂度。根据经验，我们证明该算法能够解决各种 SGEP 问题实例，包括神经网络激活的大规模分析。

AI.tldr: 本文将对称广义特征值问题（SGEP）建模为纳什均衡，并提出一种可并行的高效算法以解决大规模流数据场景下的SGEP问题。
AI.motivation: 现有SGEP求解方法在处理高维流数据时计算复杂度过高（O(d²k)），难以满足实际需求，需寻找更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过博弈论框架将top-k SGEP转化为纳什均衡问题，设计可并行的算法将时间复杂度降至O(dk)，并证明其渐进收敛性。
AI.result: 实验验证了算法在多种SGEP实例（包括神经网络激活分析）上的有效性，展示了相较于现有方法的效率优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为大规模SGEP问题提供了理论保证和计算效率更高的求解方案，拓展了博弈论在数值线性代数中的应用。

It captures the solution of many classical machine learning problems such as canonical correlation analysis, independent components analysis, partial least squares, linear discriminant analysis, principal components and others. Despite this, most general solvers are prohibitively expensive when dealing with streaming data sets (i.e., minibatches) and research has instead concentrated on finding efficient solutions to specific problem instances. authors_text: Evan E. Dobbs,Joseph S. Friedman,Alexandru Paler
title: Efficient Quantum Circuit Design with a Standard Cell Approach, with an Application to Neutral Atom Quantum Computers
title_zh: 采用标准单元方法的高效量子电路设计，及其在中性原子量子计算机中的应用
abstract: We design quantum circuits by using the standard cell approach borrowed from classical circuit design, which can speed-up the layout of circuits with a regular structure. Our standard cells are general and can be used for all types of quantum circuits: error-corrected or not. The standard cell approach enables the formulation of layout-aware routing algorithms. Our method is directly applicable to neutral atom quantum computers supporting qubit shuttling. Such computers enable zoned architectures for memory, processing and measurement, and we design circuits using qubit storages (memory and measurement zones) and standard cells (processing zones). Herein, we use cubic standard cells for Toffoli gates and, starting from a 3D architecture, we design a multiplication circuit. We present evidence that, when compared with automatic routing methods, our layout-aware routers are significantly faster and achieve shallower 3D circuits (by at least 2.5x) and with a lower routing cost. Additionally, our co-design approach can be used to estimate the resources necessary for a quantum computation without using complex compilation methods. We conclude that standard cells, with the support of layout-aware routing, pave the way to very large scale methods for quantum circuit compilation.
summary: We design quantum circuits by using the standard cell approach borrowed from classical circuit design, which can speed-up the layout of circuits with a regular structure. Our standard cells are general and can be used for all types of quantum circuits: error-corrected or not. The standard cell approach enables the formulation of layout-aware routing algorithms. Our method is directly applicable to neutral atom quantum computers supporting qubit shuttling. Such computers enable zoned architectures for memory, processing and measurement, and we design circuits using qubit storages (memory and measurement zones) and standard cells (processing zones). Herein, we use cubic standard cells for Toffoli gates and, starting from a 3D architecture, we design a multiplication circuit. We present evidence that, when compared with automatic routing methods, our layout-aware routers are significantly faster and achieve shallower 3D circuits (by at least 2.5x) and with a lower routing cost. Additionally, our co-design approach can be used to estimate the resources necessary for a quantum computation without using complex compilation methods. We conclude that standard cells, with the support of layout-aware routing, pave the way to very large scale methods for quantum circuit compilation.
abstract_zh: 我们采用借鉴经典电路设计的标准单元方法来设计量子电路，可以加快规则结构电路的布局。我们的标准单元是通用的，可用于所有类型的量子电路：纠错与否。标准单元方法可以制定布局感知路由算法。我们的方法直接适用于支持量子位穿梭的中性原子量子计算机。此类计算机支持内存、处理和测量的分区架构，我们使用量子位存储（内存和测量区域）和标准单元（处理区域）来设计电路。在这里，我们使用立方标准单元作为Toffoli门，并从3D架构开始，设计乘法电路。我们提供的证据表明，与自动布线方法相比，我们的布局感知路由器速度明显更快，可以实现更浅的 3D 电路（至少 2.5 倍），并且布线成本更低。此外，我们的协同设计方法可用于估计量子计算所需的资源，而无需使用复杂的编译方法。我们得出的结论是，在布局感知路由的支持下，标准单元为超大规模量子电路编译方法铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于标准单元的量子电路设计方法，并应用于中性原子量子计算机，以提高电路布局效率。
AI.motivation: 传统量子电路设计方法在处理大规模电路时效率低下，且难以适配中性原子量子计算机的三维架构和量子比特 shuttling 特性。
AI.method: 借鉴经典电路设计的标准化单元方法，设计通用标准单元库并结合布局感知路由算法，针对中性原子量子计算机的三维架构优化电路布局。
AI.result: 相比自动路由方法，布局感知路由速度提升2.5倍以上，生成的三维电路深度更低，且能准确估算量子计算资源需求。
AI.conclusion: 标准单元与布局感知路由结合，为大规模量子电路编译提供了可行的解决方案。

method: 借鉴经典电路设计的标准化单元方法，设计通用标准单元库并结合布局感知路由算法，针对中性原子量子计算机的三维架构优化电路布局。
result: 相比自动路由方法，布局感知路由速度提升2.5倍以上，生成的三维电路深度更低，且能准确估算量子计算资源需求。

search_text: Efficient Quantum Circuit Design with a Standard Cell Approach, with an Application to Neutral Atom Quantum Computers 采用标准单元方法的高效量子电路设计，及其在中性原子量子计算机中的应用 We design quantum circuits by using the standard cell approach borrowed from classical circuit design, which can speed-up the layout of circuits with a regular structure. Our standard cells are general and can be used for all types of quantum circuits: error-corrected or not. The standard cell approach enables the formulation of layout-aware routing algorithms. Our method is directly applicable to neutral atom quantum computers supporting qubit shuttling. Such computers enable zoned architectures for memory, processing and measurement, and we design circuits using qubit storages (memory and measurement zones) and standard cells (processing zones). Herein, we use cubic standard cells for Toffoli gates and, starting from a 3D architecture, we design a multiplication circuit. We present evidence that, when compared with automatic routing methods, our layout-aware routers are significantly faster and achieve shallower 3D circuits (by at least 2.5x) and with a lower routing cost. Additionally, our co-design approach can be used to estimate the resources necessary for a quantum computation without using complex compilation methods. We conclude that standard cells, with the support of layout-aware routing, pave the way to very large scale methods for quantum circuit compilation. 我们采用借鉴经典电路设计的标准单元方法来设计量子电路，可以加快规则结构电路的布局。我们的标准单元是通用的，可用于所有类型的量子电路：纠错与否。标准单元方法可以制定布局感知路由算法。我们的方法直接适用于支持量子位穿梭的中性原子量子计算机。此类计算机支持内存、处理和测量的分区架构，我们使用量子位存储（内存和测量区域）和标准单元（处理区域）来设计电路。在这里，我们使用立方标准单元作为Toffoli门，并从3D架构开始，设计乘法电路。我们提供的证据表明，与自动布线方法相比，我们的布局感知路由器速度明显更快，可以实现更浅的 3D 电路（至少 2.5 倍），并且布线成本更低。此外，我们的协同设计方法可用于估计量子计算所需的资源，而无需使用复杂的编译方法。我们得出的结论是，在布局感知路由的支持下，标准单元为超大规模量子电路编译方法铺平了道路。 本文提出了一种基于标准单元的量子电路设计方法，并应用于中性原子量子计算机，以提高电路布局效率。 Evan E. Dobbs,Joseph S. Friedman,Alexandru Paler quant-ph,cs.ET

authors_text: Duygu Dogan,Huang Xie,Toni Heittola,Tuomas Virtanen
title: Zero-Shot Audio Classification using Image Embeddings
title_zh: 使用图像嵌入的零样本音频分类
comment: Accepted to the European Signal Processing Conference (EUSIPCO) 2022
comments: Accepted to the European Signal Processing Conference (EUSIPCO) 2022
abstract: Supervised learning methods can solve the given problem in the presence of a large set of labeled data. However, the acquisition of a dataset covering all the target classes typically requires manual labeling which is expensive and time-consuming. Zero-shot learning models are capable of classifying the unseen concepts by utilizing their semantic information. The present study introduces image embeddings as side information on zero-shot audio classification by using a nonlinear acoustic-semantic projection. We extract the semantic image representations from the Open Images dataset and evaluate the performance of the models on an audio subset of AudioSet using semantic information in different domains; image, audio, and textual. We demonstrate that the image embeddings can be used as semantic information to perform zero-shot audio classification. The experimental results show that the image and textual embeddings display similar performance both individually and together. We additionally calculate the semantic acoustic embeddings from the test samples to provide an upper limit to the performance. The results show that the classification performance is highly sensitive to the semantic relation between test and training classes and textual and image embeddings can reach up to the semantic acoustic embeddings when the seen and unseen classes are semantically similar.
summary: Supervised learning methods can solve the given problem in the presence of a large set of labeled data. However, the acquisition of a dataset covering all the target classes typically requires manual labeling which is expensive and time-consuming. Zero-shot learning models are capable of classifying the unseen concepts by utilizing their semantic information. The present study introduces image embeddings as side information on zero-shot audio classification by using a nonlinear acoustic-semantic projection. We extract the semantic image representations from the Open Images dataset and evaluate the performance of the models on an audio subset of AudioSet using semantic information in different domains; image, audio, and textual. We demonstrate that the image embeddings can be used as semantic information to perform zero-shot audio classification. The experimental results show that the image and textual embeddings display similar performance both individually and together. We additionally calculate the semantic acoustic embeddings from the test samples to provide an upper limit to the performance. The results show that the classification performance is highly sensitive to the semantic relation between test and training classes and textual and image embeddings can reach up to the semantic acoustic embeddings when the seen and unseen classes are semantically similar.
abstract_zh: 监督学习方法可以在存在大量标记数据的情况下解决给定的问题。然而，获取涵盖所有目标类别的数据集通常需要手动标记，这是昂贵且耗时的。零样本学习模型能够利用语义信息对看不见的概念进行分类。本研究通过使用非线性声学语义投影引入图像嵌入作为零样本音频分类的辅助信息。我们从开放图像数据集中提取语义图像表示，并使用不同领域的语义信息评估模型在 AudioSet 音频子集上的性能；图像、音频和文本。我们证明图像嵌入可以用作语义信息来执行零样本音频分类。实验结果表明，图像和文本嵌入无论单独还是一起都表现出相似的性能。我们还根据测试样本计算语义声学嵌入，以提供性能上限。结果表明，分类性能对测试类和训练类之间的语义关系高度敏感，当可见类和不可见类语义相似时，文本和图像嵌入可以达到语义声学嵌入。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用图像嵌入作为语义信息，解决零样本音频分类中数据标注成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习依赖大量标注数据，而手动标注成本高昂。零样本学习可通过语义信息分类未见类别，但如何有效利用跨模态语义信息（如图像）仍需探索。
AI.method: 采用非线性声学-语义投影，从Open Images提取图像嵌入，并在AudioSet音频子集上结合图像、文本及音频嵌入进行零样本分类，通过语义声学嵌入设定性能上限。
AI.result: 图像与文本嵌入单独或联合使用表现相近，分类性能高度依赖测试与训练类的语义关联性，当语义相似时可接近语义声学嵌入的上限。
AI.conclusion: 图像嵌入可有效替代文本嵌入用于零样本音频分类，语义关联性是影响性能的关键因素。

authors_text: Zhemin Zhang,Xun Gong
title: Positional Label for Self-Supervised Vision Transformer
title_zh: 自监督视觉变压器的位置标签
abstract: Positional encoding is important for vision transformer (ViT) to capture the spatial structure of the input image. General effectiveness has been proven in ViT. In our work we propose to train ViT to recognize the positional label of patches of the input image, this apparently simple task actually yields a meaningful self-supervisory task. Based on previous work on ViT positional encoding, we propose two positional labels dedicated to 2D images including absolute position and relative position. Our positional labels can be easily plugged into various current ViT variants. It can work in two ways: (a) As an auxiliary training target for vanilla ViT (e.g., ViT-B and Swin-B) for better performance. (b) Combine the self-supervised ViT (e.g., MAE) to provide a more powerful self-supervised signal for semantic feature learning. Experiments demonstrate that with the proposed self-supervised methods, ViT-B and Swin-B gain improvements of 1.20% (top-1 Acc) and 0.74% (top-1 Acc) on ImageNet, respectively, and 6.15% and 1.14% improvement on Mini-ImageNet.
summary: Positional encoding is important for vision transformer (ViT) to capture the spatial structure of the input image. General effectiveness has been proven in ViT. In our work we propose to train ViT to recognize the positional label of patches of the input image, this apparently simple task actually yields a meaningful self-supervisory task. Based on previous work on ViT positional encoding, we propose two positional labels dedicated to 2D images including absolute position and relative position. Our positional labels can be easily plugged into various current ViT variants. It can work in two ways: (a) As an auxiliary training target for vanilla ViT (e.g., ViT-B and Swin-B) for better performance. (b) Combine the self-supervised ViT (e.g., MAE) to provide a more powerful self-supervised signal for semantic feature learning. Experiments demonstrate that with the proposed self-supervised methods, ViT-B and Swin-B gain improvements of 1.20% (top-1 Acc) and 0.74% (top-1 Acc) on ImageNet, respectively, and 6.15% and 1.14% improvement on Mini-ImageNet.
abstract_zh: 位置编码对于视觉变换器（ViT）捕获输入图像的空间结构非常重要。总体有效性已在 ViT 中得到证实。在我们的工作中，我们建议训练 ViT 识别输入图像补丁的位置标签，这个看似简单的任务实际上产生了有意义的自我监督任务。基于之前 ViT 位置编码的工作，我们提出了两种专用于 2D 图像的位置标签，包括绝对位置和相对位置。我们的位置标签可以轻松插入当前的各种 ViT 变体中。它可以通过两种方式发挥作用：(a) 作为普通 ViT（例如 ViT-B 和 Swin-B）的辅助训练目标，以获得更好的表现。 (b)结合自监督ViT（例如MAE）为语义特征学习提供更强大的自监督信号。实验表明，采用所提出的自监督方法，ViT-B 和 Swin-B 在 ImageNet 上分别获得了 1.20%（top-1 Acc）和 0.74%（top-1 Acc）的改进，在 Mini-ImageNet 上获得了 6.15% 和 1.14% 的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于位置标签的自监督方法，通过训练视觉Transformer（ViT）识别图像块的位置信息，提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有ViT依赖位置编码捕捉空间结构，但如何有效利用位置信息进行自监督学习尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 设计两种2D图像位置标签（绝对/相对位置），作为辅助训练目标或与MAE等自监督方法结合，增强特征学习。
AI.result: ViT-B和Swin-B在ImageNet上分别提升1.20%和0.74% top-1准确率，在Mini-ImageNet上提升6.15%和1.14%。
AI.conclusion: 位置标签作为自监督信号能有效提升ViT性能，且兼容现有模型架构与训练框架。

authors_text: Nick McGreivy,Ammar Hakim
title: Convolutional layers are equivariant to discrete shifts but not continuous translations
title_zh: 卷积层与离散平移等价，但与连续平移不等价
abstract: The purpose of this short and simple note is to clarify a common misconception about convolutional neural networks (CNNs). CNNs are made up of convolutional layers which are shift equivariant due to weight sharing. However, convolutional layers are not translation equivariant, even when boundary effects are ignored and when pooling and subsampling are absent. This is because shift equivariance is a discrete symmetry while translation equivariance is a continuous symmetry. This fact is well known among researchers in equivariant machine learning, but is usually overlooked among non-experts. To minimize confusion, we suggest using the term `shift equivariance' to refer to discrete shifts in pixels and `translation equivariance' to refer to continuous translations.
summary: The purpose of this short and simple note is to clarify a common misconception about convolutional neural networks (CNNs). CNNs are made up of convolutional layers which are shift equivariant due to weight sharing. However, convolutional layers are not translation equivariant, even when boundary effects are ignored and when pooling and subsampling are absent. This is because shift equivariance is a discrete symmetry while translation equivariance is a continuous symmetry. This fact is well known among researchers in equivariant machine learning, but is usually overlooked among non-experts. To minimize confusion, we suggest using the term `shift equivariance' to refer to discrete shifts in pixels and `translation equivariance' to refer to continuous translations.
abstract_zh: 这篇简短说明的目的是澄清有关卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的常见误解。 CNN 由卷积层组成，由于权重共享，这些层是平移等变的。然而，即使忽略边界效应并且不存在池化和子采样，卷积层也不是平移等变的。这是因为平移等方差是离散对称性，而平移等方差是连续对称性。这一事实在等变机器学习的研究人员中众所周知，但在非专家中通常被忽视。为了尽量减少混淆，我们建议使用术语“平移等方差”来指代像素的离散平移，使用“平移等方差”来指代连续平移。

AI.tldr: 澄清卷积神经网络中卷积层对离散平移和连续平移的等变性差异的常见误解
AI.motivation: 纠正非专家对卷积层等变性的误解，明确区分离散和连续平移的等变性差异
AI.method: 通过理论分析和定义解释，区分离散和连续平移的等变性差异，纠正常见误解
AI.result: 证明卷积层对离散平移等变，但对连续平移不等变，并建议使用不同的术语以减少混淆
AI.conclusion: 建议使用术语区分离散和连续平移的等变性，以减少非专家的误解

authors_text: Alessandro Daniele,Emile van Krieken,Luciano Serafini,Frank van Harmelen
title: Refining neural network predictions using background knowledge
title_zh: 使用背景知识完善神经网络预测
comment: 26 + 15 pages, 9 + 4 figures
comments: 26 + 15 pages, 9 + 4 figures
abstract: Recent work has shown logical background knowledge can be used in learning systems to compensate for a lack of labeled training data. Many methods work by creating a loss function that encodes this knowledge. However, often the logic is discarded after training, even if it is still useful at test time. Instead, we ensure neural network predictions satisfy the knowledge by refining the predictions with an extra computation step. We introduce differentiable refinement functions that find a corrected prediction close to the original prediction. We study how to effectively and efficiently compute these refinement functions. Using a new algorithm called Iterative Local Refinement (ILR), we combine refinement functions to find refined predictions for logical formulas of any complexity. ILR finds refinements on complex SAT formulas in significantly fewer iterations and frequently finds solutions where gradient descent can not. Finally, ILR produces competitive results in the MNIST addition task.
summary: Recent work has shown logical background knowledge can be used in learning systems to compensate for a lack of labeled training data. Many methods work by creating a loss function that encodes this knowledge. However, often the logic is discarded after training, even if it is still useful at test time. Instead, we ensure neural network predictions satisfy the knowledge by refining the predictions with an extra computation step. We introduce differentiable refinement functions that find a corrected prediction close to the original prediction. We study how to effectively and efficiently compute these refinement functions. Using a new algorithm called Iterative Local Refinement (ILR), we combine refinement functions to find refined predictions for logical formulas of any complexity. ILR finds refinements on complex SAT formulas in significantly fewer iterations and frequently finds solutions where gradient descent can not. Finally, ILR produces competitive results in the MNIST addition task.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作表明，逻辑背景知识可以用于学习系统，以弥补标记训练数据的缺乏。许多方法都是通过创建一个损失函数来编码这些知识。然而，即使逻辑在测试时仍然有用，但通常在训练后会被丢弃。相反，我们通过额外的计算步骤细化预测来确保神经网络预测满足知识。我们引入了可微细化函数，可以找到接近原始预测的校正预测。我们研究如何有效且高效地计算这些细化函数。使用称为迭代局部细化（ILR）的新算法，我们结合细化函数来找到任何复杂性逻辑公式的细化预测。 ILR 以显着更少的迭代次数找到对复杂 SAT 公式的改进，并且经常找到梯度下降无法找到的解决方案。最后，ILR 在 MNIST 加法任务中产生了有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用背景知识优化神经网络预测的方法，通过引入可微分修正函数和迭代局部优化算法（ILR）提升预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在训练后通常丢弃逻辑背景知识，而这些知识在测试阶段仍可帮助修正预测结果，需探索更有效的利用方式。
AI.method: 设计可微分修正函数对原始预测进行优化，并提出ILR算法迭代结合多个修正函数，以处理任意复杂度的逻辑公式。
AI.result: ILR在复杂SAT公式求解中迭代次数显著少于梯度下降法，且在MNIST加法任务中取得具有竞争力的结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过保留并应用背景知识，ILR算法能有效提升神经网络预测的逻辑一致性与准确性，尤其适用于复杂逻辑任务。

authors_text: Hanting Li,Mingzhe Sui,Zhaoqing Zhu,Feng zhao
title: NR-DFERNet: Noise-Robust Network for Dynamic Facial Expression Recognition
title_zh: NR-DFERNet：用于动态面部表情识别的噪声鲁棒网络
comment: 10 pages
comments: 10 pages
abstract: Dynamic facial expression recognition (DFER) in the wild is an extremely challenging task, due to a large number of noisy frames in the video sequences. Previous works focus on extracting more discriminative features, but ignore distinguishing the key frames from the noisy frames. To tackle this problem, we propose a noise-robust dynamic facial expression recognition network (NR-DFERNet), which can effectively reduce the interference of noisy frames on the DFER task. Specifically, at the spatial stage, we devise a dynamic-static fusion module (DSF) that introduces dynamic features to static features for learning more discriminative spatial features. To suppress the impact of target irrelevant frames, we introduce a novel dynamic class token (DCT) for the transformer at the temporal stage. Moreover, we design a snippet-based filter (SF) at the decision stage to reduce the effect of too many neutral frames on non-neutral sequence classification. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our NR-DFERNet outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on both the DFEW and AFEW benchmarks.
summary: Dynamic facial expression recognition (DFER) in the wild is an extremely challenging task, due to a large number of noisy frames in the video sequences. Previous works focus on extracting more discriminative features, but ignore distinguishing the key frames from the noisy frames. To tackle this problem, we propose a noise-robust dynamic facial expression recognition network (NR-DFERNet), which can effectively reduce the interference of noisy frames on the DFER task. Specifically, at the spatial stage, we devise a dynamic-static fusion module (DSF) that introduces dynamic features to static features for learning more discriminative spatial features. To suppress the impact of target irrelevant frames, we introduce a novel dynamic class token (DCT) for the transformer at the temporal stage. Moreover, we design a snippet-based filter (SF) at the decision stage to reduce the effect of too many neutral frames on non-neutral sequence classification. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our NR-DFERNet outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on both the DFEW and AFEW benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 由于视频序列中存在大量噪声帧，野外动态面部表情识别（DFER）是一项极具挑战性的任务。以前的工作侧重于提取更具辨别力的特征，但忽略了区分关键帧和噪声帧。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种抗噪声动态面部表情识别网络（NR-DFERNet），它可以有效减少噪声帧对DFER任务的干扰。具体来说，在空间阶段，我们设计了一个动态-静态融合模块（DSF），将动态特征引入静态特征，以学习更具辨别力的空间特征。为了抑制目标不相关帧的影响，我们在时间阶段为变压器引入了一种新颖的动态类标记（DCT）。此外，我们在决策阶段设计了基于片段的过滤器（SF），以减少过多的中性帧对非中性序列分类的影响。大量实验结果表明，我们的 NR-DFERNet 在 DFEW 和 AFEW 基准测试中均优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种抗噪动态面部表情识别网络NR-DFERNet，通过有效减少噪声帧干扰提升动态表情识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有动态表情识别方法未充分区分关键帧与噪声帧，导致噪声帧对识别任务产生干扰，影响准确率。
AI.method: 设计动态-静态融合模块(DSF)提取空间特征，引入动态类标记(DCT)增强时序建模，并采用片段级过滤器(SF)抑制中性帧干扰。
AI.result: 在DFEW和AFEW基准测试中，NR-DFERNet优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过多阶段噪声抑制机制，该网络显著提升了动态表情识别在复杂场景下的鲁棒性。

Previous works focus on extracting more discriminative features, but ignore distinguishing the key frames from the noisy frames. Specifically, at the spatial stage, we devise a dynamic-static fusion module (DSF) that introduces dynamic features to static features for learning more discriminative spatial features. To suppress the impact of target irrelevant frames, we introduce a novel dynamic class token (DCT) for the transformer at the temporal stage. Moreover, we design a snippet-based filter (SF) at the decision stage to reduce the effect of too many neutral frames on non-neutral sequence classification. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our NR-DFERNet outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on both the DFEW and AFEW benchmarks. 由于视频序列中存在大量噪声帧，野外动态面部表情识别（DFER）是一项极具挑战性的任务。以前的工作侧重于提取更具辨别力的特征，但忽略了区分关键帧和噪声帧。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种抗噪声动态面部表情识别网络（NR-DFERNet），它可以有效减少噪声帧对DFER任务的干扰。具体来说，在空间阶段，我们设计了一个动态-静态融合模块（DSF），将动态特征引入静态特征，以学习更具辨别力的空间特征。为了抑制目标不相关帧的影响，我们在时间阶段为变压器引入了一种新颖的动态类标记（DCT）。此外，我们在决策阶段设计了基于片段的过滤器（SF），以减少过多的中性帧对非中性序列分类的影响。大量实验结果表明，我们的 NR-DFERNet 在 DFEW 和 AFEW 基准测试中均优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种抗噪动态面部表情识别网络NR-DFERNet，通过有效减少噪声帧干扰提升动态表情识别性能。 Hanting Li,Mingzhe Sui,Zhaoqing Zhu,Feng zhao cs.CV

authors_text: Yi Li,ShuangLin Li,Yang Sun,Syed Mohsen Naqvi
title: Feature Learning and Ensemble Pre-Tasks Based Self-Supervised Speech Denoising and Dereverberation
title_zh: 基于特征学习和集成预任务的自监督语音去噪和去混响
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.11142
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.11142
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) achieves great success in monaural speech enhancement, while the accuracy of the target speech estimation, particularly for unseen speakers, remains inadequate with existing pre-tasks. As speech signal contains multi-faceted information including speaker identity, paralinguistics, and spoken content, the latent representation for speech enhancement becomes a tough task. In this paper, we study the effectiveness of each feature which is commonly used in speech enhancement and exploit the feature combination in the SSL case. Besides, we propose an ensemble training strategy. The latent representation of the clean speech signal is learned, meanwhile, the dereverberated mask and the estimated ratio mask are exploited to denoise and dereverberate the mixture. The latent representation learning and the masks estimation are considered as two pre-tasks in the training stage. In addition, to study the effectiveness between the pre-tasks, we compare different training routines to train the model and further refine the performance. The NOISEX and DAPS corpora are used to evaluate the efficacy of the proposed method, which also outperforms the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) achieves great success in monaural speech enhancement, while the accuracy of the target speech estimation, particularly for unseen speakers, remains inadequate with existing pre-tasks. As speech signal contains multi-faceted information including speaker identity, paralinguistics, and spoken content, the latent representation for speech enhancement becomes a tough task. In this paper, we study the effectiveness of each feature which is commonly used in speech enhancement and exploit the feature combination in the SSL case. Besides, we propose an ensemble training strategy. The latent representation of the clean speech signal is learned, meanwhile, the dereverberated mask and the estimated ratio mask are exploited to denoise and dereverberate the mixture. The latent representation learning and the masks estimation are considered as two pre-tasks in the training stage. In addition, to study the effectiveness between the pre-tasks, we compare different training routines to train the model and further refine the performance. The NOISEX and DAPS corpora are used to evaluate the efficacy of the proposed method, which also outperforms the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习（SSL）在单耳语音增强方面取得了巨大成功，但目标语音估计的准确性（特别是对于看不见的说话者）仍然不足以满足现有的前置任务的要求。由于语音信号包含说话者身份、副语言学和口语内容等多方面信息，因此语音增强的潜在表示成为一项艰巨的任务。在本文中，我们研究了语音增强中常用的每个特征的有效性，并在 SSL 案例中利用了特征组合。此外，我们提出了集成训练策略。学习干净语音信号的潜在表示，同时利用去混响掩模和估计比率掩模对混合物进行去混响和去混响。潜在表示学习和掩模估计被视为训练阶段的两个前置任务。此外，为了研究前置任务之间的有效性，我们比较了不同的训练例程来训练模型并进一步完善性能。 NOISEX 和 DAPS 语料库用于评估所提出方法的有效性，该方法也优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于特征学习和集成预任务的自监督语音降噪和去混响方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的自监督学习方法在单声道语音增强任务中表现优异，但在未见过的说话人上目标语音估计的准确性仍不足。语音信号包含多方面的信息，如说话人身份、副语言学信息和语音内容，因此语音增强的潜在表示变得复杂。
AI.method: 本文研究了语音增强中常用的每种特征的有效性，并探索了特征组合在自监督学习中的应用。此外，提出了一种集成训练策略，通过学习干净语音信号的潜在表示，并利用去混响掩码和估计的比率掩码对混合信号进行降噪和去混响。潜在表示学习和掩码估计被视为训练阶段的两个预任务。
AI.result: 使用NOISEX和DAPS语料库评估了所提出方法的有效性，并且该方法优于最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过特征组合和集成预任务的策略，本文提出的方法在语音降噪和去混响任务中取得了更好的性能。

authors_text: Guangyi Zhao,Simin Kou,Xuesong Yin
title: Self-Supervised Deep Subspace Clustering with Entropy-norm
title_zh: 具有熵范数的自监督深层子空间聚类
abstract: Auto-Encoder based deep subspace clustering (DSC) is widely used in computer vision, motion segmentation and image processing. However, it suffers from the following three issues in the self-expressive matrix learning process: the first one is less useful information for learning self-expressive weights due to the simple reconstruction loss; the second one is that the construction of the self-expression layer associated with the sample size requires high-computational cost; and the last one is the limited connectivity of the existing regularization terms. In order to address these issues, in this paper we propose a novel model named Self-Supervised deep Subspace Clustering with Entropy-norm (S$^{3}$CE). Specifically, S$^{3}$CE exploits a self-supervised contrastive network to gain a more effetive feature vector. The local structure and dense connectivity of the original data benefit from the self-expressive layer and additional entropy-norm constraint. Moreover, a new module with data enhancement is designed to help S$^{3}$CE focus on the key information of data, and improve the clustering performance of positive and negative instances through spectral clustering. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the superior performance of S$^{3}$CE in comparison to the state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Auto-Encoder based deep subspace clustering (DSC) is widely used in computer vision, motion segmentation and image processing. However, it suffers from the following three issues in the self-expressive matrix learning process: the first one is less useful information for learning self-expressive weights due to the simple reconstruction loss; the second one is that the construction of the self-expression layer associated with the sample size requires high-computational cost; and the last one is the limited connectivity of the existing regularization terms. In order to address these issues, in this paper we propose a novel model named Self-Supervised deep Subspace Clustering with Entropy-norm (S$^{3}$CE). Specifically, S$^{3}$CE exploits a self-supervised contrastive network to gain a more effetive feature vector. The local structure and dense connectivity of the original data benefit from the self-expressive layer and additional entropy-norm constraint. Moreover, a new module with data enhancement is designed to help S$^{3}$CE focus on the key information of data, and improve the clustering performance of positive and negative instances through spectral clustering. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the superior performance of S$^{3}$CE in comparison to the state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 基于自动编码器的深度子空间聚类（DSC）广泛应用于计算机视觉、运动分割和图像处理。然而，它在自表达矩阵学习过程中存在以下三个问题：第一，由于简单的重构损失，对于学习自表达权重来说有用的信息较少；二是与样本量相关的自我表达层的构建需要较高的计算成本；最后一个是现有正则化项的连通性有限。为了解决这些问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种名为自监督深度子空间聚类与熵范数（S$^{3}$CE）的新模型。具体来说，S$^{3}$CE 利用自监督对比网络来获得更有效的特征向量。原始数据的局部结构和密集连接受益于自我表达层和额外的熵范数约束。此外，设计了一个具有数据增强功能的新模块，帮助S$^{3}$CE关注数据的关键信息，并通过谱聚类提高正例和负例的聚类性能。大量的实验结果证明了 S$^{3}$CE 与最先进的方法相比具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为S³CE的自监督深度子空间聚类方法，通过改进自表达矩阵学习过程解决现有方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有基于自编码器的深度子空间聚类方法存在信息利用不足、计算成本高和正则化连接有限等问题。
AI.method: 设计自监督对比网络获取有效特征向量，引入熵范数约束增强局部结构连接性，并通过数据增强模块提升聚类性能。
AI.result: 实验表明S³CE在多个数据集上的聚类性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: S³CE通过自监督学习和熵范数约束有效解决了深度子空间聚类中的关键问题，提升了聚类效果。

authors_text: Sebastian Basterrech,Gerardo Rubino
title: Evolutionary Echo State Network: evolving reservoirs in the Fourier space
title_zh: 进化回波状态网络：傅立叶空间中的进化储库
comment: This manuscript was accepted at the 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2022)
comments: This manuscript was accepted at the 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2022)
abstract: The Echo State Network (ESN) is a class of Recurrent Neural Network with a large number of hidden-hidden weights (in the so-called reservoir). Canonical ESN and its variations have recently received significant attention due to their remarkable success in the modeling of non-linear dynamical systems. The reservoir is randomly connected with fixed weights that don't change in the learning process. Only the weights from reservoir to output are trained. Since the reservoir is fixed during the training procedure, we may wonder if the computational power of the recurrent structure is fully harnessed. In this article, we propose a new computational model of the ESN type, that represents the reservoir weights in the Fourier space and performs a fine-tuning of these weights applying genetic algorithms in the frequency domain. The main interest is that this procedure will work in a much smaller space compared to the classical ESN, thus providing a dimensionality reduction transformation of the initial method. The proposed technique allows us to exploit the benefits of the large recurrent structure avoiding the training problems of gradient-based method. We provide a detailed experimental study that demonstrates the good performances of our approach with well-known chaotic systems and real-world data.
summary: The Echo State Network (ESN) is a class of Recurrent Neural Network with a large number of hidden-hidden weights (in the so-called reservoir). Canonical ESN and its variations have recently received significant attention due to their remarkable success in the modeling of non-linear dynamical systems. The reservoir is randomly connected with fixed weights that don't change in the learning process. Only the weights from reservoir to output are trained. Since the reservoir is fixed during the training procedure, we may wonder if the computational power of the recurrent structure is fully harnessed. In this article, we propose a new computational model of the ESN type, that represents the reservoir weights in the Fourier space and performs a fine-tuning of these weights applying genetic algorithms in the frequency domain. The main interest is that this procedure will work in a much smaller space compared to the classical ESN, thus providing a dimensionality reduction transformation of the initial method. The proposed technique allows us to exploit the benefits of the large recurrent structure avoiding the training problems of gradient-based method. We provide a detailed experimental study that demonstrates the good performances of our approach with well-known chaotic systems and real-world data.
abstract_zh: 回声状态网络（ESN）是一类具有大量隐藏-隐藏权重（在所谓的蓄水池中）的循环神经网络。 Canonical ESN 及其变体由于在非线性动力系统建模方面取得了显着的成功，最近受到了极大的关注。水库与固定权重随机连接，这些权重在学习过程中不会改变。仅训练从存储库到输出的权重。由于储存库在训练过程中是固定的，我们可能想知道循环结构的计算能力是否得到了充分利用。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 ESN 类型计算模型，该模型表示傅立叶空间中的储层权重，并在频域中应用遗传算法对这些权重进行微调。主要的兴趣在于，与经典 ESN 相比，该过程将在更小的空间中工作，从而提供初始方法的降维变换。所提出的技术使我们能够利用大型循环结构的优势，避免基于梯度的方法的训练问题。我们提供了详细的实验研究，证明了我们的方法在众所周知的混沌系统和现实世界数据上的良好性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在傅里叶空间中通过遗传算法优化水库权重的进化型回声状态网络（ESN），以提升其计算效率并解决传统ESN的训练问题。
AI.motivation: 传统ESN的水库权重固定，可能无法充分发挥递归结构的计算潜力，且梯度下降法存在训练难题。本文旨在通过傅里叶空间的维度约简和遗传算法优化，改进ESN性能。
AI.method: 将水库权重表示为傅里叶空间中的参数，利用遗传算法在频域内进行细粒度调优，从而降低计算复杂度并避免梯度下降法的缺陷。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在混沌系统和实际数据集上均表现出优异的性能，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过傅里叶空间的维度约简和遗传算法优化，本文提出的模型成功克服了传统ESN的局限性，为非线性动力系统建模提供了新思路。
