search_text: Evolutionary Echo State Network: evolving reservoirs in the Fourier space 进化回波状态网络：傅立叶空间中的进化储库 The Echo State Network (ESN) is a class of Recurrent Neural Network with a large number of hidden-hidden weights (in the so-called reservoir). Canonical ESN and its variations have recently received significant attention due to their remarkable success in the modeling of non-linear dynamical systems. The reservoir is randomly connected with fixed weights that don't change in the learning process. Only the weights from reservoir to output are trained. Since the reservoir is fixed during the training procedure, we may wonder if the computational power of the recurrent structure is fully harnessed. In this article, we propose a new computational model of the ESN type, that represents the reservoir weights in the Fourier space and performs a fine-tuning of these weights applying genetic algorithms in the frequency domain. The main interest is that this procedure will work in a much smaller space compared to the classical ESN, thus providing a dimensionality reduction transformation of the initial method. The proposed technique allows us to exploit the benefits of the large recurrent structure avoiding the training problems of gradient-based method. We provide a detailed experimental study that demonstrates the good performances of our approach with well-known chaotic systems and real-world data. 回声状态网络（ESN）是一类具有大量隐藏-隐藏权重（在所谓的蓄水池中）的循环神经网络。 Canonical ESN 及其变体由于在非线性动力系统建模方面取得了显着的成功，最近受到了极大的关注。水库与固定权重随机连接，这些权重在学习过程中不会改变。仅训练从存储库到输出的权重。由于储存库在训练过程中是固定的，我们可能想知道循环结构的计算能力是否得到了充分利用。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 ESN 类型计算模型，该模型表示傅立叶空间中的储层权重，并在频域中应用遗传算法对这些权重进行微调。主要的兴趣在于，与经典 ESN 相比，该过程将在更小的空间中工作，从而提供初始方法的降维变换。所提出的技术使我们能够利用大型循环结构的优势，避免基于梯度的方法的训练问题。我们提供了详细的实验研究，证明了我们的方法在众所周知的混沌系统和现实世界数据上的良好性能。 本文提出了一种在傅里叶空间中通过遗传算法优化水库权重的进化型回声状态网络（ESN），以提升其计算效率并解决传统ESN的训练问题。 Sebastian Basterrech,Gerardo Rubino cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Rui Chen,Yongqiang Tang,Wensheng Zhang,Wenlong Feng
title: Deep Multi-View Semi-Supervised Clustering with Sample Pairwise Constraints
title_zh: 具有样本成对约束的深度多视图半监督聚类
abstract: Multi-view clustering has attracted much attention thanks to the capacity of multi-source information integration. Although numerous advanced methods have been proposed in past decades, most of them generally overlook the significance of weakly-supervised information and fail to preserve the feature properties of multiple views, thus resulting in unsatisfactory clustering performance. To address these issues, in this paper, we propose a novel Deep Multi-view Semi-supervised Clustering (DMSC) method, which jointly optimizes three kinds of losses during networks finetuning, including multi-view clustering loss, semi-supervised pairwise constraint loss and multiple autoencoders reconstruction loss. Specifically, a KL divergence based multi-view clustering loss is imposed on the common representation of multi-view data to perform heterogeneous feature optimization, multi-view weighting and clustering prediction simultaneously. Then, we innovatively propose to integrate pairwise constraints into the process of multi-view clustering by enforcing the learned multi-view representation of must-link samples (cannot-link samples) to be similar (dissimilar), such that the formed clustering architecture can be more credible. Moreover, unlike existing rivals that only preserve the encoders for each heterogeneous branch during networks finetuning, we further propose to tune the intact autoencoders frame that contains both encoders and decoders. In this way, the issue of serious corruption of view-specific and view-shared feature space could be alleviated, making the whole training procedure more stable. Through comprehensive experiments on eight popular image datasets, we demonstrate that our proposed approach performs better than the state-of-the-art multi-view and single-view competitors.
summary: Multi-view clustering has attracted much attention thanks to the capacity of multi-source information integration. Although numerous advanced methods have been proposed in past decades, most of them generally overlook the significance of weakly-supervised information and fail to preserve the feature properties of multiple views, thus resulting in unsatisfactory clustering performance. To address these issues, in this paper, we propose a novel Deep Multi-view Semi-supervised Clustering (DMSC) method, which jointly optimizes three kinds of losses during networks finetuning, including multi-view clustering loss, semi-supervised pairwise constraint loss and multiple autoencoders reconstruction loss. Specifically, a KL divergence based multi-view clustering loss is imposed on the common representation of multi-view data to perform heterogeneous feature optimization, multi-view weighting and clustering prediction simultaneously. Then, we innovatively propose to integrate pairwise constraints into the process of multi-view clustering by enforcing the learned multi-view representation of must-link samples (cannot-link samples) to be similar (dissimilar), such that the formed clustering architecture can be more credible. Moreover, unlike existing rivals that only preserve the encoders for each heterogeneous branch during networks finetuning, we further propose to tune the intact autoencoders frame that contains both encoders and decoders. In this way, the issue of serious corruption of view-specific and view-shared feature space could be alleviated, making the whole training procedure more stable. Through comprehensive experiments on eight popular image datasets, we demonstrate that our proposed approach performs better than the state-of-the-art multi-view and single-view competitors.
abstract_zh: 多视图聚类由于具有多源信息集成的能力而备受关注。尽管过去几十年来提出了许多先进的方法，但大多数方法普遍忽视了弱监督信息的重要性，并且未能保留多视图的特征属性，从而导致聚类性能不理想。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种新的深度多视图半监督聚类（DMSC）方法，该方法在网络微调过程中联合优化三种损失，包括多视图聚类损失、半监督成对约束损失和多自编码器重建损失。具体来说，将基于KL散度的多视图聚类损失施加到多视图数据的公共表示上，以同时执行异构特征优化、多视图加权和聚类预测。然后，我们创新性地提出，通过强制必须链接样本（不能链接样本）的学习多视图表示相似（不相似），将成对约束集成到多视图聚类过程中，使得形成的聚类架构更加可信。此外，与现有竞争对手在网络微调期间仅保留每个异构分支的编码器不同，我们进一步建议调整包含编码器和解码器的完整自动编码器框架。这样，可以缓解特定视图和视图共享特征空间严重损坏的问题，使整个训练过程更加稳定。通过对八个流行图像数据集的综合实验，我们证明了我们提出的方法比最先进的多视图和单视图竞争对手的性能更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度多视角半监督聚类方法（DMSC），通过整合多视角聚类损失、半监督样本对约束损失和自编码器重构损失，提升多源数据的聚类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效利用弱监督信息且难以保持多视角特征属性，导致聚类效果不佳。
AI.method: 联合优化三类损失：基于KL散度的多视角聚类损失、样本对约束损失及完整自编码器重构损失，同时调整编码器与解码器以稳定训练过程。
AI.result: 在八个图像数据集上实验表明，DMSC优于现有单视角和多视角聚类方法。
AI.conclusion: DMSC通过整合半监督约束与多视角特征优化，有效提升了聚类的准确性与稳定性。

authors_text: Ines Akaichi
title: Semantic Technology based Usage Control for Decentralized Systems
title_zh: 基于语义技术的去中心化系统使用控制
abstract: The sharing of data and digital assets in a decentralized settling is associated with various legislative challenges, including, but not limited to, the need to adhere to legal requirements with respect to privacy (e.g. data protection legislation) and copyright (e.g. copyright legislation). In order to enable software platform providers to manage data and digital assets appropriately and to provide more control to data and digital asset owners, usage control technologies could be used to make sure that consumers handle data according to privacy preferences, licenses, regulatory requirements, among others. In this research proposal, we explore the application of usage control in decentralized environments. In particular, we address the challenges related to the specification of usage control policies, the enforcement of the respective policies, and the usability of the tools that are used to administer them.
summary: The sharing of data and digital assets in a decentralized settling is associated with various legislative challenges, including, but not limited to, the need to adhere to legal requirements with respect to privacy (e.g. data protection legislation) and copyright (e.g. copyright legislation). In order to enable software platform providers to manage data and digital assets appropriately and to provide more control to data and digital asset owners, usage control technologies could be used to make sure that consumers handle data according to privacy preferences, licenses, regulatory requirements, among others. In this research proposal, we explore the application of usage control in decentralized environments. In particular, we address the challenges related to the specification of usage control policies, the enforcement of the respective policies, and the usability of the tools that are used to administer them.
abstract_zh: 在去中心化结算中共享数据和数字资产与各种立法挑战相关，包括但不限于需要遵守隐私（例如数据保护立法）和版权（例如版权立法）方面的法律要求。为了使软件平台提供商能够适当地管理数据和数字资产，并向数据和数字资产所有者提供更多控制，可以使用使用控制技术来确保消费者根据隐私偏好、许可证、监管要求等处理数据。在本研究提案中，我们探索了使用控制在去中心化环境中的应用。特别是，我们解决了与使用控制策略的规范、相应策略的执行以及用于管理这些策略的工具的可用性相关的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在去中心化系统中应用语义技术实现数据和数字资产的使用控制，以解决隐私、版权等法律合规问题。
AI.motivation: 去中心化环境中数据共享面临隐私保护和版权法规等法律挑战，需通过使用控制技术增强数据所有者的管理能力与合规性。
AI.method: 基于语义技术设计使用控制框架，重点解决策略制定、策略执行及管理工具可用性等核心问题。
AI.result: 提出适用于去中心化环境的使用控制方案，实现对数据访问行为的合规性约束与动态管理。
AI.conclusion: 语义技术驱动的使用控制可有效提升去中心化系统的数据管理能力，平衡法律合规性与用户自主权。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究如何在去中心化系统中应用语义技术实现数据和数字资产的使用控制，以解决隐私、版权等法律合规问题。

search_text: Semantic Technology based Usage Control for Decentralized Systems 基于语义技术的去中心化系统使用控制 The sharing of data and digital assets in a decentralized settling is associated with various legislative challenges, including, but not limited to, the need to adhere to legal requirements with respect to privacy (e.g. data protection legislation) and copyright (e.g. copyright legislation). In order to enable software platform providers to manage data and digital assets appropriately and to provide more control to data and digital asset owners, usage control technologies could be used to make sure that consumers handle data according to privacy preferences, licenses, regulatory requirements, among others. In this research proposal, we explore the application of usage control in decentralized environments. In particular, we address the challenges related to the specification of usage control policies, the enforcement of the respective policies, and the usability of the tools that are used to administer them. 在去中心化结算中共享数据和数字资产与各种立法挑战相关，包括但不限于需要遵守隐私（例如数据保护立法）和版权（例如版权立法）方面的法律要求。为了使软件平台提供商能够适当地管理数据和数字资产，并向数据和数字资产所有者提供更多控制，可以使用使用控制技术来确保消费者根据隐私偏好、许可证、监管要求等处理数据。在本研究提案中，我们探索了使用控制在去中心化环境中的应用。特别是，我们解决了与使用控制策略的规范、相应策略的执行以及用于管理这些策略的工具的可用性相关的挑战。 本文研究如何在去中心化系统中应用语义技术实现数据和数字资产的使用控制，以解决隐私、版权等法律合规问题。 Ines Akaichi cs.CR,cs.HC,cs.LO,eess.SY

authors_text: Ka-Hei Hui,Ruihui Li,Jingyu Hu,Chi-Wing Fu
title: Neural Template: Topology-aware Reconstruction and Disentangled Generation of 3D Meshes
title_zh: 神经模板：拓扑感知重建和 3D 网格的解缠结生成
abstract: This paper introduces a novel framework called DTNet for 3D mesh reconstruction and generation via Disentangled Topology. Beyond previous works, we learn a topology-aware neural template specific to each input then deform the template to reconstruct a detailed mesh while preserving the learned topology. One key insight is to decouple the complex mesh reconstruction into two sub-tasks: topology formulation and shape deformation. Thanks to the decoupling, DT-Net implicitly learns a disentangled representation for the topology and shape in the latent space. Hence, it can enable novel disentangled controls for supporting various shape generation applications, e.g., remix the topologies of 3D objects, that are not achievable by previous reconstruction works. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our method is able to produce high-quality meshes, particularly with diverse topologies, as compared with the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: This paper introduces a novel framework called DTNet for 3D mesh reconstruction and generation via Disentangled Topology. Beyond previous works, we learn a topology-aware neural template specific to each input then deform the template to reconstruct a detailed mesh while preserving the learned topology. One key insight is to decouple the complex mesh reconstruction into two sub-tasks: topology formulation and shape deformation. Thanks to the decoupling, DT-Net implicitly learns a disentangled representation for the topology and shape in the latent space. Hence, it can enable novel disentangled controls for supporting various shape generation applications, e.g., remix the topologies of 3D objects, that are not achievable by previous reconstruction works. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our method is able to produce high-quality meshes, particularly with diverse topologies, as compared with the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为 DTNet 的新颖框架，用于通过解缠结拓扑进行 3D 网格重建和生成。除了之前的工作之外，我们学习了特定于每个输入的拓扑感知神经模板，然后使模板变形以重建详细的网格，同时保留学习的拓扑。一个关键的见解是将复杂的网格重建分解为两个子任务：拓扑制定和形状变形。由于解耦，DT-Net 隐式地​​学习了潜在空间中拓扑和形状的解缠结表示。因此，它可以实现新颖的解开控制来支持各种形状生成应用，例如重新混合 3D 对象的拓扑，这是以前的重建工作无法实现的。大量的实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法能够生成高质量的网格，特别是具有不同拓扑的网格。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DTNet的新型框架，通过解耦拓扑结构和形状变形来实现高质量3D网格的重建与生成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时处理复杂拓扑结构和形状细节，且无法独立控制拓扑与形状属性。
AI.method: DTNet通过将网格重建分解为拓扑建模和形状变形两个子任务，学习拓扑感知的神经模板并在潜空间中实现解耦表示。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能生成比现有技术更高质量且拓扑多样的3D网格，支持拓扑重混等新应用。
AI.conclusion: DTNet通过解耦拓扑与形状表示，显著提升了3D网格重建与生成的灵活性和质量。

authors_text: Mohit Vaishnav,Thomas Serre
title: GAMR: A Guided Attention Model for (visual) Reasoning
title_zh: GAMR：（视觉）推理的引导注意力模型
comment: ef:Eleventh International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2023
comments: ef:Eleventh International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2023
abstract: Humans continue to outperform modern AI systems in their ability to flexibly parse and understand complex visual scenes. Here, we present a novel module for visual reasoning, the Guided Attention Model for (visual) Reasoning (GAMR), which instantiates an active vision theory -- positing that the brain solves complex visual reasoning problems dynamically -- via sequences of attention shifts to select and route task-relevant visual information into memory. Experiments on an array of visual reasoning tasks and datasets demonstrate GAMR's ability to learn visual routines in a robust and sample-efficient manner. In addition, GAMR is shown to be capable of zero-shot generalization on completely novel reasoning tasks. Overall, our work provides computational support for cognitive theories that postulate the need for a critical interplay between attention and memory to dynamically maintain and manipulate task-relevant visual information to solve complex visual reasoning tasks.
summary: Humans continue to outperform modern AI systems in their ability to flexibly parse and understand complex visual scenes. Here, we present a novel module for visual reasoning, the Guided Attention Model for (visual) Reasoning (GAMR), which instantiates an active vision theory -- positing that the brain solves complex visual reasoning problems dynamically -- via sequences of attention shifts to select and route task-relevant visual information into memory. Experiments on an array of visual reasoning tasks and datasets demonstrate GAMR's ability to learn visual routines in a robust and sample-efficient manner. In addition, GAMR is shown to be capable of zero-shot generalization on completely novel reasoning tasks. Overall, our work provides computational support for cognitive theories that postulate the need for a critical interplay between attention and memory to dynamically maintain and manipulate task-relevant visual information to solve complex visual reasoning tasks.
abstract_zh: 人类在灵活解析和理解复杂视觉场景的能力方面继续优于现代人工智能系统。在这里，我们提出了一个新的视觉推理模块，即（视觉）推理引导注意力模型（GAMR），它实例化了主动视觉理论——假设大脑动态地解决复杂的视觉推理问题——通过注意力转移序列来选择和路由与任务相关的视觉信息到记忆中。对一系列视觉推理任务和数据集的实验证明了 GAMR 以稳健且样本高效的方式学习视觉例程的能力。此外，GAMR 被证明能够在全新的推理任务上进行零样本泛化。总体而言，我们的工作为认知理论提供了计算支持，该理论假设注意力和记忆之间需要关键的相互作用，以动态维护和操纵与任务相关的视觉信息，以解决复杂的视觉推理任务。

AI.tldr: 提出GAMR模型以解决复杂视觉推理问题，通过动态注意力机制与记忆交互来模拟人类视觉处理过程。
AI.motivation: 现有AI在复杂视觉任务中表现不足，需模拟人类动态注意力与记忆交互机制以提升视觉推理能力。
AI.method: 设计GAMR模块，通过序列注意力转移机制动态选择任务相关视觉信息并整合至记忆系统。
AI.result: 实验表明GAMR在多种视觉推理任务中表现出鲁棒性、样本效率及零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 验证了注意力与记忆动态交互对解决复杂视觉推理任务的关键作用，为认知理论提供计算支持。

authors_text: Fanqing Lin,Tony Martinez
title: Ego2HandsPose: A Dataset for Egocentric Two-hand 3D Global Pose Estimation
title_zh: Ego2HandsPose：以自我为中心的双手 3D 全局姿势估计数据集
abstract: Color-based two-hand 3D pose estimation in the global coordinate system is essential in many applications. However, there are very few datasets dedicated to this task and no existing dataset supports estimation in a non-laboratory environment. This is largely attributed to the sophisticated data collection process required for 3D hand pose annotations, which also leads to difficulty in obtaining instances with the level of visual diversity needed for estimation in the wild. Progressing towards this goal, a large-scale dataset Ego2Hands was recently proposed to address the task of two-hand segmentation and detection in the wild. The proposed composition-based data generation technique can create two-hand instances with quality, quantity and diversity that generalize well to unseen domains. In this work, we present Ego2HandsPose, an extension of Ego2Hands that contains 3D hand pose annotation and is the first dataset that enables color-based two-hand 3D tracking in unseen domains. To this end, we develop a set of parametric fitting algorithms to enable 1) 3D hand pose annotation using a single image, 2) automatic conversion from 2D to 3D hand poses and 3) accurate two-hand tracking with temporal consistency. We provide incremental quantitative analysis on the multi-stage pipeline and show that training on our dataset achieves state-of-the-art results that significantly outperforms other datasets for the task of egocentric two-hand global 3D pose estimation.
summary: Color-based two-hand 3D pose estimation in the global coordinate system is essential in many applications. However, there are very few datasets dedicated to this task and no existing dataset supports estimation in a non-laboratory environment. This is largely attributed to the sophisticated data collection process required for 3D hand pose annotations, which also leads to difficulty in obtaining instances with the level of visual diversity needed for estimation in the wild. Progressing towards this goal, a large-scale dataset Ego2Hands was recently proposed to address the task of two-hand segmentation and detection in the wild. The proposed composition-based data generation technique can create two-hand instances with quality, quantity and diversity that generalize well to unseen domains. In this work, we present Ego2HandsPose, an extension of Ego2Hands that contains 3D hand pose annotation and is the first dataset that enables color-based two-hand 3D tracking in unseen domains. To this end, we develop a set of parametric fitting algorithms to enable 1) 3D hand pose annotation using a single image, 2) automatic conversion from 2D to 3D hand poses and 3) accurate two-hand tracking with temporal consistency. We provide incremental quantitative analysis on the multi-stage pipeline and show that training on our dataset achieves state-of-the-art results that significantly outperforms other datasets for the task of egocentric two-hand global 3D pose estimation.
abstract_zh: 全局坐标系中基于颜色的双手 3D 姿态估计在许多应用中至关重要。然而，专门用于此任务的数据集很少，并且没有现有数据集支持非实验室环境中的估计。这很大程度上归因于 3D 手势注释所需的复杂数据收集过程，这也导致难以获得具有野外估计所需的视觉多样性水平的实例。为了实现这一目标，最近提出了一个大型数据集 Ego2Hands 来解决野外双手分割和检测的任务。所提出的基于组合的数据生成技术可以创建具有质量、数量和多样性的双手实例，可以很好地推广到未见过的领域。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Ego2HandsPose，它是 Ego2Hands 的扩展，包含 3D 手部姿势注释，并且是第一个在看不见的领域中实现基于颜色的双手 3D 跟踪的数据集。为此，我们开发了一组参数拟合算法，以实现 1) 使用单个图像进行 3D 手部姿势注释，2) 从 2D 到 3D 手部姿势的自动转换，以及 3) 具有时间一致性的准确双手跟踪。我们对多阶段管道进行了增量定量分析，并表明对我们的数据集进行的训练取得了最先进的结果，在以自我为中心的双手全局 3D 姿态估计任务中，其性能显着优于其他数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Ego2HandsPose数据集，用于解决第一视角下双手法姿的3D全局估计问题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏对非实验室环境的双手法姿估计支持，且3D标注过程复杂导致数据多样性不足。
AI.method: 开发参数化拟合算法实现单图像3D标注、2D到3D姿态转换及双手法姿的时序一致性跟踪。
AI.result: 在多阶段流程中实现增量定量分析，训练结果在第一视角双手法姿估计任务中达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: Ego2HandsPose是首个支持非实验室环境颜色信息双手法姿估计的3D数据集，推动了相关领域的发展。

search_text: Ego2HandsPose: A Dataset for Egocentric Two-hand 3D Global Pose Estimation Ego2HandsPose：以自我为中心的双手 3D 全局姿势估计数据集 Color-based two-hand 3D pose estimation in the global coordinate system is essential in many applications. However, there are very few datasets dedicated to this task and no existing dataset supports estimation in a non-laboratory environment. This is largely attributed to the sophisticated data collection process required for 3D hand pose annotations, which also leads to difficulty in obtaining instances with the level of visual diversity needed for estimation in the wild. Progressing towards this goal, a large-scale dataset Ego2Hands was recently proposed to address the task of two-hand segmentation and detection in the wild. The proposed composition-based data generation technique can create two-hand instances with quality, quantity and diversity that generalize well to unseen domains. In this work, we present Ego2HandsPose, an extension of Ego2Hands that contains 3D hand pose annotation and is the first dataset that enables color-based two-hand 3D tracking in unseen domains. To this end, we develop a set of parametric fitting algorithms to enable 1) 3D hand pose annotation using a single image, 2) automatic conversion from 2D to 3D hand poses and 3) accurate two-hand tracking with temporal consistency. We provide incremental quantitative analysis on the multi-stage pipeline and show that training on our dataset achieves state-of-the-art results that significantly outperforms other datasets for the task of egocentric two-hand global 3D pose estimation. 全局坐标系中基于颜色的双手 3D 姿态估计在许多应用中至关重要。然而，专门用于此任务的数据集很少，并且没有现有数据集支持非实验室环境中的估计。这很大程度上归因于 3D 手势注释所需的复杂数据收集过程，这也导致难以获得具有野外估计所需的视觉多样性水平的实例。为了实现这一目标，最近提出了一个大型数据集 Ego2Hands 来解决野外双手分割和检测的任务。所提出的基于组合的数据生成技术可以创建具有质量、数量和多样性的双手实例，可以很好地推广到未见过的领域。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Ego2HandsPose，它是 Ego2Hands 的扩展，包含 3D 手部姿势注释，并且是第一个在看不见的领域中实现基于颜色的双手 3D 跟踪的数据集。为此，我们开发了一组参数拟合算法，以实现 1) 使用单个图像进行 3D 手部姿势注释，2) 从 2D 到 3D 手部姿势的自动转换，以及 3) 具有时间一致性的准确双手跟踪。我们对多阶段管道进行了增量定量分析，并表明对我们的数据集进行的训练取得了最先进的结果，在以自我为中心的双手全局 3D 姿态估计任务中，其性能显着优于其他数据集。 本文提出Ego2HandsPose数据集，用于解决第一视角下双手法姿的3D全局估计问题。 Fanqing Lin,Tony Martinez cs.CV

authors_text: Daniel Casanueva-Morato,Alvaro Ayuso-Martinez,Juan P. Dominguez-Morales,Angel Jimenez-Fernandez,Gabriel Jimenez-Moreno
title: A bio-inspired implementation of a sparse-learning spike-based hippocampus memory model
title_zh: 基于稀疏学习尖峰的海马记忆模型的仿生实现
comment: 15 pages, 7 figures, 3 tables, journal, Neural Networks
comments: 15 pages, 7 figures, 3 tables, journal, Neural Networks
abstract: The nervous system, more specifically, the brain, is capable of solving complex problems simply and efficiently, far surpassing modern computers. In this regard, neuromorphic engineering is a research field that focuses on mimicking the basic principles that govern the brain in order to develop systems that achieve such computational capabilities. Within this field, bio-inspired learning and memory systems are still a challenge to be solved, and this is where the hippocampus is involved. It is the region of the brain that acts as a short-term memory, allowing the learning and unstructured and rapid storage of information from all the sensory nuclei of the cerebral cortex and its subsequent recall. In this work, we propose a novel bio-inspired memory model based on the hippocampus with the ability to learn memories, recall them from a cue (a part of the memory associated with the rest of the content) and even forget memories when trying to learn others with the same cue. This model has been implemented on the SpiNNaker hardware platform using Spiking Neural Networks, and a set of experiments and tests were performed to demonstrate its correct and expected operation. The proposed spike-based memory model generates spikes only when it receives an input, being energy efficient, and it needs 7 timesteps for the learning step and 6 timesteps for recalling a previously-stored memory. This work presents the first hardware implementation of a fully functional bio-inspired spike-based hippocampus memory model, paving the road for the development of future more complex neuromorphic systems.

In this regard, neuromorphic engineering is a research field that focuses on mimicking the basic principles that govern the brain in order to develop systems that achieve such computational capabilities. Within this field, bio-inspired learning and memory systems are still a challenge to be solved, and this is where the hippocampus is involved. It is the region of the brain that acts as a short-term memory, allowing the learning and unstructured and rapid storage of information from all the sensory nuclei of the cerebral cortex and its subsequent recall. In this work, we propose a novel bio-inspired memory model based on the hippocampus with the ability to learn memories, recall them from a cue (a part of the memory associated with the rest of the content) and even forget memories when trying to learn others with the same cue. This model has been implemented on the SpiNNaker hardware platform using Spiking Neural Networks, and a set of experiments and tests were performed to demonstrate its correct and expected operation. The proposed spike-based memory model generates spikes only when it receives an input, being energy efficient, and it needs 7 timesteps for the learning step and 6 timesteps for recalling a previously-stored memory. This work presents the first hardware implementation of a fully functional bio-inspired spike-based hippocampus memory model, paving the road for the development of future more complex neuromorphic systems.
abstract_zh: 神经系统，更具体地说是大脑，能够简单有效地解决复杂问题，远远超过现代计算机。在这方面，神经形态工程是一个研究领域，重点是模仿控制大脑的基本原理，以开发实现这种计算能力的系统。在这个领域中，仿生学习和记忆系统仍然是一个有待解决的挑战，而这正是海马体所涉及的领域。它是大脑中充当短期记忆的区域，允许学习和非结构化地快速存储来自大脑皮层所有感觉核的信息以及随后的回忆。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于海马体的新颖的仿生记忆模型，该模型具有学习记忆的能力，可以通过提示（与其余内容相关的记忆的一部分）回忆它们，甚至在尝试使用相同提示学习其他记忆时忘记记忆。该模型已使用Spiking Neural Networks在SpiNNaker硬件平台上实现，并进行了一系列实验和测试以证明其正确且符合预期的操作。所提出的基于尖峰的记忆模型仅在接收到输入时才生成尖峰，具有高能效，并且需要 7 个时间步进行学习步骤，需要 6 个时间步来调用先前存储的记忆。这项工作提出了第一个全功能的基于仿生尖峰的海马体记忆模型的硬件实现，为未来更复杂的神经形态系统的开发铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于海马体的生物启发式稀疏学习脉冲记忆模型，并在SpiNNaker硬件平台上实现了该模型。
AI.motivation: 大脑能够高效解决复杂问题，而现有计算机难以实现类似能力。生物启发式学习与记忆系统仍是神经形态工程领域的挑战，需开发类似海马体功能的模型。
AI.method: 基于海马体机制设计记忆模型，利用脉冲神经网络（SNN）在SpiNNaker硬件平台实现，通过输入触发脉冲进行学习与回忆，支持通过线索召回记忆并实现记忆遗忘。
AI.result: 模型成功实现学习（7个时间步）与回忆（6个时间步）功能，仅在输入时产生脉冲，能耗低，为首个完整硬件实现的生物启发式脉冲海马体记忆模型。
AI.conclusion: 该工作验证了生物启发式脉冲记忆模型的可行性，为未来复杂神经形态系统开发奠定了基础。

authors_text: Junhui Zhang,Wudi Bao,Junjie Pan,Xiang Yin,Zejun Ma
title: A Novel Chinese Dialect TTS Frontend with Non-Autoregressive Neural Machine Translation
title_zh: 一种新型的非自回归神经机器翻译汉语方言 TTS 前端
comment: 4 pages,5 figures
comments: 4 pages,5 figures
abstract: Chinese dialects are different variations of Chinese and can be considered as different languages in the same language family with Mandarin. Though they all use Chinese characters, the pronunciations, grammar and idioms can vary significantly, and even local speakers may find it hard to input correct written forms of dialect. Besides, using Mandarin text as text-to-speech inputs would generate speech with poor naturalness. In this paper, we propose a novel Chinese dialect TTS frontend with a translation module, which converts Mandarin text into dialectic expressions to improve the intelligibility and naturalness of synthesized speech. A non-autoregressive neural machine translation model with various tricks is proposed for the translation task. It is the first known work to incorporate translation with TTS frontend. Experiments on Cantonese show the proposed model improves 2.56 BLEU and TTS improves 0.27 MOS with Mandarin inputs.
summary: Chinese dialects are different variations of Chinese and can be considered as different languages in the same language family with Mandarin. Though they all use Chinese characters, the pronunciations, grammar and idioms can vary significantly, and even local speakers may find it hard to input correct written forms of dialect. Besides, using Mandarin text as text-to-speech inputs would generate speech with poor naturalness. In this paper, we propose a novel Chinese dialect TTS frontend with a translation module, which converts Mandarin text into dialectic expressions to improve the intelligibility and naturalness of synthesized speech. A non-autoregressive neural machine translation model with various tricks is proposed for the translation task. It is the first known work to incorporate translation with TTS frontend. Experiments on Cantonese show the proposed model improves 2.56 BLEU and TTS improves 0.27 MOS with Mandarin inputs.
abstract_zh: 汉语方言是汉语的不同变体，可以被视为与普通话同属一个语系的不同语言。虽然它们都使用汉字，但发音、语法和习语差异很大，即使是本地人也可能很难输入正确的方言书面形式。此外，使用普通话文本作为文本转语音输入会生成自然度较差的语音。在本文中，我们提出了一种带有翻译模块的新型中文方言 TTS 前端，它将普通话文本转换为方言表达，以提高合成语音的清晰度和自然度。针对翻译任务，提出了一种具有各种技巧的非自回归神经机器翻译模型。这是第一部将翻译与 TTS 前端结合起来的已知作品。粤语实验表明，使用普通话输入时，所提出的模型将 BLEU 提高了 2.56，TTS 提高了 0.27 MOS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合非自回归神经机器翻译的中文方言TTS前端，通过将普通话文本转换为方言表达以提升合成语音的自然度和可理解性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法直接使用普通话文本进行方言TTS合成时，因方言与普通话在发音、语法和书面表达上的差异，导致合成语音自然度和可理解性不足。
AI.method: 设计包含翻译模块的TTS前端，采用非自回归神经机器翻译模型将普通话文本转换为方言表达，并首次将翻译与TTS前端结合。
AI.result: 在粤语实验中，该模型使翻译任务BLEU值提升2.56，TTS MOS评分提升0.27。
AI.conclusion: 通过将翻译模块集成到TTS前端，有效提升了方言语音合成质量，验证了翻译与TTS结合的可行性与优势。

search_text: A Novel Chinese Dialect TTS Frontend with Non-Autoregressive Neural Machine Translation 一种新型的非自回归神经机器翻译汉语方言 TTS 前端 Chinese dialects are different variations of Chinese and can be considered as different languages in the same language family with Mandarin. Though they all use Chinese characters, the pronunciations, grammar and idioms can vary significantly, and even local speakers may find it hard to input correct written forms of dialect. Besides, using Mandarin text as text-to-speech inputs would generate speech with poor naturalness. In this paper, we propose a novel Chinese dialect TTS frontend with a translation module, which converts Mandarin text into dialectic expressions to improve the intelligibility and naturalness of synthesized speech. A non-autoregressive neural machine translation model with various tricks is proposed for the translation task. It is the first known work to incorporate translation with TTS frontend. Experiments on Cantonese show the proposed model improves 2.56 BLEU and TTS improves 0.27 MOS with Mandarin inputs. 汉语方言是汉语的不同变体，可以被视为与普通话同属一个语系的不同语言。虽然它们都使用汉字，但发音、语法和习语差异很大，即使是本地人也可能很难输入正确的方言书面形式。此外，使用普通话文本作为文本转语音输入会生成自然度较差的语音。在本文中，我们提出了一种带有翻译模块的新型中文方言 TTS 前端，它将普通话文本转换为方言表达，以提高合成语音的清晰度和自然度。针对翻译任务，提出了一种具有各种技巧的非自回归神经机器翻译模型。这是第一部将翻译与 TTS 前端结合起来的已知作品。粤语实验表明，使用普通话输入时，所提出的模型将 BLEU 提高了 2.56，TTS 提高了 0.27 MOS。 本文提出一种结合非自回归神经机器翻译的中文方言TTS前端，通过将普通话文本转换为方言表达以提升合成语音的自然度和可理解性。 Junhui Zhang,Wudi Bao,Junjie Pan,Xiang Yin,Zejun Ma cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Ming Yin,Wenjing Chen,Mengdi Wang,Yu-Xiang Wang
title: Offline Stochastic Shortest Path: Learning, Evaluation and Towards Optimality
title_zh: 离线随机最短路径：学习、评估和走向最优
comment: UAI 2022
comments: UAI 2022
abstract: Goal-oriented Reinforcement Learning, where the agent needs to reach the goal state while simultaneously minimizing the cost, has received significant attention in real-world applications. Its theoretical formulation, stochastic shortest path (SSP), has been intensively researched in the online setting. Nevertheless, it remains understudied when such an online interaction is prohibited and only historical data is provided. In this paper, we consider the offline stochastic shortest path problem when the state space and the action space are finite. We design the simple value iteration-based algorithms for tackling both offline policy evaluation (OPE) and offline policy learning tasks. Notably, our analysis of these simple algorithms yields strong instance-dependent bounds which can imply worst-case bounds that are near-minimax optimal. We hope our study could help illuminate the fundamental statistical limits of the offline SSP problem and motivate further studies beyond the scope of current consideration.
summary: Goal-oriented Reinforcement Learning, where the agent needs to reach the goal state while simultaneously minimizing the cost, has received significant attention in real-world applications. Its theoretical formulation, stochastic shortest path (SSP), has been intensively researched in the online setting. Nevertheless, it remains understudied when such an online interaction is prohibited and only historical data is provided. In this paper, we consider the offline stochastic shortest path problem when the state space and the action space are finite. We design the simple value iteration-based algorithms for tackling both offline policy evaluation (OPE) and offline policy learning tasks. Notably, our analysis of these simple algorithms yields strong instance-dependent bounds which can imply worst-case bounds that are near-minimax optimal. We hope our study could help illuminate the fundamental statistical limits of the offline SSP problem and motivate further studies beyond the scope of current consideration.
abstract_zh: 面向目标的强化学习，即智能体需要达到目标状态，同时最小化成本，在现实应用中受到了极大的关注。其理论公式随机最短路径（SSP）已在在线环境中得到深入研究。然而，当这种在线互动被禁止并且仅提供历史数据时，它仍然没有得到充分研究。在本文中，我们考虑状态空间和动作空间有限时的离线随机最短路径问题。我们设计了简单的基于价值迭代的算法来处理离线策略评估（OPE）和离线策略学习任务。值得注意的是，我们对这些简单算法的分析产生了强大的依赖于实例的边界，这可能意味着最坏情况的边界接近极小极大最优。我们希望我们的研究能够帮助阐明离线 SSP 问题的基本统计限制，并激发超出当前考虑范围的进一步研究。

AI.tldr: 研究离线随机最短路径问题，设计基于值迭代的算法用于策略评估与学习，并分析其统计限制
AI.motivation: 现有研究多集中于在线设置，离线场景下缺乏有效方法，需探索仅依赖历史数据的解决方案
AI.method: 设计基于值迭代的算法，解决离线策略评估与学习任务
AI.result: 算法分析获得强实例相关界，最坏情况界接近近似最小最大最优
AI.conclusion: 阐明离线SSP的统计限制，为后续研究提供基础

authors_text: Yuchen Rao,Yinyu Nie,Angela Dai
title: PatchComplete: Learning Multi-Resolution Patch Priors for 3D Shape Completion on Unseen Categories
title_zh: PatchComplete：学习多分辨率补丁先验以完成未见类别的 3D 形状
comment: Video link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ch1rvw2D_Kc ; Project page: https://yuchenrao.github.io/projects/patchComplete/patchComplete.html ; Accepted to NeurIPS'22
comments: Video link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ch1rvw2D_Kc ; Project page: https://yuchenrao.github.io/projects/patchComplete/patchComplete.html ; Accepted to NeurIPS'22
abstract: While 3D shape representations enable powerful reasoning in many visual and perception applications, learning 3D shape priors tends to be constrained to the specific categories trained on, leading to an inefficient learning process, particularly for general applications with unseen categories. Thus, we propose PatchComplete, which learns effective shape priors based on multi-resolution local patches, which are often more general than full shapes (e.g., chairs and tables often both share legs) and thus enable geometric reasoning about unseen class categories. To learn these shared substructures, we learn multi-resolution patch priors across all train categories, which are then associated to input partial shape observations by attention across the patch priors, and finally decoded into a complete shape reconstruction. Such patch-based priors avoid overfitting to specific train categories and enable reconstruction on entirely unseen categories at test time. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on synthetic ShapeNet data as well as challenging real-scanned objects from ScanNet, which include noise and clutter, improving over state of the art in novel-category shape completion by 19.3% in chamfer distance on ShapeNet, and 9.0% for ScanNet.
summary: While 3D shape representations enable powerful reasoning in many visual and perception applications, learning 3D shape priors tends to be constrained to the specific categories trained on, leading to an inefficient learning process, particularly for general applications with unseen categories. Thus, we propose PatchComplete, which learns effective shape priors based on multi-resolution local patches, which are often more general than full shapes (e.g., chairs and tables often both share legs) and thus enable geometric reasoning about unseen class categories. To learn these shared substructures, we learn multi-resolution patch priors across all train categories, which are then associated to input partial shape observations by attention across the patch priors, and finally decoded into a complete shape reconstruction. Such patch-based priors avoid overfitting to specific train categories and enable reconstruction on entirely unseen categories at test time. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on synthetic ShapeNet data as well as challenging real-scanned objects from ScanNet, which include noise and clutter, improving over state of the art in novel-category shape completion by 19.3% in chamfer distance on ShapeNet, and 9.0% for ScanNet.
abstract_zh: 虽然 3D 形状表示可以在许多视觉和感知应用中实现强大的推理，但学习 3D 形状先验往往仅限于所训练的特定类别，从而导致学习过程效率低下，特别是对于具有看不见类别的一般应用。因此，我们提出了 PatchComplete，它基于多分辨率局部补丁学习有效的形状先验，这些局部补丁通常比完整形状更通用（例如，椅子和桌子通常共享腿），从而能够对不可见的类类别进行几何推理。为了学习这些共享子结构，我们学习所有训练类别的多分辨率补丁先验，然后通过关注补丁先验将其与输入部分形状观察相关联，最后解码为完整的形状重建。这种基于补丁的先验避免了对特定训练类别的过度拟合，并能够在测试时对完全不可见的类别进行重建。我们展示了我们的方法对合成 ShapeNet 数据以及来自 ScanNet 的具有挑战性的真实扫描对象（包括噪声和杂波）的有效性，在 ShapeNet 上的倒角距离上比现有技术水平提高了 19.3%，在 ScanNet 上提高了 9.0%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PatchComplete方法，通过学习多分辨率局部补丁先验知识，实现对未见过类别3D形状的补全。
AI.motivation: 传统3D形状先验学习受限于训练类别，难以泛化到未见过的类别。局部补丁（如椅子和桌子共有的腿结构）比完整形状更通用，可提升对未知类别的几何推理能力。
AI.method: 跨所有训练类别学习多分辨率补丁先验，通过注意力机制将补丁先验关联到输入的不完整形状，最终解码为完整形状。
AI.result: 在ShapeNet和ScanNet数据集上分别提升19.3%和9.0%的Chamfer距离指标，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于补丁先验的方法避免了对特定训练类别的过拟合，有效实现了对未知类别3D形状的补全。

To learn these shared substructures, we learn multi-resolution patch priors across all train categories, which are then associated to input partial shape observations by attention across the patch priors, and finally decoded into a complete shape reconstruction. Such patch-based priors avoid overfitting to specific train categories and enable reconstruction on entirely unseen categories at test time. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on synthetic ShapeNet data as well as challenging real-scanned objects from ScanNet, which include noise and clutter, improving over state of the art in novel-category shape completion by 19.3% in chamfer distance on ShapeNet, and 9.0% for ScanNet. 虽然 3D 形状表示可以在许多视觉和感知应用中实现强大的推理，但学习 3D 形状先验往往仅限于所训练的特定类别，从而导致学习过程效率低下，特别是对于具有看不见类别的一般应用。因此，我们提出了 PatchComplete，它基于多分辨率局部补丁学习有效的形状先验，这些局部补丁通常比完整形状更通用（例如，椅子和桌子通常共享腿），从而能够对不可见的类类别进行几何推理。为了学习这些共享子结构，我们学习所有训练类别的多分辨率补丁先验，然后通过关注补丁先验将其与输入部分形状观察相关联，最后解码为完整的形状重建。这种基于补丁的先验避免了对特定训练类别的过度拟合，并能够在测试时对完全不可见的类别进行重建。我们展示了我们的方法对合成 ShapeNet 数据以及来自 ScanNet 的具有挑战性的真实扫描对象（包括噪声和杂波）的有效性，在 ShapeNet 上的倒角距离上比现有技术水平提高了 19.3%，在 ScanNet 上提高了 9.0%。 本文提出PatchComplete方法，通过学习多分辨率局部补丁先验知识，实现对未见过类别3D形状的补全。 Yuchen Rao,Yinyu Nie,Angela Dai cs.CV

authors_text: Jinsong Chen,Kaiyuan Gao,Gaichao Li,Kun He
title: NAGphormer: A Tokenized Graph Transformer for Node Classification in Large Graphs
title_zh: NAGphormer：用于大图中节点分类的标记化图转换器
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2023
comments: Accepted by ICLR 2023
abstract: The graph Transformer emerges as a new architecture and has shown superior performance on various graph mining tasks. In this work, we observe that existing graph Transformers treat nodes as independent tokens and construct a single long sequence composed of all node tokens so as to train the Transformer model, causing it hard to scale to large graphs due to the quadratic complexity on the number of nodes for the self-attention computation. To this end, we propose a Neighborhood Aggregation Graph Transformer (NAGphormer) that treats each node as a sequence containing a series of tokens constructed by our proposed Hop2Token module. For each node, Hop2Token aggregates the neighborhood features from different hops into different representations and thereby produces a sequence of token vectors as one input. In this way, NAGphormer could be trained in a mini-batch manner and thus could scale to large graphs. Moreover, we mathematically show that as compared to a category of advanced Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), the decoupled Graph Convolutional Network, NAGphormer could learn more informative node representations from the multi-hop neighborhoods. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets from small to large are conducted to demonstrate that NAGphormer consistently outperforms existing graph Transformers and mainstream GNNs. Code is available at https://github.com/JHL-HUST/NAGphormer.
summary: The graph Transformer emerges as a new architecture and has shown superior performance on various graph mining tasks. In this work, we observe that existing graph Transformers treat nodes as independent tokens and construct a single long sequence composed of all node tokens so as to train the Transformer model, causing it hard to scale to large graphs due to the quadratic complexity on the number of nodes for the self-attention computation. For each node, Hop2Token aggregates the neighborhood features from different hops into different representations and thereby produces a sequence of token vectors as one input. In this way, NAGphormer could be trained in a mini-batch manner and thus could scale to large graphs. Moreover, we mathematically show that as compared to a category of advanced Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), the decoupled Graph Convolutional Network, NAGphormer could learn more informative node representations from the multi-hop neighborhoods. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets from small to large are conducted to demonstrate that NAGphormer consistently outperforms existing graph Transformers and mainstream GNNs. Code is available at https://github.com/JHL-HUST/NAGphormer.
abstract_zh: 图 Transformer 作为一种新架构出现，并在各种图挖掘任务上表现出了卓越的性能。在这项工作中，我们观察到现有的图 Transformer 将节点视为独立的 token，并构建由所有节点 token 组成的单个长序列来训练 Transformer 模型，由于自注意力计算的节点数量的二次复杂度，导致难以扩展到大型图。为此，我们提出了一个邻域聚合图转换器（NAGphormer），它将每个节点视为包含一系列由我们提出的 Hop2Token 模块构造的令牌的序列。对于每个节点，Hop2Token 将来自不同跃点的邻域特征聚合为不同的表示形式，从而生成一系列标记向量作为一个输入。通过这种方式，NAGphormer 可以以小批量的方式进行训练，从而可以扩展到大图。此外，我们在数学上表明，与一类高级图神经网络（GNN）（解耦图卷积网络）相比，NAGphormer 可以从多跳邻域中学习更多信息丰富的节点表示。对从小到大的基准数据集进行了大量实验，证明 NAGphormer 始终优于现有的图 Transformer 和主流 GNN。代码可在 https://github.com/JHL-HUST/NAGphormer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为NAGphormer的图Transformer模型，用于解决大规模图中的节点分类问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图Transformer模型因自注意力计算的二次复杂度难以扩展到大规模图，且未充分利用多跳邻居信息。
AI.method: 设计Hop2Token模块将节点多跳邻居特征聚合为序列化token，结合分批次训练策略降低复杂度，并数学证明其表征能力优于先进GNN模型。
AI.result: 在从小型到大型的基准数据集上，NAGphormer持续优于现有图Transformer和主流GNN方法。
AI.conclusion: NAGphormer通过创新的token化机制和分层聚合策略，实现了对大规模图节点分类任务的高效准确建模。

authors_text: Jieyi Ye,Jiafei Duan,Samson Yu,Bihan Wen,Cheston Tan
title: ABCDE: An Agent-Based Cognitive Development Environment
title_zh: ABCDE：基于代理的认知开发环境
comment: Accepted to CVPRW 2022,Embodied AI Workshop (Extended Abstract)
comments: Accepted to CVPRW 2022,Embodied AI Workshop (Extended Abstract)
abstract: Children's cognitive abilities are sometimes cited as AI benchmarks. How can the most common 1,000 concepts (89\% of everyday use) be learnt in a naturalistic children's setting? Cognitive development in children is about quality, and new concepts can be conveyed via simple examples. Our approach of knowledge scaffolding uses simple objects and actions to convey concepts, like how children are taught. We introduce ABCDE, an interactive 3D environment modeled after a typical playroom for children. It comes with 300+ unique 3D object assets (mostly toys), and a large action space for child and parent agents to interact with objects and each other. ABCDE is the first environment aimed at mimicking a naturalistic setting for cognitive development in children; no other environment focuses on high-level concept learning through learner-teacher interactions. The simulator can be found at https://pypi.org/project/ABCDESim/1.0.0/
summary: Children's cognitive abilities are sometimes cited as AI benchmarks. How can the most common 1,000 concepts (89\% of everyday use) be learnt in a naturalistic children's setting? Cognitive development in children is about quality, and new concepts can be conveyed via simple examples. Our approach of knowledge scaffolding uses simple objects and actions to convey concepts, like how children are taught. We introduce ABCDE, an interactive 3D environment modeled after a typical playroom for children. It comes with 300+ unique 3D object assets (mostly toys), and a large action space for child and parent agents to interact with objects and each other. ABCDE is the first environment aimed at mimicking a naturalistic setting for cognitive development in children; no other environment focuses on high-level concept learning through learner-teacher interactions. The simulator can be found at https://pypi.org/project/ABCDESim/1.0.0/
abstract_zh: 儿童的认知能力有时被视为人工智能的基准。如何在自然主义的儿童环境中学习最常见的 1,000 个概念（占日常使用的 89%）？儿童的认知发展关乎品质，新概念可以通过简单的例子来传达。我们的知识支架方法使用简单的对象和动作来传达概念，例如如何教育孩子。我们介绍 ABCDE，这是一个模仿典型儿童游戏室的交互式 3D 环境。它配备了 300 多个独特的 3D 对象资产（主要是玩具），以及供儿童和家长代理与对象和彼此交互的大型动作空间。 ABCDE 是第一个旨在模仿儿童认知发展的自然环境的环境；没有其他环境专注于通过学习者与教师的互动进行高级概念学习。模拟器可以在 https://pypi.org/project/ABCDESim/1.0.0/ 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出ABCDE，一个模拟儿童自然学习环境的交互式3D平台，通过代理间互动实现高层概念学习。
AI.motivation: 现有AI认知基准缺乏对儿童自然学习环境的模拟，需探索基于简单示例和互动的高效概念学习方法。
AI.method: 构建包含300+玩具模型的3D游戏室环境，设计知识脚手架机制，通过儿童与家长代理的互动动作空间传递概念。
AI.result: 开发出首个专注于自然场景下认知发展的模拟器，支持通过师生互动进行高阶概念学习，并提供开源工具包。
AI.conclusion: ABCDE为AI认知发展研究提供了新范式，其自然交互机制可推动类人概念学习能力的突破性进展。

authors_text: Geonho Cha,Chaehun Shin,Sungroh Yoon,Dongyoon Wee
title: Out of Sight, Out of Mind: A Source-View-Wise Feature Aggregation for Multi-View Image-Based Rendering
title_zh: 眼不见心不烦：基于多视图图像渲染的源视图特征聚合
abstract: To estimate the volume density and color of a 3D point in the multi-view image-based rendering, a common approach is to inspect the consensus existence among the given source image features, which is one of the informative cues for the estimation procedure. To this end, most of the previous methods utilize equally-weighted aggregation features. However, this could make it hard to check the consensus existence when some outliers, which frequently occur by occlusions, are included in the source image feature set. In this paper, we propose a novel source-view-wise feature aggregation method, which facilitates us to find out the consensus in a robust way by leveraging local structures in the feature set. We first calculate the source-view-wise distance distribution for each source feature for the proposed aggregation. After that, the distance distribution is converted to several similarity distributions with the proposed learnable similarity mapping functions. Finally, for each element in the feature set, the aggregation features are extracted by calculating the weighted means and variances, where the weights are derived from the similarity distributions. In experiments, we validate the proposed method on various benchmark datasets, including synthetic and real image scenes. The experimental results demonstrate that incorporating the proposed features improves the performance by a large margin, resulting in the state-of-the-art performance.
summary: To estimate the volume density and color of a 3D point in the multi-view image-based rendering, a common approach is to inspect the consensus existence among the given source image features, which is one of the informative cues for the estimation procedure. To this end, most of the previous methods utilize equally-weighted aggregation features. However, this could make it hard to check the consensus existence when some outliers, which frequently occur by occlusions, are included in the source image feature set. In this paper, we propose a novel source-view-wise feature aggregation method, which facilitates us to find out the consensus in a robust way by leveraging local structures in the feature set. We first calculate the source-view-wise distance distribution for each source feature for the proposed aggregation. After that, the distance distribution is converted to several similarity distributions with the proposed learnable similarity mapping functions. Finally, for each element in the feature set, the aggregation features are extracted by calculating the weighted means and variances, where the weights are derived from the similarity distributions. In experiments, we validate the proposed method on various benchmark datasets, including synthetic and real image scenes. The experimental results demonstrate that incorporating the proposed features improves the performance by a large margin, resulting in the state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 为了估计基于多视图图像的渲染中 3D 点的体积密度和颜色，一种常见的方法是检查给定源图像特征之间是否存在一致性，这是估计过程的信息线索之一。为此，之前的大多数方法都利用等权聚合特征。然而，当源图像特征集中包含一些经常因遮挡而出现的异常值时，这可能会导致难以检查一致性的存在。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的源视图方式特征聚合方法，该方法有助于我们通过利用特征集中的局部结构以稳健的方式找到共识。我们首先计算所提出的聚合的每个源特征的源视图距离分布。之后，使用所提出的可学习相似度映射函数将距离分布转换为几个相似度分布。最后，对于特征集中的每个元素，通过计算加权均值和方差来提取聚合特征，其中权重是从相似性分布中得出的。在实验中，我们在各种基准数据集（包括合成图像场景和真实图像场景）上验证了所提出的方法。实验结果表明，结合所提出的功能可以大幅提高性能，从而达到最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种源视角-wise特征聚合方法，用于多视角图像基于渲染中的3D点体积密度和颜色估计，以解决遮挡导致的异常值问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法采用等权重聚合特征，难以处理遮挡产生的异常值，导致共识判断失效，影响渲染质量。
AI.method: 计算源特征的距离分布，通过可学习相似性映射转换为相似度分布，利用加权均值和方差提取聚合特征，权重由相似度分布决定。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上验证，性能显著提升，达到当前最优水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过局部结构分析和动态权重分配，方法有效提升了多视角渲染中对异常值的鲁棒性。

search_text: Out of Sight, Out of Mind: A Source-View-Wise Feature Aggregation for Multi-View Image-Based Rendering 眼不见心不烦：基于多视图图像渲染的源视图特征聚合 To estimate the volume density and color of a 3D point in the multi-view image-based rendering, a common approach is to inspect the consensus existence among the given source image features, which is one of the informative cues for the estimation procedure. To this end, most of the previous methods utilize equally-weighted aggregation features. However, this could make it hard to check the consensus existence when some outliers, which frequently occur by occlusions, are included in the source image feature set. In this paper, we propose a novel source-view-wise feature aggregation method, which facilitates us to find out the consensus in a robust way by leveraging local structures in the feature set. We first calculate the source-view-wise distance distribution for each source feature for the proposed aggregation. After that, the distance distribution is converted to several similarity distributions with the proposed learnable similarity mapping functions. Finally, for each element in the feature set, the aggregation features are extracted by calculating the weighted means and variances, where the weights are derived from the similarity distributions. In experiments, we validate the proposed method on various benchmark datasets, including synthetic and real image scenes. The experimental results demonstrate that incorporating the proposed features improves the performance by a large margin, resulting in the state-of-the-art performance. 为了估计基于多视图图像的渲染中 3D 点的体积密度和颜色，一种常见的方法是检查给定源图像特征之间是否存在一致性，这是估计过程的信息线索之一。为此，之前的大多数方法都利用等权聚合特征。然而，当源图像特征集中包含一些经常因遮挡而出现的异常值时，这可能会导致难以检查一致性的存在。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的源视图方式特征聚合方法，该方法有助于我们通过利用特征集中的局部结构以稳健的方式找到共识。我们首先计算所提出的聚合的每个源特征的源视图距离分布。之后，使用所提出的可学习相似度映射函数将距离分布转换为几个相似度分布。最后，对于特征集中的每个元素，通过计算加权均值和方差来提取聚合特征，其中权重是从相似性分布中得出的。在实验中，我们在各种基准数据集（包括合成图像场景和真实图像场景）上验证了所提出的方法。实验结果表明，结合所提出的功能可以大幅提高性能，从而达到最先进的性能。 本文提出一种源视角-wise特征聚合方法，用于多视角图像基于渲染中的3D点体积密度和颜色估计，以解决遮挡导致的异常值问题。 Geonho Cha,Chaehun Shin,Sungroh Yoon,Dongyoon Wee cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Hao-Kang Liu,I-Chao Shen,Bing-Yu Chen
title: NeRF-In: Free-Form NeRF Inpainting with RGB-D Priors
title_zh: NeRF-In：使用 RGB-D 先验的自由形式 NeRF 修复
comment: Hao-Kang Liu and I-Chao Shen contributed equally to the paper. Project page: https://jdily.github.io/proj_site/nerfin_proj.html
comments: Hao-Kang Liu and I-Chao Shen contributed equally to the paper. Project page: https://jdily.github.io/proj_site/nerfin_proj.html
abstract: Though Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) demonstrates compelling novel view synthesis results, it is still unintuitive to edit a pre-trained NeRF because the neural network's parameters and the scene geometry/appearance are often not explicitly associated. In this paper, we introduce the first framework that enables users to remove unwanted objects or retouch undesired regions in a 3D scene represented by a pre-trained NeRF without any category-specific data and training. The user first draws a free-form mask to specify a region containing unwanted objects over a rendered view from the pre-trained NeRF. Our framework first transfers the user-provided mask to other rendered views and estimates guiding color and depth images within these transferred masked regions. Next, we formulate an optimization problem that jointly inpaints the image content in all masked regions across multiple views by updating the NeRF model's parameters. We demonstrate our framework on diverse scenes and show it obtained visual plausible and structurally consistent results across multiple views using shorter time and less user manual efforts.
summary: Though Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) demonstrates compelling novel view synthesis results, it is still unintuitive to edit a pre-trained NeRF because the neural network's parameters and the scene geometry/appearance are often not explicitly associated. In this paper, we introduce the first framework that enables users to remove unwanted objects or retouch undesired regions in a 3D scene represented by a pre-trained NeRF without any category-specific data and training. The user first draws a free-form mask to specify a region containing unwanted objects over a rendered view from the pre-trained NeRF. Our framework first transfers the user-provided mask to other rendered views and estimates guiding color and depth images within these transferred masked regions. Next, we formulate an optimization problem that jointly inpaints the image content in all masked regions across multiple views by updating the NeRF model's parameters. We demonstrate our framework on diverse scenes and show it obtained visual plausible and structurally consistent results across multiple views using shorter time and less user manual efforts.
abstract_zh: 尽管神经辐射场 (NeRF) 展示了令人信服的新颖视图合成结果，但编辑预训练的 NeRF 仍然不直观，因为神经网络的参数和场景几何/外观通常没有明确关联。在本文中，我们介绍了第一个框架，该框架使用户能够在由预训练的 NeRF 表示的 3D 场景中删除不需要的对象或修饰不需要的区域，而无需任何特定于类别的数据和训练。用户首先绘制一个自由形式的掩模，以在来自预训练 NeRF 的渲染视图上指定包含不需要的对象的区域。我们的框架首先将用户提供的掩模传输到其他渲染视图，并估计这些传输的掩模区域内的引导颜色和深度图像。接下来，我们制定一个优化问题，通过更新 NeRF 模型的参数来联合修复多个视图中所有屏蔽区域中的图像内容。我们在不同的场景上展示了我们的框架，并表明它使用更短的时间和更少的用户手动工作在多个视图中获得了视觉上合理且结构一致的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需特定类别数据和训练的框架，实现基于预训练NeRF的3D场景自由形式修复，可移除不需要的对象或修复指定区域。
AI.motivation: 现有NeRF编辑方法难以直观操作且需依赖特定数据或训练，而本文旨在解决预训练NeRF场景编辑的直观性与通用性问题。
AI.method: 用户绘制自由形式掩码后，框架将其转移至多视角渲染图像并估计引导颜色/深度图，通过联合优化问题更新NeRF参数实现多视图区域修复。
AI.result: 在多种场景中实现视觉合理且结构一致的修复效果，相比现有方法耗时更短且用户操作更少。
AI.conclusion: 该框架验证了无需额外数据和训练即可实现NeRF场景编辑的可行性，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Sascha Marton,Stefan Lüdtke,Christian Bartelt,Andrej Tschalzev,Heiner Stuckenschmidt
title: Explaining Neural Networks without Access to Training Data
title_zh: 在无法访问训练数据的情况下解释神经网络
comment: ef:Machine Learning (2024)
comments: ef:Machine Learning (2024)
abstract: We consider generating explanations for neural networks in cases where the network's training data is not accessible, for instance due to privacy or safety issues. Recently, $\mathcal{I}$-Nets have been proposed as a sample-free approach to post-hoc, global model interpretability that does not require access to training data. They formulate interpretation as a machine learning task that maps network representations (parameters) to a representation of an interpretable function. In this paper, we extend the $\mathcal{I}$-Net framework to the cases of standard and soft decision trees as surrogate models. We propose a suitable decision tree representation and design of the corresponding $\mathcal{I}$-Net output layers. Furthermore, we make $\mathcal{I}$-Nets applicable to real-world tasks by considering more realistic distributions when generating the $\mathcal{I}$-Net's training data. We empirically evaluate our approach against traditional global, post-hoc interpretability approaches and show that it achieves superior results when the training data is not accessible.
summary: We consider generating explanations for neural networks in cases where the network's training data is not accessible, for instance due to privacy or safety issues. Recently, $\mathcal{I}$-Nets have been proposed as a sample-free approach to post-hoc, global model interpretability that does not require access to training data. They formulate interpretation as a machine learning task that maps network representations (parameters) to a representation of an interpretable function. In this paper, we extend the $\mathcal{I}$-Net framework to the cases of standard and soft decision trees as surrogate models. We propose a suitable decision tree representation and design of the corresponding $\mathcal{I}$-Net output layers. Furthermore, we make $\mathcal{I}$-Nets applicable to real-world tasks by considering more realistic distributions when generating the $\mathcal{I}$-Net's training data. We empirically evaluate our approach against traditional global, post-hoc interpretability approaches and show that it achieves superior results when the training data is not accessible.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在网络训练数据无法访问的情况下（例如由于隐私或安全问题）生成神经网络的解释。最近，$\mathcal{I}$-Nets 被提出作为一种无需访问训练数据即可实现事后全局模型可解释性的无样本方法。他们将解释制定为一种机器学习任务，将网络表示（参数）映射到可解释函数的表示。在本文中，我们将 $\mathcal{I}$-Net 框架扩展到标准决策树和软决策树作为代理模型的情况。我们提出了合适的决策树表示和相应的 $\mathcal{I}$-Net 输出层的设计。此外，我们在生成 $\mathcal{I}$-Net 的训练数据时考虑更现实的分布，使 $\mathcal{I}$-Nets 适用于现实世界的任务。我们根据传统的全局、事后可解释性方法对我们的方法进行了实证评估，并表明当无法访问训练数据时，它可以取得优异的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需访问训练数据的神经网络解释方法，通过扩展I-Nets框架使用决策树作为替代模型生成全局解释。
AI.motivation: 在隐私或安全限制下无法获取训练数据时，传统依赖训练数据的模型解释方法无法应用，需开发无需训练数据的解释技术。
AI.method: 将I-Nets框架扩展至标准决策树和软决策树，设计适配的输出层结构，并采用更真实的分布生成训练数据以提升实用性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在无训练数据场景下优于传统全局后验解释方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于决策树的I-Nets方法为无训练数据场景下的神经网络解释提供了可行方案，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Explaining Neural Networks without Access to Training Data 在无法访问训练数据的情况下解释神经网络 We consider generating explanations for neural networks in cases where the network's training data is not accessible, for instance due to privacy or safety issues. Recently, $\mathcal{I}$-Nets have been proposed as a sample-free approach to post-hoc, global model interpretability that does not require access to training data. They formulate interpretation as a machine learning task that maps network representations (parameters) to a representation of an interpretable function. In this paper, we extend the $\mathcal{I}$-Net framework to the cases of standard and soft decision trees as surrogate models. We propose a suitable decision tree representation and design of the corresponding $\mathcal{I}$-Net output layers. Furthermore, we make $\mathcal{I}$-Nets applicable to real-world tasks by considering more realistic distributions when generating the $\mathcal{I}$-Net's training data. We empirically evaluate our approach against traditional global, post-hoc interpretability approaches and show that it achieves superior results when the training data is not accessible. 我们考虑在网络训练数据无法访问的情况下（例如由于隐私或安全问题）生成神经网络的解释。最近，$\mathcal{I}$-Nets 被提出作为一种无需访问训练数据即可实现事后全局模型可解释性的无样本方法。他们将解释制定为一种机器学习任务，将网络表示（参数）映射到可解释函数的表示。在本文中，我们将 $\mathcal{I}$-Net 框架扩展到标准决策树和软决策树作为代理模型的情况。我们提出了合适的决策树表示和相应的 $\mathcal{I}$-Net 输出层的设计。此外，我们在生成 $\mathcal{I}$-Net 的训练数据时考虑更现实的分布，使 $\mathcal{I}$-Nets 适用于现实世界的任务。我们根据传统的全局、事后可解释性方法对我们的方法进行了实证评估，并表明当无法访问训练数据时，它可以取得优异的结果。 本文提出了一种无需访问训练数据的神经网络解释方法，通过扩展I-Nets框架使用决策树作为替代模型生成全局解释。 Sascha Marton,Stefan Lüdtke,Christian Bartelt,Andrej Tschalzev,Heiner Stuckenschmidt cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yang Zhao,Xuan Lin,Wenqiang Xu,Maozong Zheng,Zhengyong Liu,Zhou Zhao
title: AntPivot: Livestream Highlight Detection via Hierarchical Attention Mechanism
title_zh: AntPivot：通过分层注意力机制进行直播精彩检测
abstract: In recent days, streaming technology has greatly promoted the development in the field of livestream. Due to the excessive length of livestream records, it's quite essential to extract highlight segments with the aim of effective reproduction and redistribution. Although there are lots of approaches proven to be effective in the highlight detection for other modals, the challenges existing in livestream processing, such as the extreme durations, large topic shifts, much irrelevant information and so forth, heavily hamper the adaptation and compatibility of these methods. In this paper, we formulate a new task Livestream Highlight Detection, discuss and analyze the difficulties listed above and propose a novel architecture AntPivot to solve this problem. Concretely, we first encode the original data into multiple views and model their temporal relations to capture clues in a hierarchical attention mechanism. Afterwards, we try to convert the detection of highlight clips into the search for optimal decision sequences and use the fully integrated representations to predict the final results in a dynamic-programming mechanism. Furthermore, we construct a fully-annotated dataset AntHighlight to instantiate this task and evaluate the performance of our model. The extensive experiments indicate the effectiveness and validity of our proposed method.
summary: In recent days, streaming technology has greatly promoted the development in the field of livestream. Due to the excessive length of livestream records, it's quite essential to extract highlight segments with the aim of effective reproduction and redistribution. Although there are lots of approaches proven to be effective in the highlight detection for other modals, the challenges existing in livestream processing, such as the extreme durations, large topic shifts, much irrelevant information and so forth, heavily hamper the adaptation and compatibility of these methods. In this paper, we formulate a new task Livestream Highlight Detection, discuss and analyze the difficulties listed above and propose a novel architecture AntPivot to solve this problem. Concretely, we first encode the original data into multiple views and model their temporal relations to capture clues in a hierarchical attention mechanism. Afterwards, we try to convert the detection of highlight clips into the search for optimal decision sequences and use the fully integrated representations to predict the final results in a dynamic-programming mechanism. Furthermore, we construct a fully-annotated dataset AntHighlight to instantiate this task and evaluate the performance of our model. The extensive experiments indicate the effectiveness and validity of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 近来，流媒体技术极大地推动了直播领域的发展。由于直播记录长度过长，提取精彩片段以实现有效再现和重新分发是非常必要的。尽管有很多方法被证明对其他模态的亮点检测有效，但直播处理中存在的挑战，例如极端的持续时间、大的主题转移、大量不相关的信息等等，严重阻碍了这些方法的适应性和兼容性。在本文中，我们制定了一个新的任务“直播亮点检测”，讨论和分析了上述困难，并提出了一种新颖的架构 AntPivot 来解决该问题。具体来说，我们首先将原始数据编码为多个视图，并对它们的时间关系进行建模，以捕获分层注意机制中的线索。之后，我们尝试将对精彩片段的检测转化为对最佳决策序列的搜索，并使用完全集成的表示在动态编程机制中预测最终结果。此外，我们构建了一个完全注释的数据集 AntHighlight 来实例化此任务并评估我们模型的性能。大量的实验表明了我们提出的方法的有效性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AntPivot方法，通过分层注意力机制实现直播高亮片段检测。
AI.motivation: 直播时长过长且包含大量无关信息，现有方法难以适应直播特点，需专门解决方案。
AI.method: 构建多视角编码捕捉时序关系，利用分层注意力机制提取特征，并通过动态规划机制预测高亮片段，同时创建AntHighlight数据集。
AI.result: 实验验证了AntPivot在直播高亮检测任务中的有效性与优越性。
AI.conclusion: AntPivot有效解决了直播高亮检测难题，为后续研究提供了新思路和数据支持。

authors_text: Zihao Zhao,Mengen Luo,Wenbo Ding
title: Deep Leakage from Model in Federated Learning
title_zh: 联邦学习中模型的深度泄漏
abstract: Distributed machine learning has been widely used in recent years to tackle the large and complex dataset problem. Therewith, the security of distributed learning has also drawn increasing attentions from both academia and industry. In this context, federated learning (FL) was developed as a "secure" distributed learning by maintaining private training data locally and only public model gradients are communicated between. However, to date, a variety of gradient leakage attacks have been proposed for this procedure and prove that it is insecure. For instance, a common drawback of these attacks is shared: they require too much auxiliary information such as model weights, optimizers, and some hyperparameters (e.g., learning rate), which are difficult to obtain in real situations. Moreover, many existing algorithms avoid transmitting model gradients in FL and turn to sending model weights, such as FedAvg, but few people consider its security breach. In this paper, we present two novel frameworks to demonstrate that transmitting model weights is also likely to leak private local data of clients, i.e., (DLM and DLM+), under the FL scenario. In addition, a number of experiments are performed to illustrate the effect and generality of our attack frameworks. At the end of this paper, we also introduce two defenses to the proposed attacks and evaluate their protection effects. Comprehensively, the proposed attack and defense schemes can be applied to the general distributed learning scenario as well, just with some appropriate customization.
summary: Distributed machine learning has been widely used in recent years to tackle the large and complex dataset problem. Therewith, the security of distributed learning has also drawn increasing attentions from both academia and industry. In this context, federated learning (FL) was developed as a "secure" distributed learning by maintaining private training data locally and only public model gradients are communicated between. However, to date, a variety of gradient leakage attacks have been proposed for this procedure and prove that it is insecure. For instance, a common drawback of these attacks is shared: they require too much auxiliary information such as model weights, optimizers, and some hyperparameters (e.g., learning rate), which are difficult to obtain in real situations. Moreover, many existing algorithms avoid transmitting model gradients in FL and turn to sending model weights, such as FedAvg, but few people consider its security breach. In this paper, we present two novel frameworks to demonstrate that transmitting model weights is also likely to leak private local data of clients, i.e., (DLM and DLM+), under the FL scenario. In addition, a number of experiments are performed to illustrate the effect and generality of our attack frameworks. At the end of this paper, we also introduce two defenses to the proposed attacks and evaluate their protection effects. Comprehensively, the proposed attack and defense schemes can be applied to the general distributed learning scenario as well, just with some appropriate customization.
abstract_zh: 近年来，分布式机器学习已被广​​泛用于解决大型且复杂的数据集问题。与此同时，分布式学习的安全性也越来越受到学术界和工业界的关注。在这种背景下，联邦学习（FL）被开发为一种“安全”分布式学习，通过在本地维护私有训练数据并且仅在公共模型梯度之间进行通信。然而，迄今为止，已经针对该过程提出了各种梯度泄漏攻击，并证明它是不安全的。例如，这些攻击有一个共同的缺点：它们需要太多的辅助信息，例如模型权重、优化器和一些超参数（例如学习率），而这些信息在实际情况下很难获得。此外，许多现有算法避免在 FL 中传输模型梯度，转而发送模型权重，例如 FedAvg，但很少有人考虑其安全漏洞。在本文中，我们提出了两个新颖的框架来证明在 FL 场景下传输模型权重也可能泄漏客户端的私有本地数据，即（DLM 和 DLM+）。此外，还进行了大量实验来说明我们的攻击框架的效果和通用性。在本文的最后，我们还介绍了针对所提出的攻击的两种防御措施并评估了它们的防护效果。综合而言，所提出的攻击和防御方案也可以应用于一般的分布式学习场景，只需进行一些适当的定制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种新型框架（DLM和DLM+），证明联邦学习中传输模型权重可能导致客户端私有数据泄露，并提出相应防御措施。
AI.motivation: 现有梯度泄露攻击依赖大量辅助信息且难以实际应用，而联邦学习中传输模型权重（如FedAvg）的安全性未被充分研究。
AI.method: 设计DLM和DLM+框架，通过分析传输的模型权重逆向推断客户端私有数据，并进行多组实验验证攻击效果及防御方案有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明两种框架能有效泄露局部数据，提出的防御措施可缓解攻击影响，方法适用于一般分布式学习场景。
AI.conclusion: 传输模型权重存在数据泄露风险，需通过定制化防御方案保障联邦学习安全性，研究为分布式学习安全提供新视角。

Comprehensively, the proposed attack and defense schemes can be applied to the general distributed learning scenario as well, just with some appropriate customization. 近年来，分布式机器学习已被广​​泛用于解决大型且复杂的数据集问题。与此同时，分布式学习的安全性也越来越受到学术界和工业界的关注。在这种背景下，联邦学习（FL）被开发为一种“安全”分布式学习，通过在本地维护私有训练数据并且仅在公共模型梯度之间进行通信。然而，迄今为止，已经针对该过程提出了各种梯度泄漏攻击，并证明它是不安全的。例如，这些攻击有一个共同的缺点：它们需要太多的辅助信息，例如模型权重、优化器和一些超参数（例如学习率），而这些信息在实际情况下很难获得。此外，许多现有算法避免在 FL 中传输模型梯度，转而发送模型权重，例如 FedAvg，但很少有人考虑其安全漏洞。在本文中，我们提出了两个新颖的框架来证明在 FL 场景下传输模型权重也可能泄漏客户端的私有本地数据，即（DLM 和 DLM+）。此外，还进行了大量实验来说明我们的攻击框架的效果和通用性。在本文的最后，我们还介绍了针对所提出的攻击的两种防御措施并评估了它们的防护效果。综合而言，所提出的攻击和防御方案也可以应用于一般的分布式学习场景，只需进行一些适当的定制。 本文提出两种新型框架（DLM和DLM+），证明联邦学习中传输模型权重可能导致客户端私有数据泄露，并提出相应防御措施。 Zihao Zhao,Mengen Luo,Wenbo Ding cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Moses Charikar,Paul Liu,Tianyu Liu,Thuy-Duong Vuong
title: On the Complexity of Sampling Redistricting Plans
title_zh: 论抽样重划计划的复杂性
comment: Correcting the definition of Markov chain to sample from spanning tree distribution
comments: Correcting the definition of Markov chain to sample from spanning tree distribution
abstract: A crucial task in the political redistricting problem is to sample redistricting plans i.e. a partitioning of the graph of census blocks into districts. We show that Recombination [DeFord-Duchin-Solomon'21]-a popular Markov chain to sample redistricting plans-is exponentially slow mixing on simple subgraph of $\mathbb{Z}_2.$ We show an alternative way to sample balance, compact and contiguous redistricting plans using a "relaxed" version of ReCom and rejection sampling.
summary: A crucial task in the political redistricting problem is to sample redistricting plans i.e. a partitioning of the graph of census blocks into districts. We show that Recombination [DeFord-Duchin-Solomon'21]-a popular Markov chain to sample redistricting plans-is exponentially slow mixing on simple subgraph of $\mathbb{Z}_2.$ We show an alternative way to sample balance, compact and contiguous redistricting plans using a "relaxed" version of ReCom and rejection sampling.
abstract_zh: 政治选区重划问题的一项关键任务是对重划区计划进行抽样，即将人口普查区块图划分为区。我们表明，重组 [DeFord-Duchin-Solomon'21]（一种流行的马尔可夫链，用于对重划区计划进行采样）在 $\mathbb{Z}_2.$ 的简单子图上呈指数缓慢混合。我们展示了另一种方法，使用“宽松”版本的 ReCom 和拒绝采样来对平衡、紧凑和连续的重划区计划进行采样。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了红istricting计划采样的复杂性，分析了Recombination马尔可夫链在简单子图上的指数级慢混合问题，并提出了一种改进方法。
AI.motivation: 现有红istricting计划采样方法（如Recombination）在特定图结构上效率低下，导致难以生成符合平衡性、紧凑性和连续性要求的分区方案。
AI.method: 通过改进ReCom算法（放宽约束）结合拒绝采样技术，设计新的采样方法以生成符合要求的红istricting计划。
AI.result: 证明了Recombination在Z₂子图上混合时间指数级增长，新方法能有效生成平衡、紧凑且连续的分区方案。
AI.conclusion: 传统Recombination算法存在效率瓶颈，改进后的采样方法可更高效地生成符合约束的红istricting计划。

authors_text: Nan Luo,Yuanzhang Li,Yajie Wang,Shangbo Wu,Yu-an Tan,Quanxin Zhang
title: Enhancing Clean Label Backdoor Attack with Two-phase Specific Triggers
title_zh: 通过两阶段特定触发器增强清洁标签后门攻击
abstract: Backdoor attacks threaten Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). Towards stealthiness, researchers propose clean-label backdoor attacks, which require the adversaries not to alter the labels of the poisoned training datasets. Clean-label settings make the attack more stealthy due to the correct image-label pairs, but some problems still exist: first, traditional methods for poisoning training data are ineffective; second, traditional triggers are not stealthy which are still perceptible. To solve these problems, we propose a two-phase and image-specific triggers generation method to enhance clean-label backdoor attacks. Our methods are (1) powerful: our triggers can both promote the two phases (i.e., the backdoor implantation and activation phase) in backdoor attacks simultaneously; (2) stealthy: our triggers are generated from each image. They are image-specific instead of fixed triggers. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach can achieve a fantastic attack success rate~(98.98%) with low poisoning rate~(5%), high stealthiness under many evaluation metrics and is resistant to backdoor defense methods.
summary: Backdoor attacks threaten Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). Towards stealthiness, researchers propose clean-label backdoor attacks, which require the adversaries not to alter the labels of the poisoned training datasets. Clean-label settings make the attack more stealthy due to the correct image-label pairs, but some problems still exist: first, traditional methods for poisoning training data are ineffective; second, traditional triggers are not stealthy which are still perceptible. To solve these problems, we propose a two-phase and image-specific triggers generation method to enhance clean-label backdoor attacks. Our methods are (1) powerful: our triggers can both promote the two phases (i.e., the backdoor implantation and activation phase) in backdoor attacks simultaneously; (2) stealthy: our triggers are generated from each image. They are image-specific instead of fixed triggers. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach can achieve a fantastic attack success rate~(98.98%) with low poisoning rate~(5%), high stealthiness under many evaluation metrics and is resistant to backdoor defense methods.
abstract_zh: 后门攻击威胁深度神经网络 (DNN)。为了实现隐秘性，研究人员提出了清洁标签后门攻击，要求对手不要更改中毒训练数据集的标签。由于正确的图像标签对，清洁标签设置使攻击更加隐蔽，但仍然存在一些问题：首先，传统的毒害训练数据的方法无效；其次，传统的触发因素并不隐秘，仍然可以被察觉。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种两阶段且特定于图像的触发器生成方法来增强清洁标签后门攻击。我们的方法是（1）强大：我们的触发器可以同时促进后门攻击的两个阶段（即后门植入和激活阶段）； (2) 隐秘：我们的触发器是从每个图像生成的。它们是特定于图像的而不是固定的触发器。大量的实验表明，我们的方法可以实现出色的攻击成功率〜（98.98％），中毒率较低〜（5％），在许多评估指标下具有较高的隐秘性，并且对后门防御方法具有抵抗力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种增强清洁标签后门攻击的方法，通过生成两阶段特定触发器来提高攻击效果。
AI.motivation: 清洁标签后门攻击虽然具有隐蔽性，但传统方法在数据中毒和触发器设计上仍存在不足，导致攻击效果不佳。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种两阶段且图像特定的触发器生成方法，该方法能够同时促进后门植入和激活阶段，并且触发器是图像特定的，提高了隐蔽性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在低中毒率（5%）下实现了高达98.98%的攻击成功率，并在多个评估指标下表现出高隐蔽性，且能抵抗后门防御方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在清洁标签后门攻击中表现出色，具有较高的攻击成功率和隐蔽性，为相关研究提供了新的思路。

authors_text: Liang Liao,Wenyi Chen,Jing Xiao,Zheng Wang,Chia-Wen Lin,Shin'ichi Satoh
title: Unsupervised Foggy Scene Understanding via Self Spatial-Temporal Label Diffusion
title_zh: 通过自时空标签扩散的无监督雾场景理解
comment: IEEE Transactions on Image Processing 2022
comments: IEEE Transactions on Image Processing 2022
abstract: Understanding foggy image sequence in the driving scenes is critical for autonomous driving, but it remains a challenging task due to the difficulty in collecting and annotating real-world images of adverse weather. Recently, the self-training strategy has been considered a powerful solution for unsupervised domain adaptation, which iteratively adapts the model from the source domain to the target domain by generating target pseudo labels and re-training the model. However, the selection of confident pseudo labels inevitably suffers from the conflict between sparsity and accuracy, both of which will lead to suboptimal models. To tackle this problem, we exploit the characteristics of the foggy image sequence of driving scenes to densify the confident pseudo labels. Specifically, based on the two discoveries of local spatial similarity and adjacent temporal correspondence of the sequential image data, we propose a novel Target-Domain driven pseudo label Diffusion (TDo-Dif) scheme. It employs superpixels and optical flows to identify the spatial similarity and temporal correspondence, respectively and then diffuses the confident but sparse pseudo labels within a superpixel or a temporal corresponding pair linked by the flow. Moreover, to ensure the feature similarity of the diffused pixels, we introduce local spatial similarity loss and temporal contrastive loss in the model re-training stage. Experimental results show that our TDo-Dif scheme helps the adaptive model achieve 51.92% and 53.84% mean intersection-over-union (mIoU) on two publicly available natural foggy datasets (Foggy Zurich and Foggy Driving), which exceeds the state-of-the-art unsupervised domain adaptive semantic segmentation methods. Models and data can be found at https://github.com/velor2012/TDo-Dif.
summary: Understanding foggy image sequence in the driving scenes is critical for autonomous driving, but it remains a challenging task due to the difficulty in collecting and annotating real-world images of adverse weather. Recently, the self-training strategy has been considered a powerful solution for unsupervised domain adaptation, which iteratively adapts the model from the source domain to the target domain by generating target pseudo labels and re-training the model. However, the selection of confident pseudo labels inevitably suffers from the conflict between sparsity and accuracy, both of which will lead to suboptimal models. To tackle this problem, we exploit the characteristics of the foggy image sequence of driving scenes to densify the confident pseudo labels. Specifically, based on the two discoveries of local spatial similarity and adjacent temporal correspondence of the sequential image data, we propose a novel Target-Domain driven pseudo label Diffusion (TDo-Dif) scheme. It employs superpixels and optical flows to identify the spatial similarity and temporal correspondence, respectively and then diffuses the confident but sparse pseudo labels within a superpixel or a temporal corresponding pair linked by the flow. Moreover, to ensure the feature similarity of the diffused pixels, we introduce local spatial similarity loss and temporal contrastive loss in the model re-training stage. Experimental results show that our TDo-Dif scheme helps the adaptive model achieve 51.92% and 53.84% mean intersection-over-union (mIoU) on two publicly available natural foggy datasets (Foggy Zurich and Foggy Driving), which exceeds the state-of-the-art unsupervised domain adaptive semantic segmentation methods. Models and data can be found at https://github.com/velor2012/TDo-Dif.
abstract_zh: 理解驾驶场景中的雾天图像序列对于自动驾驶至关重要，但由于收集和注释恶劣天气的真实图像很困难，这仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。最近，自训练策略被认为是无监督域适应的强大解决方案，它通过生成目标伪标签并重新训练模型，迭代地将模型从源域适应到目标域。然而，置信伪标签的选择不可避免地会遇到稀疏性和准确性之间的冲突，这两者都会导致模型不理想。为了解决这个问题，我们利用驾驶场景的雾图像序列的特征来密集化置信伪标签。具体来说，基于序列图像数据的局部空间相似性和相邻时间对应性的两个发现，我们提出了一种新颖的目标域驱动伪标签扩散（TDo-Dif）方案。它使用超像素和光流分别识别空间相似性和时间对应性，然后在超像素或由流链接的时间对应对内扩散置信但稀疏的伪标签。此外，为了确保扩散像素的特征相似性，我们在模型重新训练阶段引入了局部空间相似性损失和时间对比损失。实验结果表明，我们的 TDo-Dif 方案帮助自适应模型在两个公开的自然雾数据集（Foggy Zurich 和 Foggy Driving）上实现了 51.92% 和 53.84% 的平均交并比（mIoU），这超过了最先进的无监督域自适应语义分割方法。模型和数据可以在 https://github.com/velor2012/TDo-Dif 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督的雾天场景理解方法，通过自适应时空伪标签扩散技术提升自动驾驶中雾天图像序列的语义分割性能。
AI.motivation: 雾天图像序列的语义分割因标注数据稀缺且现有伪标签选择策略存在稀疏性与准确性冲突而面临挑战，亟需更有效的无监督域适应方案。
AI.method: 基于局部空间相似性与相邻时间对应性，提出目标域驱动的伪标签扩散（TDo-Dif）框架，利用超像素与光流技术传播稀疏伪标签，并引入空间相似性损失与时间对比损失优化模型。
AI.result: 在Foggy Zurich和Foggy Driving数据集上分别达到51.92%和53.84%的mIoU，超越现有无监督域适应分割方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过时空信息增强伪标签密度与一致性，所提方法有效提升了雾天场景的语义分割性能，为无监督域适应提供了新思路。
